何より旅先で知り合った相手の素性を根掘り葉掘り探るというのは、あまりいい趣味とは: Above all, prying into the identity of someone you just met while traveling isn't exactly good taste.

重明\n「おっさんはこのペンションの常連客なんですか？」: Shigeaki: “Are you a regular at this pension, old man?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「ああ、そうだね……けどどうしてそう思ったんだい？」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Yes, that’s right... but what made you think that?”
華穂\n「うん……きーくん、どうしてそう思ったの？」: Kaho: “Yeah... Ki-kun, what made you think so?”
重明\n「そんなの、ただの当てずっぽうに決まっている」: Shigeaki: “That was obviously just a lucky guess.”
重明\n「常連じゃなきゃ初めて……つまり確率は１／２だからな」: Shigeaki: “If you’re not a regular, you’re a first-timer... so the odds were 50/50.”
重明\n「ちなみに今日このペンションに居るお客って、俺達の他に居るんですか？」: Shigeaki: “By the way, are there any other guests at this pension today besides us?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「男の客が数名……あとは……学生服を着た若い女の子が一人」: Man Reading Newspaper: “A few male guests... and... one young girl in a school uniform.”
重明\n「なぬ！？ ……制服女子……ちなみに可愛い子ですか？」: Shigeaki: “Say what?! ...A girl in uniform... is she cute, by the way?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「うん、可愛い子だったよ」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Yes, she was quite a cute girl.”
重明\n「よし、華穂……今からその可愛い制服女子を捜しに行こう」: Shigeaki: “Alright, Kaho... let's go find that cute girl in the uniform right now.”
華穂\n「きーくん……それ、恋人を背中から抱きながら言う言葉なわけ？」: Kaho: “Ki-kun... are those really words you should say while holding your girlfriend from behind?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「ははは……キミ達、随分と面白いカップルだね」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Hahaha... you two are quite an amusing couple.”
重明\n「どうも……けど華穂も旅先で偶然一緒になった女の子がどんな子なのか、少し: Shigeaki: “Thanks... but Kaho, you’re at least a little curious about what kind of girl happened to be at the same inn as us, right?”
華穂\n「……まぁ……まるでないわけじゃないけど……」: Kaho: “...Well... I wouldn't say I'm not curious at all...”
見ず知らずのオッサンを含んだ３人で緩い会話をしている最中、何者かがロビーにやって: In the middle of our casual conversation between the three of us—including the stranger—I sensed someone else approaching the lobby and shifted my attention.
そしてそのやってきた人物の姿をこの目で見る為……俺は胸元に抱いた華穂を抱えたまま: To see the newcomer with my own eyes... I spun around while still holding Kaho against my chest...
制服を着た見知らぬ美少女……: A beautiful, unfamiliar girl in a school uniform...
スラッとした体型をしたその少女は、まるで見てはいけないものを見たような面持ちで…: The slender girl was staring intently at us... with a look as if she’d seen something she shouldn't have.
華穂\n「きーくん、この子がそこのおじさんが言ってた女の子かな？」: Kaho: “Ki-kun, is this the girl the gentleman over there was talking about?”
重明\n「多分そうだろうな……何で彼女が俺達を見て、妙なモノを見るような顔をして: Shigeaki: “Probably... though I don’t know why she’s looking at us like we’re some kind of freaks.”
？？？\n「き、きーくん？ ……もしかしてこれが都心でたまに見かけられるっていう: ???: “K-Ki-kun? ...Is this what they call... a ‘lovey-dovey idiot couple’ that you occasionally see in the city? ...It’s my... first time seeing one in person...”
このロビーにカップルと言えば、俺達しかない。: In this lobby, we were the only couple.
そしてこうして人目も気にせずイチャイチャとバックハグをかましている……俺達がバカ: And here we were, flirting shamelessly with a back hug in public... if we weren’t a lovey-dovey idiot couple, what were we?
……だが、俺はあえて自分達がバカップルという自覚がないという体で……背後から抱き: ...But, I chose to act as if I had no idea we were that kind of couple... and spoke to my lover in a feigned, innocent tone while still embracing her from behind.
重明\n「なぁ、華穂……俺達って……バカップルなのか？」: Shigeaki: “Hey, Kaho... are we... a lovey-dovey idiot couple?”
華穂\n「うーん、どうなんだろう……わからないや……」: Kaho: “Hmm, I wonder... I don’t really know...”
察しよくこちらの思惑を理解してくれた恋人のリアクションを聞いたのち、俺はスッと彼: After hearing my lover’s reaction—she’d quickly caught on to my intent—I smoothly moved my right palm in front of her face, holding it vertically as if in prayer.
すると華穂も同様に左手をこちらの右手に重ね合わせ……俺達は互いの手の皺と皺を、ピ: Then Kaho similarly placed her left hand over my right... and we pressed the lines of our palms perfectly together.
？？？\n「え？ 何？ ……これ、今から何が起きるの？ ……手を合わせて……もし: ???: “Eh? What? ...What’s about to happen? ...Joining hands... is it a magic trick?”
華穂\n「手と手を合わせて、幸せ皺合わせ」: Kaho: “Putting our hands together, aligning the lines of happiness.”
重明\n「おい見たか華穂、今の彼女の顔と、迫力ある声……」: Shigeaki: “Hey, Kaho, did you see that? Her face just now, and that powerful voice...”
華穂\n「うんうん、あれこそが真のツッコミってやつだね……きーくんに言われて私が: Kaho: “Yeah, yeah, that was a true ‘straight man’ comeback... It’s completely different from the hasty skills I’ve picked up lately because of Ki-kun... it’s like the work of a master?”
目の前にいる制服少女について、二人で軽く論じたのち……俺達はバカップルの体をやめ: After briefly discussing the girl in the uniform right in front of her... we dropped the act, let go of each other, and took a little distance.
重明\n「どうも、俺は萩原重明……彼女と旅行に来たバカップルの彼氏の方です」: Shigeaki: “Hi, I’m Hagiwara Shigeaki... the boyfriend half of the lovey-dovey couple on a trip.”
華穂\n「こんにちは、私は上乃院華穂……彼氏と旅行に来たバカップルの彼女の方です: Kaho: “Hello, I’m Jounoin Kaho... the girlfriend half of the lovey-dovey couple on a trip.”
？？？\n「いや、別に彼氏彼女の下りをいちいち二人で言わなくたってわかりますから: ???: “No, I can tell you’re boyfriend and girlfriend without both of you saying it one by one.”
華穂\n「……わからないよ……実は二人とも嘘をついていて、本当は私が女装してる、: Kaho: “...You don’t know that... There’s a possibility we’re both lying and I’m actually a guy in drag, the boyfriend half of the couple on a trip.”
重明\n（……この子、ノリいいなぁ……）: Shigeaki: (...This girl is fun to play along with...)
くす葉\n「私は松原くす葉……ちなみにここに来た目的は、旅行とかじゃなく親の仕事: Kusuha: “I’m Matsubara Kusuha... By the way, my reason for being here isn't a trip or anything; it’s for my parents’ work.”
重明\n「……仕事？ このペンションの従業員として働きに来たって事か？」: Shigeaki: “...Work? Does that mean you’re here to work as an employee of this pension?”
くす葉\n「ううん、違う違う……このペンションに来る人と待ち合わせてるって事」: Kusuha: “No, no, that’s not it... I’m here to meet someone who’s coming to this pension.”
華穂\n「ねぇ、くす葉ちゃんっていってもいい？」: Kaho: “Hey, can I call you Kusuha-chan?”
くす葉\n「いいですよ、私は華穂さんって呼びますね」: Kusuha: “Sure, and I’ll call you Kaho-san.”
華穂\n「はーい、くす葉ちゃんって制服着てるし、学生さんなの？」: Kaho: “Okay. Kusuha-chan, you’re wearing a uniform, so are you a student?”
くす葉\n「そう学生、でも今年卒業です」: Kusuha: “Yeah, a student, but I graduate this year.”
華穂\n「そっか……卒業してすぐ親の仕事を手伝うなんて、若いのに偉いね」: Kaho: “I see... helping with your parents’ work right after graduation, you’re very responsible for someone so young.”
くす葉\n「まぁ……ちょっとワケありで……即働く事になってしまいました」: Kusuha: “Well... there were some circumstances... so I ended up having to work right away.”
華穂\n「ところでその制服なんだけど……このペンション白花荘が寮だった時の制服だ: Kaho: “By the way, that uniform... it’s the one from when this Pension Hakka-sou was a dormitory, right?”
くす葉\n「そうなの？ ……へぇ……知らなかった……」: Kusuha: “Is it? ...Heh... I didn't know that...”
くす葉\n「これは私の近所に住んでる親戚のお姉さんが学生時代に着てたヤツなんだけ: Kusuha: “This is something an older girl in my neighborhood gave me because she wore it when she was a student and doesn't need it anymore, so she said I could use it as formal wear... It’s simple, but pretty cute, right?”
華穂\n「うんうん……ちなみに私、昔その制服着てたよ」: Kaho: “Yeah, definitely... by the way, I used to wear that uniform too.”
くす葉\n「そうなんですか？ つまり華穂さんも、ここが廃校になる前の卒業生？」: Kusuha: “Really? So you’re an alumna from before the school closed, Kaho-san?”
目の前でくす葉が着ている制服を、昔の華穂が着ていた……: Kaho used to wear the same uniform Kusuha was wearing right in front of us...
その当時を脳裏に軽く思い浮かべてみたものの……華穂のあの大きな乳房が、どう考えて: I tried to picture Kaho from that time in my head... but no matter how I thought about it, I couldn’t imagine those massive breasts of hers fitting into this uniform.
重明\n「お前のおっぱい、この制服に入りきるのか？ ……どう見ても厳しい気がする: Shigeaki: “Did your tits actually fit in that uniform? ...No matter how I look at it, it seems like a stretch.”
華穂\n「……さすがにこの服着てた時は……今ほど大きくなかったよ？」: Kaho: “...I obviously wasn't as big as I am now back when I wore this...”
重明\n「ほう……ちなみに卒業した時のカップはいくつだったんだ？」: Shigeaki: “I see... by the way, what was your cup size when you graduated?”
くす葉\n「昔でＧ……て事は今は……その……失礼ですけど、今のサイズはいくつなん: Kusuha: “A ‘G’ back then... which means now... um... excuse me, but what is your current size?”
くす葉\n「……ア、アイ……９６……ナンデスカ、ソレハ……」: Kusuha: “...I... I-cup... 96... What on earth is that...”
華穂\n「あはは……おっきいよね～自分でもそう思う」: Kaho: “Ahahaha... they’re big, aren't they~ Even I think so.”
自分でも持て余すと言った感じで、華穂はジャケットの内側にある乳房を片手でユサユサ: As if finding them a handful herself, Kaho used one hand to jiggle her breasts under her jacket.
その胸が動く様は……まるで乳房が揺れるというより、外洋の海面が揺れ動くようなスケ: The way they moved... it felt less like breasts swaying and more like something on a grander scale, like the surface of the open ocean shifting...
くす葉\n「うは……何、この揺れ具合……迫力が凄い……凄すぎなんですけど……」: Kusuha: “Uwah... what is that jiggle... the impact is incredible... it’s just too much...”
くす葉\n「……ちなみに華穂さんの……その有り得ないぐらいキラキラ光ってる髪って: Kusuha: “...By the way, Kaho-san... that impossibly shiny hair of yours, is it natural? ...Also, I don’t think I’m imagining it, but your eyes look blue.”
華穂\n「うん地毛、私のお母さんフランス人なの」: Kaho: “Yeah, it’s natural. My mother is French.”
くす葉\n「ぬは……このスタイルで美人……地毛が金髪の異人さん……チートだ……チ: Kusuha: “Nuwaa... this kind of figure and a beauty... natural blonde hair and a foreigner... that’s a cheat... that’s way too much of a cheat code...”
くす葉\n「こほん……ちょっと失礼して……ジロジロ見させてもらいますね」: Kusuha: “*Ahem*... excuse me... I’m going to take a good, long look.”
華穂に少し頭を下げたくす葉は、華穂の顔や身体をジロジロと見回し始める。: Kusuha gave a small bow to Kaho and began to stare intently at Kaho’s face and body.
同性とはいえ、人にジロジロと容姿やスタイルを見られるのは、普通なら嫌がるだろう。: Normally, someone would hate being stared at like that, even by another girl.
だが、華穂は無遠慮に自分を見回すくす葉を咎める事もなく、ニコニコと笑みを浮かべて: But Kaho didn't rebuke Kusuha for her unabashed staring; she just kept a gentle smile on her face.
この堂々とした態度も……上乃院華穂という女の価値を演出する一つなのかもしれない。: This dignified attitude... might be another part of what makes Jounoin Kaho so valuable.
くす葉\n「……足なが……って、このコルクのミュール可愛い……どこのメーカーだろ: Kusuha: “...Her legs are so long... wait, these cork mules are so cute... I wonder what brand they are.”
華穂\n「うん？ ミュールのメーカー？ ＰＲＡ●●だけど」: Kaho: “Hm? The brand of the mules? They’re PRA●●.”
華穂\n「これは軽くて穿きやすいし、足も疲れないからお勧めだよ～」: Kaho: “These are light and easy to wear, and your feet don’t get tired, so I recommend them~”
重明\n「いや華穂……そんな運動靴みたいに薦められても、一般人には気軽に買える代: Shigeaki: “Hey Kaho... even if you recommend them like they’re sneakers, they’re not exactly something a regular person can just buy on a whim...”
華穂\n「けど安い運動靴と違って長く使えて、ガタが来ても修理出来るし……結果的に: Kaho: “But unlike cheap sneakers, they last a long time, and you can get them repaired if they wear out... so in the end, I don’t think there’s that much of a difference.”
重明\n「言いたい事は良くわかるが、たしかお前のミュールって……ウン万どころかあ: Shigeaki: “I get what you’re saying, but if I remember correctly, those mules of yours... they didn't just cost tens of thousands; you needed another zero at the end, right?”
くす葉\n「何なんですか貴方の彼女……髪どころか肌すらキラキラしてるし、何だかい: Kusuha: “What is your girlfriend... not just her hair, but even her skin is glowing, and she smells so good... is she really human? Is she actually an alien or something?”
重明\n「俺的には別に宇宙人でもいいんだけど……華穂は正真正銘、普通の人より美し: Shigeaki: “Personally, I wouldn't mind if she were an alien... but Kaho is a genuine inhabitant of Earth... she just happens to be way more beautiful than average... apparently.”
くす葉\n「私も見た目じゃ結構イケてる自信あったのに……これがワールドクラスの美: Kusuha: “I was pretty confident in my own looks... but this is a world-class beauty... the world is incredible...”
くす葉\n「ああ……もしかして、黒船来航の時に日本人が感じたショックって……こん: Kusuha: “Ahh... I wonder if this is the kind of shock the Japanese felt when the Black Ships arrived...”
華穂\n「くす葉ちゃんって……何だか面白い子だね」: Kaho: “Kusuha-chan... is a pretty funny girl.”
重明\n「ああ面白いヤツだな……そして多分、こいつアホの子だぞ……そんな匂いがす: Shigeaki: “Yeah, she’s amusing... and she’s probably a bit of an airhead... I can smell it on her.”
くす葉\n「お察しの通り勉強はあまりできませんよ、悪かったですね……つか、アホの: Kusuha: “As you’ve guessed, I’m not very good at studying, so sorry about that... wait, what does an airhead smell like?!”
重明\n「俺も勉強は出来ない、つまり同属の匂いを感じたってやつだ」: Shigeaki: “I’m not good at studying either, so basically I smelled a kindred spirit.”
くす葉\n「ああ……うん、重明さんって結構顔はイケてるけど……何か馬鹿っぽいよね: Kusuha: “Ahh... yeah, Shigeaki-san, you’ve got a pretty decent face... but you do seem kind of stupid.”
華穂\n「ちなみに私は勉強得意だよ、大体成績は一番だし」: Kaho: “By the way, I’m good at studying. I’m usually top of the class.”
重明\n「落ち着けくす葉……華穂は人類だけど別次元の人間なんだ……無理に自分と比: Shigeaki: “Calm down, Kusuha... Kaho is human, but she’s from another dimension... don’t try to compare yourself to her, just give up and accept that she’s just like that.”
くす葉\n「はあはあ……う、うん……わかった……」: Kusuha: “*Pant, pant*... y-yeah... I got it...”
重明\n「……しかし山奥のペンションで制服を着た若い女の子が、オッサンと待ち合わ: Shigeaki: “...But a young girl in a uniform waiting to meet an old man at a pension deep in the mountains... is your job something shady, by any chance?”
軽く下種な想像をしたが、このご時勢、別にありえない話でもない。: I made a slightly sleazy guess, but in this day and age, it wasn’t impossible.
くす葉\n「いやいや、んなわけないっつーの……うちの親が紹介してくれた仕事なわけ: Kusuha: “No, no, no way... my parents were the ones who introduced me to this job.”
くす葉\n「確かに制服でオッサンと会うって部分だけだといかがわしい感じだけど……: Kusuha: “It’s true that meeting an old man in a uniform sounds shady... but it’s my first job, so maybe it’s a substitute for formal wear?”
重明\n「それなら……別にその制服じゃなく、お前が在学中の学校の制服でもいいんじ: Shigeaki: “In that case... wouldn't the uniform of the school you’re currently attending have been fine too?”
くす葉\n「あればそうしたんだけど……私の通ってた学校、制服ってないんだよね……: Kusuha: “I would’ve used that if I had one... but my school doesn't have uniforms... and it was a very sudden talk, so there wasn't time to get new clothes.”
重明\n「なるほど……それで急遽、着ていくには丁度いい親戚の人に貰っていたお下が: Shigeaki: “I see... so this hand-me-down uniform from a relative that was perfect for the occasion suddenly got its time to shine.”
華穂\n「仕事で来たって事は……もしかして、今も忙しいのかな？」: Kaho: “Since you’re here for work... does that mean you’re busy right now?”
くす葉\n「ううん、さっきクライアントさんから電話があってペンションに到着するの: Kusuha: “No, my client called earlier and said they wouldn't arrive at the pension until tonight... so I was just wandering around because I’m bored.”
華穂\n「じゃあそれまで……このまま私達とお喋りする？」: Kaho: “In that case... do you want to keep chatting with us until then?”
くす葉\n「お邪魔でなければ」: Kusuha: “If I’m not in the way.”
くす葉\n「……まあ、ラブラブすぎて……邪魔なんて出来そうもありませんが……」: Kusuha: “...Well, you two are so lovey-dovey... I feel like I might be in the way regardless...”
重明\n「よし……じゃあ旅は道連れって事で……早速親睦でも深めてみるか」: Shigeaki: “Alright... since we’re traveling together, let’s go ahead and deepen our friendship.”
華穂\n「きーくん、何をしてくす葉ちゃんとの親睦を深めるの？」: Kaho: “Ki-kun, what are you going to do to deepen our friendship with Kusuha-chan?”
親睦を深めるため、ご飯を食べる: To deepen the friendship, we'll eat a meal
親睦を深めるため、一緒にお風呂に入る: To deepen the friendship, we'll take a bath together
重明\n「じゃあ、時間的には少し早い感じだけど、ご飯でも食べようか……くす葉は大: Shigeaki: “Well, it’s a bit early, but should we grab some food? Kusuha, is that okay with you?”
重明\n「じゃあ、時間的には少し早い感じだけど、風呂にでも入ろうか……くす葉は大: Shigeaki: “Well, it’s a bit early, but should we take a bath? Kusuha, is that okay with you?”
重明\n「いや、勘違いするな……一緒に入るって言っても、ただ同タイミングで風呂に: Shigeaki: “No, don’t misunderstand... when I say ‘together,’ I just mean going to the baths at the same time.”
くす葉\n「ああ……けどそれだと、親睦を深めようにも、重明さんとは会話出来ないじ: Kusuha: “Ahh... but if we do that, even if we want to deepen our friendship, I won't be able to talk with you, Shigeaki-san.”
重明\n「多分真ん中に敷居があるぐらいで、声ぐらいなら余裕で届くんじゃないか？」: Shigeaki: “There’s probably just a partition in the middle, so our voices should carry easily enough, right?”
完全に別にするとコストやらメンテナンスが単純に倍になるという理由もあってか、大抵: Maybe because doubling the cost and maintenance is a pain, in most inns, the men’s and women’s baths are often connected by just a single wall.
……恐らくその例外に漏れず、このペンションのお風呂も男女で繋がっているに違いない: ...And most likely, the baths in this pension are connected between genders without exception.
重明\n「まぁ最悪会話も出来ないようなら……俺の事は切り捨てていいから、お前ら二: Shigeaki: “Well, if we really can't talk... you can just ignore me and you two can deepen your friendship on your own.”
くす葉\n「おっけ……じゃあ準備してくるから、お風呂場で」: Kusuha: “Okay... then I’ll go get ready, see you at the baths.”
くす葉が去った後……俺は先ほど途中で会話を止め放置してしまっていたおっさんに近づ: After Kusuha left... I approached the old man I’d left mid-conversation earlier and spoke to him.
重明\n「つーことで俺ら、ちょっとお風呂に入ってきます」: Shigeaki: “And with that, we’re going to hit the baths for a bit.”

……メニューの近くに置いてあった呼び出しブザーを押すと、カウンターの奥に引っ込ん: ...When I pressed the call buzzer near the menu, Fujiko-san appeared from behind the counter.

重明\n「はい……じゃあ、この本日のオススメを３つください」: Shigeaki: “Yes... well then, please give us three of ‘Today’s Recommendation’.”

くす葉\n「じゃあ遠慮なく……本日のオススメで」: Kusuha: “Then I won’t hold back... I’ll take Today’s Recommendation.”

くす葉\n「……華穂さんは選ばなくて良かったんですか？ ……まぁ選ぶとはいっても: Kusuha: “...Kaho-san, were you okay with not choosing? ...Well, even if you did choose, the other menu items are pretty ordinary... so I guess it would’ve ended up being Today’s Recommendation anyway.”

重明\n「華穂は他の事は何でも即決即断なんだが……何故か食べ物に関しては、とこと: Shigeaki: “Kaho is decisive about everything else, but for some reason she has absolutely zero interest in food... she’s hopeless.”
年上なのに甘えん坊ではあるものの……華穂は何でも彼氏に決めてもらうような、相手に: She acts spoiled even though she’s older... but Kaho isn't the type of woman to depend on her partner for everything.
洋服選びで時間をかけた事はないし、デートする場所も自分でいう事が多い……今回の旅: She never takes time choosing clothes, and she’s usually the one to say where she wants to go on dates... even this destination was Kaho’s choice.
重明\n「ああ、悩んで時間食うわりに毎回偏ったものばっかり頼んで……しかも高確率: Shigeaki: “Yeah, despite spending time agonizing over it, she always orders something biased... and high probability she’ll say it’s mediocre and leave some, then try to make up the difference with supplements.”

他人から見たら変な関係らしいが、俺は別に気にしていないし、華穂も受け入れてくれて: Apparently it seems like a strange relationship to others, but I don’t particularly mind, and Kaho has accepted it.

重明\n「華穂……お前、それ一応俺の事を褒めてるつもりなのか？」: Shigeaki: “Kaho... was that supposed to be a compliment?”
華穂\n「うんうん……私にとって、きーくんは世界最高の彼氏だよ♪」: Kaho: “Yeah, yeah... for me, Ki-kun is the best boyfriend in the world♪”
くす葉\n「……あーはいはい……これから食事だっていうのに……ごちそうさまごちそ: Kusuha: “...Ah, yeah, yeah... even though we’re about to eat... thanks for the show, thanks for the show...”
くす葉の前で軽く華穂とイチャついたのち、俺達は誰も居ない談話室のテーブルの一つを: After a bit of light flirting with Kaho in front of Kusuha, we took over one of the tables in the empty lounge and all sat down.

女は恋バナが好き……どうやらこの法則は、目の前の制服少女にも当てはまるようだ。: Women love love stories... and apparently that rule applied to the girl in uniform before me as well.

重明\n「……小奇麗な野良犬か……俺への第一印象って、思いのほか最初から好印象だ: Shigeaki: “...A tidy stray dog, huh... so your first impression of me was actually positive from the start.”

もし今の雰囲気を継続させたいのなら……ここは積極的に自分から何らかの話題を振るべ: If I wanted to keep the current atmosphere going... I should actively bring up some kind of topic myself.

このまま食事に集中する: Focus on the meal like this

偶然テーブルの下にスプーンが落ちる: A spoon happens to fall under the table
重明\n「こっちの話は大体したわけだが……くす葉、お前には俺達みたいな恋愛のエピ: Shigeaki: “Well, I've told most of my stories... Kusuha, don't you have any romantic episodes like ours?”

だがこういう類の女は、ガードを固めた分だけ男慣れしておらず……心の柔らかい部分に: But women of this sort are often inexperienced with men precisely because they keep their guard so high... Once you get into the soft part of their heart, they can be surprisingly easy to conquer.
俺なら精々２週間もあればいける自信がある……そう思えるからこそ、今までくす葉を落: If it were me, I'm confident I could do it in two weeks at most... It's because I feel that way that I can't help but find the guys who couldn't take Kusuha down until now pathetic.
くす葉\n「けど……さすがにこの歳になってまだ処女ってのは……ちょっと恥ずかしい: Kusuha: “But... as expected, being a virgin still at this age is... a little embarrassing, you know...”

最初に浴槽へダイブした時と同じように、くす葉を両手で抱え上げていく。: Just like when we first dived into the tub, I lifted Kusuha with both hands.
そして言われるがまま俺の首に両腕を回してきたくす葉をしっかりと抱え直した所で……: And just as she was told, Kusuha wrapped both arms around my neck, and just as I was readjusting my hold on her... the old guy, who had been silent until now, finally opened his mouth.
太ったオッサン\n「……ククッ……お嬢さん、ふらふらしてますけど……大丈夫ですか: Fat Old Guy: “...Kuku... young lady, you're looking a bit wobbly... are you okay?”
初めて聞くオッサンの声……まるで耳元に直接吹きかけられたように響く低音の声色が、: The old guy's voice, heard for the first time... the low-pitched tone echoed as if whispered directly into my ear, strangely disgusting.
重明\n（……まぁオッサンの声なんてどうでもいい……さっさとここを出ないと……）: Shigeaki: (...Well, I don't give a damn about the old guy's voice... I have to leave here quickly...)
重明\n「この子、のぼせちゃったみたいですけど俺が居るんで大丈夫そうです……先に: Shigeaki: “It looks like this girl got a bit lightheaded, but she'll be fine since I'm here... we'll be heading out first.”
丁寧に言ったが、要するに関わるなという意図を込めて言ったつもりだ。: I said it politely, but I meant to imply (don't get involved).
もしここでオッサンが悪乗りしてこちらに絡んでくるようであれば……二人の女連れとは: If the old guy tried to pester us further... even with two women in tow, I didn't intend to stay quiet any longer.
太ったオッサン\n「そうですか……くくっ……」: Fat Old Guy: “Is that so... kuku...”
こちらの意を察してか、元々無関心なのか……オッサンは座ったまま抱えているくす葉の: Whether he sensed my intent or was just indifferent from the start... the old guy just sat there and stared at the naked body of the Kusuha I was holding... and showed no sign of doing anything more.
オッサンの動向を見て、取り敢えずは無害と判断した後、俺は傍にいた恋人の華穂に声を: After judging the old guy to be harmless for now after seeing his movements, I spoke to my lover Kaho who was nearby.
華穂\n「……わりと平気、先に上がってるね」: Kaho: “...I'm relatively fine, I'll head out first.”
重明\n「タオルの準備とか頼む」: Shigeaki: “I'll leave the towels and stuff to you.”
言葉を交わし終えると、華穂はその美しい裸身を晒したままオッサンの横を堂々と横切っ: After exchanging those words, Kaho walked boldly past the old guy while exposing her beautiful naked body.
颯爽と歩く華穂の後に続き、くす葉を落とさぬよう慎重に湯船を突き進むと……俺はこの: Following Kaho as she walked briskly, I moved carefully through the tub so as not to drop Kusuha... and then I stepped from that obscene place into the changing room...
浴室から脱衣所へと移動し安心して泣き出したくす葉を、華穂と共に慰めた後……俺達は: After moving from the bathroom to the changing room and comforting Kusuha, who started crying in relief, together with Kaho... we made our way into the hallway.
くす葉\n「……落ち着くまで……二人して優しく抱きしめてくれて……本当にありがと: Kusuha: “...Thank you so much... for both of you holding me so gently... until I calmed down...”
重明\n「まぁあれだ……難しいかもしれないけど……あまり気にするな」: Shigeaki: “Well... it might be hard, but... don't let it get to you too much.”
重明\n「オッサンが来た時点で、さっさと俺がお前を連れ出せばよかったんだけど……: Shigeaki: “I should have taken you out as soon as that old guy came... but I was surprised by the situation and my decision was delayed... I'm sorry, both of you.”
くす葉\n「ううん……重明さんは悪くないよ……」: Kusuha: “No... it's not your fault, Shigeaki-san...”
くす葉\n「それに二人が居なかったら……多分、湯船から出れなかったと思うし……」: Kusuha: “Besides, if you two hadn't been there... I probably wouldn't have been able to get out of the tub...”
華穂\n「でもホントビックリしたね……何事かと思ったよ～」: Kaho: “But it was really a shock. I wondered what was going on~”
くす葉\n「そうですね……ほんと何なんですかね……最悪……」: Kusuha: “That's true... seriously, what was that... the worst...”
重明\n「……けどな、くす葉……あんな事があったからって、全ての男が汚いって思い: Shigeaki: “...But listen, Kusuha... just because that happened, don't go thinking all men are dirty and become passive toward sex, okay? ...That is that, sex is sex.”
くす葉\n「……心配してくれてありがとうございます……けど……多分それは……大丈: Kusuha: “...Thank you for worrying about me... but... I think I'm probably fine with that.”
くす葉\n「……お風呂場から連れ出されて、脱衣所でも裸のまま重明さんに抱かれてる: Kusuha: “...Even after being taken out of the bathroom and being held naked by Shigeaki-san in the changing room... it didn't feel bad at all the whole time.”
くす葉\n「あと、その……抱かれてる最中……重明さんのもの……ずっと私の身体にし: Kusuha: “Also, um... while I was being held... Shigeaki-san's thing... was hitting my body firmly the whole time...”
重明\n（という事は……さっきの件でくす葉が男嫌いになったって事はなさそうだな…: Shigeaki: (Which means... it doesn't look like Kusuha became a man-hater because of that incident... good, good)
華穂\n「話は変わるんだけど……桔梗ちゃん、あんな事しそうな子じゃないのに……ど: Kaho: “On another note... Kikyou-chan didn't seem like the type of girl to do something like that... I wonder why she was doing that earlier?”
俺にも桔梗があのオッサンと淫らな事をする理由が思いつかない。: I couldn't think of a reason why Kikyou would do something so lewd with that old guy either.
愛し合っているようには見えなかったし、脅され無理やり身体を売るような悲壮感も、一: It didn't look like they loved each other, and I couldn't feel any sense of tragedy like she was being threatened or forced to sell her body.
重明\n（好きあってるわけでもなく、嫌がっているわけでもない……それなのに何で桔: Shigeaki: (They don't love each other, and she doesn't seem to hate it... so why was Kikyou-chan... doing that?)
重明\n「さぁな……今日知り合ったばかりで会話もまだロクにしていない相手の込み入: Shigeaki: “Who knows... there's no way we'd understand the complicated circumstances of someone we just met today and haven't even had a proper conversation with.”
重明\n「よし、じゃあ気を取り直して……美味いモノでも食いに行こうぜ！」: Shigeaki: “Alright, then let's change our mood... let's go eat something delicious!”
華穂\n「おっけー♪ ……くす葉ちゃん、お風呂上りのアイス食べる？ 私、奢ってあ: Kaho: “Okay♪ ...Kusuha-chan, want some ice cream after the bath? I'll treat you.”
くす葉\n「ありがとうございます……私、バニラかチョコミントがいいです」: Kusuha: “Thank you... I'd like vanilla or chocolate mint.”
重明\n「くす葉、今から決めず遠慮なく一番高いのを頼めよ？ 華穂にとって１０００: Shigeaki: “Kusuha, don't decide now, just order the most expensive one without hesitation, okay? To Kaho, 1000 yen is like pocket change.”
華穂\n「そうそう、全然遠慮しなくていいからね？」: Kaho: “That's right, you don't have to hold back at all, okay?”
甘く美味しいものを食べ楽しい会話をすれば、先ほどくす葉が体験した嫌な記憶も少しは: If we eat something sweet and delicious and have a fun conversation, the bad memory Kusuha experienced earlier will surely fade a little.
そんな思いを胸に……俺達は３人仲良く、談話室へと移動したのだった……: With that thought in our hearts... the three of us moved harmoniously to the lounge...
早めの夕食の後……俺達は特に移動もせず、同じ場所でダラダラとした感じの雑談を小一: After an early dinner... we didn't move much, and spent about an hour chatting idly in the same place.
風呂場でのちょっとした事件の後……: After the little incident in the bathroom...
俺達３人は談話室で休憩ついでに夕食まで済ませ、そのままダラダラと雑談を続けていた: The three of us had stayed in the lounge for a break and finished dinner there, and then continued our idle chatter.
くす葉の人懐っこい人柄もあってか、知らない人間が見たら旧知の仲なのだろうと勘違い: Perhaps because of Kusuha's friendly personality, if a stranger saw us they'd probably mistake us for old friends... the three of us had opened up to each other that much.
きっとこのペンションを出た後も、俺達は仲のいい関係を続けていくのだろう……: I’m sure we’ll continue to have a good relationship even after we leave this pension...
和気藹々と雑談を交わしながら先の未来の事を漠然と考えていた所……楽しげに話してい: While thinking vaguely about the future as we chatted harmoniously... a man approached our table where we were talking merrily.
真面目そうなオッサン\n「こんにちは……そちらの制服を着ている方は、もしや松原く: Serious-looking Old Man: “Hello... by any chance, is the person wearing that uniform Matsubara Kusuha-san?”
返事と共に席を立ったくす葉は、やってきた顔の印象が薄いオッサンと少し硬い感じの会: Standing up with her reply, Kusuha began a somewhat stiff conversation with the old man who arrived, who had a thin facial impression.
……真面目な雰囲気から察するに……どうやらこの真面目そうなオッサンが、くす葉がペ: ...Judging from the serious atmosphere... apparently this serious-looking old guy is the client who requested the work that brought Kusuha to the pension.
くす葉\n「重明さん、華穂さん……私、今から仕事の話をしなければならなくなったの: Kusuha: “Shigeaki-san, Kaho-san... I have to talk about work now, so I'll take my leave here.”
華穂\n「くす葉ちゃん、お仕事の話が終わったらメールしてもらえる？ また一緒にお: Kaho: “Kusuha-chan, once you're done with your work talk, can you email me? Let's chat again.”
くす葉\n「はい、よろこんで……では、失礼します」: Kusuha: “Yes, with pleasure... then, excuse me.”
やってきたばかりの真面目そうなオッサンと共に立ち去っていくくす葉。: Kusuha left with the serious-looking old guy who had just arrived.
くす葉が居なくなった結果……談話室には俺と華穂の二人だけが残る形となった。: As a result of Kusuha leaving... only Kaho and I were left in the lounge.
二人きりで居るには、談話室は少々広すぎる。: For just the two of us, the lounge was a bit too spacious.
そんな俺と同じような感覚になったのだろう……華穂は何となく感じるこの場への居心地: Perhaps having a similar feeling to mine... Kaho shifted her face toward the window to escape the slight awkwardness of the place.
華穂\n「あれ……きーくん……雪……降ってるかも……」: Kaho: “Oh... Ki-kun... it might be snowing...”
重明\n「え……雪？ だって今３月だぞ？」: Shigeaki: “Eh... snow? But it’s March now, isn't it?”
華穂\n「でも降ってる……ほら、外見て」: Kaho: “But it’s falling... look, look outside.”
窓の外に広がる暗闇の中……大粒の雪が止め処なく暗闇の空から降り注いでくる。: In the darkness outside the window... large snowflakes were falling incessantly from the dark sky.
華穂\n「ニュースで今夜から明日にかけて強い寒波がくるって言ってたけど……まさが: Kaho: “The news said a strong cold wave was coming from tonight to tomorrow... but I never thought it would snow...”
雪のせいか、部屋の温度が急に下がってきた気がする。: Maybe because of the snow, I feel like the room temperature has suddenly dropped.
軽い尿意にも似たムズムズとする寒気を感じ、俺は椅子を引きスッと立ち上がった。: Feeling a tingling chill similar to a slight urge to urinate, I pulled back my chair and stood up.
重明\n「何か寒くなってきたし……とりあえず部屋に戻るか」: Shigeaki: “It’s getting a bit cold... let's head back to the room for now.”
ロビーにある階段を上がり自室へと歩いていた所……前方から見た事のない男が歩いてき: While walking up the stairs in the lobby toward my room... a man I'd never seen before came walking from ahead.
尚人\n「やぁ華穂くん、随分と綺麗になったね……元気だったかい？」: Naoto: “Hey, Kaho-kun, you've become quite beautiful... have you been well?”
開口一番女の容姿を褒める野郎は、十中八九相手にスケベな事を目論んでいると思って間: I'm pretty sure that a guy who praises a woman's appearance as his first words is ten to one planning something lewd.
しかも華穂は誰もが認める絶世の美女で、奇跡のようなスタイルの持ち主。: Moreover, Kaho is a peerless beauty whom everyone recognizes, and the owner of a miraculous style.
この魅力的な外見に釣られ、飢えた雄たちが交尾目的に寄ってくる事など……華穂にとっ: Lured by this attractive appearance, it’s a daily occurrence for hungry males to approach her for mating purposes... for Kaho, that is.
重明\n（今回は元教師か……スーツ姿は中々様になってるし、整った顔立ちをしてるけ: Shigeaki: (A former teacher this time... his suit fits him quite well, and he has refined features... but he's a guy with a strangely weak facial impression...)
だが何にしろ、俺という恋人が居る以上……華穂にどうアタックしようが無駄な事。: But at any rate, since she has a lover like me... it’s useless no matter how he tries to hit on Kaho.
重明\n（フッ……そんな特徴のない顔立ちで華穂を狙うなんぞ片腹痛い……せめて派手: Shigeaki: (Hmph... it’s pathetic for you to aim for Kaho with such an unremarkable face... go back and study how to use makeup so you look flashy at least, before coming back)
華穂\n「はい、元気でした……先生の方もお変わりない様子で」: Kaho: “Yes, I've been well... You seem unchanged as well, Sensei.”
重明\n「……先生って事は……廃校になったこの学校の元教師って事か？」: Shigeaki: “...If he's (Sensei), that means he's a former teacher of this school that closed down?”
華穂\n「うんうん……尚人先生はね、若くてイケメンでクールなのに優しいって評判で: Kaho: “Yeah, yeah... Naoto-sensei, you know, had a reputation for being young, handsome, cool, and yet kind... he was a teacher who was really popular among us students.”
華穂はあまり他人を外見で判断するタイプの女ではない……しかも俺の前で他の男の外見: Kaho isn't the type of woman who judges others by their appearance much... moreover, this is the first time she's praised another man's appearance in front of me.
だが、今のはあくまで“生徒達の中では評判だった”と言う一般論に過ぎない。: But that was just a general statement that (he was popular among the students).
……別に華穂自身が、この野郎を気に入っているという話ではないのだ。: ...It’s not like Kaho herself particularly likes this bastard.
尚人\n「はは、照れるな……事実、その通りではあったんだけどね」: Naoto: “Haha, you flatter me... though in fact, it was exactly as you say.”
重明\n（……おいこのスカシ野郎……普通ならそこは【そんな事はない】と謙遜すべき: Shigeaki: (...Hey, this fancy bastard... shouldn't he normally be humble and say (that's not true)?)
華穂\n「先生は、また何故この白花荘へ？ 旅行ですか？」: Kaho: “Why have you come to Hakukaso again, Sensei? For a trip?”
重明\n（……本当はその軽口が原因で仕事をクビになって、傷心旅行とかなんじゃねー: Shigeaki: (...Isn't it actually that you got fired because of that big mouth of yours and you're on a journey to heal your broken heart?)
ふと憎まれ口を叩きそうになったものの……華穂の昔の知り合いに喧嘩を売り印象を悪く: I almost let a hateful remark slip... but there's no merit in picking a fight with Kaho's old acquaintance and making a bad impression.
タダでさえナンパが趣味だった昔の素行のせいで、お嬢様な華穂とＤＱＮな俺は全然釣り: Even without that, because of my past behavior where my hobby was hitting on girls, it’s often said that a lady like Kaho and a delinquent like me are completely mismatched.
ここは華穂に相応しい男として……大人しくニコニコと無害な好青年っぷりをアピールし: As a man worthy of Kaho... I'll just stay quiet and smile to appeal my harmlessness as a good young man.
尚人\n「華穂くん、一緒に居るそこのニヤケ顔が不気味な男はいったい……もしかして: Naoto: “Kaho-kun, the man with the creepy smirk over there... is he by any chance one of your worshippers or something?”
こちらの不穏な空気を察したのか、華穂がスッと尚人との間に入り、俺の暴走を抑制する: Perhaps sensing the ominous atmosphere here, Kaho stepped between me and Naoto, showing a move to suppress my rampage.
重明\n（……わかってるよ、華穂……俺ももう大人なんだし……腹が立ったからってＤ: Shigeaki: (...I know, Kaho... I'm an adult too... just because I got angry doesn't mean I'll suddenly kick or punch him like a delinquent...)
尚人\n「へぇ……こんなチンピラがキミの恋人……ハイソな華穂くんとでは、とても釣: Naoto: “Heh... a punk like this is your lover... you're so high-class, Kaho-kun, it looks like you're completely mismatched... is that really true?”
恋人の手前、荒事にはしたくないと思っていたのだが……どうやら相手の方が揉め事を求: For my lover's sake, I didn't want to make it a rough affair... but apparently the other party is seeking trouble.
それに余り大人しくし過ぎてナメられてしまうと、華穂にチョッカイをかけやすいと野郎: Besides, if I'm too quiet and get underestimated, it'll be a hassle if the bastard mistakenly thinks it's easy to hit on Kaho.
華穂に手を出すなという警告と鬱憤晴らしも兼ねて……ここは軽くスカし野郎にメンチを: Both as a warning not to touch Kaho and to vent my frustration... I should give this fancy bastard a bit of a glare.
重明\n「……アァン？ ……今、何か言いましたか？」: Shigeaki: “...Aaahn? ...Did you say something just now?”
俺の目は鋭く睨むにはうってつけ……こうしてガンをつければ、争いを好まない相手の戦: My eyes are perfect for a sharp glare... if I stare him down like this, I can easily drain the fighting spirit of an opponent who doesn't like conflict.
だが尚人は俺に睨まれてビビるどころか、先ほどから好戦的な笑みを浮かべ続けていた。: But Naoto, instead of being scared by my glare, continued to wear a provocative smile.
もしこれがただの虚勢でなければ……尚人は教員という職種に似合わぬ、暴力を好む好戦: If this isn't just a bluff... then Naoto has a bellicose personality that loves violence, which doesn't suit the profession of a teacher.
重明\n（……優男っぽいナリのクセに好戦的か……いいね、色々ムカつくのは確かだけ: Shigeaki: (...Bellicose despite your gentle-looking appearance... good, it’s true that you're annoying in many ways... but I don't hate that kind of personality...)
華穂\n「……きーくん……怒らないで……平和的にいこうね？」: Kaho: “...Ki-kun... don't be angry... let's go peacefully, okay?”
重明\n「やだな華穂……俺は別に怒ってなんかいないぞ？」: Shigeaki: “Come on, Kaho... I'm not angry or anything, okay?”
華穂\n「か、顔……きーくん顔が怖いって……」: Kaho: “Your f-face... Ki-kun, your face is scary...”
華穂\n「それと尚人先生も、初対面の彼にその物言いは余りに失礼じゃありませんか？: Kaho: “And Naoto-sensei, isn't that way of speaking too rude to him for a first meeting? ...In my memory, I remember Naoto-sensei being a much calmer person...”
尚人\n「すまない、僕とした事が……余りにもキミと彼が釣り合わないものだからつい: Naoto: “Forgive me, for someone like me to... since you and he were so mismatched, my true feelings just slipped out...”
華穂\n「せ、先生？ ……謝るなら私ではなく……きーくんに謝るべきだと思いますが: Kaho: “S-Sensei? ...If you're going to apologize, I think you should apologize to Ki-kun, not me...”
重明\n「へぇ思った事を堪えられず口にしてしまうだなんて、仮にも人にモノを教える: Shigeaki: “Heh, to say what you think without being able to hold it back, even though you're a teacher who supposedly teaches people things, Naoto-sensei is quite a (childish) and thoughtless person, aren't you? ☆”
華穂\n「ふ、二人とも……どうしたのさ……おちついて、おちついていこうよ……」: Kaho: “B-both of you... what’s wrong... calm down, let's keep it calm...”
重明\n（……まぁ一応クギも刺したし……華穂の手前、今回はここでやめておくとする: Shigeaki: (...Well, I've made my point... for Kaho's sake, I'll stop here this time...)
ここまでやってもし今後もしつこく絡んでくるようなら……その時は容赦なく制裁を加え: If he continues to persistently pester us from now on... I'll subject him to a merciless sanction then.
こちらが抜きかけた闘争心を鞘に収めると、尚人側もこれ以上揉め事を膨らます気はない: When I sheathed my fighting spirit, it seemed Naoto also had no intention of escalating the trouble any further... he showed a smile to Kaho as if nothing had happened.
尚人\n「ところで……華穂くんはどうして、また白花荘に？」: Naoto: “By the way... Kaho-kun, why have you come back to Hakukaso?”
華穂\n「あ、はい……彼と恋人になった記念の旅行はどこがいいかなって考えて……比: Kaho: “Ah, yes... I thought about where would be a good place for a trip to commemorate becoming lovers with him... and I chose this Hakukaso, which is relatively close and I have memories of.”
華穂\n「それと……あんな事件があったのに、結局一回も来れていませんでしたし……: Kaho: “And... even though there was that incident, in the end I hadn't been able to come even once...”
華穂\n「私がきーくんと幸せになる前に、ここで仲良くしてくれた撫子ちゃんへ挨拶し: Kaho: “Before I become happy with Ki-kun, I thought I'd come and say hello to Nadeshiko-chan, who was kind to me here... so I came.”
撫子というワードを聞いた直後、尚人の顔色が少しだけ硬い印象へと変わっていくように: Immediately after hearing the word (Nadeshiko), it looked like Naoto's complexion changed slightly to a stiff impression, but was it just my imagination?

こうしてただ顔を合わせているだけなのに、先ほどの風呂場での件のせいで、どうしても: But even though we’re just standing here face-to-face, because of that business in the bathroom earlier, I can’t help but look at her with lecherous eyes.
重明\n（まぁ、むしろあんな事があって何も感じない方が……人として不自然だよな…: Shigeaki: (Well, it’d actually be more unnatural for a guy... to feel nothing after something like that happened...)
こうしてただ顔を合わせているだけなのに、先ほどのオッサンとの話のせいで、どうして: Even though we’re just standing here face-to-face, because of the conversation I had with that middle-aged guy earlier, I can’t help but look at her with lecherous eyes.
重明\n（まぁ、むしろあんな事を言われて何も感じない方が……人として不自然だよな: Shigeaki: (Well, it’d actually be more unnatural for a guy... to feel nothing after being told something like that...)
何にしろ……こうして顔を合わせている相手の裏を勝手に邪推するのは、礼儀に反する。: In any case... it’s bad manners to make base assumptions about the person right in front of me.
重明\n（……けど、興味あるし……ちょっと遠まわしに聞いてみるか……）: Shigeaki: (...But I’m curious... Maybe I’ll try asking her in a roundabout way...)
重明\n「桔梗ちゃん……ちょっと、いいかな？」: Shigeaki: “Kikyou-chan... do you have a minute?”
桔梗\n「はい、私にお答え出来る事なら何なりと」: Kikyou: “Yes, I am happy to answer anything I am able to.”
人里離れた山奥のペンションで、従順な態度と言葉遣いで応対する……メイド服を可憐に: In a pension deep in the mountains, responding with such a submissive attitude and polite language... a beautiful girl looking lovely in her maid outfit...
ただ単に彼女が仕事熱心という可能性も考えられるが……やはり淫らな邪推が働いてしま: It’s possible she’s simply dedicated to her work... but my lewd suspicions are still firing.
……やはり桔梗は、風呂場のオッサン同様……ここを利用する客相手に、夜な夜な淫らな: ...Is Kikyou, just like the middle-aged guy in the bathroom said... the kind of woman who provides lewd services night after night to the guests who stay here?
重明\n（……風呂場であんな現場を見たし、いっそ正面から“売春してるの？”って聞: Shigeaki: (...I saw that scene in the bathroom, so I feel like I could just ask her point-blank, “Are you a prostitute?” ...But let’s start by throwing a light jab.)
俺は事の真相を聞く前に、まずは桔梗という少女の人物像を把握する為……彼女にこう語: Before digging for the truth of the matter, I decided to speak to her like this first... to get a better sense of what kind of girl Kikyou is.
もし先ほどのオッサンが言っていた、女学院の噂話が真実なら……ペンションとして改装: If the rumors that middle-aged guy mentioned about the girls' academy were true... there’s a high probability they’re doing something similar even after it was converted into a pension.
だとすると……目の前に居る桔梗も……今のような従順な態度で、白花荘を利用する客相: If that’s the case... is Kikyou, standing right in front of me... providing lewd services night after night to the guests of Shirohana-sou with that same submissive attitude?
重明\n（……よし、ならちょっくらカマをかけてみるとしよう）: Shigeaki: (...Alright, let’s try to catch her off guard.)
もしこちらが変な事を言って、桔梗が初心な反応をしたら……新聞を読んでいたオッサン: If I say something weird and Kikyou has an innocent reaction... then the rumors from the newspaper-reading guy were either nonsense, or Kikyou has nothing to do with them.
俺は下世話な噂の真偽と、ついでに桔梗という少女の人物像を把握する為……彼女にこう: To find out the truth behind the vulgar rumors, and to get a grasp of Kikyou’s character while I’m at it... I spoke to her like this.
重明\n「じゃあさ……ちょっとおっぱい触らせてよって言ったら……触らせてくれる？: Shigeaki: “Well then... if I asked you to let me touch your breasts... would you let me?”
重明\n「……え！？ マジ！？ ……じ、じゃあ……キスとかは？」: Shigeaki: “...Eh!? For real!? ...Th-Then... what about kissing?”
桔梗\n「お望みとあれば……ですが重明さんには華穂さんが居るのに、いいんですか？: Kikyou: “If that is what you desire... but Shigeaki-san, you have Kaho-san with you. Is that alright?”
重明\n「……おっぱい触ったりキスする程度なら、華穂もそんなに怒らないと思うけど: Shigeaki: “...If it’s just touching breasts or kissing, I don’t think Kaho would get that mad... Hmph... Kikyou-chan, so that’s how it is...”
桔梗\n「そうですか……では、どうぞお好きに……」: Kikyou: “I see... Then, please, as you like...”
重明\n「今のはあくまで聞いただけだって……桔梗ちゃんがここのお客さんに対して、: Shigeaki: “That was just a hypothetical... I was just trying to confirm... if you provide that kind of service to the guests here.”
桔梗\n「はい……仰るとおりお客様に“そういうサービス”をしていますが……それが: Kikyou: “Yes... as you say, we provide ‘that kind of service’ to our guests... Is there something wrong with that?”
まるで客に性的サービスをして何が変なのだと言わんばかりの桔梗。: Kikyou spoke as if it were only natural to provide sexual services to guests.
清楚なお嬢様といった雰囲気すらある彼女の口から出た予想外の応対に……俺は戸惑い、: Hearing such an unexpected response from her mouth—when she has the atmosphere of a refined young lady... I’m bewildered, feeling a light sense of vertigo.
重明\n「つまり……この旅館はデフォルトで性的なサービスもやっている……ってこと: Shigeaki: “In other words... this inn provides sexual services by default... is that it?”
桔梗\n「デフォルトと言われると……所詮、表向きそういう店ではないので、この宿の: Kikyou: “To call it the default... after all, this isn’t officially that kind of establishment, so I can’t say it’s our main selling point... but in fact, that is correct.”
重明\n「売りじゃないって事は、もしかしてタダって事？ ……タダで好きなだけ桔梗: Shigeaki: “If it’s not the main selling point, does that mean it’s free? ...Can I just fuck you as much as I want for free?”
桔梗\n「そうですね……ただ私は母と違って本番まではやらないので、したいのであれ: Kikyou: “That is right... however, unlike my mother, I do not go all the way to the main event. If that is what you want, please ask my mother.”
重明\n「……つまり……本番ＮＧなヘルス仕様が桔梗ちゃんで、ソープ仕様が藤子さん: Shigeaki: “...So... Kikyou-chan is the ‘no-sex’ massage parlor style, and Fujiko-san is the ‘full-service’ soapland style...”
桔梗\n「そのたとえは私にはよくわかりませんが……そうなります」: Kikyou: “I do not quite understand that analogy, but... yes, that is how it is.”
桔梗\n「ただ先ほども言った通り、あくまでサービスなので……それを主目的にされる: Kikyou: “However, as I said before, it is ultimately a service... so if that is your primary goal, you will need to consult with my mother in advance... otherwise we may not be able to accommodate you.”
桔梗\n「それにそもそも今は従業員が二人しかいないので、要望があったとしても手が: Kikyou: “Besides, we only have two employees right now, so even if there is a request, we cannot do anything if we are not free.”
重明\n「な、なるほど……大体理解した……ちなみに一つ聞きたいんだけど……」: Shigeaki: “I-I see... I mostly get it... By the way, there’s one thing I wanted to ask...”
重明\n「桔梗ちゃんって……見知らぬ男に身体を触らせて……気持ち悪いとか……嫌だ: Shigeaki: “Kikyou-chan... when you let strange men touch your body... don’t you find it gross... or hate it?”
桔梗\n「……そうですね……触られる程度なら、特に嫌ではありませんが」: Kikyou: “...Well... if it is just being touched, I do not particularly dislike it.”
桔梗\n「ですが嫌ではないと言っても、相手によっては臭かったり何となく気持ち悪か: Kikyou: “But even if I say I do not dislike it, depending on the person, they might smell or just be generally unpleasant... I do not refuse them for that, but there are times when I find it disagreeable.”
重明\n「まぁ普通そうだろうな……けど相手はしてあげるんだ」: Shigeaki: “Well, that’s only natural... but you still go through with it.”
桔梗\n「そうですね……何度も申しあげた通りあくまで仕事がない時であれば……の話: Kikyou: “Yes... as I have said many times, provided I do not have other work to do... that is.”
身体を売ってるとわかった時はてっきり【私って世界で一番不幸！ 同情しなさいよ！】: When I found out she was selling her body, I thought she might be the troublesome type of woman who goes, ‘I’m the unhappiest person in the world! Pity me!’... but she wasn’t like that at all.
むしろ話していて、悲壮感どころか“私は私”といった自信にも似た強さすら感じる。: In fact, talking to her, I don’t feel any sense of tragedy, but rather a strength that resembles confidence, as if saying, ‘I am who I am.’
……恐らくこの桔梗という少女は、かなり独特な世界感を持っているに違いない。: ...This girl, Kikyou, undoubtedly has a very unique worldview.
重明\n「ちなみに俺みたいなイケメンに、エッチな事しようって言われたら……桔梗ち: Shigeaki: “By the way, if a handsome guy like me asked to do something naughty... how would you feel, Kikyou-chan? Would you hate it? Would you be happy?”
桔梗\n「そうですね……イケメンであるかどうかは別として……相手が重明さんなら…: Kikyou: “Let me see... setting aside whether you are handsome or not... if the partner is Shigeaki-san...”
桔梗\n「……アリだと思います……悪い気はしません……」: Kikyou: “...I think it would be ‘yes’... It would not feel bad...”
桔梗から“抱かれてもいいですよ？”といった感じの発情した雌のオーラが感じられる。: I can feel a sort of ‘I wouldn’t mind if you took me’ aura of a female in heat coming from Kikyou.
……実際にそんなオーラは存在しないのだが、ナンパ師としての俺の直感が【こいつなら: ...In reality, no such aura exists, but my intuition as a pick-up artist is whispering to me, ‘I could close this one instantly.’
重明\n（……いやいや……落とせても彼女いるしやらないから……）: Shigeaki: (...No, no... even if I can, I have a girlfriend, so I’m not doing it...)
だが桔梗は間違いなく相当の上物……手を出さないのは、かなり勿体無いような気がしな: But Kikyou is definitely top-tier... I can’t help but feel it’d be a huge waste not to make a move.
そんな感じで沸き上がる女を口説きたい衝動を押さえ込むと……俺は思考のギアを本題で: Suppressing the impulse to hit on her that was welling up... I shifted my mental gears back to the main topic of Nadeshiko and spoke to Kikyou.
重明\n「ところで桔梗ちゃんって、ここの地元の人なのかな？」: Shigeaki: “By the way, Kikyou-chan, are you a local from around here?”
重明\n「じゃあ廃校になる前は、華穂みたいにこの学校に通ってたとか？」: Shigeaki: “Then before the school closed down, did you attend this school like Kaho did?”
重明\n「違うのか……じゃあ桔梗ちゃんが住んでた家の近くの学校とか？」: Shigeaki: “No? ...Then was it a school near where you lived?”
桔梗\n「いえ……そもそも私、学校って行った事がないんです」: Kikyou: “No... to begin with, I have never actually attended a school.”
桔梗\n「書面上は一応在籍していた事になっているらしいのですが……祖父に行くなと: Kikyou: “On paper, I was apparently enrolled... but my grandfather ordered me not to go, so in the end, all my studies were taught by tutors who came to my home.”
重明\n（……おじいちゃんに命じられて……学校にいってないって……おいおい……）: Shigeaki: (...Ordered by her grandfather... not to go to school... Whoa, hold on...)
日本国民なら不登校でなければ誰でも中学まで学校へ行き、ガキらしく甘かったり苦かっ: If you’re a Japanese citizen, as long as you aren’t a truant, everyone goes to school at least until middle school and spends their youth being a brat, experiencing the sweet and the bitter...
それが当たり前で絶対なのだという自分の中での常識を桔梗により完璧に打ち砕かれ……: That common sense of mine—that it was natural and absolute—was completely shattered by Kikyou... I’m at a loss for words, stunned.
重明\n「……学校にも行かずに家庭教師って事は、もしかして桔梗ちゃんって凄いお金: Shigeaki: “...If you had tutors instead of going to school, does that mean you were the child of a really wealthy family, Kikyou-chan?”
重明\n（……けど、お金持ちの娘だとしたら……何でこんな辺鄙な山の中で母親と二人: Shigeaki: (...But if she’s the daughter of a rich family... why is she working with her mother in a remote place like this?)
桔梗\n「家がお金持ちかと言われたら……そうですね」: Kikyou: “If you are asking if my family was wealthy... then yes.”
桔梗\n「ただ父にとって母はいわば愛人の立場なので、莫大な資産を持つ父の祖父の財: Kikyou: “However, to my father, my mother was in the position of a mistress, so I do not simply believe that my father’s grandfather’s immense fortune is all mine.”
重明\n（……お金持ちの愛人の子……学校にも行かず……辺鄙な山奥で働く……）: Shigeaki: (...The child of a wealthy man’s mistress... never went to school... working deep in the mountains...)
重明\n「……もしかしてというかもしかしなくてもだけど……桔梗ちゃんって、色々と: Shigeaki: “...Is it possible—well, it probably is—that you grew up in a very complicated and messy environment, Kikyou-chan?”
桔梗\n「そうですね……他の人の事はよく知らないので、私自身はそれほど気にした事: Kikyou: “I suppose so... I do not know much about other people, so I have never really worried about it myself.”
浮世離れした雰囲気の娘だとは思ってはいたが……どうやら桔梗は人生そのものが浮世離: I thought she had an otherworldly atmosphere... but it seems Kikyou’s life itself was otherworldly.
上品さを感じる立ち振る舞い、何も知らないといった感じの面持ち……そして独特の世界: Her refined behavior, her expression that seems to know nothing... and her unique worldview... Considering her background, it makes sense that she’d have this kind of personality.
だが、けどこうも世間ズレした生活を送ってるようでは……桔梗が撫子の死の詳しい経緯: However, living such a life so disconnected from the world... there’s a high probability Kikyou doesn’t know the detailed circumstances of Nadeshiko’s death.
仮に知っていたとしても、ロビーに居たオッサンの情報と、そう大差ないに違いないだろ: Even if she did know, it’s probably not much different from the information that guy in the lobby had.
重明\n（……そういえば……撫子ちゃんがらみの事で、桔梗ちゃんに何か言わなきゃい: Shigeaki: (...Now that I think about it... I feel like there was something I had to tell Kikyou-chan regarding Nadeshiko-chan... What was it...)
桔梗\n「私、掃除の途中なので……雑談はまた今度にしてもらってもいいでしょうか？: Kikyou: “I am in the middle of cleaning... so would it be alright if we continued our chat another time?”
重明\n「ああ……仕事の邪魔しちゃってたんだね、ごめんごめん」: Shigeaki: “Ah... I was getting in the way of your work, wasn’t I? Sorry, sorry.”
桔梗\n「いえ、お話とても楽しかったです……よければ是非、また話しかけてください: Kikyou: “No, I enjoyed our talk very much... If you like, please do talk to me again.”
桔梗\n「では失礼します」: Kikyou: “Then, if you will excuse me.”
重明\n（……是非、また話しかけてくださいときたか……）: Shigeaki: (...‘Please talk to me again,’ huh...)
今のは恐らく社交辞令ではないのだろう……: That probably wasn’t just a social pleasantry...
つまり現時点で桔梗は、少なからず俺に好意を持っていると考えてよさそうだ。: In other words, at this point, it’s safe to assume Kikyou has more than a little interest in me.
華穂という恋人が居る手前、口説き落とすわけにはいかないが……ちょっと仲良くなる程: With a girlfriend like Kaho around, I can’t exactly seduce her... but there shouldn’t be any problem with becoming a little friendly.
重明\n「……撫子ちゃんの話、少し聞いてみたかったけど……忙しそうだし今日はいい: Shigeaki: “...I wanted to ask a bit more about Nadeshiko-chan, but she seems busy, so guess I’ll call it a day...”
重明\n「……さて、と……次はどうするかな……」: Shigeaki: “...Now then... what should I do next...”
重明\n「そうだな……明日もあるし、とりあえず部屋に戻るか」: Shigeaki: “Right... tomorrow’s another day, so I’ll just head back to the room for now.”
オッサンの情報が確かなら、風呂に行けば藤子に会えるのだろう。: If the middle-aged guy’s info is correct, I can meet Fujiko if I go to the bath.
だが入浴中という事は、仕事ではなくプライベートな時間……邪魔するのは、少し悪い気: But if she’s bathing, that’s private time, not work... I can’t help but feel a little bad about interrupting.
重明\n（……ちょっと乱入してみたい気もするけど……明日もあるし、今日はこの辺で: Shigeaki: (...I feel like barging in, but... tomorrow’s another day, so I’ll stop here for today...)
新聞を読むオッサン\n「やあ、さっきぶり……このペンションは気に入ったかい？」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Oh, hello again... Do you like this pension?”
重明\n「気に入るもなにも、食堂ぐらいしかまともに利用してないので……」: Shigeaki: “Whether I like it or not, I’ve only really used the dining hall...”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「ここの温泉は中々いいものだから、是非さっきの彼女さんと行: Man Reading Newspaper: “The hot spring here is quite good, so you should definitely go with that girl from earlier... I think it will help deepen your bond.”
重明\n「……同性ならまだしも、温泉で異性との親睦って深まるものなんですかね？」: Shigeaki: “...It’d be one thing if we were the same gender, but can bonds really be deepened with the opposite sex at a hot spring?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「そりゃ深まるさ……だってここ、混浴だし」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Of course they can... because this place is mixed-gender, after all.”
重明\n「情報ありがとうございます、ここでの楽しみが一つ増えました」: Shigeaki: “Thanks for the info. I’ve got one more thing to look forward to here.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「はは、そりゃ何よりだよ」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Haha, well, that’s good to hear.”
重明\n「そうですね……お風呂が混浴ってのは……中々刺激的でよかったですよ」: Shigeaki: “That’s right... the fact that the bath is mixed-gender was... quite stimulating and good.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「言った通り垣根は無いに等しかっただろ？」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Just as I said, the barrier was practically non-existent, right?”
重明\n「ええ確かに“無いに等しかった”ですね……ちょっとしたトラブルも起きて、: Shigeaki: “Yeah, it certainly was ‘practically non-existent’... a little trouble even occurred, and thanks to that, our bond deepened quite a bit.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「はは、どうやら楽しんでもらえたようで何よりだよ」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Haha, it seems you enjoyed yourself. That’s good to hear.”
重明\n「それで話は変わるんですが……俺、この宿の従業員さんを探しているんですけ: Shigeaki: “So, changing the subject... I’m looking for the employees of this inn... Do you have any idea where they might be?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「桔梗ちゃんなら、さっき談話室の方へ行ったのを見たよ……そ: Man Reading Newspaper: “If it’s Kikyou-chan, I saw her head toward the common room earlier... And Fujiko-san was carrying a bath towel, so she’s probably in the bath right now.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「うん、つまり今なら藤子さんの裸が見放題というわけだ」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Yeah, in other words, right now Fujiko-san’s naked body is all-you-can-see.”
重明\n「ほほう……情報どうもありがとうございます……用事ついでにタイミングが合: Shigeaki: “Oho... thanks for the info... I’ll take a look if the timing is right while I’m at it.”
藤子はこの白花荘の女主人……つまり彼女が、ここのお風呂を混浴としたのだ。: Fujiko is the mistress of Shirohana-sou... meaning she’s the one who made the bath mixed-gender.
当人が決めたルールである以上……俺が入浴中に彼女を尋ねたとしても、【キャー痴漢！: Since it’s a rule she decided on... even if I visit her while she’s bathing... she has no right to complain or shout, “Eek! Pervert!”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「……あんな綺麗な彼女さんが居るのに、藤子さんみたいなおば: Man Reading Newspaper: “...Even though you have such a beautiful girlfriend, you want to see the naked body of an older woman like Fujiko-san... You really are a lecher, aren’t you?”
重明\n「若いですから、好奇心旺盛なんです」: Shigeaki: “I’m young, so I’m full of curiosity.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「そうかそうか……ま、彼女さんに怒られないようにね」: Man Reading Newspaper: “I see, I see... Well, just make sure your girlfriend doesn’t get mad at you.”
重明\n「ご忠告どうも……話ついでにもう一つ聞きたい事があるんですけど、いいです: Shigeaki: “Thanks for the advice... While we’re talking, there’s one more thing I want to ask, if that’s okay?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「キミってホント遠慮しないヤツだね……まあいいか、ついでに: Man Reading Newspaper: “You really are a guy who doesn’t hold back... Oh well, I’ll tell you since I’m at it.”
重明\n「どうもありがとうございます……確かおじさんってここの常連客って言ってま: Shigeaki: “Thank you very much... I believe you said you were a regular guest here?”
重明\n「ペンションの前身である学園寮の時の白花荘の話って、何か知ってたりします: Shigeaki: “Do you know anything about Shirohana-sou back when it was a school dormitory before it became a pension?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「学園の話か……そうだなぁ……この近辺に住む地元の人間なら: Man Reading Newspaper: “The school, huh... Let’s see... If it’s just the kind of thing local people living around here have heard, I think I can tell you.”
重明\n「ではここで死んだ撫子って子の話を教えてもらいたいんですけど」: Shigeaki: “Then I’d like you to tell me about the girl named Nadeshiko who died here.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「この寮で男と一緒に死んだ……娘の話ね」: Man Reading Newspaper: “The story of the girl... who died in this dormitory with a man.”
事故死であるとしか聞かされていなかった俺には、まさに寝耳に水の情報……: I had only been told that it was an accidental death, so this information was a bolt from the blue...
まさか撫子が一人ではなく、男と共に死んだなどとは……思いもよらなかった。: I never would have dreamed that Nadeshiko didn’t die alone, but with a man.
しかしこの直後……俺は更に衝撃的な事を、このオッサンの口から聞く事となった。: But immediately after this... I would hear something even more shocking from this man’s mouth.
新聞を読むオッサン\n「その子と男が一緒に死んだ理由なんだけどね……噂では無理心: Man Reading Newspaper: “As for the reason that girl and the man died together... the rumors say it was a forced double suicide.”
重明\n「……無理心中……つまり撫子ちゃんと、その男は恋仲だったと？」: Shigeaki: “...A forced double suicide... In other words, Nadeshiko-chan and that man were lovers?”
教師と生徒……結ばれてはいけない禁断の恋物語としては定番のネタ。: A teacher and a student... it’s a classic trope for a forbidden, ill-fated love story.
世間にバレれば立場を失い、確かに周囲から迫害はされるものの……心中するほどの事で: If it were exposed, they’d lose their positions and certainly be persecuted by those around them... but I don’t think it’s something to commit suicide over.
重明\n（つまり事件の原因は恋仲ではない可能性が高いってわけだな……）: Shigeaki: (In other words, there’s a high probability the cause of the incident wasn’t being lovers...)
新聞を読むオッサン\n「まぁ無理心中ってのはあくまで噂で、実際の理由は誰も知らな: Man Reading Newspaper: “Well, the double suicide is just a rumor, and no one knows the actual reason... In the first place, no one even knows... who the man who died with her was, even now.”
重明\n「それって変じゃないですか？ ……だって撫子ちゃんはこの寮で死んだんです: Shigeaki: “Isn’t that strange? ...I mean, Nadeshiko-chan died in this dormitory, right?”
重明\n「ここは山奥の女子寮……まず一般人は来ないし、しかも男ともなれば……かな: Shigeaki: “This is a girls’ dormitory deep in the mountains... Ordinarily, civilians wouldn’t come here, and if it’s a man... the candidates should be pretty limited.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「ところが……噂じゃその廃校になったミッション系の女学院が: Man Reading Newspaper: “However... the rumor is that the defunct mission-style girls’ academy... actually had a very shady side to it...”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「……学校が主体となって……特定の生徒に売春をさせていたら: Man Reading Newspaper: “...It seems the school itself was the mastermind... and was making specific students work as prostitutes.”
重明\n「……はい？ ……んなアホな……そんな事をしたら、即バレて廃校まっしぐら: Shigeaki: “...Come again? ...That’s insane... If they did something like that, it’d be exposed immediately and lead straight to the school closing down.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「ところがどっこい、その特定の生徒ってのがミソでね」: Man Reading Newspaper: “But you see, those ‘specific students’ were the key.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「表向きは身寄りがなかったり貧乏な子を引き取って、卒業まで: Man Reading Newspaper: “On the surface, it was a beautiful story about taking in children with no relatives or from poor families and letting them study for free until graduation.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「実際は親に金で売られ逃げ場もなく相談できる相手もいない山: Man Reading Newspaper: “In reality, they were sold for money by their parents, with no place to run and no one to talk to in the mountains, and were made to open their legs for wealthy men.”
重明\n「そんな目に遭って、やられた女の子達はここを訴えたりしなかったんですか？: Shigeaki: “Didn’t the girls who were subjected to that sue this place?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「しないさ……どのみち学校に行くどころかマトモに暮らす事す: Man Reading Newspaper: “They didn’t... After all, they couldn’t even live a normal life, let alone go to school, and they were all girls from backgrounds where they would have eventually ended up opening their legs even if they hadn’t been sold here.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「だからセックスしないといけないとはいえ、人並みの生活が出: Man Reading Newspaper: “So even though they had to have sex, they were able to live a decent life, and rumor has it the school even helped them find jobs after graduation...”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「変な話だが、ここに通って身体を売った連中は、この学校を恨: Man Reading Newspaper: “It’s a strange story, but it seems the ones who went here and sold their bodies didn’t resent the school; in fact, they were all grateful to it.”
道徳的には許される話ではないものの……親に売られた娘達の境遇を考えれば、案外この: While it’s not an excusable story morally... considering the circumstances of the girls sold by their parents, perhaps life in the school dormitory was actually a place of salvation.
重明\n（……何だかんだいってＷＩＮＷＩＮの関係だったんだろうな……そりゃ確かに: Shigeaki: (...I guess they had a win-win relationship... Certainly, no one would sue...)
新聞を読むオッサン\n「そんな場所だから、撫子って子と男が死んだのは、客とのイザ: Man Reading Newspaper: “Because it was that kind of place, locals say the reason the girl named Nadeshiko and the man died was because of some trouble with a client.”
重明\n「こう色々教えてもらっておいて、何なんですが……それって本当に本当の事な: Shigeaki: “After you’ve told me all this, I feel bad asking... but is that really the truth? It’s not just some tall tale?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「そうだなぁ……まぁ僕も当事者ってわけじゃあないから、何も: Man Reading Newspaper: “Let’s see... Well, I wasn’t involved myself, so I can’t say everything is the absolute truth... but I think the general outline is correct.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「何せその時の寮母だった藤子さんと、その娘の桔梗ちゃんは…: Man Reading Newspaper: “After all, Fujiko-san, who was the dorm mother at the time, and her daughter Kikyou-chan... are still providing similar services here even now.”
オッサンのその言葉を聴いた瞬間、先ほどの風呂場での事が俺の脳裏に浮かび上がる。: The moment I heard those words from the man, the scene in the bathroom earlier flashed across my mind.
重明\n（……ようするに、アレはこのペンションのサービスだったってわけだ……）: Shigeaki: (...In short, that was a service provided by this pension...)
オッサンのその言葉を聴いた瞬間、桔梗の姿が俺の脳裏に浮かび上がる。: The moment I heard those words from the man, Kikyou’s image flashed across my mind.
重明\n（あの子を好きに出来るのか……そいつは確かに魅力的なサービスだな……）: Shigeaki: (I can have my way with that girl... That certainly is an attractive service...)
女が身体を売る……普通なら可哀想やら汚らわしいなどという感想が出る所なのだろう。: A woman selling her body... Normally, one might feel pity or disgust.
だがそんな感情よりも先に……許されるのなら桔梗を抱いてみたいという感情が、俺の中: But before any such emotion, a feeling of wanting to hold Kikyou if it’s allowed swells up inside me.
重明\n（まあ、桔梗ちゃんがたとえ売り女でも魅力的だという事は置いておくとして…: Shigeaki: (Well, setting aside the fact that Kikyou-chan is attractive even if she’s a pro...)
先ほどから新聞で顔を隠しているオッサンの話が、与太話ではないとした場合……: If the story from the man—who’s been hiding his face with a newspaper this whole time—isn’t just a tall tale...
華穂の親が事件の詳しい経緯を教えなかった事や、たかだか女生徒が死んだ事で学園が廃: Then it makes sense why Kaho’s parents didn’t tell her the details of the incident, and why the academy fell into ruin just because a female student died.
重明\n（……つまり廃校は、大騒ぎになって裏で女生徒を売っていた事実が、明るみに: Shigeaki: (...In other words, the school closed down because it was a huge scandal, and they shut it down to cover up the fact that they were selling students in the background for fear of it coming to light...)
だが今オッサンが語った話を全て真実だと鵜呑みにするのは、あまりに早計だろう。: But it would be too hasty to swallow everything the man just said as the truth.
もし事件の真相を深く知りたいのであれば……もっと他の人の話を聞き、様々な角度から: If I want to know the truth of the incident deeply... I need to talk to other people and verify it from various angles.
重明\n（……藤子さんや桔梗ちゃん……気が進まないが、尚人とかいう野郎にも……話: Shigeaki: (...Fujiko-san and Kikyou-chan... I’m not looking forward to it, but it seems like I should talk to that guy Naoto too...)
重明\n「色々と詳しく教えてくれて、ありがとうございました」: Shigeaki: “Thank you very much for telling me so much in detail.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「いやいや……こちらもキミと沢山雑談が出来て楽しかったよ」: Man Reading Newspaper: “No, no... I enjoyed having such a long chat with you too.”
重明\n（……楽しかったって言うなら……顔ぐらい見せればいいのに……）: Shigeaki: (...If you say you enjoyed it... you could at least show your face...)
重明\n「それでは俺はここで、失礼します」: Shigeaki: “Well then, I’ll be taking my leave here.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「うん、また気兼ねなく声をかけてね」: Man Reading Newspaper: “Yes, feel free to talk to me again.”
重明\n（そう……俺が話すべき相手はオッサンなんかじゃなく藤子さんか桔梗ちゃんだ: Shigeaki: (Right... the person I should be talking to isn’t some middle-aged guy, it’s Fujiko-san or Kikyou-chan.)
部屋に戻り華穂と合流すると……俺達はお互いが得た情報を交換し合った。: When I returned to the room and joined up with Kaho... we exchanged the information we had each gathered.
結局、こちらと同じで華穂も藤木親子から詳しい話は聞けなかったらしい。: In the end, it seems Kaho, like me, couldn’t hear any detailed stories from the Fujiki mother and daughter.
その代わりと言うのも何だが、俺は先ほどオッサンから聞き出した地元の噂話を、藤木親: Instead—if you could call it that—I passed along the local rumors I’d gotten from the middle-aged guy earlier, but with a milder seasoning, leaving out the parts about the Fujiki duo.
……情報をあえて歪曲したのは……華穂が調べている撫子の死と、藤子達が宿の客達と淫: ...The reason I deliberately distorted the information was... because I judged there was no connection between Nadeshiko’s death, which Kaho is investigating, and the fact that Fujiko and her daughter were engaging in lewd acts with the inn’s guests.
それに華穂も……学生時代に恩を受けた人の痴情など知りたくもないに違いない。: Besides, Kaho surely wouldn’t want to know about the sexual affairs of someone she respected during her student days.
意気揚々と出て徒労に終わったのは残念だが、得てして調べ物なんてものはこういうもの: It’s a shame that she went out so enthusiastically only for it to end in vain, but that’s how research often goes.
今日出来なければ明日やればいい……別に俺達は、時間に追われているわけではないのだ: If we couldn’t do it today, we can just do it tomorrow... It’s not like we’re being pressed for time.
華穂\n「じゃあ、夜も遅いし……詳しい事を調べるのは明日にしようか」: Kaho: “Well, it’s late, so... let’s save the detailed investigation for tomorrow.”
本日のよそ様との交流はこれにて終了……以降は恋人同士のプライベートな時間。: That’s it for today’s interactions with others... from here on, it’s private time for us as lovers.
俺は場の雰囲気をより親密なものへと変化させるため……彼女の耳を優しく甘噛みし、続: To shift the atmosphere of the place into something more intimate... I gently nibbled on her ear, then slowly began to massage her large breasts.
重明\n「……ちょっと唐突だけど、今日はもう他にする事もないし……そろそろいいだ: Shigeaki: “...It’s a bit sudden, but there’s nothing else to do today... isn’t it about time?”
俺はロビーで新聞を読んでいたオッサンの情報を元に、浴室へと足を運んでいた。: Based on the information from the middle-aged guy reading the newspaper in the lobby, I made my way to the bathroom.
廊下に居ても良かったが……待っていた挙句、藤子本人ではなく【実はとっくにお風呂か: I could have waited in the hallway... but I didn’t want to wait only to find out it wasn’t Fujiko herself but rather some “punchline” like, ‘Actually, she already finished her bath a long time ago.’
それに、ここはそもそも混浴……藤子が居ると知って入った所で、こちらが咎められる理: Besides, this place is mixed-gender to begin with... Even if I entered knowing Fujiko was there, there’s no reason for me to be blamed.
そうやって藤子の裸をタダ見する言い訳を一通り脳内で並べた後……: After lining up a series of excuses for peeping at Fujiko’s naked body in my head...
俺は浴槽の中に一人の女性を見つけ、その人物の下へと足を運んでいく。: I found a single woman inside the tub and made my way toward her.
重明\n「どうも藤子さん、お邪魔します」: Shigeaki: “Hello, Fujiko-san. Excuse me for interrupting.”
湯船に浸かる前にシャワーでも浴びたのか、既に藤子の熟れたいやらしい身体は濡れそぼ: Perhaps she had taken a shower before soaking in the tub, as Fujiko’s mature, lewd body was already drenched, appearing to give off a faint glow.
いつもならこの肢体に手を出し旅先のアバンチュールを楽しめるよう色々と奮闘したのだ: Normally, I probably would have struggled in various ways to get my hands on this body and enjoy a travel fling... but right now, I’m with someone.
俺は早々と藤子へ下心がない事を伝える為、彼女に手が届かない場所で腰を下ろし、湯船: To quickly convey to Fujiko that I had no ulterior motives, I sat down in a spot where she couldn’t reach me and submerged my lower half into the tub.
藤子\n「いらっしゃい……重明……くん……だったわよね？ ……一人？ 華穂ちゃん: Touko: “Welcome... it was Shigeaki...-kun, right? ...Are you alone? Where is Kaho-chan?”
重明\n「ええ、訳あって別行動なんですよ……まぁその理由がですね……」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, for certain reasons we’re acting separately... Well, as for that reason...”
俺は華穂から聞いた撫子の話や、、ロビーのオッサンに色々な話を聞いた事などなど……: I began to calmly tell Fujiko the sequence of events leading up to my arrival here, including the story about Nadeshiko I’d heard from Kaho and the various things the middle-aged guy in the lobby had told me.
こちらの話を聞き続けていた藤子は……その美しい面持ちに影を落としている。: Fujiko, who had been listening to my story... had a shadow over her beautiful face.
特に“撫子”というワードを聞いた瞬間、藤子はあからさまな動揺を俺に見せた。: Particularly the moment she heard the word “Nadeshiko,” Fujiko showed me a clear sense of agitation.
やはり藤子にとっても女学院が閉鎖された原因である撫子が死んだ出来事は、それだけ大: As expected, the incident of Nadeshiko’s death—the cause of the girls’ academy being closed down—was a major event for Fujiko as well... that’s what her reaction seemed to show.
重明\n「それでですね……不躾なのは承知で一度撫子ちゃんの部屋を見せてもらいたい: Shigeaki: “So... I know it’s rude, but I’d like to see Nadeshiko-chan’s room once... would that be alright?”
先ほどから暗い顔をしている事もあり、多少はこちらの提案を渋るだろうと想定はしてい: Since she’d been looking grim for a while, I’d anticipated she might be a bit reluctant to my proposal...
まさかこうもキッパリと藤子が断るとは、思いも寄らなかった。: But I never dreamed Fujiko would refuse so flatly.
重明\n「……藤子さん、すみませんが、断る理由を教えてもらえないでしょうか？」: Shigeaki: “...Fujiko-san, I’m sorry, but could you tell me the reason for your refusal?”
藤子\n「……言いたくありません」: Touko: “...I do not want to say.”
言いたくないという事は、つまり思い出したくもない何かを知っているという事。: The fact that she doesn’t want to say means she knows something she doesn’t even want to remember.
それはつまり、ただ女生徒が死んだのではなく……噂が本当だったか、それに近い重い出: In other words, it’s not just that a female student died... it’s safe to say it suggests the rumors were true, or that there was a similarly heavy event.
藤子が隠す情報が、既にこちらが知っている内容なのか、それとも知らない事なのかはわ: Whether the information Fujiko is hiding is content I already know or something I don’t, I can’t be sure...
彼女が簡単に話してくれない事だけは、どうやら間違いなさそうだ。: But it seems certain that she won’t talk easily.
重明\n（……さてと……どうするかな……）: Shigeaki: (...Now then... what should I do...)
今回の件に関して、俺は完全に部外者……しかも人の死が関わっているデリケートな案件: Regarding this matter, I’m a complete outsider... and it’s a delicate case involving a death.
恋人とは言え無関係の野次馬がしゃしゃり出るより、関係者の華穂が前に出て藤子との交: Even if we’re lovers, rather than an unrelated onlooker like me sticking my nose in, it makes more sense for Kaho, who is involved, to come forward and negotiate with Fujiko.
重明\n（無闇に食い下がって、藤子さんを頑なにさせるわけにもいかないし……仕方な: Shigeaki: (I can’t afford to be stubbornly persistent and make Fujiko-san close up... Oh well, guess I’ll quietly back down for now.)
だが何の成果も上げずに華穂に全てを委ねるというのは、恋人として余りにも格好が悪い: But to leave everything to Kaho without achieving any results would be too pathetic as a boyfriend.
どうせ断るなら、断りついでに……少し明日の布石を打たせてもらう事としよう。: If I’m going to be refused anyway, then as I’m being refused... I’ll take the opportunity to lay some groundwork for tomorrow.
重明\n「わかりました……藤子さんが話したくないと言うのであれば、引き下がらせて: Shigeaki: “I understand... If you don’t want to talk, Fujiko-san, then I’ll back off.”
重明\n「ただ明日……今度は華穂が、藤子さんに色々と聞く事になると思うんです」: Shigeaki: “However, tomorrow... I think Kaho will be asking you various things.”
重明\n「……まぁその時になって色々と詳しい話をしてもらえるのであれば……それに: Shigeaki: “...Well, if you could tell her the details at that time... nothing would be better than that...”
重明\n「もし明日の華穂相手に話す気がなかったとしても……今回みたいに取り付く島: Shigeaki: “Even if you don’t feel like talking to Kaho tomorrow... could you please not refuse her flatly like you did with me, and instead refuse her gently if possible?”
藤子\n「わかったわ……そう出来るよう、頑張ってみるわね……」: Touko: “I understand... I will try my best to do so...”
これで明日の藤子との話し合いの中で、華穂が不必要に傷つくという展開は回避させられ: With this, I’m sure I’ve avoided a development where Kaho gets unnecessarily hurt during her talk with Fujiko tomorrow.
重明\n（あとは事の真相がロビーのオッサンの語った噂話に近かった場合の事を考え、: Shigeaki: (Now I just have to consider what to tell Kaho to lessen the shock if the truth is close to the rumors that middle-aged guy in the lobby mentioned...)
藤子\n「……とってもやんちゃな感じなのに、思いのほか優しくて紳士なのね……」: Touko: “...You seem very mischievous, but you’re unexpectedly kind and a gentleman, aren’t you...”
自分としてはもう十分大人の貫禄を身に着けているつもりなのだが……: I intend to have plenty of adult dignity myself...
一回りは歳の違う彼女からすると、やはり俺はまだまだお子様らしい。: But from her perspective, being over a decade older, I’m still just a kid, it seems.
交渉が決裂すると、俺は何事もなかったかのように、藤子と軽めの雑談を交わしていく。: Once the negotiations had broken down, I exchanged some light small talk with Fujiko as if nothing had happened.
俺は彼女より先に風呂を上がり、華穂が待つであろう自分の部屋へと戻る事にしたのだっ: I decided to get out of the bath before her and return to my room where Kaho would be waiting...
ある意味、温和な感じの藤子が相手を強く拒絶するほどの事であるという事を知れたのが: In a sense, knowing that the matter is serious enough for the gentle-feeling Fujiko to strongly reject someone could be called a result of this attempt...
頼りになる彼氏として、出来ればもう少し突っ込んだ成果を得てから……華穂の元へ戻り: But as a dependable boyfriend, I’d like to return to Kaho after obtaining a slightly more penetrating result if possible.
それにこうして色々と話を知ってしまった事で、俺自身も撫子という女の子の事件に興味: Besides, now that I’ve learned so much, my own interest in the incident involving the girl named Nadeshiko has been piqued.
完全にタダの野次馬であり、嫌がる藤子には本当に申し訳ないのだが……: I’m a total onlooker, and I’m truly sorry to the unwilling Fujiko...
ここは空気も読まず、もう少しこの話題を引っ張ってみる事にしよう。: But I’m going to ignore the social cues and drag this topic out a bit more.
重明\n「……そんな取り付く島もなく拒絶されたら、余計に気になってもやもやした気: Shigeaki: “...If you reject me so flatly, it only makes me more curious and leaves me feeling restless...”
重明\n「そもそも無関係ですし、別に“知ってる事を全部話せ”なんて横暴な事を言う: Shigeaki: “I’m an outsider anyway, and I have no intention of saying something as overbearing as ‘tell me everything you know’... Of course, you’re welcome to leave out the parts that are difficult to say.”
重明\n「例えば言うにあたって何らかの条件付きという形でも全然構わないので……是: Shigeaki: “For example, I wouldn’t mind if it were in the form of a condition for telling me... so please, could you tell me a bit about Nadeshiko-chan?”
藤子\n「……私と……セックスをする……という条件なら……どう？」: Touko: “...If the condition is... that you have sex... with me... how about it?”
あまりに突拍子もない藤子の条件を前に唖然となり、思考が一瞬停止してしまう。: I’m stunned by Fujiko’s sudden and bizarre condition, and my thoughts stop for a moment.
最初は単なる冗談かと思ったものの、その提案をした藤子の顔はどこか好戦的……駆け引: At first I thought it was just a joke, but the face Fujiko made when she proposed it was somewhat provocative... a sensation similar to the tension felt during a negotiation filled the air.
重明\n（……どうやら冗談じゃなさそうだな……つまりセックスをしたら、俺が知りた: Shigeaki: (...It doesn’t seem like a joke... In other words, if we have sex, you’ll tell me the information I want to know... is that right?)
