重明\n（……い……言いたくねぇ……）: Shigeaki: (...I... I don’t want to say it...)
だが目的の為とは言え、信頼を裏切る行為をしたのは事実……男として、ここで言わない: But even if it was for the sake of our goal, the fact remains that I betrayed her trust... as a man, I can't not say it here.
重明\n「俺、撫子ちゃんの話を聞く条件として抱いて欲しいって藤子さんに言われて…: Shigeaki: “Touko-san told me she wanted me to hold her as a condition for talking about Nadeshiko-chan... so I just had sex with her... sorry.”
華穂\n「あれ……いま何か、私……凄い事を言われた気がするんだけど……」: Kaho: “Wait... I feel like I just heard... something incredible...”
重明\n「う、うん……場合によっては包丁で刺されてもおかしくないデンジャラスな事: Shigeaki: “Y-Yeah... I think... I said something dangerous enough that I wouldn't be surprised if I got stabbed with a kitchen knife...”
華穂\n「初めてＨをする為の旅行でペンションに来たのに、きーくんは恋人を放って私: Kaho: “Even though we came to this pension for our first time having sex, Ki-kun left his girlfriend behind and... had sex with Touko-san, the dorm mother who took care of me in the past?”
重明\n「……まぁ少し偏りがある気がするけど……大雑把な説明としては、大筋間違い: Shigeaki: “...Well, I feel like that’s a bit biased... but as a rough explanation, it’s mostly correct...”
華穂\n「とりあえず殴ってもいい？」: Kaho: “For now, can I punch you?”
重明\n「ああ、いいぞ……俺は間違いを起こした……罰するのは恋人の当然の権利だ」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, go ahead... I made a mistake... it’s a lover's right to punish me.”
俺の言葉にコクリと頷いた華穂は、スッと後ろに下がり殴りやすい間合いへと身体を移動: Nodding at my words, Kaho took a step back and moved her body to a distance that made it easy to punch.
そしてギュッと固めた右拳を胸元に構えたかと思うと……: And just when I thought she was going to hold her right fist tight against her chest...
何故かそのままゆっくりと腕を前に出し……殴りもせず、俺の胸元のシャツを掴んできた: For some reason, she slowly reached her arm forward... and without punching me, she grabbed the shirt at my chest.
華穂\n「……うん……きーくんがちょっと酷い間違いを犯したから、ここは制裁してお: Kaho: “...Yeah... Ki-kun made a pretty terrible mistake, so I thought I had to punish you here... but I just can't...”
華穂\n「だって私……いくら駄目でも……大好きなきーくんの顔……グーで殴りたくな: Kaho: “Because... no matter how bad you were... I don’t want to punch the face of the Ki-kun I love... with my fist.”
重明\n（……平手とかじゃなくグーなんだ……）: Shigeaki: (...So it was going to be a fist, not a slap...)
重明\n「いや華穂、殴ってくれ……一応理由はあるとはいえ、俺はお前が嫌がる事をし: Shigeaki: “No, Kaho, punch me... Even though there was a reason, I did something you hate... so at this point, I’d feel better if you just hit me once.”
華穂\n「……わかった……きーくんがそうして欲しいって言うなら……いくね」: Kaho: “...I understand... if that’s what you want, Ki-kun... here I go.”
重明\n「ああ、頼む……思いっきりな！」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, please... with everything you’ve got!”
呼吸音が聞こえるほど息を大きく吸い込んだ事で、彼女の豊満なバストが一時的に更に膨: She inhaled so deeply that I could hear her breathing, and her voluptuous bust temporarily swelled even more.
……続いて手首をしっかり固めた右拳が、弓を引くようにゆっくり後方へ下げられる。: ...Next, her right fist, held firm, was pulled back slowly like she was drawing a bow.
そうして溜め込んだ力を、運動エネルギーに変換し……華穂は思いのほか鋭いパンチを、: Converting that stored power into kinetic energy... Kaho unleashed an unexpectedly sharp punch aimed at my cheek.
重明\n（……そういえば華穂のヤツ、一時……健康の為にボクササイズを……習ってた: Shigeaki: (...Now that I think about it, for a while... Kaho was taking... boxercise classes... for her health...)
拳が当たる間際、そんな事を思い出し……: Just as the fist was about to land, I remembered that...
……俺は恋人の制裁を、ありがたく頂戴したのだった。: ...and I gratefully received my lover's punishment.
華穂によるケジメという名のお仕置きを受けた後……: After receiving the discipline known as Kaho's settlement...
俺は単独行動中に知り得た情報を、一部を除き事細かに彼女へ話し伝えていく。: I told her every detail of the information I had gained during my solitary action, except for one part.
ちなみに藤木親子とペンションにくる客との性事情は、割愛させてもらった。: By the way, I omitted the sexual affairs between the Fujiki duo and the guests who come to the pension.
藤木親子がしている事と、撫子の事件に表立った関連性が見つからない以上……あえてよ: Since I hadn't found any obvious connection between what the Fujiki duo was doing and Nadeshiko's incident... I judged there was no need to tell Kaho about other people's sexual lives.
重明\n「……とりあえず俺が聞いて得た情報は以上だ」: Shigeaki: “...Anyway, that’s all the info I managed to get.”
華穂\n「藤子さん……どうして撫子ちゃんの事……話したくないんだろ……」: Kaho: “Fujiko-san... I wonder why... she doesn't want to talk about Nadeshiko-chan...”
重明\n「さぁな……話したくないから部屋を勝手に調べてくれなんて言うぐらいだ……: Shigeaki: “Who knows... She said she doesn't want to talk so I should just investigate the room... She’s probably carrying some pretty heavy baggage... that’s about all I can tell.”
華穂\n「それと……いくら撫子ちゃんの情報を知りたいからって……何で藤子さんとＨ: Kaho: “Also... no matter how much you want info on Nadeshiko-chan... why would you end up having sex with Fujiko-san... Normally that’d be an instant breakup, you know?”
重明\n「根拠はないんだけど……あそこで条件を飲んでおかないと、撫子ちゃんの事件: Shigeaki: “I don’t have any basis for it, but... I felt like if I didn’t accept the condition there, I wouldn't be able to dig any deeper into Nadeshiko-chan's incident.”
華穂\n「……きーくんの直感が囁いたって事？」: Kaho: “...Your intuition whispered to you, Ki-kun?”
重明\n「ああ、そんな感じだ……あくまで気がしただけで、実際はあれが正解だったの: Shigeaki: “Yeah, something like that... It was just a feeling, and I don’t know if that was actually the right answer.”
呟くように言葉を漏らした華穂は、“よいしょっ”という可愛らしい声と同時に、俺の膝: Muttering those words, Kaho said, “Yoisho!” with a cute voice and stood up from my lap.
そしてその場でくるりと回りこちらへ向きなおると……華穂はまだベッドに座っていた俺: And turning around on the spot to face me again... Kaho brought her face close to mine as I was still sitting on the bed.
華穂\n「じゃあ、きーくんの直感が正しかったのか……今から撫子ちゃんの部屋に確認: Kaho: “Then, let’s go to Nadeshiko-chan's room right now and see if Ki-kun's intuition was right.”
重明\n「……確認した結果、俺の直感は大ハズレで藤子さんとＨした意味がまるでなか: Shigeaki: “...I hope the result of checking isn't that my intuition was a total miss and there was no point in having sex with Fujiko-san...”
華穂\n「大丈夫、私はきーくんの直感を信じるよ」: Kaho: “It’ll be fine. I believe in Ki-kun's intuition.”
華穂\n「それにたとえ勘が外れたとしても……もうあの事は殴ってケジメをつけたんだ: Kaho: “Besides, even if your hunch was wrong... I’ve already settled that matter by punching you, so don’t worry about it, don’t worry.”
並の女だったら、先ほどの件で早々に破局していただろう。: If she were an average woman, we would have broken up long ago over that matter earlier.
そんな華穂の器の広さと愛の深さを、こうして目の当たりにした事で……俺は自分が彼女: Witnessing Kaho's broad-mindedness and the depth of her love like this... I was once again reminded of how much I love her.
重明\n「調べ終わったら……予定通りＨしようぜ」: Shigeaki: “Once we’re done investigating... let’s have sex as planned.”
立ち上がり華穂と軽くキスを交わした後……: After standing up and exchanging a light kiss with Kaho...
俺達は手を繋ぎ仲良く撫子の部屋へと向かったのだった……: We held hands and headed off to Nadeshiko's room like a happy couple...
おもむろにドアノブへ手を伸ばすと、鍵がかかり途中で止まった先ほどと違い、最後まで: Reaching for the doorknob, unlike before when it was locked and stopped halfway, the lever went down with a click all the way.
……どうやら約束通り、藤子はこの部屋の鍵を開けてくれたようだ。: ...It seems that Touko has opened the lock to this room, just as she promised.
重明\n「ただ誰も居ない部屋に入るだけなのに……何だか少しドキドキしてきたな……: Shigeaki: “Even though I’m just entering an empty room... my heart’s starting to race a bit...”
華穂\n「あは……二人して探偵になったみたいだよね……私達の力で、隠蔽された事件: Kaho: “Aha... it feels like we’ve both become detectives... ‘We’ll use our power to uncover the truth of the covered-up incident!’ ...something like that.”
重明\n「一応そこそこの事件で隠蔽もされてたみたいだから、実際それに結構近い状況: Shigeaki: “It seems like it was a significant incident and it was covered up, so the situation actually is quite close to that... Well, for now, shall we go inside?”
華穂\n「……うん……間違いなくそう……」: Kaho: “...Yeah... there’s no doubt about it...”
独り言に近いこちらの言葉に、それとなく相槌を返す華穂……俺はその彼女のトーンの低: Kaho offered a faint acknowledgement to my words, which were little more than a mutter... but the low tone of her voice felt off, so I spoke up.
重明\n「……声に力がないけど、どうかしたのか？」: Shigeaki: “...Your voice sounds weak. Is something wrong?”
華穂\n「う～ん……どうかしたってわけでも、何かがあったわけでもないんだけど……: Kaho: “Hmm... it’s not that something’s wrong, or that anything happened... but I feel this strange sense of dissonance in this room.”
違和感と言われ感じたのは、客室である自分達の部屋とはかなり作りが違うという事……: When she mentioned dissonance, what I noticed was how different the layout was compared to our guest room...
ベッドは一つに、旅館にはそぐわない勉強机……どうみても個人の部屋。: A single bed, a study desk that didn't fit an inn... no matter how you looked at it, this was a private room.
つまり学生寮がペンションへと作り変えられる時に、この部屋だけは手を付けられなかっ: In other words, when the student dormitory was converted into a pension, this room alone was left untouched.
重明\n「……華穂の言う違和感とは違うと思うけど……何で改修した時に、ここだけは: Shigeaki: “...It might be different from the dissonance you’re feeling, Kaho... but I wonder why only this room wasn't renovated during the conversion...”
華穂\n「うーん……例えば死んだ撫子ちゃんが住んでいた場所だから、お客様を呼ぶに: Kaho: “Hmm... maybe because it’s where Nadeshiko-chan lived before she died, they thought it would be bad luck to have guests stay here?”
重明\n「そんな事を言ったら……この寮自体が縁起が悪いだろうが」: Shigeaki: “If that were the case... this whole dormitory would be considered bad luck.”
重明\n「可能性があるとしたら、このペンションの持ち主と撫子ちゃんの間に、何らか: Shigeaki: “If there’s a possibility, it’s that there was some kind of strong connection between the owner of this pension and Nadeshiko-chan.”
華穂\n「藤子さんと繋がりがあった？ 親戚とか？」: Kaho: “A connection with Fujiko-san? Like a relative?”
重明\n「親戚ぐらいの絆なら、宿へと修繕する時にそのまま残すなんて金の無駄になる: Shigeaki: “If it were just a familial bond, wouldn't it be a waste of money to leave it as is when repairing the inn?”
重明\n「……そもそも……このペンションって、藤子さんの物なのか？」: Shigeaki: “...Actually... does this pension even belong to Fujiko-san?”
華穂\n「つまり藤子さんは雇われ女将で、建物の持ち主は別にいるって事？」: Kaho: “You mean Fujiko-san is just a hired manager, and the owner of the building is someone else?”
重明\n「そう考えるのが無難だろうな……辺鄙な山奥とはいえ、あの若さでこうも立派: Shigeaki: “It’s a safe assumption... even if it’s in a remote mountain area, owning such a grand pension at her age would normally be impossible.”
華穂\n「じゃあ撫子ちゃんはこのペンションの持ち主の娘だったって……事なのかな？: Kaho: “Then... could it be that Nadeshiko-chan was the daughter of the pension's owner?”
重明\n「そいつが廃校後、娘の思い出が残ったこの部屋を残すためペンションにした…: Shigeaki: “And after the school closed, he turned it into a pension to preserve this room filled with memories of his daughter... something like that... maybe.”
華穂\n「なら何で藤子さんは私達にこの部屋を見せるのを躊躇ったり、撫子ちゃんの話: Kaho: “Then why did Fujiko-san hesitate to show us this room or talk about Nadeshiko-chan?”
重明\n「実は寮母の時の藤子さんと撫子ちゃんの父親は不倫してて、尚且つ結婚前提で: Shigeaki: “Maybe Fujiko-san, back when she was the dorm mother, was having an affair with Nadeshiko-chan's father, and they were in a relationship with the intention of marriage?”
華穂\n「それで死んだ撫子ちゃんに強い負目を感じている……と」: Kaho: “And so she feels a strong sense of guilt toward the deceased Nadeshiko-chan...”
重明\n「ああ……まああくまで全部俺の根拠のない推測だけど」: Shigeaki: “Yeah... well, it’s all just my baseless speculation.”
華穂\n「不倫してたって思う理由は？」: Kaho: “And why do you think they were having an affair?”
重明\n「普通に付き合ってただけなら、撫子ちゃんの父親と藤子さんが付き合ってた事: Shigeaki: “If they were just normally dating, wouldn't it be strange if you didn't know that Nadeshiko-chan's father and Fujiko-san were together?”
重明\n「けどまぁ……それっぽい事をそれっぽくこうして説明してはみたんだが……ぶ: Shigeaki: “But... even though I explained it like that to make it sound plausible... honestly, I think this speculation is probably wrong.”
華穂\n「なら私はきーくんのその勘が当たってる方に賭けるね」: Kaho: “Then I’ll bet on your intuition being right, Ki-kun.”
重明\n「……お互い実に論理的じゃないなぁ……ちなみに聞くけど、華穂が感じた違和: Shigeaki: “...We’re both being remarkably illogical... By the way, what was that dissonance you felt, Kaho?”
華穂\n「多分気のせいなんだと思うんだけど……この部屋、私の記憶と合い過ぎてる気: Kaho: “I’m sure it’s just my imagination... but I feel like this room matches my memories too perfectly.”
重明\n「合い過ぎてる？ ……寸分違わぬ状態って事か？」: Shigeaki: “Matches too perfectly? ...As in, an identical state?”
華穂\n「うん、合い過ぎてる……何て言うか……本来ハマらないはずのピースが無理や: Kaho: “Yeah, too perfectly... how do I put it... it’s like a puzzle piece that shouldn't fit was forced into place, and yet it looks right at first glance...?”
重明\n「……う～ん、見事なまでに具体性に欠けるなぁ……ちなみに撫子ちゃんが死ん: Shigeaki: “...Hmm, that’s impressively lacking in specifics... By the way, how many years has it been since Nadeshiko-chan died?”
重明\n「３年か……３年放置されてたにしては、確かに少し綺麗すぎるかもな……違和: Shigeaki: “Three years... for being left alone for three years, it might indeed be a bit too clean... maybe that’s the reason for the dissonance?”
華穂\n「うーん……そうなのかなぁ……でもそういう事じゃない気がする……」: Kaho: “Hmm... maybe... but I feel like that’s not quite it...”
重明\n「んじゃその違和感も含めて……今からこの部屋を軽く調べるとしようか」: Shigeaki: “Well then, including that dissonance... let’s give this room a quick search.”
もし名探偵なら、どこを調べれば効率よく自分の得たい情報が得られるか即座に見当がつ: If I were a great detective, I’d probably have an immediate idea of where to search to efficiently find the information I wanted... but unfortunately, both Kaho and I are just ordinary students who happen to be more attractive than most.
なのでとりあえず手当たり次第、二人して部屋の中を探した結果……: So, for the time being, we both searched through the room haphazardly...
俺達は撫子の所有物であろうアルバムと日記帳を運よく手に入れる事が出来たのだった。: And as luck would have it, we managed to get our hands on an album and a diary that presumably belonged to Nadeshiko.
重明\n「よし……とりあえずこんな所かな……」: Shigeaki: “Alright... I think this is about it...”
華穂\n「じゃあ座って中を確認しようか」: Kaho: “Then let's sit down and check the contents.”
俺はアルバムと日記帳を持つ華穂の腰へスッと手を回すと、彼女をベッドの端へとエスコ: I slipped my hand around the waist of Kaho, who was holding the album and diary, escorted her to the edge of the bed, and we sat down side-by-side.
重明\n「この二冊に俺達の知りたい謎が書かれてるといいな……」: Shigeaki: “I hope the mysteries we want to solve are written in these two books...”
華穂\n「アルバムと日記を見終わったら、きーくんが物色してる時に散らかした撫子ち: Kaho: “Once we’re done with the album and diary, you have to properly put back the underwear of Nadeshiko-chan that you scattered while you were rummaging around... okay?”
重明\n「わかってるって……ちゃんと取り出す前より綺麗に畳んでしまうから心配しな: Shigeaki: “I know... I’ll fold them even more neatly than they were before I took them out, so don't you worry.”
重明\n「じゃあまずはアルバム……を、見る前に……キスしよっか」: Shigeaki: “Then, first the album... but before that... let’s kiss.”
重明\n「……いや実はさ……自分でも罰当たりとは思うんだけど、撫子ちゃんの未発達: Shigeaki: “...Well, actually... I know it’s disrespectful, but while I was digging through Nadeshiko-chan's underdeveloped underwear... I got a bit of an erotic feeling.”
華穂\n「理由が思いのほか最悪だよ！？ きーくんほんと自粛しようよ！？」: Kaho: “The reason is unexpectedly the worst!? Ki-kun, seriously, show some self-restraint!?”
重明\n「しょうがないだろ……何となくそういう気分になっちゃったんだから……」: Shigeaki: “I can't help it... I just ended up in that kind of mood...”
華穂\n「……もおぉ……きーくんの節操なし……」: Kaho: “...Geez... Ki-kun, you have no shame...”
華穂\n「じゃあ……キスで許してあげる……」: Kaho: “Fine... I’ll forgive you with a kiss...”
フサフサな睫毛が下り目が閉じると、華穂の柔らかく瑞々しい唇がこちらへ突き出される: As her thick eyelashes lowered and her eyes closed, Kaho's soft and succulent lips were thrust toward me.
そんな彼女を迎え入れるように……俺は優しくそっと華穂と唇を重ねさせたのだった。: As if to welcome her... I gently and softly overlapped my lips with Kaho's.
まず最初に見る事になったのはアルバム。: The first thing we looked at was the album.
ページの始めの方は大半が風景ばかりで、撮った時間もかなり飛び飛びという……正直言: The beginning of the pages consisted mostly of scenery, and the times they were taken were quite scattered... honestly, it was made up of photos that weren't very cute.
そんなどこか寂しいアルバムも、華穂が転校してきた辺りを転機に、撫子と華穂のツーシ: But that somewhat lonely album reached a turning point around the time Kaho transferred in, and the photos shifted to mainly being two-shots of Nadeshiko and Kaho.
うって変わって楽しげな撫子の学園生活の様子がアルバムを彩り、彼女が充実した日々を: In stark contrast, the cheerful state of Nadeshiko's school life adorned the album, and it was clear from the many photos that she had been living fulfilling days.
そうして端まで確認してみたものの……写真は正月を越えたあたりまでしか存在せず、以: We checked all the way to the end... but photos only existed until around the New Year, and after that, not a single one was in the album.
重明\n「う～ん……アルバムには事件に繋がるような重要な情報は見つけられなかった: Shigeaki: “Hmm... I couldn't find any important information in the album that would lead to the incident...”
華穂\n「そうだね……もしかすると、私達が写真の中に隠された撫子ちゃんの意図を見: Kaho: “I guess so... although it might just be that we missed Nadeshiko-chan's intention hidden within the photos.”
重明\n「まーな……じゃあ次は日記を読むとするか……」: Shigeaki: “Maybe... well then, shall we read the diary next...?”
続いて手にしていたアルバムをベッドの適当な場所へ置き、予め近くに用意していた日記: I placed the album I’d been holding on a suitable spot on the bed, grabbed the diary we’d prepared nearby, and moved it to my lap.
そして俺は謎の死を遂げた撫子という少女が残した日記帳を、ゆっくりと捲り始めたのだ: And then, I slowly began to flip through the diary left behind by the girl named Nadeshiko, who had met a mysterious death...
重明\n「……冒頭のページから、またえらく重い感じできたな……」: Shigeaki: “...It starts off with quite a heavy feeling from the very first page...”
この短い数行に、撫子という女の子の鬱々とした性格がよくでている気がする。: I feel like Nadeshiko's gloomy personality comes out well in these short few lines.
こういった文を書く子なら、アルバムに収められていた写真が風景ばかりというのも頷け: If she’s a girl who writes things like this, it makes sense that the photos in the album were mostly scenery.
華穂\n「この……新入生の教育って……何の事だろう？」: Kaho: “This... ‘education of the new student’... what could it mean?”
重明\n「何らかの部活やら委員会に所属していたとか？」: Shigeaki: “Maybe she belonged to some club or committee?”

部屋中には雌の香りが充満し……私自身も汗と淫液で酷い匂いをしているに違いない。: The room was filled with a female's scent... and I myself was surely smelling terribly of sweat and love juice.
