私は寝転がったまま右手を伸ばし、部屋の灯りのスイッチを押そうと試みる。: While lying down, I reached out my right hand and tried to press the light switch for the room.
何度か手を振ると、上手いこと指先が当たり部屋の灯りが消えてくれた。: After waving my hand a few times, my fingertip hit it just right and the room light went out.
最後に残っていたキャミソールを乱暴に脱ぎ全裸になると、身体をうつ伏せにして両目を: Rudely taking off the camisole that was left and becoming completely naked, I turned my body face down and closed both eyes.
そして私は押し寄せる虚脱感に飲まれるように……ゆっくりと意識を闇の中へと落として: And so, as if being swallowed by the surge of exhaustion... I slowly let my consciousness drop into the darkness...
今日は文化祭の３日目。: Today is the third day of the culture festival.
この３日間は、朝から晩まで華穂さまとずっと一緒だった。: For these three days, I have been with Kaho-sama from morning until night.
一緒に居る時は常に手を握り、何かを食べたり飲んだりする時は、お互いが相手に食べさ: We are always holding hands when we are together, and whenever we eat or drink something, we feed each other.
まさに幸せの絶頂……: It is truly the height of bliss...
そんな楽しい時間を過ごして居た時……私は寮の方へ向かう一台の車に気付き、視線を動: While I was spending such a wonderful time... I noticed a car heading toward the dormitory and followed it with my gaze.
あのハデな外車は見た事がある……たしか学校の裏の顔であるウチの常連客だ。: I have seen that flashy imported car before... it surely belongs to one of our regulars, a client of the school's hidden side.
だが今日は文化祭で一般人が多いため、寮での裏の営業は休業している。: However, because there are many outsiders visiting for the culture festival today, the illicit business at the dormitory is suspended.
その休業を利用して実家に帰ったお母さんは、夜まで寮に戻らないらしい。: Taking advantage of the break, my mother has gone back to her parents' house and supposedly won't return to the dorm until tonight.
そして尚人も今は表の顔である教師として、色々と忙しいはずだ。: And Naoto must be busy right now with his public role as a teacher.
とりあえず尚人に報告するとしても、先にお客様が何の用事でここに来たのか、話を聞い: Even if I am to report this to Naoto later, I should first find out what business the client has here.
私は一緒に居た華穂さまに、この辺で少し待っていて欲しいと頼み、一人寮へと向かった: I asked Kaho-sama to wait for me here for a moment and headed toward the dormitory alone...
男の客は訪れる日を間違って、ここに来てしまったらしい。: It seemed the male client had mistaken the date of his visit.
それなのに客は自分の間違いを一切認めず、生意気だと逆ギレして私は横腹を蹴られてし: Despite that, the man refused to admit his mistake and, flying into a rage at my supposed "impudence," he kicked me in the side.
自分の体重が軽い事もあり、吹き飛ばされた私はゴロゴロとロビーの床を転がっていく。: Being lightweight, I was sent flying and went rolling across the lobby floor.
撫子\n（……女の子を……容赦なく革靴で蹴るとか……どういう神経しているのよ……: Nadeshiko: (...Kicking a girl... with leather shoes without mercy... what kind of nerves does he have...)
真っ先に文句を言ってやりたいが……こういう輩は、大抵【女は家畜で会話する価値もな: I wanted to scream complaints at him first thing... but people like this usually believe "women are livestock not worth talking to," and conversation is often impossible.
むしろ暴力を振るう事が、女の為になると……本気で信じているような奴等だ。: If anything, they are the type who truly believe that using violence is for the woman's own sake.
撫子\n（……これだから、金もっていい気になってるヤツって嫌い……）: Nadeshiko: (...This is why I hate people who get full of themselves just because they have money...)
男の横暴な態度に腹が立つが、私が今後尚人と共に相手をしていく客は、こういうゲスい: I am furious at the man's arrogant attitude, but the clients I will have to deal with alongside Naoto from now on are all of this disgusting breed.
社会の裏で行われる商売に、客を選ぶ自由などないのだ。: In a business conducted in the shadows of society, there is no freedom to choose your clients.
普段なら尚人が睨みを効かせている為、どんな客も大人しくしているのだが……今回は主: Normally, Naoto would be keeping a sharp eye on things, so any guest would behave... but since the master is away this time, this man must have decided to "educate" the disrespectful me.
不要な騒ぎを起こしたくない私は、理不尽に感じている事などおくびにも出さず、立ち上: Not wanting to cause an unnecessary scene, I didn't let any of my feelings of injustice show. I stood up and bowed sincerely, suggesting that there might have been a deficiency on our part as well.
すると客は気が済んだらしく……後日また来るといい、立ち去っていった。: The client seemed satisfied then... saying he would return another day, and left.
撫子\n（……痛い……この事、尚人に言ったら……【何で呼ばなかったんだ】って……: Nadeshiko: (...It hurts... if I tell Naoto about this... he’ll probably complain, saying "Why didn't you call me?"...)
こういった目に遭う事など、すべてを尚人に報告していないだけで、買われた女生徒を含: Things like this happen all the time to us, including the female students who were bought; we just don't report everything to Naoto.
ああいう手合い相手に、尚人の加護もなしに横腹が痛む程度で済んだのなら……それはも: If I got away with nothing more than a dull ache in my side against a man like that without Naoto's protection... that might as well be considered uninjured.
撫子\n（……ちょっと蹴られた程度だし……蹴られた部分は黙っておこっと……）: Nadeshiko: (...It was just a little kick... I'll keep quiet about where I was hit...)
トラブルを解決した私は寮を出ると、身体の痛む箇所を庇いつつ、急ぎ華穂さまが居る場: Having resolved the trouble, I left the dormitory and, shielding the painful area, hurried back to where Kaho-sama was...
撫子\n（……華穂さまはどこかなっと……あ、居た居た……）: Nadeshiko: (...I wonder where Kaho-sama is... Ah, there she is...)
学園祭で多くの人が賑わう中……: Amidst the bustling crowds of the school festival...
私の大好きな人は何時も通りの美貌を輝かせ、周りを行きかう人々の視線を釘付けにして: My beloved person was shining with her usual beauty, capturing the gazes of everyone passing by.
一人で座っていると思ったら、誰かと話している……もしかして、華穂さまの親戚だろう: I thought she was sitting alone, but she is talking to someone... could it be one of Kaho-sama's relatives?
華穂さまと一緒に座っているのは、私が良く知っている人……尚人だった。: Sitting with Kaho-sama was someone I knew very well... Naoto.
いい雰囲気で話し合う二人……華穂さま同様、尚人も笑顔を浮かべている。: The two of them are talking in a good atmosphere... and just like Kaho-sama, Naoto has a smile on his face.
私はその尚人の笑顔に……妙な違和感のようなものを感じていた。: I felt a strange sense of dissonance... from that smile of Naoto's.
私が知る尚人の笑顔は２つ……作り物の笑顔と、人をあざ笑い見下す冷笑……: The smiles I know from Naoto are two: a fabricated smile, and a cold sneer that mocks and looks down on people...
今、尚人が浮かべている笑顔は……明らかにそのどちらでもない。: The smile Naoto is wearing now... is clearly neither of those.
尚人は……何かに困ったような、不器用な感じの笑顔を浮かべていた。: Naoto... is wearing a troubled, awkward-looking smile.
私の知る尚人は決して誰にも弱みを見せない、鋼のような強い心の持ち主。: The Naoto I know is a person with a heart like steel, who never shows weakness to anyone.
……そんな尚人が……会って間もない華穂さまの前で……: ...That Naoto... in front of Kaho-sama, whom he has only just met...
どこか自信がなさそうな……心の弱さを垣間見せるような……困った笑みを……浮かべて: Is wearing a troubled smile... one that seems lacking in confidence... a glimpse of weakness in his heart.
私以外の人間からすれば、ただ尚人と華穂さまが仲良く談笑しているだけに見えるに違い: To anyone other than me, it must look like Naoto and Kaho-sama are simply having a friendly chat.
そんな単純な状況を、私はまるで理解出来ず……: I could not understand such a simple situation at all...
頭の中は、まるで貧血を起こしたかのように思考が真っ白になり……身体と心から、力が: My mind went white as if I had suffered an attack of anemia... and strength drained away from my body and soul.
そして私はそのまま二人に近づく事なく、来た道を戻り……: And so, without approaching the two, I turned back the way I came...
寮へとゆっくり歩き始めたのだった……: And began to walk slowly back toward the dormitory...
二人が話している姿を見た後……: After seeing the two of them talking...
何も考えずベッドに寝そべっていた私の携帯に、華穂さまからメールがきた。: An email from Kaho-sama arrived on my phone while I was lying aimlessly on my bed.
直ぐ戻ると言っておきながら、ずっと待たせているのだ……何かあったのかと思うのが普: I had told her I would be right back and have kept her waiting all this time... it is only natural to wonder if something happened.
私は携帯を操作し、謝罪の後、疲労で具合が悪くなったので今日はこのまま休ませてくだ: I operated my phone and, after an apology, composed a message saying I had started feeling unwell due to exhaustion and would like to rest for the day, then sent the email.
具合が悪いのは別に嘘ではない……この３日間は遊び通しで疲れは溜まっているし、それ: Feeling unwell was not exactly a lie... after playing all out for these three days, fatigue has built up, and the side where the client kicked me is still throbbing with pain.
しばらくして返ってきた返信には【大丈夫？ お見舞いに行こうか？】と書かれていた。: The reply that came back a while later said, "Are you okay? Should I come visit you?"
それに対し私は【大丈夫です、疲れているだけなので明日には元気になると思います】と: In response, I pushed away Kaho-sama's concern, replying, "I'm fine, I'm just tired so I think I'll be better by tomorrow."
お別れの挨拶をメールで済ますと、私は携帯を適当な場所に置き、再び身体を横たわらせ: Having finished the parting greetings via email, I placed my phone in a random spot and lay down again.
感じていた痛みを確認するように口にして、私は傷ついた脇腹を手で押さえていく。: Confirming the pain I felt by speaking it aloud, I pressed my hand against my injured side.
けどこうして痛みを感じている方が安心する。: But I feel more at ease when I can feel the pain like this.
身体に痛い箇所があれば……目を背けている事を、無駄に考えずに済むのだから……: As long as there is a part of my body that hurts... I don't have to waste time thinking about the things I am averting my eyes from...
文化祭の片付けも終わり、学校に日常が戻ってきた。: The cleanup for the culture festival ended, and daily life returned to the school.
そして私の心も、学校が通常通りになる頃にはすっかり立ち直っていた。: And my heart had fully recovered by the time things were back to normal.
秋から冬に変わり始めた少し肌寒い陽気の中……私達の明るく弾んだ声が、周辺に響き渡: In the slightly chilly weather as autumn began to turn to winter... our bright, bouncy voices echoed in the surroundings.
久々の華穂さまとの二人だけのお茶会。: A long-awaited tea party with just the two of us, Kaho-sama and me.
華穂\n「学園祭、終わっちゃったね～」: Kaho: “The school festival is over, isn't it~”
撫子\n「そうですね……３日間、あっという間でしたね」: Nadeshiko: “That’s right... the three days went by in a flash.”
華穂\n「うんうん、すっごく楽しかったね♪」: Kaho: “Mm-hmm, it was so much fun♪”
華穂\n「でも楽しい学園祭が終わったって事は、いよいよ受験が近いって事だよね……: Kaho: “But the end of the fun school festival means entrance exams are finally close... we have to tighten up our relaxed spirits.”
撫子\n「引き締めるって言っても、華穂さまは頭がいいから志望してる所は余裕なんじ: Nadeshiko: “Even if you say that, Kaho-sama, you're smart, so aren't you certain to get into your first choice?”
華穂\n「まぁ危機感は感じては居ないけど……油断は禁物かな」: Kaho: “Well, I don't feel a sense of crisis... but I shouldn't let my guard down.”
華穂\n「ところで、撫子ちゃんはここを卒業した後はどうするの？」: Kaho: “By the way, Nadeshiko-chan, what are you going to do after you graduate from here?”
撫子\n「私ですか？ 私は就職しますよ」: Nadeshiko: “Me? I'm going to get a job.”
華穂\n「え……進学しないの？」: Kaho: “Eh... you're not going to college?”
撫子\n「はい……色々と家の事情がありまして……」: Nadeshiko: “Yes... there are various family circumstances...”
そもそも私は何かあった時に簡単に切り捨てられるようにと、戸籍すら持っていなかった: In the first place, I don't even have a family register, so that I can be easily discarded if anything happens.
つまり……尚人の父親の息がかかっているこの学園ならいざ知らず、私には普通の場所へ: In other words... while it might be different for this academy, which is under the influence of Naoto's father, I do not possess the freedom to go anywhere normal.
撫子\n（まぁ今のところ戸籍がないから困った何て事なかったから、別にいいんだけど: Nadeshiko: (Well, I haven't been troubled by the lack of a family register so far, so I don't really mind.)
華穂\n「そうなんだ……撫子ちゃん結構勉強出来る方だし……もしかしたら一年違いで: Kaho: “I see... Nadeshiko-chan is quite good at studying... so I thought maybe we could be together again with a one-year difference... but I guess it’s impossible...”
華穂さまと再び同じ学校に通う……それは実に魅力的な話だが、やはり無理な話だろう。: Attending the same school as Kaho-sama again... it is a truly attractive idea, but as expected, it is impossible.
そもそも私が学校に居る理由が、学業などではなく……尚人の仕事を手伝うためなのだか: After all, the reason I am at school is not for academics... it is to help with Naoto's work.
撫子\n「私も出来ればそうしたいんですけど……やっぱり無理だと思います……何て言: Nadeshiko: “I would like to do that if I could, but... I think it’s impossible after all... how should I put it... it’s already been decided.”
華穂\n「でも、私が卒業したら会えなくなるわけじゃないよね？」: Kaho: “But, it doesn't mean we won't be able to see each other once I graduate, right?”
撫子\n「はい、華穂さまがよろしければ……流石に今みたいに頻繁にってわけにはいか: Nadeshiko: “Yes, if you're okay with it, Kaho-sama... though I won't be able to see you as frequently as I do now... I want to see you forever too.”
華穂\n「よかった……私、撫子ちゃんともうすぐ会えなくなるのかと思っちゃったよ」: Kaho: “I'm glad... I thought maybe I wouldn't be able to see Nadeshiko-chan anymore soon.”
華穂\n「へへ……安心安心」: Kaho: “Hehe... what a relief, what a relief.”
華穂さまの明るく優しげな笑顔が、私の心を暖かく満たしていく。: Kaho-sama's bright, gentle smile fills my heart with warmth.
この人と出会うまでの私は、自分はなんて下卑た存在なのだろうと日々を陰鬱と過ごして: Until I met this person, I spent my days in gloom, thinking about what a vulgar existence I was.
だが今では自分の境遇など、どうでもいいと思える。: But now, I feel like my circumstances don't matter.
確かに私の現状は酷い有様……華穂さまが知ったら、間違いなく見る目が変わってしまう: True, my current situation is a mess... if Kaho-sama found out, the way she looks at me would undoubtedly change... she might even hate me at worst.
けど、知られたら知られたで仕方がない……その時はその時……まだ何も起きていない今: But if it's found out, it's found out... I'll deal with it then... there's no point in fearing the future here and now when nothing has happened yet.
そう……私が出来る事があるとしたら、せいぜいその何かが起きるまで精一杯華穂さまと: Yes... if there is anything I can do, it is at most to be as friendly as I can with Kaho-sama until that "something" happens.
撫子\n（そうだ……私は私の生い立ちに引け目を感じ、ただ下を向くのではなく……前: Nadeshiko: (That’s right... instead of feeling inferior about my upbringing and just looking down... I'll look forward and spend every precious moment with Kaho-sama who is right in front of me...)
私は自分の考えを胸に流し込むように、カップに注がれた熱いお茶を口元に運んでいく。: As if swallowing my thoughts into my chest, I brought the hot tea poured into the cup to my lips.
すると暖かな安心感が胸に染み込み……私は今の幸せを実感し、自然と笑みを浮かべてし: A warm sense of security soaked into my chest... and as I felt my current happiness, I naturally found myself smiling.
あの日を境に……華穂さまの口から、度々尚人の名前が出るようになった。: From that day on... Naoto's name frequently began to come out of Kaho-sama's mouth.
そして時を同じく、学校内で尚人と華穂さまの仲がいいという噂が出始める。: And around the same time, rumors began to spread within the school that Naoto and Kaho-sama were on good terms.
噂をする人達は皆知らないだけ……二人では住む世界が違いすぎる。: The people spreading rumors just don't know... the worlds the two live in are too different.
闇に生きる尚人が、普通の世界に生きる華穂さまと普通の付き合いをするなんて事が……: There is no way that Naoto, who lives in the darkness, could have a normal relationship with Kaho-sama, who lives in the normal world.
私自身……社会の裏と表で生きる人間は仲良く出来る訳がない……そう思って接触を拒み: I myself... thought that people living on the front and back of society could never get along... and had continued to refuse contact...
尚人が住む世界に近い場所に居た私がそう思えたという事は……尚人も少なからず華穂さ: If I, who lived in a place close to the world Naoto lives in, could feel that way... then isn't it possible that Naoto too is attracted to Kaho-sama and his thinking will change?
ではこの際、尚人が華穂さまによって変わったと仮定しよう。: Then, let's assume for a moment that Naoto has changed because of Kaho-sama.
……それが私にとって、何の問題になるというのだろうか？: ...What kind of problem would that be for me?
どうして私は……華穂さまと尚人が仲良くなるたびに、ああも冷静さを失ってしまうのだ: Why do I... lose my composure so much every time Naoto and Kaho-sama get closer?
二人が仲良くなる状況を考えようとすると、頭がもやもやする。: Whenever I try to think about the situation of the two getting closer, my head feels foggy.
そうなる理由も、何度考えても理解できない。: No matter how many times I think about it, I cannot understand the reason why.
理不尽な自分の思考を分析する為、私は頭を冷やし感情を凍らせていく。: To analyze my own irrational thoughts, I cooled my head and let my emotions freeze.
日課となっている日記を書く事で、自分の事を第三者から見たかのように捉え、考察出来: By writing in the diary that has become my daily routine, I might be able to perceive and analyze myself as if from a third party's perspective.
日記に今日の出来事を書き綴る中……ふと部屋の中に入ってきた冷気に、私はブルっと身: While writing down today's events in my diary... I suddenly felt a chill enter the room and my body tensed with a shiver.
このまま取り巻く空気が、徐々に冬へと近づいていくのだろう。: The surrounding air will likely continue to approach winter gradually.
その気温の変化に合わせるかのように……: As if matching that change in temperature...
私は自分の世界も何か熱が失われていくような……そんな気がしたのだった……: I felt as if something like heat was being lost from my own world too... that was the sensation I had...
１２月の初め……仕事の事で尚人と口論になった。: At the beginning of December... I had an argument with Naoto about work.
かなり感情的になりまくし立てたものの……別に尚人に反発したわけではない。: Although I became quite emotional and ranted at him... it wasn't as if I was rebelling against Naoto.
自分は尚人の所有物……奴隷がご主人様に逆らうなど許されないという事ぐらい、子供の: Even as a child, I am well aware that I am Naoto's property... that a slave is not allowed to defy their master.
けれど一緒に仕事をする以上……良くないと思った部分を、指摘せずにはいられなかった: However, as long as we work together... I could not help but point out the parts I thought were not good.
私はここ最近、妙に怒りっぽくなった気がする。: I feel like I've become strangely short-tempered lately.
今日だけではない……ここ最近の私は、何だか妙に怒りっぽく、些細な事で腹を立てるよ: It's not just today... lately, I've become strangely irritable, getting angry over trivial things.
今もしつこく尚人と華穂さまの事を妄想で語る外野の声に動揺しないよう、感情をギュッ: Even now, I am tightly suppressing my emotions so as not to be shaken by the voices of outsiders who talk about Naoto and Kaho-sama with delusions.
その反動からなのか、火がつくと凄い勢いで爆発してしまうのだ。: Perhaps because of that reaction, once the fire is lit, I explode with incredible force.
そうして一通り怒りのエネルギーを使うと、今度は波が引くかのように冷静さを取り戻し: After I've used up my energy on anger, I regain my composure as if the tide is receding.
撫子\n（……やっちゃった……よりにもよって……尚人の前で……）: Nadeshiko: (...I've done it... of all people... in front of Naoto...)
尚人\n「……お前の言いたい事はそれで終わりか？」: Naoto: “...Is that the end of what you wanted to say?”
喧嘩腰に指摘した意見は、こうして冷静になってから軽く考え直しても、自分は正しい指: Thinking back calmly on the opinions I pointed out in a combative manner, I am confident that I made the correct points.
だが内容を相手に伝達する手段としては、私は明確に間違えてしまった。: However, as a means of communicating the content to the other person, I was clearly wrong.
そもそも正しい事を相手に伝えたいのであれば、無闇に攻撃的になる必要はない……相手: In the first place, if you want to convey something correct to someone, there is no need to be unnecessarily aggressive... there is no reason at all to make the other person uncomfortable.
撫子\n（……何でこんな事で感情的になっちゃったんだろ……私……）: Nadeshiko: (...Why did I get so emotional over something like this... me...)
尚人\n「わかった、お前の意見は前向きに検討する……疲れているみたいだし、今日は: Naoto: “I understand, I will consider your opinion positively... you seem tired, so rest for today.”
地下室から離れると、私の胸の中に自分のご主人様である尚人を不快にしてしまったので: Leaving the basement, an anxiety welled up in my chest that I might have made my master, Naoto, uncomfortable.
撫子\n（……大丈夫……尚人は凄い大人だし……そのぐらいでは怒ったりはしない……: Nadeshiko: (...It’s okay... Naoto is a mature adult... he won't get angry over something like that...)
私はこれまでずっと尚人の傍に居たのだ……人の言葉で安易に腹を立て、根に持つような: I have been by Naoto's side all this time... I am well aware that he is not the kind of person who gets easily angry at people's words and holds a grudge.
だがこんな小娘に、しかも自分の奴隷に罵倒されたのだ……普通に考えれば正論だろうと: But he was insulted by such a young girl, and his own slave at that... normally speaking, it would be natural to get angry and hold a grudge, even if it were a sound argument.
そう思うと、まだ地下室に一人でいるであろう尚人が、鬼の形相で腹を立てているような: Thinking so, I felt as if Naoto, who must still be alone in the basement, was furious with a demonic expression... and becoming frightened, I hurried my steps toward my own room.
ご主人様に激しく怒ったと思ったら、今度は妄想で不安になり軽いパニックになる……ま: One moment I am violently angry at my master, and the next I am becoming anxious and panicking over my own delusions... it's as if I have no control over my emotions.
……明らかに、自分はどうかしている……: ...Clearly, there is something wrong with me...
……私は……頭がおかしくなってしまったのだろうか？: ...Have I... gone crazy in the head?
扉が閉まり一人きりの空間に入ると、部屋に辿り着くまで感じていた不安が急に強まり、: Once the door closed and I entered the space where I was alone, the anxiety I felt until I reached the room suddenly intensified, and my emotions were dominated by a feeling of sadness.
ベッドに倒れこむと、そのまま私の両目からわけもなくボロボロと涙が流れ始めた。: Collapsing onto the bed, tears began to flow uncontrollably from both my eyes for no reason.
私はめったに泣かない方だ……小さい頃から暴力を受けても罵倒されようとも、大人しく: I am not the type to cry often... since I was little, I was a child who would quietly not cry even if I were subjected to violence or insults.
けど偶に、何となく泣いてしまう。: But occasionally, I just end up crying for some reason.
そうして泣いた時は、必ずお母さんか尚人が抱きしめてくれた。: Whenever I cried like that, my mother or Naoto would always hold me.
……恐らく一人で泣いたのは、これが初めて……: ...This is probably the first time I have cried alone...
その事に気づいた私は……余計悲しくなり、いつまでも泣き続けたのだった……: Realizing that... I became even sadder and continued to cry forever...
１２月の中旬……期末試験もあり、最近華穂さまと話をしない事が多くなった。: Mid-December... with final exams, there have been many times lately when I haven't talked to Kaho-sama.
そして女生徒の噂が正しければ、私とは対照的に、華穂さまと尚人の会う頻度が徐々に増: And if the rumors from the female students are correct, in contrast to me, the frequency of Kaho-sama and Naoto meeting seems to be gradually increasing.
この状況に慣れてきたのか……ここ最近、私は華穂さまと尚人の噂話や、二人が話してい: Perhaps I've become accustomed to this situation... lately, I haven't been very shaken even when I hear rumors about Kaho-sama and Naoto or see the two of them talking.
そして心動かされなくなった分だけ……私は何かをしようとする熱意や意欲を、前より持: And to the extent that my heart was no longer moved... I found myself unable to have the enthusiasm or motivation to do anything, more so than before.
ようは……華穂さまに会う前の昔の自分に戻ったのだ。: In short... I have returned to my old self from before I met Kaho-sama.
授業も終わり気温も大分落ちてきた寮までの道を歩く中……私は胸に溜まった陰鬱とした: Walking the path to the dormitory after classes ended and the temperature had dropped considerably, I let out a deep sigh—haaa—as if to exhale the gloomy feelings gathered in my chest.
虚しさのせいか、人のぬくもりが欲しい……ここ最近、尚人とセックスをしていないので: Perhaps because of the emptiness, I want human warmth... since I haven't had sex with Naoto lately, I'm feeling extra horny.
何の意欲も熱意もないのに、性欲だけは一丁前……実に低俗で浅ましい。: No motivation or enthusiasm, yet my sex drive is fully operational... truly vulgar and shallow.
私は自分という人間のくだらなさに呆れ、乾いた笑いを小さく口元からこぼれ出させた。: I was appalled at how pathetic a human being I was, and a dry laugh escaped my lips.
周りに誰も居ない事を確認した後、私はロビーの何もない空間に声をかけた。: After confirming no one was around, I spoke into the empty space of the lobby.
そういえば独り言も増えた気がする。: Come to think of it, I feel like my habit of talking to myself has increased too.
部屋に戻ると、誰も居ないはずの私の部屋に尚人が居た。: When I returned to my room, Naoto was there in my room, where no one should have been.
勝手に部屋に入るなと思わなくもないが……私達の関係性を一般の女生徒たちにバラさな: I can't help but think he shouldn't enter my room as he pleases... but considering the need to avoid revealing our relationship to the ordinary female students, it can't be helped.
女が男に言う第一声としては、デリカシーがないにもホドがある。: As a first thing for a woman to say to a man, it's beyond tactless.
しかもヤリたいのは自分……余計、たちが悪い。: And the one who wants to do it is me... that makes it even worse.
尚人\n「いや、この後も用事がある……忙しいから無理だ」: Naoto: “No, I have things to do after this... I'm busy, so I can't.”
一瞬……ただ単に貧相な身体をしている私としたくないだけなのではと思ったが、多分違: For a moment... I thought maybe he just didn't want to do it with someone who had such a pathetic body like mine, but that's probably not it.
尚人は普通に多忙なのだ……表は教師をやり、裏では仕込んだ女生徒の身体を金持ちに売: Naoto is normally very busy... being a teacher by day and training bought female students to sell to wealthy men by night... if you effectively have two jobs, of course you'll be busy.
尚人と言い合いになってから２週間……: It's been two weeks since the argument with Naoto...
試験期間が終われば、来年ここに売られてくる新入生を迎える準備をしなければならない: Once the exam period is over, we have to prepare to welcome the new students who will be sold here next year.
学業優先と言われ、最近仕事から離れていたが……そろそろ復帰の頃合だろう。: I had been away from work lately because I was told academics come first... but it's about time to return.
撫子\n（……仕事中もギスギスしてるなんて嫌だし……そろそろ仲直りしておくかな…: Nadeshiko: (...I don't want things to be tense while we're working... maybe I should make up with him soon...)
恐らく口論した事を、尚人は気にしていない……この男はそういうヤツだ。: Naoto probably doesn't care about the argument... that's the kind of guy he is.
けどこっちは、はいそうですかといきなり気持ちを切り替える事は出来ない。: But for my part, I can't just suddenly switch my feelings like that.
私は自分の尚人への苛立ちを一度リセットさせるため……最近失いつつあった心の力を奮: To reset my irritation toward Naoto, I roused the strength of heart I had been losing lately and spoke to him.
撫子\n「最近、何かギスギスした感じになってたけど……もう大丈夫」: Nadeshiko: “Lately, things have been feeling a bit tense... but I'm fine now.”
撫子\n（ほら……言うと思った）: Nadeshiko: (See... I knew he'd say that.)
撫子\n「いいの、こっちの話……試験終わったら今まで通り、調教の手伝いとかするね: Nadeshiko: “It's fine, it's my own thing... once exams are over, I'll help with the training as usual.”
尚人\n「いや、お前はもう仕事を手伝わなくていい」: Naoto: “No, you don't have to help with the work anymore.”
予想外の言葉に呆然とする私に、尚人は来年から別の学校へ転校しろという言葉を続けて: As I stood dazed by his unexpected words, Naoto went on to say that I should transfer to another school starting next year.
尚人の言っている事が理解出来ない。: I cannot understand what Naoto is saying.
……私は尚人の所有物で、ご主人様の仕事を手伝う為に……この学校に来たのだ。: ...I am Naoto's property, and I came to this school... to help with my master's work.
転校したら仕事を手伝えないではないか。: If I transfer, I won't be able to help with the work.
だから私は言った……仕事はどうするんだと……そう尋ねた。: So I said it... what about the work... I asked him that.
その問いに尚人は答えた……とてもわかりやすく……非常に端的に。: To that question, Naoto answered... very clearly... and very curtly.
尚人\n「お前が居なくても大丈夫だ」: Naoto: “It's fine even if you're not here.”
……その尚人の言葉は……私の心の何かをへし折り……: ...Those words of Naoto's... snapped something in my heart...
具合が悪いから寮に残ると言った私を残し、尚人は売られてきた子達を連れお母さんと家: Leaving me behind after I said I would stay at the dorm because I felt unwell, Naoto went home with my mother and the girls who had been sold.
身体がだるく体調が優れないのは本当だが……それ以上に今は尚人の傍に居たくない。: It is true that my body feels heavy and I don't feel well... but more than that, I don't want to be near Naoto right now.
撫子\n（……これでも与えられた仕事は真面目にこなして来たつもりなのに……）: Nadeshiko: (...Even though I thought I had been doing the work I was given seriously...)
ようするに面と向かって【お前が居なくても大丈夫】と言われ平然としていられるほど…: In short, I am not a person with a heart strong enough to remain unperturbed after being told to my face, "It's fine even if you're not here."
だが事実その通りなのかもしれない。: But it might actually be as he says.
傍には常にお母さんが居るし、尚人の仕事は子供の私が無理に背伸びして手伝うほど切羽: My mother is always by his side, and Naoto's work is not in such a desperate state that a child like me needs to overstretch myself to help.
私は気だるさを吐き出すようにため息を吐くと、最近読んでいなかった漫画を掴みページ: Exhaling my languor as a sigh, I grabbed a manga I hadn't read lately and flipped the pages.
これはお気に入りの作者の新刊で、予約注文した時は凄い気になっていたのだ。: This was a new release by my favorite author, and I had been very curious about it when I pre-ordered it.
この漫画は絶対に面白い……華穂さまにも自信を持って薦めたくらいだ。: This manga is definitely interesting... I even recommended it to Kaho-sama with confidence.
それなのに、読んでみるとまるで面白くない……言いたい事はわかるのだが、即だから何: And yet, reading it, it isn't interesting at all... I understand what it's trying to say, but I immediately think, "So what?"
部屋で漫画を読む事に苦痛を感じた私は、気晴らしに寮の中をブラブラと歩いていた。: Feeling it a pain to read manga in my room, I was wandering aimlessly through the dormitory for a change of pace.
ロビーには人の気配はない……何人かの生徒は寮に残っているものの、皆自分達の部屋に: There was no sign of people in the lobby... while a few students are staying at the dorm, they must all be holed up in their own rooms.
私は何となくその場でくるりと回り、ロビーの風景を見渡していく。: I casually turned around on the spot and looked over the lobby scenery.
この学校に来るまで家に軟禁状態だった私が初めて長期間滞在した場所……そして尚人と: The first place I stayed for a long period after being under house arrest until I came to this school... and the place where Naoto and my mother work.
私はもうすぐココを立ち去る事になるらしい。: It seems I will be leaving this place soon.
そういえば詳しく聞いていないが……何故急に私は別の学校へ行く事になったのだろうか: Come to think of it, I haven't heard the details... why did I suddenly have to go to another school?
撫子\n（まぁいいか……やらなきゃいけない事があったら……向こうから言ってくるだ: Nadeshiko: (Oh well... if there's something I have to do... they'll probably tell me from their end...)
多分ありえないだろうが、何の指令もなく、ただ別の学校で学園生活を満喫しろというな: It's probably impossible, but if there are no orders and I'm just supposed to enjoy school life at another school, then so be it.
窓から寮の外を見ると、雪が降り始めていた。: Looking outside the dormitory from the window, it had begun to snow.
雪のせいか部屋の温度も下がり、私は部屋の肌寒さにブルりと身体を強張らせた……: Perhaps because of the snow, the room temperature also dropped, and I tensed up with a shiver at the chill in the room...
特にする事もなくベッドで惰眠をむさぼっていたら、突然電話がかかってきた。: While I was indulging in idle sleep in bed with nothing particularly to do, I suddenly received a phone call.
私はほとんど寝ぼけた頭のまま起き上がり、机元に置いてあった携帯を取ると、ベッドに: With my head almost still groggy from sleep, I sat up, took the phone that was sitting by the desk, sat on the bed, and pressed the call button.
華穂\n「……もしかして寝てた？」: Kaho: “...Were you sleeping, by any chance?”
撫子\n「いえ、大丈夫です……あけましておめでとうございます、華穂さま」: Nadeshiko: “No, it's okay... Happy New Year, Kaho-sama.”
時計を見ると夜中の０時を今回ったばかり……: Looking at the clock, it was just past midnight.
電話をする時間としては非常識だが、今は年明け……年頃の娘なら、普通はまず起きてい: It's an unreasonable time to make a phone call, but this is the start of the year... for a girl of that age, it's normally a time she would be awake.
転校してきてからずっと一緒だったのに、１２月に入ってから試験やら受験やらで会う機: Despite having been together all the time since she transferred, after entering December, Kaho-sama and I had dramatically fewer opportunities to meet due to exams and preparation.
その私は今、どうしているのだろうととても気になり……思い切って新年早々に電話をか: She said she was very curious about how I was doing now... and decided to take the plunge and call me early in the new year.
こんな生まれの私を心配してくれる華穂さまの優しさが嬉しかった。: I was happy for Kaho-sama's kindness in worrying about someone of my birth.
そして普通の仲のいい女子がしてそうな“新年一番の電話”を……こんな私にしてくれた: And I was so happy that she made the "first call of the year"—the kind that normal close girls would do—to someone like me... that tears naturally began to fall.
華穂\n「うん？ ……どうしたの撫子ちゃん……もしかして鼻が出てるの？」: Kaho: “Hmm? ...What's wrong, Nadeshiko-chan... is your nose running?”
少し泣いてしまったせいか、釣られるように鼻水が出てしまった。: Perhaps because I had cried a little, my nose started running as if in sympathy.
折角気を利かせて電話してくれた華穂さまに、心配かけるわけにもいかない。: I can't worry Kaho-sama, who had gone to the trouble of calling me.
私は泣いている事を隠すため“もう大分良くなったけど、年末は風邪を引いて寝込んでい: To hide that I was crying, I made an excuse, saying "I'm much better now, but I had a cold and was bedridden at the end of the year," to smooth things over for the time being.
華穂\n「そっかぁ……じゃあそのまま悪化させないよう、ゆっくり休むんだよ？」: Kaho: “I see... well, make sure it doesn't get worse and get plenty of rest, okay?”
華穂\n「私も年末は色々と引っ張りまわされちゃって……もう大変だったよ」: Kaho: “I was dragged around to all sorts of things at the end of the year too... it was so tough.”
華穂さまはその煌びやかな見た目通り……大金持ちのお嬢様だ。: Just as her glittering appearance suggests... Kaho-sama is the daughter of a very wealthy family.
大金を持つ者という事は、それだけ普通の人間より人と接する機会が多いという事……: Being a person with great wealth means having many more opportunities to interact with people than a normal person...
もしその親の娘として随伴しているとなれば……さぞ忙しい年末を過ごす破目にあってい: If she was accompanied as the daughter of those parents... she must have had a very busy end of the year.
撫子\n「そうだったんですか……それはお疲れ様です」: Nadeshiko: “Is that so... then, good work.”
華穂\n「それでね、昨日の夜、都心のホテルで会食してたんだけど……」: Kaho: “And then, you know, yesterday evening I was having dinner at a hotel in the city center...”
華穂\n「何と偶然……尚人先生に会ったんだよね」: Kaho: “By some coincidence... I met Naoto-sensei.”
喉奥に込み上げてくるものを感じ通話の停止ボタンを押すと、私はその直後に床へ胃の中: Feeling something welling up in the back of my throat, I pressed the end-call button and, immediately after, vomited my stomach contents onto the floor.
そして自分の吐瀉物を前に、私は笑っていた。: And facing my own vomit, I was laughing.
何故、私は今のタイミングで吐いたのだろう……まるで理解できない。: Why did I vomit at this timing... I don't understand it at all.
その理不尽さが何となく面白かったから……私は笑ってしまったのだ。: Because that irrationality was somehow funny... I ended up laughing.
吐いて笑って少し気が楽になると、直ぐ華穂さまに電話をかけなおし謝罪をした。: Once I felt a bit better after vomiting and laughing, I immediately called Kaho-sama back and apologized.
こちらの異変は勘付かれなかったと思う……: I don't think my abnormality was noticed...
自分の負の感情は表に出さない……私はそういった演技が得意なのだ。: I don't show my negative emotions... I am good at that kind of acting.
華穂さまとの電話を終え自分の吐瀉物を掃除すると、私は再び人の気配がない静かな寮の: After finishing the call with Kaho-sama and cleaning up my vomit, I was once again wandering aimlessly through the quiet dormitory where there was no sign of people.
ロビーにあったソファにボスッと音を立てて座ると、何故かこれまで考えまいとしていた: When I sat down on the sofa in the lobby with a thud, for some reason Naoto's face, which I had been trying not to think about, came to mind.
もう一ヶ月以上……私は尚人の仕事の手伝いをしていない。: It's been more than a month... since I stopped helping with Naoto's work.
気の進む仕事ではなかったが、それなりに達成感はあった。: It wasn't a job I was keen on, but I had a certain sense of accomplishment.
自分の中では頑張っていたつもりだし、それなりに尚人とお母さんの役に立てていると思: I thought I was trying my best in my own way, and that I was being useful to Naoto and my mother.
けど結果は違った……どうやら私は居なくてもいいらしい。: But the result was different... apparently, it's fine even if I'm not here.
確かに私は子供で経験も浅く、重要と思われる仕事は任されなかった。: True, I'm a child with little experience, and I wasn't entrusted with work deemed important.
けど急に大人にはなれないし、時間がなければ仕事の経験も知識も身につかない。: But I can't suddenly become an adult, and without time, I can't gain experience or knowledge of the work.
そもそも将来尚人を手伝えるようここに来たというのに……居なくていいと言われたら、: In the first place, I came here so I could help Naoto in the future... if I'm told I'm not needed, what am I supposed to do?
新しく行く学校は、聞いた所ごく普通の所らしい。: The school I'm going to next is, from what I've heard, a very ordinary place.
この世に生まれる前から、私は普通の人生は歩めない事が決まっていた。: Since before I was born into this world, it had been decided that I could not lead a normal life.
そんな私は、その普通の学校とやらで……いったい何を学べばいいのだろうか？: What on earth am I supposed to learn... at that so-called normal school?
無言のまま外の雪が降るのを延々と見続けていたら、頭がぼーっとして目眩がしてきた。: As I continued to stare silently at the falling snow outside, my head felt dazed and I became dizzy.
こうして起きていると、何だかろくな事がないような気がしてならない。: I can't help but feel that nothing good comes from being awake like this.
私は部屋へ戻り、再び眠りにつく事にした……: I returned to my room and decided to go back to sleep...
新学期が始まると、お母さんが転校の手続きが済んだと伝えてきた。: When the new term began, my mother told me that the transfer procedures were complete.
引越しはどうするのかと聞いた所、衣服以外の必要なモノは全部向こうで揃えればいいと: When I asked what to do about moving, I was told that I should just get everything I need other than clothes over there.
私の部屋の荷物と言えば、衣服と勉強道具と漫画ぐらい。: The luggage in my room consists of clothes, study materials, and manga.
机やタンスは私が去った後の生徒が使うと考えたら……確かに引越しと呼べるほど、大げ: If I think that the desk and wardrobe will be used by the students who come after I leave... then perhaps there is no need for anything as grand as what you'd call "moving."
３つ上げた荷物の漫画も、ここ最近まったく読まなくなってしまった。: The manga among the three types of luggage I listed... I haven't read them at all lately.
必要がないなら移転先に持っていく必要もない……要るかどうかはわからないが、全て妹: If I don't need them, there's no need to take them to the new place... I don't know if she wants them, but I'll just send them all to my younger sister.
なんだかココ最近、身体がとてもだるい……耳鳴りも多くなってきた気がする。: Lately, my body feels very heavy for some reason... I feel like the ringing in my ears has increased too.
そんな体調のせいか色々とリアクションが薄く、今日久しぶりに顔を合わせた華穂さまに: Perhaps because of that physical condition, my reactions have been weak, and Kaho-sama, whom I met today after a long time, was a bit worried that I had no energy.
一応出席日数は余裕だし、授業を受けなくても勉強なんて一人でも出来る。: I have plenty of attendance days to spare, and I can study on my own even without attending classes.
体調が戻るまで、当分は無理をせず休むというのもいいのかもしれない……: Until my condition recovers, it might be good to rest for the time being without overextending myself...
１月の終わりに寮の廊下で尚人に会った……何だか凄い久々な気がする。: At the end of January, I met Naoto in the hallway of the dormitory... I feel like it's been a very long time.
気のせいだとは思うが、こうして顔を合わせているだけなのに、何だか私は尚人に責めら: I'm sure it's my imagination, but just by being face-to-face like this, I felt as if I were being blamed by Naoto.
もし怒っているのなら、突然仕事を手伝わなくていいと言ったり、転校しろなどといって: If he is angry, then it makes sense that he suddenly said I didn't have to help with work anymore or told me to transfer.
だが私に不満があるなら、尚人はこんな回りくどい事をしたりするはずがない。: But if Naoto has a grievance against me, he wouldn't do something so roundabout.
それでも私はもしかするとと思い……人の目がない事を確認した後、尚人に怒っているの: Even so, thinking maybe, I checked that no one was watching and asked Naoto if he was angry.
尚人\n「いや？ ……何故そんな事を聞く」: Naoto: “No? ...Why do you ask such a thing?”
怒られていないと確認出来て一応ホッとしたものの……なら何で尚人は私を突き放すよう: Although I was relieved for the time being to confirm that he wasn't angry... then why is Naoto acting like he is pushing me away?
そう思った瞬間……私の心臓はその鼓動を大きく乱れさせ、周囲が暗くなったかと思うと: The moment I thought that... my heart's pulse became violently irregular, and just as I thought my surroundings had gone dark, I stumbled with a dizzy spell.
理由はわからないが、これ以上はいけない……: I don't know why, but I can't go any further than this...
私はそう判断すると、尚人に嫌われたのではという自分への問いかけをやめ、思考を停止: Making that judgment, I stopped questioning myself if Naoto had come to hate me and ceased my thoughts.
尚人\n「……撫子……顔色が悪いようだが大丈夫か？」: Naoto: “...Nadeshiko... you look pale, are you okay?”
尚人\n「お前、最近は体調不良で授業を休みがちらしいな……体調には気をつけるんだ: Naoto: “I heard you've been frequently absent from classes lately due to poor health... take care of yourself.”
尚人\n「転校したら仕事を手伝う必要もなくなり、お前は自由になる」: Naoto: “Once you transfer, you won't need to help with work anymore, and you will be free.”
尚人\n「そうなったら今のように、体調を気にかけてくれる奴も居なくなる……その事: Naoto: “When that happens, there won't be anyone who worries about your health like I do now... don't forget that, okay?”
尚人が教師みたいな事を言っている……ふとそんな違和感を感じたが、違和感もなにも尚: Naoto is saying things like a teacher... I suddenly felt a sense of dissonance, but dissonance or not, Naoto's public face was that of a teacher.
そんな当たり前な事に違和感を感じるほど、私は表の尚人に関わってこなかったのだ。: I had been so uninvolved with the public Naoto that I felt a sense of dissonance over such a natural thing.
尚人\n「そろそろ部屋に戻ってゆっくり休め……じゃあな」: Naoto: “Go back to your room soon and get some rest... see you.”
拘束される親元を離れ、自由に暮らす……ハメを外したい成長期の子供が憧れるシチュエ: Leaving your parents' home where you are bound and living freely... it might be a situation a growing child who wants to cut loose would yearn for.
けど私はそんなものに何の興味も持ち合わせていない……元々軟禁されてようが首輪をハ: But I possess no interest in such things... I have a personality that doesn't mind being house-arrested or wearing a collar from the start.
拘束される事を苦痛に感じないインドアな私が……はい自由ですと言われて、何をどう手: I, an indoor person who doesn't find being bound painful... what am I supposed to be happy about when told "Yes, you are free"?
だが転校しろと言われた以上……ただ不服だからという理由で、主人たる尚人の意思に背: But since I was told to transfer... I don't feel like defying the will of my master, Naoto, just because I am dissatisfied.
それに転校したら自由と言われても、１年で卒業し尚人の仕事を手伝うためまたここに戻: Besides, even if I'm told I'll be free if I transfer, I'll graduate in a year and return here to help with Naoto's work.
たった一年……約５２週間をボケッと過ごす……それだけで済む。: Just one year... about 52 weeks of idly passing time... that's all it will take.
どうせなら目を瞑り目覚めたら、来年になってればいいのに……: I wish I could just close my eyes and, when I wake up, it would be next year...
そんな都合のいい事を考えながら……私は目を瞑り、眠りについた。: While thinking such convenient thoughts... I closed my eyes and fell asleep.
大半の人はどう特別かも知らずに仲の良い人にお菓子を上げたり、何故か好きな人に告白: A day that makes no sense, where most people give sweets to people they're close to without knowing why it's special, or feel like they have to confess to someone they like for some reason.
そんな日本中が浮き足立っている中……新学期に入ってからは休みがちだった私は、今日: While all of Japan was restless like that... having been frequently absent since the start of the new term, I was lying in bed today too, skipping school.
いつも通り体調が優れないからという理由もあったが、今の私は騒がしい空気というやつ: There was the reason that I wasn't feeling well as usual, but for me now, what you'd call a "noisy atmosphere" is very painful.
そろそろ華穂さまには来年転校する事を伝えなくては。: I should tell Kaho-sama soon that I am transferring next year.
だが何かをしようとする力が……エネルギーが湧いてこない。: But the power to do something... energy won't well up.
今はとにかく、誰かに会うという行為が面倒臭い。: Right now, the act of meeting anyone is just a hassle.
そしてこんな精神状態のまま華穂さまと顔を合わせたくない。: And I don't want to see Kaho-sama while in this state of mind.
撫子\n「……引っ越した後に報告すればいいか……」: Nadeshiko: “...I can just report it after I've moved...”
どうせ華穂さまは卒業する……ここを出るのだ。: Kaho-sama will be graduating anyway... she'll be leaving here.
いきなりの報告に多少は驚かれるだろうが、その時は適当な嘘をでっち上げるとしよう。: She'll probably be a bit surprised by the sudden report, but I'll just fabricate some suitable lie then.
いくら仲がいいとはいえ、それが相手に対して失礼な事だというのはわかっている。: No matter how close we are, I know that is disrespectful to her.
けど、今の私には誰かに礼を重んじようとするだけの意志の力がなかった。: But the me now did not have the power of will enough to try to be polite to someone.
最近はちょっと頭を動かすと、直ぐ眠くなってしまう。: Lately, if I move my head just a little, I immediately become sleepy.
私は訪れた眠気に逆らう気力もないまま……ゆっくりと眠りの中へと落ちていくのだった: Without the energy to resist the approaching sleepiness... I slowly fell into sleep...
２月の終わり……華穂さま達３年生が期末試験を受ける中。: End of February... while Kaho-sama and the other third-year students were taking their final exams.
私は普通に授業を受けている同学年をよそ目に、着々と転校の為の準備を済ませていた。: Turning my eyes away from my classmates who were taking classes normally, I was steadily completing the preparations for my transfer.
荷物はもう大体まとめ終った……後はこの身一つで新天地へ行くだけ。: I've already mostly finished packing my things... all that's left is to go to the new land with just my own body.
とりたててやる事もなかった私は、携帯で新しく住む場所の大まかな情報を調べ始めた。: With nothing in particular to do, I began searching for general information about the new place where I'll be living on my phone.
撫子\n（……ん、ノック……お母さんかな？）: Nadeshiko: (...Hm, a knock... is it my mother?)
遠目で見かけた事はあったが、尚人と向かい合うのは一ヶ月ぶり。: I had seen him from a distance, but it has been a month since I faced Naoto directly.
部屋で二人きりになるのは二ヶ月ぶりだ。: It's been two months since we were alone together in a room.
１２月の中旬から、尚人と何となく顔を合わせにくい感じだったが、こうやって二人きり: Since mid-December, I had felt it was somewhat difficult to see Naoto, but even when we were alone together like this, my heart showed no sign of being shaken.
仕事を手伝わなくていい、転校しろと言われてから今日まで……私の心は散々混乱し疲弊: From the time I was told I didn't have to help with work and to transfer until today... my heart has been thoroughly confused and exhausted.
今更尚人に会った程度で……この私の冷えきった心が簡単に反応するはずもない。: Meeting Naoto now... there's no way this cold heart of mine would react easily.
尚人は何を言いに来たのだろうか？: I wonder what Naoto came here to say.
……また私の事を必要ないと言いに来たのだろうか？: ...Did he come to say I'm not needed again?
それとも……まさか華穂さまと一線を越えたと、報告でもしに来たのだろうか？: Or... could he have come to report that he finally crossed the line with Kaho-sama?
撫子\n（……ない……そんな事……絶対にない……あるはず……ない……）: Nadeshiko: (...No... that's... definitely not... there's no way...)
何にしろ、もう私の心を乱さないで欲しい……何も言わずに立ち去って欲しい……このま: In any case, I don't want my heart disturbed anymore... I want him to leave without saying anything... I want to be allowed to depart quietly like this.
新しい学校で１年を過ごし、またこの寮に戻ってくる。: I'll spend a year at the new school and then return to this dormitory.
そうすれば二度と転校しろとは言われない……私はずっと尚人の傍に居られるのだ。: If I do that, I won't be told to transfer ever again... I can stay by Naoto's side forever.
……もう悲しい思いをしないですむのだ……: ...I won't have to feel sad anymore...
……だから……今はもう構わないで欲しい……: ...So... I don't want to be messed with now...
私はふと頭に浮かんだ自分の言葉をいぶかしんだ。: I was suspicious of my own words that suddenly came to mind.
今まで尚人の言葉や態度に傷つき……悲しんでいたのだろうか？: Have been hurt and saddened by Naoto's words and attitude all this time?
撫子\n（……そうか……そうだったんだ……）: Nadeshiko: (...I see... that's what it was...)
撫子\n（……私……尚人の言葉に……行動に……傷ついてたんだ……）: Nadeshiko: (...I... was hurt by Naoto's words... by his actions...)
まるで気付かなかった……２ヶ月以上かかって、私はようやく気付く事が出来た。: I didn't notice it at all... it took more than two months, but I was finally able to realize it.
ようするに、私は尚人の傍に居たかったのだ。: In short, I wanted to be by Naoto's side.
文化祭のあの日……: That day at the culture festival...
華穂さまと尚人が話しているのを見て、私が激しく動揺してしまったのは……私の居場所: The reason I was violently shaken when I saw Kaho-sama and Naoto talking was... because I thought my place by Naoto's side would be taken by the attractive Kaho-sama.
地下室で尚人にキツく当たってしまったのも、華穂さまと尚人が仲がいいという噂を聞い: The reason I was harsh with Naoto in the basement was because I heard rumors that Kaho-sama and Naoto were on good terms.
そして尚人が【お前が居なくても大丈夫だ】といった時……: And when Naoto said, "It's fine even if you're not here"...
尚人の傍に居たかった私は、とてもとても大きく深く……傷ついていたのだ。: I, who wanted to be by Naoto's side, was very, very deeply... hurt.
ずっとずっと好きだった。: I've loved him forever and ever.
多分、初めて会った時から好きだったのだろう。: Maybe I've loved him since the first time we met.
小さい頃……自分が母親に売られたと聞いた時に“それなり”にしかショックを受けなか: When I was little... the reason I was only "somewhat" shocked when I heard I had been sold by my mother was because my master was Naoto.
その当時の幼い頃の私から見ても、尚人はとても美形だった。: Even from my perspective as a young child then, Naoto was very handsome.
売られた少女の仕える相手が、知的で物事に動じず容姿端麗な男……このシチュエーショ: The person a sold girl serves is an intelligent man who is unperturbed by things and has a refined appearance... in this situation, I think it's more unreasonable not to fall in love.
けど尚人が好きだというこの気持ちに今の今まで気付かなかったのも、自分の事ながら無: But the fact that I didn't realize these feelings of loving Naoto until this very moment is also understandable, in its own way.
なにせ私は奴隷なのだ……ここに売られてきた女生徒達と、実質的にはそう大差はない。: After all, I am a slave... in actual fact, I'm not much different from the female students sold here.
親に……親戚に売られ、尚人に調教され、尚人を好きになり……そして契約を終え、尚人: The many girls who were sold by their parents... by their relatives, were trained by Naoto, fell in love with Naoto... and then, having completed their contracts, left Naoto's side.
私より可愛い子や性格もいい子だって何人も居たのに……尚人はその子達を一切、受け入: Even though there were many girls cuter than me or with better personalities... Naoto never accepted any of them.
そう……尚人は愛だの恋だのといった不確かな事に、心を乱される人間ではないのだ。: Yes... Naoto is not the kind of person whose heart is disturbed by uncertain things like love or affection.
だから私は……無意識に好きという感情を押さえ込み、尚人と同じようになる事で……隣: So I... must have suppressed the feeling of love unconsciously and tried to become someone worthy of standing by his side by becoming like Naoto.
華穂さまの時もそうだった……どうやら私は、好きになった相手に相応しい人になろうと: It was the same with Kaho-sama... apparently, I have a habit of wanting to become a person worthy of the one I've come to love.
部屋に入ったまま無言でジッと私を見ていた尚人が、同じく無言のまま自分自身を見つめ: Naoto, who had been staring at me silently since entering the room, was suspicious of me as I looked back at myself and understood my own self in silence.
私は少しニコッと笑顔を浮かべつつ、尚人にそう切り返した。: I replied to Naoto with a bit of a smile.
尚人に転校しろと言われ、ここ３ヶ月近くどうすればいいのかと混乱していたが……よう: Since Naoto told me to transfer, I had been confused for nearly three months about what to do... but I've finally seen the direction I want to head in.
どんな意図があって私を転校させるのかは知らないけど……１年経てば、また尚人の元に: I don't know what intention he has for making me transfer, but after a year, I can return to Naoto.
なら言われた通り１年耐えて、また尚人の元に戻ってこよう。: Then I'll endure for a year as I was told and return to Naoto.
私が大好きでも、きっと尚人は私の事など、どうとも思っていないのだろう。: Even if I love him, Naoto surely thinks nothing of me.
けどいいのだ……私は産まれる前から尚人のもの……彼に仕える為にこの世に誕生したの: But that's fine... I've been Naoto's since before I was born... I was brought into this world to serve him.
ずっと傍にさえいられればいい。: As long as I can be by his side forever, that's enough.
もし華穂さまと尚人が付き合うとしても……辛いけど、受け入れよう。: Even if Kaho-sama and Naoto were to date... it would be painful, but I'll accept it.
だって私は、尚人の傍にいられるだけで幸せなのだ。: Because I'm happy just being by Naoto's side.
それが尚人に売られ自由を失った私の特権。: That is the privilege of the me who was sold to Naoto and lost my freedom.
……それこそが……私の……私という人間の……根底なのだから。: ...That... is the foundation... of me... of the human being that I am.
尚人\n「転校して１年後に学校を卒業するだろうが……卒業しても、お前は俺の仕事を: Naoto: “You'll graduate from school a year after you transfer... but even after you graduate, you don't need to help with my work.”
尚人\n「そのまま勉強をしたいなら続けてもいいし、働きたいのならごく普通の会社の: Naoto: “If you want to continue your studies, you can, and if you want to work, I'll prepare a job at a perfectly normal company.”
どうしてそんな事をいうの？: Why are you saying such a thing?
私は戻ってくる……不必要に勉強なんてしない……尚人がする仕事以外の事なんてしたく: I'm coming back... I won't study unnecessarily... I don't want to do anything other than the work Naoto does...
だって私は尚人のモノなんだよ？ ……尚人の傍に仕えるために産まれてきた……ただそ: After all, I'm Naoto's, aren't I? ...I was born just to serve by Naoto's side... that's the only reason I exist, isn't it?
尚人\n「お前はもう俺の奴隷とか、売られてきた藤子の娘だとか、そういうくだらない: Naoto: “Don't worry about ridiculous things like being my slave or being the daughter of the sold Touko anymore.”
尚人\n「手を回してお前が普通に生きるのに支障のない戸籍を用意した」: Naoto: “I've pulled strings and prepared a family register that won't hinder you from living normally.”
尚人\n「今後、お前は普通に生きていける……俺のような人間に……無理に関わる必要: Naoto: “From now on, you can live normally... there's no need for you to be forced to involve yourself... with a person like me.”
別れの言葉を残し……私の部屋を出て行く尚人。: Leaving words of parting... Naoto left my room.
……そして同時に不自由という特権を失った……: ...And at the same time, I lost the privilege of being bound...
……もう私を縛るものはない……: ...There is nothing tying me down anymore...
……取り柄も学も女の魅力もない私が……尚人の傍に無条件で居られる理由を失った……: ...I, who have no redeeming features, no education, and no feminine charm, have lost the reason to be by Naoto's side unconditionally...
……これで私は、売られてきた女生徒たち同様……尚人が住む世界ではない、表の世界に: ...With this, just like the female students who were sold... I will be sent out into the world on the surface, which is not the world Naoto lives in...
……そう……私が今まで見てきた女生徒達と同じように……私はもう……尚人と会えなく: ...Yes... just like the female students I have seen until now... I will... never be able to see Naoto again...
撫子\n「…………もう尚人の…………傍には……居られない…………」: Nadeshiko: “............I can no longer............ stay by............ Naoto's side............”
……その言葉が頭に浮かんだ瞬間……: ...The moment those words came to mind...
ちゃんと起きているはずなのに、何だか夢のよう……しかも多分悪夢だ。: I'm sure I'm awake, but it feels like a dream... and probably a nightmare.
何故ならこうして走っているのに、私の頭はまるで働いていない。: Because although I am running like this, my head isn't working at all.
高熱を出しうなされた時のように……いいようのない不安だけで頭の中が埋め尽くされる: My head is filled with nothing but an indescribable anxiety, like when I'm moaning with a high fever.
何も意識していないのに、操り人形のように勝手に動く私の手足。: Even though I'm not conscious of it, my limbs are moving on their own like a puppet's.
そうして呆然とした中、走る私の視界には……まるで床が滑っているかのように見えた。: And in that dazed state, as I ran, the floor... looked as if it were sliding.
……私の身体はどこへ向かうつもりなのだろう……: ...Where is my body intending to go...
……ふとそんな事を考えた時、ぼんやりと映った視界の先に……尚人が居た。: ...When I suddenly thought that, at the end of my blurry vision... was Naoto.
……フワフワとした浮遊感を感じる……: ...I feel a fluffy sensation of floating...
廊下に居た尚人に体当たりした事は、何となく覚えている。: I vaguely remember slamming into Naoto, who was in the hallway.
一緒に居たい……捨てないでと……思いっきり抱きついたのだ。: I wanted to be with him... don't discard me... I clung to him with all my might.
……愛するものを強く守るように……: ...As if to protect the one he loves...
……あらゆる危険から、私を庇ってくれるかのように……: ...As if to shield me from all danger...
不思議な浮遊感は、硬く大きな岩に頭が激突するような衝撃により、唐突に終わりを迎え: The mysterious floating sensation came to an abrupt end with an impact like my head smashing into a hard, large rock.
……ドクドクと脈打つ頭部の激痛……激しい目眩に痙攣する身体……: ...Intense pain in my head throbbing rhythmically... my body convulsing with violent dizziness...
私はよく磨かれたタイルの床に手をつき、愛する主の温もりを求め上体を起こしていく。: I put my hands on the well-polished tile floor and raised my upper body, seeking the warmth of my beloved master.
尚人は頭から大量に出血している……恐らく……死んでいるのだろう。: Naoto is bleeding heavily from his head... he is probably... dead.
私は尚人の死体を見て……こうなった事の顛末を理解した。: Looking at Naoto's corpse... I understood the sequence of events that led to this.
私の部屋は２階……: My room is on the second floor...
そして私が追いかけた先に居た尚人は、廊下の先の階段を下りようとしていたのだ。: And Naoto, whom I had chased, was about to go down the stairs at the end of the hallway.
頭の中が真っ白になっていた私は、そんな事も露知らず……飛びつき、抱きついてしまっ: My head having gone white, I hadn't known that... and I leaped and clung to him.
デザインを優先した階段は急勾配……: The stairs, which prioritized design, were steep...
バランスを崩した私達は、一階のタイルの床へ真っ逆さま。: Losing our balance, we fell headlong onto the tile floor on the first floor.
階段から１人で落ちるか、せめて床がもう少し柔らかい素材だったら……きっと尚人は助: If we had fallen alone, or if at least the floor had been made of a softer material... Naoto surely would have been saved.
咄嗟の状況に己の身を守らず私を庇うように抱きしめ、尚人はロビーの見栄えのよい固い: In the sudden situation, without protecting his own body and instead embracing me to shield me, Naoto's head smashed into the hard floor tiles of the lobby.
そして折角庇ってもらったというのに……貧弱な私も、頭を強く打ってしまったらしい。: And despite being shielded, it seems that I, frail as I am, also hit my head hard.
傷を負ったと思われる箇所は熱く痺れ、ドクンドクンと明らかに異常な力強さで脈打ち続: The part where I seem to have been injured is feverish and numb, and it continues to throb with an clearly abnormal strength—thump, thump.
私はずっと、尚人に何も思われていないと思っていた。: I had always thought that Naoto thought nothing of me.
尚人にとって、私はただの便利なコマ……そう勝手に思い込んでいた。: I had assumed that to Naoto, I was just a convenient piece... I had convinced myself of that.
尚人は……自分の命を捨ててでも、私を守ろうとしてくれたのだ。: Naoto... had tried to protect me even by throwing away his own life.
大好きな人に嫌われていない事がわかりホッとしたのか……身体から力がスッと抜け落ち: Perhaps feeling relieved to know that I wasn't hated by the person I love, the strength drained away from my body.
私はまだ暖かい尚人の手を握ると、仰向けになり床に倒れこんだ。: I gripped Naoto's hand, which was still warm, and collapsed onto the floor, lying on my back.
藤子\n「……撫子……どうして……どうしてこんな事に……何が……何があったの！？: Touko: “...Nadeshiko... why... why did this happen... what... what happened!?”
頭がドクンドクンと脈打ち、意識が朦朧とする……全身が……口を動かすのすらだるい…: My head is throbbing, and my consciousness is hazy... my whole body is... it's even a hassle to move my mouth...
だが、こんな大事を起こしてしまったのだ……最低でもお母さんに事の顛末は伝えておい: But since I've caused such a grand incident... I should at least tell my mother what happened.
力が抜け落ちた重い口を開くと、私はお母さんに話しかけた。: Opening my heavy mouth as the strength left me, I spoke to my mother.
撫子\n「……もう……奴隷じゃない……傍に居なくて……いいって……」: Nadeshiko: “...No longer... a slave... that I don't have to... be by his side...”
撫子\n「……そう言われて私……パニックになっちゃって……尚人を……追いかけて…: Nadeshiko: “...Being told that... I panicked... and chased after... Naoto...”
撫子\n「……捨てないでって……抱きついたの……」: Nadeshiko: “...To tell him not to discard me... I clung to him...”
撫子\n「……そうしたら……二人して……階段から……落ちた……」: Nadeshiko: “...Then... we both... fell... from the stairs...”
ちゃんと伝えられただろうか？: Did I manage to tell her properly?
……あまりに馬鹿過ぎる私の愚行を……尚人は何一つ悪くないという事を……: ...My own incredibly stupid foolish act... that Naoto is not to blame for anything...
藤子\n「……尚人さんが、貴方を捨てるだなんて……そんな事、絶対にありえないわ…: Touko: “...There is no way... that Naoto-san would discard you...”
藤子\n「だって尚人さんは……貴方を深く深く愛していた……あの人は私なんかより…: Touko: “Because Naoto-san... loved you very, very deeply... that person... thought of you much more... than someone like me did...”
藤子\n「……転校の話だって……秋から凄く明るくなった貴方を見て……」: Touko: “...Even the talk about transferring... after seeing you become so bright since autumn...”
藤子\n「本当は自分の傍にずっと居て欲しいけど……貴方が……今よりもっともっと幸: Touko: “He said that while he actually wanted you to stay by his side forever... if you... could become even more, much more happy than you are now... he didn't mind... Naoto-san said that, you know...”
撫子\n（……そっか……そうだったんだ……）: Nadeshiko: (...I see... that's what it was...)
藤子\n「……それに……そんなに転校が嫌なら……嫌っていえばよかったじゃない……: Touko: “...And... if you hated transferring that much... you should have said you hated it...”
藤子\n「それなのに……貴方……私の前では……全然顔に出さないし……何も言わない: Touko: “And yet... you... didn't show it on your face at all... in front of me... you didn't say anything, so... I didn't know, did I...”
撫子\n（……そうだよね……言えばよかった……嫌だって……）: Nadeshiko: (...You're right... I should have said it... that I hated it...)
撫子\n（それに私って、頭の中では言いたい放題だけど……人前では表情を出さないよ: Nadeshiko: (And although I say whatever I want in my head, I had always put on a facade so as not to show any expression in front of people... so of course no one would notice...)
そして今更だが、無表情でも尚人は私に優しかった。: And although it's too late now, even if he was expressionless, Naoto was kind to me.
下種な客に私を触れさせる事などはなかったし、我侭も聞いてくれた。: He never let vulgar clients touch me, and he listened to my selfishness.
ちょっと変な事を言っても、怒って理不尽な事を言っても……無表情のまま話を聞いてく: Even if I said something a bit strange, or said something irrational in anger... he would listen to me without changing his expression.
調教をして疲れているはずなのに、私を抱いてくれた。: Even though he must have been tired from training, he held me.
どう振り返っても、嫌われてる要素なんてない。: Looking back now, there aren't any elements of being hated.
もしかすると……私がそうだったように……尚人も初めから私が好きだったのかもしれな: Maybe... just as I did... Naoto had loved me from the beginning too.
撫子\n（……ふふ……馬鹿だなぁ……私って……ほんと馬鹿……）: Nadeshiko: (...Fufu... I'm an idiot... I'm... really an idiot...)
けどわかったからと言って、もうどうにもならない……全て終わった事。: But even if I understand it now, it can't be helped... it's all over.
尚人は私が殺し……そしてもうすぐ私も死ぬのだから。: I killed Naoto... and I will be dying soon too.
不思議と私は尚人を殺した事には罪悪感はなかった。: Strangely, I felt no guilt about killing Naoto.
だってあの人は……絶対に怒ったりしない……私には甘々だから。: Because that person... would never get angry... he's a pushover when it comes to me.
それに元々、尚人は自分の生への執着があるような人間ではなかった……死んだら死んだ: Besides, Naoto wasn't a person with an attachment to his own life to begin with... he would think if he died, it couldn't be helped.
それどころか……きっと尚人も自分の命を私に奪われるのなら、仕方がないと思ったかも: If anything... Naoto might even think it couldn't be helped if his life was taken by me.
撫子\n（……なんてね……流石にそれは調子に乗りすぎかな……）: Nadeshiko: (...Just kidding... that might be getting a bit too ahead of myself...)
藤子\n「……撫子……しっかり……いま救急車呼ぶから……瞬き……して……」: Touko: “...Nadeshiko... stay with me... I'm calling an ambulance now... blink... for me...”
……いつも尚人の事ばかりで……私……お母さんの事……全然考えてなかった……近くに: ...Always just thinking about Naoto... I... didn't think about my mother at all... even though we were close... I couldn't talk to her... about much...
……それと華穂さま……こんな私に優しくしてくれてありがとう……嬉しかった……: ...And Kaho-sama... thank you for being kind to someone like me... I was happy...
……迷惑かもしれないけど……出来れば私の事、全部話して……その上で友達になりたか: ...It might have been a nuisance... but if possible, I wanted to tell you everything about me... and then become friends...
頭に思い浮かぶ、全てのものが私にはもう出来ないと思うと、とても残念でならない。: Thinking that I can no longer do everything that comes to mind, it's very regrettable.
自分でもあまり我侭は言わない子だったと思う……どちらかというと無口で、何でも素直: I think I was a child who didn't say much selfish stuff... if anything, I was quiet and obeyed everything obediently.
だから私は……最後の最後に……今の純粋な素直な気持ちを……我侭を……口にだした。: So, at the very, very end... I spoke my current pure, honest feelings... my selfishness.
撫子\n「……死にたくないよ……おかあさん……」: Nadeshiko: “...I don't want to die... mother...”
藤子\n「……誰か……誰か助けて……助けてぇ！！！ ……私の子が……撫子が……尚: Touko: “...Someone... someone help... help me!!! ...My child... Nadeshiko... Naoto-san... haha... ahaha...”
私の言葉に、お母さんが壊れてしまった。: At my words, my mother broke.
思わずお母さんが怖いと思ってしまった……何て酷い娘なのだろう。: I instinctively thought my mother was scary... what a terrible daughter I am.
……私の一生は……他の人から見たら、最後の最後まで本当に酷い人生だったと思うに違: ...My life... if seen by others, they will undoubtedly think it was a truly terrible life until the very end... and there's no room for sympathy.
けど、私本人にとっては……悪くない一生だった。: But for me personally... it wasn't a bad life.
だって傍にはずっと尚人がいたのだから……: Because Naoto was by my side all the time...
こうして最後まで大好きな人を……独占できたのだから。: Because until the very end, I was able to... monopolize the person I love like this.
気が付くと、いつのまにか俺と華穂は自分達が乗ってきた車内に移動していた。: When I came to, Kaho and I had somehow been transported back inside the car we arrived in.
エンジンがかかったままの車のナビを見ると……現在地は目的地まであと少しといった所: Looking at the navigation system of the car, which was still running... our current location was just a short distance from our destination.
自分の身にいったい何が起きたのか、まるで理解出来ない……キョトンとした様子の華穂: I couldn't understand at all what had just happened to me... judging by Kaho's bewildered expression, she seemed to be in the same situation.
とりあえず混乱した頭を少し落ち着かせるついでに、俺達は目的のペンションへ車で移動: For now, while trying to calm our confused minds, we decided to drive to the intended pension...
ナビが示す場所に車が到着すると……そこは建物らしきものが焼け落ちた跡地だった。: When the car arrived at the location indicated by the navigation... it was the site of the ruins of a burned-down building.
変な夢らしきものを見てゴチャゴチャした頭を落ち着かせる為に、さっさとここへ来たと: I had come here quickly to clear my head after seeing that strange dream-like thing... and yet I ended up even more confused...
俺はこのワケの分からない状況を少しでも理解する為、恋人の華穂と話し合う事にした。: To understand even a little of this incomprehensible situation, I decided to talk it over with my girlfriend, Kaho.
話し合って出た答えは、二人して同じような夢を見たという結論だった。: The answer we reached after talking it over was the conclusion that we had both seen a similar dream.
理由は、互いが見た夢らしきものが一応両方とも自分の主観であった事。: The reason was that the dream-like things we each saw were both from our own subjective perspectives.
たまたま、偶然……俺達は何かに影響されるかのように似たような夢をみた……: By some random chance, a coincidence... we had seen similar dreams as if influenced by something...
少々無理のある結論だとは思うが、一応は納得出来なくもない。: I think it’s a somewhat forced conclusion, but for the time being, it’s not entirely unconvincing.
だがペンションの方はそれで説明がついたとしても、撫子という少女の思い出の方は……: However, even if the pension could be explained that way, the memories of the girl named Nadeshiko... could not be explained by that.
あの夢だけは……終始自分達の主観ではなく、あの撫子という少女の主観だった。: That dream alone... from beginning to end, was not our own subjective perspective, but that of the girl named Nadeshiko.
しかも撫子という女の子の、喜びや悲しみ……愛しさや虚しさを感じる事が出来た。: Furthermore, we were able to feel the joy and sadness... the love and emptiness of that girl.
あのビジョンも……撫子という少女が死ぬまでの出来事も……全部ただの夢で、事実無根: Was that vision... the events leading up to the girl's death... all just a dream, a groundless event?
重明\n「お前は……さっき見た撫子ちゃんの事……あれ全部夢だと思うか？」: Shigeaki: "Do you... think that stuff about Nadeshiko-chan we just saw... was all a dream?"
華穂\n「……夢だと思う……普通に考えれば……あれが真実だって証拠なんて……どこ: Kaho: "...I think it was a dream... Normally speaking... there’s no evidence anywhere... that it was the truth."
今体験した出来事を現実的に考えたら、確かに夢と考えるべきだろう。: If I thought about the events I just experienced realistically, I should indeed consider them a dream.
だがその夢は、夢というには……あまりにもリアリティがあった……とてもありえないか: But that dream... had too much reality to be called a dream... it wasn't an event with such a weak impression that I could easily deny it just because it was impossible.
それでも俺は今みたものを夢と決めつけ、知り合いに“妙な夢を見た”とネタ話にして語: Even so, I could decide that what I just saw was a dream and tell my acquaintances as a joke, "I had a weird dream."
何せ自分の夢とはいえ、俺にとっては他人事なのだ……華穂と違って。: After all, even if it was my own dream, it was someone else's business to me... unlike Kaho.
華穂\n「ねぇ、きーくん……私ね……撫子ちゃんの事、調べるなって……ショックを受: Kaho: "Hey, Ki-kun... you know... my father always told me... not to investigate Nadeshiko-chan... because it would be a shock to me."
重明\n「あぁ知ってる……って言っていいかわからないが……確か、夢の中でお前がそ: Shigeaki: "Yeah, I know... I don't know if I should say that, but... you said that in the dream, I think."
華穂\n「うん……だから私は撫子ちゃんと藤子さんが親子だって事は知らないし、現時: Kaho: "Yeah... that’s why I don't know that Nadeshiko-chan and Fujiko-san are mother and daughter, and at this point, there’s no proof."
華穂\n「それにあの尚人先生が……学校の裏で、あんな事してただなんて……私、信じ: Kaho: "And for that Naoto-sensei... to be doing those things behind the school... I can't believe it... and I don't... want to believe it."
華穂\n「けどあの夢の中に私が知ってる事もあった……私と撫子ちゃんしか知らない事: Kaho: "But there were things I knew in that dream... there were many things... that only Nadeshiko-chan and I knew..."
華穂\n「そして……さっき見た夢の中の撫子ちゃんが知らなかった事を……私、知って: Kaho: "And... I know things... that Nadeshiko-chan in that dream didn't know..."
華穂\n「私、きーくんに撫子ちゃんと仲の良かった先生は居なかったって言ったよね」: Kaho: "I told you, Ki-kun, that there were no teachers who were close to Nadeshiko-chan."
華穂\n「確かに私の知る限りは居なかった……けど、一回だけ……尚人先生の口から…: Kaho: "Certainly, as far as I knew, there weren't any... but just once... from Naoto-sensei's mouth... Nadeshiko-chan's name came up."
華穂\n「……文化祭の３日目……初めて尚人先生と話して……撫子ちゃんと仲がいいの: Kaho: "...On the third day of the culture festival... I spoke with Naoto-sensei for the first time... and he asked if I was on good terms with Nadeshiko-chan."
華穂\n「だから仲良くさせてもらってますって答えたら……尚人先生……あの子は友達: Kaho: "So when I answered that we were on good terms... Naoto-sensei... said that she didn't have any friends, so he wanted me to continue being friends with her."
華穂\n「私が優しいんですねって言ったら……尚人先生、何だか困った顔してた……」: Kaho: "When I said he was kind, Naoto-sensei... had a somewhat troubled face..."
華穂\n「それから尚人先生とお話する機会が増えたんだよ……最近はどうだとか、今の: Kaho: "After that, the opportunities to talk with Naoto-sensei increased... about how things were lately, what the students were talking about... things like that."
華穂\n「その時の私は、同学年のクラスの子に何か遠慮されちゃってて、あんまり話し: Kaho: "At that time, I was being kept at a distance by the other girls in my class, so I didn't talk to them much... as a result, everything I told Naoto-sensei was about Nadeshiko-chan."
華穂\n「……最近読んで撫子ちゃんと話した漫画の事とか……差し入れてくれたお菓子: Kaho: "...About the manga I’d read lately and talked about with Nadeshiko-chan... about how we enjoyed the sweets he’d brought us..."
華穂\n「……私が進学する話になった時も……撫子ちゃん、家庭の事情で進学できない: Kaho: "...When the topic of my continuing my education came up... because I’d heard that Nadeshiko-chan couldn't go on to higher education due to family circumstances..."
華穂\n「……そういうの……進路相談の時、先生の方から両親に相談できないものなの: Kaho: "...I... said to Naoto-sensei... that I wondered if the teacher couldn't talk to the parents during the career counseling... or something like that..."
その言葉を聴いた瞬間……俺は華穂が今、どんな思いでこの後何を言おうとするか……察: The moment I heard those words... I could guess what Kaho was thinking and what she was about to say next.
華穂は思い違いをしている……それに気付かせる為に……俺は彼女が次の言葉を言う前に: Kaho is making a mistake... to make her realize that... I spoke forcefully before she could say her next words.
重明\n「二人が死んだのは……お前のせいじゃない」: Shigeaki: "The death of those two... isn't your fault."
その言葉を聞き、華穂は悲しげに微笑み……首を横に振る。: Hearing those words, Kaho smiled sadly... and shook her head.
華穂\n「……尚人先生がよく話しかけてくれるのって……見た目で浮いてる私を気にか: Kaho: "...I’d always thought... that the reason Naoto-sensei talked to me often... was because he was concerned about me standing out because of my looks and called out to me..."
華穂\n「……けど違った……やっと今わかった……」: Kaho: "...But I was wrong... I finally understand now..."
華穂\n「……尚人先生……私を通して聞いてたんだ……撫子ちゃんの事……聞きたかっ: Kaho: "...Naoto-sensei... was listening through me... he wanted to hear... about Nadeshiko-chan..."
重明\n「……華穂……だからお前のせいじゃない……」: Shigeaki: "...Kaho... that’s why it isn't your fault..."
華穂\n「……だって、私……本当に……全部撫子ちゃんの話しかしてなかったもん……: Kaho: "...But, I... really... only talked about Nadeshiko-chan the whole time..."
華穂\n「……あの夢が本当の事なら……私のせいだ……二人が死んだのは……私のせい: Kaho: "...If that dream is true... then it’s my fault... the reason those two died... is my fault..."
華穂\n「……ねぇきーくん……もしかしたら私……二人を助けられたのかな……」: Kaho: "...Hey, Ki-kun... maybe... I could have saved them..."
重明\n「いや無理だ……相手の事情を知らなきゃ助けようがない……誰かに助けも乞わ: Shigeaki: "No, it’s impossible... you can't save someone if you don't know their circumstances... you can't save someone who doesn't even ask for help and doesn't show their pain."
重明\n「それに華穂……お前は撫子ちゃんと関わっていたが……当事者ではなかった…: Shigeaki: "And Kaho... you were involved with Nadeshiko-chan... but you weren't a party to the situation... you were definitely a stranger."
重明\n「どんなに近くに居ようが、会って間もない余所様の運命を、自分の好きに変え: Shigeaki: "No matter how close you were, thinking that you could change the fate of someone else you had only just met... it’s harsh to say, but frankly, it’s arrogant."
重明\n「もちろん悲しい出来事であり、お前が悲しむのは当然だろう……助けられなか: Shigeaki: "Of course, it’s a sad event, and it’s natural for you to be sad... I understand the feeling of being frustrated that you couldn't save them."
重明\n「けどな華穂……二人が死んだ事に対して、現場にすら居なかったお前が責任を: Shigeaki: "But Kaho... for you, who wasn't even at the scene, to feel a strong responsibility for their deaths is clearly wrong... don't you think so?"
華穂\n「……きーくんの言う通りかも……私も……きーくんが正しいと思う……」: Kaho: "...Maybe you’re right, Ki-kun... I... think you're right too..."
華穂\n「……けどね……理屈ではわかってても……たとえ他人事で、私がどうこう思う: Kaho: "...But you know... even if I understand it logically... even if it was someone else's business and it’s wrong for me to feel this way... no matter how arrogant it is..."
華穂\n「……私は、それでも……何とか助けたかった……」: Kaho: "...I still... somehow wanted to save them..."
華穂\n「……撫子ちゃんを……二人を……助けたかったよ……」: Kaho: "...I wanted to save Nadeshiko-chan... I wanted to save them both..."
華穂\n「……私は……二人を助けたかったんだよ！！ きーくん！！！」: Kaho: "...I wanted to save them!! Ki-kun!!!"
建物の焼け跡の前で泣き続ける華穂を抱きしめ見守った後……俺達は車内へと移動してい: After embracing and watching over Kaho as she continued to cry in front of the burned ruins of the building... we had moved inside the car.
泣きつかれて助手席で眠る華穂。: Kaho is sleeping in the passenger seat, exhausted from crying.
その隣で軽く一息つくと……俺はこの不思議な出来事を一人頭の中でまとめ始めていた。: Taking a light breath next to her... I began to summarize this mysterious event in my own head.
