重明\n「……そんな中、ちょっと行ってみようかなぁ～何て思ったからといって、どう: Shigeaki: “...Just because I thought 'maybe I'll take a quick look,' why do I have to be so dutiful about actually going... Haha... makes no sense at all, right?”
藤子\n「こんな天気に外へ出るだなんて……どうしたんですか？」: Touko: “What on earth are you doing, going outside in this weather?”
重明\n「いえ……実は建物の中からだと、実際どの程度天候が悪いのか正確な事がわか: Shigeaki: “No... well, I thought I couldn't really tell exactly how bad the weather was from inside the building... so I decided to test it out.”
重明\n（……まぁ実際は単にテンションが上がって、何となくノリで外に出ただけなん: Shigeaki: (...Well, the truth is I just got a bit hyped up and went out on a whim...)
藤子\n「……あら……それで何かわかったのかしら？」: Touko: “...I see... and did you find anything out?”
重明\n「……とても……寒い事が……よくわかりました……」: Shigeaki: “...I found out... that it is... very cold...”
重明\n「しかし、雪……凄いですね……」: Shigeaki: “But still, the snow... it’s incredible, isn't it...”
重明\n「よし……じゃあ藤子さんを探しに、撫子の部屋に行くとするか……」: Shigeaki: “Alright... let's head to Nadeshiko's room to look for Touko-san...”
重明\n「いや待て！？ ……何だよその部屋……この宿のドコにあるんだよ！！？」: Shigeaki: “Wait, what!? ...What room is that... and where the hell is it in this inn!!?”
重明\n「……とまぁ冗談はこの辺にしておいて……どこへ行くかな」: Shigeaki: “...Well, jokes aside... where should I go?”
重明\n「あれ……そういえばくす葉がどの部屋に泊まってるか……聞いてなかったっけ: Shigeaki: “Wait... come to think of it... did I ever hear... which room Kusuha is staying in...?”
重明\n「よぉし……じゃあ廊下へ行くぞ」: Shigeaki: “Alright... heading to the hallway now.”
重明\n「……まぁ……ただその場で回転しただけなんだけどな」: Shigeaki: “...Well... I just spun around in place, though.”
藤子\n「ええ……ここでこんなに降り積もったのは何時以来かしら……」: Touko: “Yes... I wonder how long it’s been since we’ve had this much snow accumulate here...”
重明\n「天気予報ってどうなってます？ 何時ぐらいまで降って積もる感じですかね？: Shigeaki: “What’s the weather forecast say? How long is it going to keep falling and piling up?”
藤子\n「予報では……雪が止むのは今日の夜って事になってたけど……」: Touko: “The forecast says... the snow is supposed to stop tonight...”
大雪と言えば、去年の２月……記録的な積雪があった時の状況が、頭に思い浮かぶ。: Speaking of heavy snow, I’m reminded of last February... the situation when there was record-breaking snowfall.
……都市部はまだマシだったが、場所によっては交通が遮断され陸の孤島になったらしい: ...The city centers were still okay, but apparently some places were completely cut off and became isolated islands on land.
重明\n「……俺達……今日家に帰れるのかな……」: Shigeaki: “...Are we... going to be able to go home today...”
藤子\n「都心も凄くて交通が麻痺し始めているらしいし……」: Touko: “I hear the city center is also hit hard and transportation is starting to be paralyzed...”
藤子\n「これだけ雪が積もって視界の悪くなった山道を降りるのは危険よ？」: Touko: “It would be dangerous to go down mountain roads with this much snow and such poor visibility, don't you think?”
藤子\n「雪が止んだら宿から公道までの道を軽く除雪してくれるよう今朝電話で頼んだ: Touko: “I called this morning to ask them to lightly plow the road from the inn to the main road once the snow stops... so I think it’s wiser to stay at the inn today without overextending yourselves.”
重明\n「わかりました……藤子さん、すみませんが雪が落ち着くまでよろしくお願いし: Shigeaki: “Understood... I’m sorry for the trouble, Touko-san, but please take care of us until the snow settles.”
藤子\n「ええ、何もない宿だけどゆっくりしていってね」: Touko: “Of course. It’s an inn with nothing much to offer, but please take your time and relax.”
重明\n「……あと……実は華穂が少し体調崩してしまいまして……すみませんが何か消: Shigeaki: “...Also... actually Kaho's feeling a bit under the weather... sorry, but could I ask for something easy to digest for her?”
藤子\n「わかったわ……貴方が朝食を済ませている間に、華穂さんのご飯、準備してお: Touko: “I understand... I'll prepare something for Kaho-san while you're finishing your breakfast.”
朝食のため藤子と共に隣の部屋へと移動すると……談話室には、昨日知り合ったばかりの: When I moved to the next room with Touko for breakfast... Kusuha, the girl I’d only met yesterday, was in the common room.
重明\n（……うん？ ……何か昨日に比べて妙にテンションが低いな……）: Shigeaki: (...Hm? ...She seems to have a strangely low energy compared to yesterday...)
……夜更かしでもしたのか……それとも低血圧とかなのだろうか？: ...Did she stay up late... or is she just a person with low blood pressure?
もっとハキハキとした印象だったのだが……今朝の彼女からは昨日の勢いのようなものが: She’d given me a more energetic impression... but from her this morning, I can't feel the same momentum she had yesterday.
重明\n「……何か体調が悪そうだけど……平気なのか？」: Shigeaki: “...You look like you're not feeling well... are you okay?”
くす葉\n「ところで華穂さんは？ 昨日みたいに一緒じゃないの？」: Kusuha: “By the way, where's Kaho-san? Isn't she with you like yesterday?”
重明\n「ああ、実はアイツ今朝になって体調を崩しちゃってな……今は部屋でダウンし: Shigeaki: “Ah, well, she actually started feeling unwell this morning... She’s down in the room right now.”
くす葉\n「……そうだったんですか……お大事にと伝えておいてください」: Kusuha: “...I see... please tell her to take care.”
重明\n「わかった……所でくす葉、お前も朝食をとりにきたのか？」: Shigeaki: “Got it... So Kusuha, did you come to get breakfast too?”
重明\n「ああ、じゃあ今から二人で一緒に食べるか」: Shigeaki: “Yeah. Want to eat together, then?”
朝食らしく簡単に用意出来そうな料理を藤子から受け取ると……俺達は昨日と同じ場所に: Receiving some simple dishes from Touko that looked easy to prepare for breakfast... we moved to the same spot as yesterday and sat down in the chairs.
メニューはオムレツにサラダ、紅鮭にひじきの煮物におしんことスープに白米……まさに: The menu consisted of an omelet, salad, sockeye salmon, simmered hijiki, pickles, soup, and white rice... a lineup that was exactly what you'd expect for an inn's breakfast.
……そんな俺に比べ、くす葉の方はサラダとスープ……そしてコーヒーのみ。: ...Compared to mine, Kusuha only had a salad, soup... and coffee.
重明\n「おい、くす葉……お前それだけでお腹すかないのか？」: Shigeaki: “Hey, Kusuha... aren't you going to be hungry with just that?”
くす葉\n「……昨日私がここに来たのは仕事っていったでしょ？」: Kusuha: “...I told you yesterday that I came here for work, didn't I?”
重明\n「ああ、親の紹介だとか何とか……」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, something about your parents introducing you...”
くす葉\n「それでね……炭水化物とかお肉は、仕事に影響するから……極力取らないで: Kusuha: “And, well... I was told not to take in carbohydrates or meat as much as possible... because it affects the work.”
食事制限のある仕事と言われて真っ先に思いつくのがモデル業。: When told about work with dietary restrictions, the first thing that comes to mind is modeling.
だがこの宿にスタジオがあるとは思えない……もしかしてこの近場に、誰かのアトリエで: But I don't think there’s a studio in this inn... maybe there’s someone's atelier nearby?
重明\n（……仮にそうだとしても……健康診断じゃあるまいし……一食程度でそう変わ: Shigeaki: (...Even if that were the case... it’s not like a medical checkup... does one meal really change that much?)
重明\n「仕事って……この宿でやってるのか？」: Shigeaki: “The work... are you doing it at this inn?”
重明\n「どんな仕事をしているのか……聞いてもいいかな？」: Shigeaki: “Could I ask... what kind of work you're doing?”
……山奥の宿で行われる、食事制限のあるナイショの仕事……: ...A secret job with dietary restrictions, taking place at an inn deep in the mountains...
重明\n（……どう考えても……マトモな仕事じゃないよな……）: Shigeaki: (...No matter how you think about it... it doesn't sound like a normal job, does it...)
もしかしてくす葉は……この宿で何かろくでもない事に巻き込まれているのではないだろ: Is it possible Kusuha is... caught up in something no-good at this inn?
重明\n（けどろくでもない事って何だ？ ……安直だけど、やっぱりエロい事か？）: Shigeaki: (But what would 'no-good' mean? ...It’s a bit of a leap, but maybe something erotic?)
だがもし性的な仕事だというなら、くす葉は仕事を紹介した自分の【親】に売られたとい: But if it were sexual work, it would mean Kusuha had been sold to it by her own [Parents] who introduced the job.
昨日会ったばかりで事情も良く知らない相手の複雑な家庭の事情を根掘り葉掘り聞くほど: I’m not the kind of reckless person who digs into the complicated family circumstances of someone I only met yesterday.
……そもそも……くす葉が酷い目に遭っているというのは、単なる俺の妄想でしかないの: ...In the first place... the idea that Kusuha is being subjected to something terrible is just my own delusion.
そんな感じでこっちが色々と勝手な憶測を働かせていた所……気だるそうに食事をしてい: While I was speculating on various things like that... a chopstick slipped from Kusuha's hand as she ate listlessly, falling to the floor.
くす葉\n「……あぁ……床に落ちちゃった……」: Kusuha: “...Ah... it fell on the floor...”
重明\n「おいおい、何やってんだよ……」: Shigeaki: “Hey now, what are you doing...”
直ぐに箸を拾ってやる: Pick up the chopstick for her immediately
落とした箸を拾ってやろうかと考えたものの……机の下に潜り込んでしまうと、下着を見: I thought about picking up the dropped chopstick for her... but if I crawl under the table, I might see her underwear.
気持ちに余裕のある時なら、パンツを見る程度ギャグで済ませられるのだが……見た感じ: When I’m feeling relaxed, I can pass off seeing panties as a joke, but Kusuha clearly looks depressed.
ここは年上として、少しばかり気を使ってやるべきだろう。: As the older one here, I should probably show a little consideration.
重明\n「待ってろ……代わりの箸、すぐ貰ってきてやるよ」: Shigeaki: “Hang on... I'll go get you a replacement chopstick right away.”
俺は藤子が用意してくれた華穂の朝食を片手に、自分の部屋へと向かい歩いていた。: I was walking toward my room with the breakfast Touko had prepared for Kaho in one hand.
ボケッと箸を床に落としたくす葉に軽く呆れつつ……俺は机の下へと自分の身体をもぐり: While feeling a bit appalled at Kusuha for listlessly dropping her chopstick on the floor... I crawled under the table.
くす葉\n「……あ……自分で拾う……」: Kusuha: “...Ah... I'll pick it up myself...”
重明\n「いいって、もう潜っちゃったし」: Shigeaki: “It’s fine, I’m already under here.”
……机の下の薄暗い空間の中に見える、くす葉の白く細い足。: ...Kusuha's pale, slender legs visible in the dim space under the table.
ふとセクハラかなとは思ったものの……こうして既に潜り込んでしまった以上、さっと用: I suddenly thought it might be sexual harassment, but since I’d already crawled in, I should just finish the task quickly.
俺はスカートの中へと向きそうになる視線を下げ、キョロキョロと彼女が落とした箸を探: I lowered my gaze from where it was about to face the inside of her skirt, and looked around for the chopstick she’d dropped.
くす葉\n「……重明さん……箸……見つかりましたか？」: Kusuha: “...Shigeaki-san... did you find the chopstick?”
重明\n「ああ、ちょうどお前の足元にあったぞ……今、手を伸ばして取る所だ」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, it was right by your feet... I'm just reaching for it now.”
箸を取るため手を伸ばし、ほんの少し顔を彼女の下半身に近づけた所……: As I reached for the chopstick, bringing my face just a little closer to her lower body...
くす葉の足がわずかに動き……彼女のスカートの内側が、視界に飛び込んできた。: Kusuha's leg moved slightly... and the inside of her skirt flashed into my field of vision.
くす葉\n「何だか驚いた顔してますけど……机の下で……変なモノでも見えましたか？: Kusuha: “You have a surprised look on your face... did you see... something strange under the table?”
重明\n（……見えたよ……そりゃモロ見えたけどさ……）: Shigeaki: (...I saw it... I saw it all, clear as day...)
今見せている力のない笑顔から察するに……実はくす葉には露出趣味があり、自分の恥部: Judging from the weak smile she’s showing now... the possibility that Kusuha actually has an exhibitionist fetish and is enjoying having her private parts seen... is likely very thin.
重明\n（望んでしていないとなると……やっぱりくす葉は……何かいかがわしい事に巻: Shigeaki: (If she’s not doing it because she wants to... then does it mean Kusuha really is... caught up in something shady?)
もしそうなら、どうにか助けてやりたい……もちろん俺が出来る範囲の事までだが。: If that’s the case, I want to help her somehow... of course, only within the range of what I can do.
それに助けるとしても、当然くす葉が俺を頼り、助けられる事を強く望んでいる事が大前: And even if I were to help, the premise would naturally have to be that Kusuha relies on me and strongly desires to be helped...
俺はさっと状況を考えた結果……あえて直接的な返答を避け、くす葉にこう声を掛けた。: After a quick assessment of the situation... I decided to avoid a direct response and spoke to Kusuha like this.
重明\n「何かあったら遠慮なく言え……どんな相談だろうと、聞くだけならいくらでも: Shigeaki: “If anything happens, don't hesitate to tell me... No matter what kind of trouble it is, I'm willing to listen as much as you need.”
恐らく、まずはノーパンである事を指摘し、どうしたと聞いてくると思い込んでいたのだ: Presumably, she’d assumed I would first point out that she wasn't wearing panties and ask what happened.
……ただ【話を聞いてやる】という言葉は相当意外だったらしく……くす葉は呆然と俺の: ...The words [I'm willing to listen] must have been quite unexpected... as Kusuha is staring at me, dazed.
くす葉\n「……ごめん、重明さん……私、用事思い出した……もういくね……」: Kusuha: “...Sorry, Shigeaki-san... I just remembered I have something to do... I have to go now...”
肩を落とし立ち去るくす葉の姿を、無言のまま見守った後……: After watching Kusuha leave with her shoulders slumped in silence...
……俺はモヤモヤとした気分のまま……一人朝食を済ませたのだった……: ...I finished the rest of my breakfast alone... feeling a sense of unease...
途中から一人となった朝食を終えた俺は……藤子が用意してくれた華穂の朝食を片手に、: Having finished the breakfast that I ended up eating alone halfway through... I was walking toward my room with the breakfast Touko had prepared for Kaho in one hand.
ロビーから階段を上がると、昨夜会った男……尚人が、こちらへと近づいてきた。: When I went up the stairs from the lobby, the man I met last night... Naoto, approached me.
重明\n（……あれ？ ……こいつって……こんな顔だったっけ……）: Shigeaki: (...Wait? ...Was this... what his face looked like...?)
昨日もマジマジと見たわけではないので、確かな事は言えないのだが……何だか前に見た: I hadn't looked at him very closely yesterday either, so I can't say for sure, but... I can't help but feel his expression is strangely more distinct than when I saw him before.
重明\n（まぁ別人ってわけでもなさそうだし……どうでもいいか）: Shigeaki: (Well, it doesn't seem like he’s a different person... so whatever.)
尚人\n「何だお前……まだここに居たのか」: Naoto: “What are you... still doing here?”
重明\n「……まだってまだ午前中だぞ？ チェックアウトしてるわけないだろうが……: Shigeaki: “...What do you mean 'still,' it’s still the morning, you know? There’s no way we’ve checked out yet... and besides, look at the weather.”
重明\n「そうだよ……３月だって言うのに外は去年の２月みたいな大雪……視界不良な: Shigeaki: “Exactly... it’s March and yet it’s like that record snow from last February out there... Who the hell could just casually head home on mountain roads that are piled high enough to need plowing and have zero visibility, you moron.”
尚人\n「ふむ……そう……なるか……まぁまだ残りたいと言うなら、別に止めはしない: Naoto: “Hmm... I suppose... that’s true... well, if you say you want to stay longer, I won't stop you.”
重明\n「……別にお前に命じられたからと言って……ハイそうですかと出て行きやしな: Shigeaki: “...It’s not like I’m going to just say 'Oh, okay' and leave just because you ordered me to, though.”
この男は年上で華穂の元先生。: This man is older and is Kaho's former teacher.
立場だけで考えたら、当然目上という事でもう少し丁重な感じで話すような相手。: Thinking only of positions, he’s naturally someone I should speak to more politely as a superior.
だが、俺は初対面で相手を見下すような野郎に尽くす礼など持ち合わせてはいない。: However, I don't possess any courtesy to waste on a guy who looks down on others from the first meeting.
尚人\n「昨日は色々と思う所あって少々気が立っていたとはいえ……大人気なくキミに: Naoto: “I was a bit on edge yesterday for various reasons... and I ended up taking it out on you in an immature way... I apologize for that.”
重明\n「……はぁ……そうなんすか……まぁ別にいいっすけど」: Shigeaki: “...Hah... is that so... well, whatever, I don't mind.”
横柄なヤツだと思い込んでいたので、こうもあっさり謝られるとは思わなかった。: I’d assumed he was an arrogant prick, so I didn't expect him to apologize so easily.
相変わらず上からなのは少し気になるが……まぁそこまで悪いヤツではないのかもしれな: The fact that he’s still talking down to me is a bit bothersome... but maybe he’s not such a bad guy after all.
尚人\n「これで昨日の事は水に流したとして……だ」: Naoto: “Now that we’ve let bygones be bygones regarding yesterday... well.”
尚人\n「お前、華穂くんと別れる気はないか」: Naoto: “Do you have any intention of breaking up with Kaho-kun?”
尚人\n「今のでわからなかったのか？ ……馬鹿だな……仕方がない、もう一度いって: Naoto: “Did you not understand that? ...How stupid... fine, I'll say it again.”
重明\n「いやいや！ わかったよ！ 十分わかったけど！！ ……俺がわかんねぇのは: Shigeaki: “No, no! I understood! I understood perfectly!! ...What I don't understand is why the hell I have to break up with Kaho!”
尚人\n「……まさか二股をかけるきか？ ……お前にそれが出来る甲斐性があるのか？: Naoto: “...Are you planning to two-time her? ...Do you have the capacity to do that?”
重明\n「だから甲斐性以前に、何でいきなり俺が二股をかけるって話になってるんだよ: Shigeaki: “That’s why I'm saying, before we even talk about capacity, why has it suddenly become a story about me two-timing anyone...”
尚人\n「ふむ……少し結論を急ぎすぎて言葉が足りなかったようだな……謝罪しよう」: Naoto: “Hmm... it seems I was a bit too quick to reach a conclusion and lacked sufficient words... I apologize.”
重明\n「……ああ、足りなすぎだ……お前は本当に教師なのかと問いただしたいぐらい: Shigeaki: “...Yeah, you lacked them way too much... You lacked them so much I want to cross-examine you on whether you’re really a teacher... so go ahead and explain it properly.”
尚人\n「桔梗は気に入ったか？」: Naoto: “Did you take a liking to Kikyou?”
重明\n「だから説明しろって！！ ぜんっぜん説明になってねえよ！？」: Shigeaki: “I TOLD YOU TO EXPLAIN!! That doesn't explain a damn thing!?”
尚人\n「当然だ……足りない言葉を言っただけで、説明をする気など、はなからない」: Naoto: “Naturally. I only spoke the words that were lacking; I had no intention of explaining from the start.”
重明\n「あんた無茶苦茶自分勝手っすね……今の、俺じゃなきゃキレて会話終わってま: Shigeaki: “You're incredibly selfish, aren't you... if it weren't me, this conversation would have ended with someone snapping, you know?”
そう……確かに尚人の自分勝手な物言いに呆れてはいるものの……俺はその程度で頭にき: Right... I certainly was appalled by Naoto's selfish way of speaking, but I’m not a short-tempered person who would get angry over that and cut off the conversation.
それに見下すような物言いのクセに、何だか尚人の言葉にはトゲトゲしさがない……言葉: Besides, despite his looking-down-on-me way of speaking, somehow there’s no thorniness in Naoto's words... I don't feel any hostility in them.
敵意もない上に、多少この男の意図も気になる……なら無理に会話を打ち切らず、もう少: Since there’s no hostility and I’m also a bit curious about this man's intentions... I'll play along for a bit more without forcing an end to the talk.
重明\n「……どうって……桔梗ちゃんとは昨日会ったばかりで、ほとんど話してないん: Shigeaki: “...What do you mean, 'how'... I only met Kikyou-chan yesterday, and I’ve hardly talked to her...”
重明\n「まぁ……外見だけって話なら、華穂には及ばないけど美人だし……風呂場でみ: Shigeaki: “Well... if it’s just about looks, she’s not on Kaho's level but she’s a beauty, and from what I saw in the bath, her body was plump and lewd-looking.”
重明\n「ろくな接点もないのに、外見以上のどんな感想を述べればいいんだよ」: Shigeaki: “We have no real connection, so what kind of impression other than looks do you expect me to give?”
尚人\n「まぁいい……つまり気に入ったって事だな」: Naoto: “Fine... in short, you liked her, then.”
重明\n「気に入ったか気に入ってないかで言えば、気に入ったよ……９０点前後だな」: Shigeaki: “If you're asking if I liked her or not, I liked her... about a 90, I guess.”
重明\n「けど俺には華穂が居るし、何の理由もなしに二股なんてかけるわけねーだろう: Shigeaki: “But I have Kaho, so there’s no way I’m going to two-time for no reason, is there?”
尚人\n「まぁそうだろうな……女二人を幸せにする甲斐性など、お前にはなさそうだし: Naoto: “I suppose so... you don't look like you have the capacity to make two women happy, anyway.”
重明\n「……いや甲斐性とかそういう話じゃなく、単なる誠実さの問題なんだけど……: Shigeaki: “...No, it’s not about capacity or anything like that, it’s just a simple matter of sincerity...”
重明\n「つーか、ほんとアンタ何が言いたいわけ？ ……要は俺に華穂と別れて桔梗ち: Shigeaki: “Seriously, what are you trying to say? ...Are you basically telling me to break up with Kaho and date Kikyou-chan?”
尚人\n「つまり桔梗を幸せにする気はないと？」: Naoto: “In other words, you have no intention of making Kikyou happy?”
重明\n「いやだから、まず何で俺が桔梗ちゃんを幸せにしなきゃいけないんだ……やり: Shigeaki: “No, first of all, why do I have to be the one to make Kikyou-chan happy... if you want to do it, do it yourself... I mean, what the hell are you to Kikyou-chan anyway?”
尚人\n「出来ない事情がある……それと僕が桔梗の何なのかも、この場で説明する気は: Naoto: “There are circumstances that prevent me from doing so... and I have no intention of explaining my relationship to Kikyou here either.”
重明\n「あ～ハイハイ……そうかよ……まあいいや……」: Shigeaki: “Ah~ yeah, yeah... fine then... whatever...”
重明\n「仮にもし、今ので俺に桔梗ちゃんの事を頼んでるとしたら……そんな説明で納: Shigeaki: “Even if you're asking me to take care of Kikyou-chan just now... I don't think there’s anyone who would be convinced by an explanation like that, you know?”
尚人\n「ならお前は納得のいく説明があったら、誰だろうとそいつの面倒を一生見るの: Naoto: “Then would you take care of someone for the rest of their life as long as there was a convincing explanation?”
重明\n「……けどまぁ友達ぐらいにはなるだろうさ……あくまで桔梗ちゃんが望めばだ: Shigeaki: “...But well, I might become friends at least... provided Kikyou-chan wanted that.”
尚人\n「確かに……お前の存在自体を桔梗が生理的に断固受け入れられない可能性もあ: Naoto: “True... there is also the possibility that Kikyou herself could not biologically or psychologically accept your very existence.”
重明\n「アンタってほんと呆れるぐらい失礼なヤツだな……そんなんでよく教師なんて: Shigeaki: “You're an appallingly rude guy, aren't you... how the hell can you even be a teacher like that.”
尚人\n「教師だからといって、必ずしも人として出来ているわけでもあるまい」: Naoto: “Being a teacher does not necessarily mean one is a fully-formed human being.”
尚人\n「それに思った事をそのまま口にしなければいい」: Naoto: “Besides, one simply has to not speak exactly what one thinks.”
重明\n「なら俺にも気を使えよ」: Shigeaki: “Then show some consideration for me too.”
尚人\n「断る……僕に気を使われたければ、それなりの対価を払え」: Naoto: “I refuse... if you want my consideration, you must pay a suitable price.”
重明\n「なら気を使わなくていいや、俺も使わねーし」: Shigeaki: “Fine, forget it then. I won't show you any either.”
尚人\n「とにかくだ……桔梗の事、考えておいてくれ」: Naoto: “At any rate... keep Kikyou in mind.”
重明\n「……いや、考える前にもう少し情報をだな……」: Shigeaki: “...No, before I do that, how about a bit more info...”
尚人\n「それと桔梗と話す時は僕の名前を出すな……わかったな？」: Naoto: “And don't mention my name when you talk to Kikyou... understood?”
言いたい事を言い終えたのだろう……尚人は勝手に会話を打ち切ると、さっさと俺の元か: Having presumably finished saying what he wanted to say... Naoto unilaterally cut off the conversation and quickly left me, walking off somewhere.
重明\n「……なんて自己中なヤツだ……しかしあの野郎……ホント何が言いたかったん: Shigeaki: “...What a self-centered guy... seriously, what the hell was that bastard trying to say?”
……もしかして尚人は、藤木親子の親戚か何かなのだろうか？: ...Is it possible Naoto is a relative of the Fujiki mother and daughter or something?
重明\n（若くして母親の仕事を手伝う桔梗ちゃんには友達が居ない……親戚のオジサン: Shigeaki: (Kikyou-chan, who’s young and helping with her mother's work, doesn't have any friends... and as Naoto, her middle-aged relative, he’s worried about her and wants me to be friends... or something...)
もしそうなら、普通に仲良くなってくれそうな同性の華穂やくす葉に頼むべきではないだ: If that were the case, wouldn't it be more appropriate to ask Kaho or Kusuha, who are the same gender and seem likely to get along with her normally?
それにそもそも……俺に華穂と別れて欲しいと言う理由がない。: And besides... there’s no reason for him to want me to break up with Kaho.
何にしろ尚人が桔梗の事を、とても気に掛けているというのは良く分かった。: In any case, I understood well that Naoto cares about Kikyou very much.
かと言って、こちらとしては桔梗自身が望まないかぎり、積極的に何かやろうという気に: That being said, I don't feel like proactively doing anything unless Kikyou herself wants it.
……何故なら俺は……よそ様の悩みを勝手に嗅ぎつけ解決してやるほど……善人でもヒマ: ...Because I’m not such a good person or someone with so much time on my hands that I’d go sniffing out and resolving other people's troubles on my own initiative.
重明\n「ただいま華穂……ご飯もって来たぞ」: Shigeaki: “I'm home, Kaho... I brought you some food.”
重明\n「身体、起きれそうか？」: Shigeaki: “Do you think you can sit up?”
藤子さんが用意してくれた朝食を済ませた後……華穂は再びベッドへ横になり、身体を休: After finishing the breakfast Touko-san had prepared... Kaho lay back down on the bed to rest her body.
重明\n「どうだ？ 寒気とかはないか？」: Shigeaki: “How is it? Any chills or anything?”
華穂\n「今の所は平気……ご飯も食べたし」: Kaho: “I'm okay for now... I ate my food, after all.”
額の熱を測るついでにサラサラの華穂の髪の毛を指先ですくい、ワシャワシャと軽く頭を: While I was at it, I measured the heat of her forehead, scooped up Kaho's silky hair with my fingertips, and lightly patted and rumpled her head.
重明\n（……う～ん……熱っぽい感じは……なさそうかな……）: Shigeaki: (...Hmm... she doesn't seem to have a fever...)
華穂\n「……ぁ……きーくん……髪の毛、ぐしゃぐしゃになっちゃうよ……」: Kaho: “...Ah... Ki-kun... my hair's going to get all messy...”
重明\n「髪の毛がくしゃくしゃでも可愛いぞ」: Shigeaki: “You're cute even with messy hair.”
軽いスキンシップを終え立ち上がると、俺は窓の外の景色に視線を移していく。: After finishing our light skinship and standing up, I shifted my gaze to the view outside the window.
重明\n「藤子さんに聞いた話だと、この雪、夜まで降るらしいしぞ」: Shigeaki: “According to what I heard from Touko-san, this snow is supposed to keep falling until tonight.”
華穂\n「うわ、まだ止まないんだ……今日中に家に帰れるかな……」: Kaho: “Whoa, it’s still not going to stop... I wonder if we can get home today...”
重明\n「無理だろうな……とりあえず明日までお世話になりますって、藤子さんには言: Shigeaki: “Unlikely... for now, I told Touko-san we'll be in her care until tomorrow.”
重明\n「しかし、昨日の夜から降り続けているせいか……室温も昨日より下がってきた: Shigeaki: “But man, maybe because it’s been falling since last night... I feel like the room temperature has dropped since yesterday, too.”
華穂\n「そうだね……まだ平気だけど、これ以上下がると少し厳しいかも」: Kaho: “Yeah... it’s okay for now, but if it drops any more, it might be a bit tough.”
重明\n「よし……じゃあ食器を戻すついでに、何か暖房器具をゲットしてくるよ」: Shigeaki: “Alright... then when I go back to return the dishes, I'll see if I can get some kind of heating equipment.”
華穂\n「……ごめんね……今朝からきーくんばかりに色々とやらせちゃって」: Kaho: “...Sorry... I’ve been making you do everything since this morning, Ki-kun.”
重明\n「気にすんな……華穂は俺の彼女で、しかも体調が悪い……彼氏から一方的に甘: Shigeaki: “Don't worry about it... you're my girlfriend, Kaho, and you're not feeling well... right now, you have the right to be unilaterally pampered by your boyfriend.”
華穂\n「では……彼女の権限を、遠慮なく活用させてもらおうかな」: Kaho: “Then... maybe I'll take advantage of my girlfriend's authority without hesitation.”
華穂\n「じゃあ、きーくん……キスしてほしい」: Kaho: “Then, Ki-kun... I want you to kiss me.”
彼女の願い通りキスを交わしつつ……俺は華穂の体調を探るため、唇を押し付け柔らかな: Trading kisses as she wished... I pressed my lips against hers to check the state of her soft mucous membranes and gauge her physical condition.
華穂\n「ちゅ、ちゅぷっ……んふぅ……んっ、ちゅっ、ちゅぱっ、ちゅぅ……」: Kaho: “Chu, chupu... nfu... nn, chu, chupa, chuuu...”
重明\n（よし、いつも通りの瑞々しさだ……確かに風邪とかじゃなさそうだな……）: Shigeaki: (Alright, it’s the same moisture as usual... it certainly doesn't seem like a cold...)
華穂\n「はぁ、ん、ちゅっ、ちゅぷ……んあ、ちゅっ、んちゅぅ……ぷはぁ」: Kaho: “Haa, nn, chu, chupu... n-ah, chu, nchuu... puha.”
華穂\n「へへ……元気の元、充填完了」: Kaho: “Hehe... recharge complete. I feel more energetic now.”
重明\n「それじゃ、ちょっと行ってくるよ」: Shigeaki: “Well then, I'll be off for a bit.”
最後に軽く華穂の頭を撫でると……: After patting Kaho's head one last time...
俺は食器の乗ったトレイを片手に廊下へ向け歩き出したのだった……: I headed out into the hallway with the tray of dishes in one hand...
２階から階段を下りる最中……俺は風呂場へと続く通路に、チラりと人影を見つけ、視線: While going down the stairs from the second floor... I caught a glimpse of a figure in the passage leading to the bath and shifted my gaze.
すると少し離れた場所に、くす葉と見知らぬ男が立ち話をしている姿が見えた。: I saw Kusuha and a man I didn't know talking a short distance away.
重明\n（あれって……昨日の夜、談話室でくす葉と雑談してた所にやって来た男……か: Shigeaki: (Is that... the man who came to the common room while I was chatting with Kusuha last night... maybe?)
顔は印象が薄くハッキリとは覚えていないものの……髪型と服装を見た限り、恐らく昨晩: His face didn't leave much of an impression and I don't remember it clearly... but judging by his hairstyle and clothes, he must be the man who took Kusuha away last night.
重明\n（……さっき一緒に朝食も食べたし、雪で今日は帰れそうもない……ここで無意: Shigeaki: (...I just ate breakfast with her earlier, and we won't be able to leave today because of the snow... there’s no need to force a conversation by interrupting them here...)
俺はくす葉達から視線を外すと、目的地である談話室へと再び歩き始めたのだった……: I averted my eyes from Kusuha and the man and began to walk toward the common room, my destination...
ふと脳裏に、朝食の時の疲弊したくす葉の顔と、ノーパンだった事が浮かび上がる。: Suddenly, Kusuha's exhausted face from breakfast and the fact that she wasn't wearing panties came to mind.
……俺は彼女の身に何が起きたのかを軽く探るため……二人に気付かれぬよう足音を殺し: ...To lightly probe what had happened to her... I killed my footsteps so they wouldn't notice and approached them.
オッサン\n「……では、彼に下半身を見られたのですか？」: Old Man: “...So, he saw your lower body?”
オッサン\n「……ほうほう……彼はなんと言ってましたか？」: Old Man: “...Ho-ho... and what did he say?”
くす葉\n「……何かあったら……相談しろって……言ってきました……」: Kusuha: “...He said... if anything happens... I should talk to him...”
オッサン\n「……ノーパンである事は何も言わなかったんですか？」: Old Man: “...He didn't say anything about you not wearing panties?”
重明\n（……ああ……これはもう……くす葉はこのオッサンにエロい事をされてるって: Shigeaki: (...Ah... this is it... there’s no doubt that Kusuha is having erotic things done to her by this old guy...)
重明\n（……む、むぅ……ここは少し冷静になって考えるか……）: Shigeaki: (...M-Mm... I should take a moment to think this through calmly...)
……昨日くす葉は、親に紹介された仕事で宿に来たと言っていた。: ...Yesterday Kusuha said she came to the inn for work introduced by her parents.
つまり彼女は自分の親により、あのオッサンに身体を売られてしまったと考えるべきだろ: In other words, I should assume she was sold by her own parents to that old guy.
重明\n（……しかも二人きりだった朝食の時、求められたのに助けて欲しいとは言わな: Shigeaki: (...On top of that, even during breakfast when it was just the two of us, she didn't ask for help even though I offered... in short, it’s all consensual, isn't it...)
そうなると俺が一人勇ましく拳を振るい、悪いオッサンを倒せば全部解決……なんて単純: If that’s the case, it’s hard to imagine it ending in a simple flow where I heroically swing my fists and defeat the bad old man to solve everything.
重明\n（……親が子供を売る……借金、かな……やっぱり……）: Shigeaki: (...Parents selling a child... a debt, maybe... after all...)
……もちろん法的に考えれば、遺産を受け取っていない限り子は親の借金を払う義務はな: ...Of course, thinking legally, a child has no obligation to pay a parent's debt unless they receive an inheritance.
だがそれでも、本人が返済を望んでいる場合……法や義務の有無など関係はないのだ。: But even so, if the person themselves wants to pay it back... the presence or absence of law or obligation doesn't matter.
心情的に言えば、今すぐ彼女を助けてやりたい。: Emotionally, I want to help her right away.
だが問題は恐らく金……そして俺は何の力もない学生風情。: But the problem is likely money... and I’m just a student with no power.
もちろん興味本位で首を突っ込む事は簡単だが……それでくす葉が傷つく事や、華穂や自: Of course, it’s easy to poke my nose in out of curiosity... but I also have to consider the risk of Kusuha being hurt because of that, or trouble spreading to Kaho or my own family to some extent.
重明\n（……そうだな……何か行動を起こす前に……少し華穂の意見も聞いてみるとす: Shigeaki: (...Right... before I take any action... maybe I'll hear Kaho's opinion for a bit...)
自分の結論にモヤモヤとしたものを感じつつも……俺は気を取り直し、再び談話室へと歩: While feeling a sense of unease about my conclusion... I pulled myself together and began to walk toward the common room once again.
重明\n（俺に何が出来るかはわからないけど……とりあえず話だけでも、聞いてみるか: Shigeaki: (I don't know what I can do... but for now, I'll at least listen to what she has to say...)
俺はくわしい事情を知るため、二人の傍へと近づいていった。: To find out the detailed circumstances, I approached the two of them.
オッサン\n「……おや貴方は……ククッ……おはようございます、どうしましたか？」: Old Man: “...Oh, you're... kuku... good morning. Is something the matter?”
出会ったばかりの相手に対し、いきなり蔑むような態度を取る人種が俺はとても嫌いだっ: I personally really dislike the breed of people who take a condescending attitude right away toward someone they just met.
その基準を満たすオッサンの言い回しに軽くカチンと来た俺は……軽く敵意を混じらせた: Getting a bit ticked off by the old guy's phrasing which met that criteria... I expressed my purpose in a tone mixed with a bit of hostility.
重明\n「オッサン……くす葉と少し話がしたいんだけど……借りてもいいかな？」: Shigeaki: “Old man... I want to talk to Kusuha for a bit... could I borrow her?”
オッサン\n「……おいおい、彼女は今仕事中だ……悪いが乳繰り合いたいなら、自分の: Old Man: “...Hey now, she’s in the middle of work... sorry, but if you want to flirt, shouldn't you do it with your own girlfriend?”
重明\n「オッサン、俺は今、くす葉と話がしたいって言ったんだぜ？ ……いいから快: Shigeaki: “Old man, I just told you I want to talk to Kusuha, didn't I? ...So just hand her over nicely, okay?”
口元は微笑みを浮かべつつも……俺は笑っていない目で【別に荒事にしてもいいぞ？】と: While wearing a smile on my face... I strengthened the pressure with eyes that weren't laughing, as if to say [I don't mind making this a rough affair, you know?]
重明\n（……もしぶん殴るとしても……手か足だろうな……顔とか胴体は、後々面倒そ: Shigeaki: (...Even if I were to punch him... it’d be a hand or a foot... the face or body seems like it’d be a hassle later on.)
そんなＤＱＮ丸出しの態度に、呆れたのか恐れたのかはわからないが……オッサンは降参: I don't know if he was appalled or afraid of such an obviously punk-like attitude, but the old guy softened his stance as if to say he surrendered.
オッサン\n「……はは、参ったな……まぁ話ぐらいなら駄目……というわけでもないん: Old Man: “...Haha, you've got me there... well, if it’s just a talk, it's not as if it’s forbidden, but...”
相手が少しでも折れれば、威圧の必要などない。: If the opponent yields even a little, there’s no need for intimidation.
俺は自分が話をすれば分かり合える相手と思わせる為……今度は力を抜き、オッサンに語: To make him think I’m someone he can talk to and reach an understanding with... I relaxed and spoke to the old guy.
重明\n「勘違いして欲しくないんだけど……これでも一応、俺はアンタのする事を邪魔: Shigeaki: “I don't want you to misunderstand... even if I look like this, I didn't come here to get in the way of what you're doing, okay?”
重明\n「言い方は乱暴だったけど、ようは最初に言った通り、俺はくす葉と話をさせて: Shigeaki: “My way of speaking was rough, but basically as I said at first, I just want to let Kusuha and me talk.”
オッサン\n「ではその話の内容次第では……邪魔をする可能性もあると？」: Old Man: “Then depending on the content of that talk... is there a possibility you might interfere?”
重明\n「まぁ心情的にはそうしたい気持ちもありますけど……所詮は他人事ですから」: Shigeaki: “Well, emotionally I’d like to do that, but... after all, it’s someone else's business.”
重明\n「……ただ単に金で買われたって話で、くす葉もキチンと納得済みという話であ: Shigeaki: “...If it’s just a story about her being bought for money and Kusuha having properly consented... well that happens all the time, and I have no intention of doing anything about it.”
重明\n（まぁ当然、くす葉が納得してなきゃ……邪魔をする気なんだけど）: Shigeaki: (Well, of course if Kusuha hasn't consented... I’m going to interfere.)
オッサン\n「ならその通り、そのままだ……あえてくす葉くんと話をする必要もないん: Old Man: “Then it’s exactly as you say... there’s no need to go out of your way to talk to Kusuha-kun, then?”
重明\n「まぁその辺の事とかを、本人から色々聞いたり話したりしたいわけで……どう: Shigeaki: “Well, I want to hear and talk about those kinds of things directly from her... so how about it? Could I have... some time?”
オッサン\n「ちなみに……私が駄目と言ったら……キミはどうするんだい？」: Old Man: “By the way... if I said no... what would you do?”
重明\n「まぁそう言われたら……仕方がないので取り合えず諦めます」: Shigeaki: “Well, if you said that... it can't be helped, so I'll give up for now.”
重明\n「その上でここで聞く事の出来なかった彼女の事情や、貴方の素性を……ここを: Shigeaki: “On top of that, after leaving here, I'll probably put in some effort to investigate her circumstances and your identity that I couldn't hear about here.”
くす葉のような素人娘を買うような男……手馴れている感もあるし、叩けば埃が出るよう: A man who buys an amateur girl like Kusuha... he looks experienced, and I can easily imagine he’s someone who would have skeletons in his closet if I went digging.
だがたとえそうだとしても、学生風情に何が出来ると向こうに高を括られてしまったら…: But even so, if he dismisses me as just a student and thinks I can't do anything... this negotiation will break down immediately.
重明\n（……つまる所……このオッサンが、現状の落とし所をどうしたいのかで決まる: Shigeaki: (...In the end... it depends on where this old guy wants to settle the current situation...)
オッサン\n「……あまり関わらない方が……キミとキミの彼女の為だと、私は思うのだ: Old Man: “...I think it would be for your sake and your girlfriend's sake... if you didn't get too involved, though...”
重明\n「貴方の言いたい事は、何となくだけど察しは付きますよ？」: Shigeaki: “I have a vague idea of what you're trying to say, you know?”
重明\n「けど俺は貴方本人じゃない……だから関わった事で何がどう問題なのかなんて: Shigeaki: “But I'm not you... so there’s no way for me to know exactly what kind of problem involvement would cause in the first place.”
重明\n「けど事態を良く知って自分でどうにかなる問題じゃないと分かれば……昨日会: Shigeaki: “But if I get to know the situation well and find out it’s not a problem I can do anything about myself... since we only met yesterday, don't you think I'd stop being involved?”
オッサン\n「つまり君はくす葉くんを助けたいからというより、何より自分が納得した: Old Man: “In other words, you want to talk not so much because you want to help Kusuha-kun, but because more than anything you want to be convinced yourself... is that it?”
オッサン\n「くす葉くん……彼と……話をしたいかい？」: Old Man: “Kusuha-kun... do you want to... talk with him?”
オッサン\n「彼に助ける気はない……惨めな思いをするだけかもしれませんよ？」: Old Man: “He has no intention of helping you... you might only end up feeling miserable, you know?”
オッサン\n「まぁいいでしょう……調教はほぼ済んでますし、始まるのは３時頃の予定: Old Man: “Very well... the training is mostly finished, and we're scheduled to start around 3:00 anyway.”
重明\n（……調教はほぼ済んだ……ねぇ……）: Shigeaki: (...The training is mostly finished... huh...)
オッサンの口から出た言葉から察するに……どうやらくす葉のヤツは、昨晩談話室で別れ: Judging from the words that came out of the old guy's mouth... apparently Kusuha had been subjected to all sorts of terrible things between our parting in the common room last night and our reunion this morning.
重明\n（……それで今朝は昨日の元気が無かったのか……そりゃ気落ちするのも当然だ: Shigeaki: (...So that’s why she didn't have her energy from yesterday this morning... it’s only natural she’d be depressed...)
オッサン\n「ああ、そうそう……話をする以外の事をしてもいいですけど……処女膜だ: Old Man: “Oh, and by the way... you can do other things besides talking, but... just don't break her hymen, okay?”
オッサン\n「……彼女の価値は膜込みなので……破損したら商品価値が下がって、もっ: Old Man: “...Her value includes the membrane, so... if it’s damaged, her product value will drop and we’ll have to put her through even harsher things.”
別にくす葉と淫らな事をする気などないが……あとで他にも禁止事項があったなどとイチ: I have no intention of doing lewd things with Kusuha, but it would be unbearable if he made a false accusation later saying there were other forbidden things.
……他に問題のある行為がないか、俺は確認の為、オッサンに疑問をぶつけてみる。: ...To check if there were any other problematic acts, I threw a question at the old guy.
重明\n「……じゃあ例えばですけど……膜さえ破かなきゃ、どんなエッチな事をしちゃ: Shigeaki: “...Just for example, though... as long as I don't break the membrane, is it okay if I do any kind of erotic things to her?”
オッサン\n「……はは、いいですよ……膜さえ破かなければ……ご自由に……」: Old Man: “...Haha, sure... as long as you don't break the membrane... feel free...”
最後にどこか楽しげにそう言い残し……オッサンは一人、この場を離れていった。: Leaving those words with a somewhat amused tone... the old guy left the area alone.
重明\n「少しここで待っていてくれ……トレイを片付けてくるから」: Shigeaki: “Wait for me here for a second... I'll just go put this tray away.”
誰も居ない談話室に入り、適当な場所に食器の乗ったトレイを置くと……俺は早足でくす: Entering the deserted common room and placing the tray of dishes on a suitable spot... I hurried back to Kusuha.
くす葉\n「別に……全然、待たされてないけどね」: Kusuha: “I wasn't really... kept waiting at all, though.”
重明\n「確かに……んじゃ、行きますか」: Shigeaki: “True... well then, shall we go?”
くす葉を連れ階段を上がった所で……俺は立ち止まり、あたりの様子を軽く見回していく: After taking Kusuha up the stairs... I stopped and took a quick look around.
最初は話を聞くため、くす葉を自分の部屋に連れ込もうと思ったのだが……華穂の体調の: At first I thought about bringing Kusuha to my room to hear her story, but I’d accidentally forgotten to take Kaho's condition into account.
……ただでさえ体調を崩しているのだ……くす葉の話でショックを受け、精神的にも疲弊: ...She’s already feeling unwell... it’s not desirable for a development where she gets shocked by Kusuha's story and becomes mentally exhausted.
最終的に華穂を巻き込む事態になったとしても……まずは軽く俺一人で状況を把握してお: Even if it ends up involving Kaho eventually... I should first grasp the situation lightly on my own.
重明\n（……とはいえ……どこで話を聞こうか……適当に空いてる部屋とか、あればい: Shigeaki: (...That being said... where should we talk... I hope there’s some suitable empty room or something...)
取り合えず落ち着いて話せそうな場所はないか……そんな事を考えつつ、俺は通路の曲が: Wondering if there was a place where we could talk calmly... while thinking that, I peeked around a corner in the passage.
……するとそこには、今朝顔を合わせた……尚人が居た。: ...And there was Naoto, whom I had faced this morning.
白花荘は、それほど大きくない宿……こう何度も遭遇するのも、別に珍しい事ではない。: Shirohana-sou isn't that large an inn... encountering him this many times isn't particularly unusual.
重明\n（……何度も会うのは別にいいんだけど……またこいつ、華穂と別れろとか、意: Shigeaki: (...I don't mind meeting him many times, but is he going to say something nonsensical about breaking up with Kaho again?)
……今はくす葉の事があるから、お前の戯言には付き合っていられない……: ...I have the matter with Kusuha right now, so I can't play along with your nonsense...
釘を刺すつもりでそう言おうとした所……こちらより先に、尚人が口を開いた。: Just as I was about to say that to head him off... Naoto spoke before me.
尚人\n「……そいつはもう駄目だ」: Naoto: “...That one is already beyond help.”
重明\n「……はぁ……意味わかんねぇんだけど……」: Shigeaki: “...Hah... I have no idea what you're talking about...”
だが【そいつ】という言葉がくす葉を指している事だけは理解出来る……何故なら俺なら: But I could understand that the word [That one] referred to Kusuha... because if it were me he’d say [You], and if it were Kaho he’d say [Kaho-kun].
重明\n（……けど、なら何が駄目だって言うんだ？ ……もしかしたら、尚人のヤツく: Shigeaki: (...But then, what is it that’s 'beyond help'? ...Maybe Naoto knows Kusuha's circumstances?)
尚人\n「……一応、忠告はしてやったからな……じゃあな」: Naoto: “...I've given you my warning, anyway... see you.”
重明\n「……だから話の途中で行くなよ……毎々毎々、意味不明な上に自分勝手なヤツ: Shigeaki: “...Stop leaving in the middle of a conversation... he’s a nonsensical and selfish guy every single time... geez...”
くす葉\n「重明さん……いま誰と話してたの？」: Kusuha: “Shigeaki-san... who were you talking to just now?”
重明\n「ん？ ……ああ、尚人ってヤツだよ……お前が今着てる制服を、華穂が身に着: Shigeaki: “Hm? ...Ah, a guy named Naoto... apparently he was a teacher when Kaho was wearing the uniform you're wearing now.”
くす葉\n「へぇ……どんな人なの？」: Kusuha: “Heh... what kind of person is he?”
重明\n「どんなって……何というか……いかにも金持ちのお坊ちゃまって感じの野郎な: Shigeaki: “What kind... well, how should I put it... he’s a guy who feels like a rich young master... well, I guess it’s faster if you see the real thing...”
そう言いつつ、ヤツが立ち去った方向へと視線を向けたものの……姿が見えない。: As I said that, I looked in the direction he had left, but... his figure was gone.
廊下は一直線……早足でもしなければ、後姿ぐらいは捉えられてもいいと思うのだが……: The hallway was a straight line... unless he was walking very fast, I should have been able to at least catch his back...
重明\n（……もしかして近くの部屋にでも入ったのか？）: Shigeaki: (...Did he enter a nearby room or something?)
重明\n「……いや……いま話題に出た尚人のヤツが近くに居ると思ったんだけど……」: Shigeaki: “...No... I thought that Naoto guy we were talking about was nearby...”
俺は何となく近くの扉に近づき、ドアノブに手を伸ばしていく。: I casually approached a nearby door and reached for the doorknob.
続いて耳をそばだて中の様子をうかがってみたが、人が居る気配はない。: Next, I strained my ears to listen for any sign of someone inside, but there was no presence of people.
もし無人なら……ここなら誰にも邪魔されず、くす葉と込み入った話が出来るかもしれな: If it’s unoccupied... maybe I can have a private talk with Kusuha here without being interrupted.
仮に中に誰かが居たとしても【いやぁ、入る部屋を間違えました！】と元気良く謝罪し、: Even if someone were inside, I’d just say [Whoops, I entered the wrong room!] and apologize energetically, then look for another room.
俺は意を決し扉を開けると……くす葉と共に、見知らぬ部屋の中へと入ってみたのだった: Making my decision, I opened the door... and stepped into an unfamiliar room with Kusuha...
くす葉\n「……勝手に入っちゃって……平気かな？」: Kusuha: “...Entering a room without permission... is it really okay?”
重明\n「大丈夫だろ……汚すわけでもないし……外は大雪だから、新たに客がくるなん: Shigeaki: “It’ll be fine... We’re not going to make a mess... and with that blizzard outside, it’s not like new guests are going to show up out of nowhere.”
重明\n「それにもし何かあったとしても……たかだか１部屋分の金ぐらい、惜しかない: Shigeaki: “Besides, even if something did happen... a guy like me wouldn’t lose sleep over the cost of a single room.”
重明\n「気にすんな……それで、何があった」: Shigeaki: “Don’t sweat it... So, tell me what happened.”
少しの間、沈黙が続いた後……くす葉は自分と家族の事を、ポツポツと話し始めた。: After a brief silence... Kusuha began to speak about herself and her family, bit by bit.
両親は昔、会社を経営していて……小さい頃はそれなりにお金持ちだった事。: How her parents used to run a company... and how they were reasonably wealthy when she was little.
そして両親が更に会社を大きくしようとした計画が失敗し、大きな損害を受けた事。: Then, her parents' plan to expand the business further failed, resulting in massive losses.
その結果、会社は倒産……債務を返済する為、自己破産の道を選びはしたものの……免除: As a result, the company went bankrupt... To repay the debts, they chose the path of personal bankruptcy... but the remaining debt that wasn't discharged was a staggering amount.
そんな絶望的な状況の中……: In the midst of that desperate situation...
ある日、両親がくす葉に【もう借金の事で心配する必要はない】と言ってきたらしいのだ: One day, her parents apparently told Kusuha, [You don't need to worry about the debt anymore.]
くす葉\n「お父さんとお母さんが、破産申請中にした借金は騙されたから無効って言い: Kusuha: “My dad and mom said the court accepted their argument that the loans they took out during the bankruptcy filing were invalid because they were defrauded... and that only the unpaid wages for the employees remained...”
くす葉\n「妹の美奈恵はまだ小さいから、借金で惨めな思いをさせたくないから……子: Kusuha: “Minae, my little sister, is still small, so they didn't want her to suffer through the misery of debt... so they had a childless relative adopt her... and then told me that the three of us would work hard together to pay back the rest...”
くす葉\n「……けど、それ……３人で頑張ろうっていう部分以外……全部嘘だった……: Kusuha: “...But that... other than the part about the three of us working together... it was all a lie...”
重明\n「……嘘って……けどさ……強引な取立ては法律で禁止されているだろ？ ……: Shigeaki: “...A lie... But wait... forced collection is prohibited by law, isn't it? ...I don't know how much it is, but shouldn't you be able to just pay it back normally over a lifetime?”
くす葉\n「うちの親……何か怪しげな所から沢山のお金借りてるらしくって……法律と: Kusuha: “My parents... apparently borrowed a lot of money from some shady source... and they come to collect regardless of the law.”
重明\n「そういう時は……裁判とか……法律事務所や警察に頼めばいいんじゃないか？: Shigeaki: “In that case... shouldn't you ask for a trial... or go to a law firm or the police?”
くす葉\n「裁判なんてお金なきゃ出来ないよ……それに警察は実害がないかぎり、基本: Kusuha: “You can't have a trial without money... Besides, the police generally won't move unless there's actual harm.”
重明\n「実害受けてるだろ？ ……騙されてここに来て、いやらしい事を強要されただ: Shigeaki: “You’ve been harmed, haven’t you? ...You were deceived into coming here and forced to do lewd things.”
くす葉\n「……強要じゃない……騙された事は騙されたけど……それで借金を返せるの: Kusuha: “...It wasn’t forced. I was deceived, yes... but I accepted it myself, thinking that if it meant I could pay off the debt...”
くす葉\n「まぁようは売春？ ……警察に言ったらどっちかと言うと私が捕まるかも？: Kusuha: “Basically, it’s prostitution, right? ...If I went to the police, I might be the one who gets arrested instead.”
くす葉\n「それに……そういう事したら……抑えてある妹に酷い事をするぞって言われ: Kusuha: “Besides... if I did something like that... they said they’d do something terrible to my sister, who they have in their custody... so I don't really want to risk it.”
重明\n「人質ってか……そいつら最悪だな」: Shigeaki: “A hostage, huh... those guys are the worst.”
くす葉\n「うん……けど私が言う事を聞いてさえいれば、妹には普通の生活を送れるよ: Kusuha: “Yeah... but since they promised to support my sister so she can live a normal life as long as I obey them... I can't help but think it's not such a bad deal.”
重明\n「妹は置いておくとして……お前を売った両親は何やってるんだよ」: Shigeaki: “Setting your sister aside... what are the parents who sold you doing?”
くす葉\n「しらない……家は売っちゃってもうないし、昨日の夜ちょっと電話したけど: Kusuha: “I don't know... Our house was sold and is gone, and I called them for a bit last night... but it seems like the two of them are going through some hell of their own... Haha...”
重明\n「……お前達を助けてくれそうなヤツとかは……居ないのかよ」: Shigeaki: “...Is there no one... who can help you guys?”
くす葉\n「金の切れ目が縁の切れ目って言うでしょ？ ……まぁ……大体そんな感じ」: Kusuha: “You know what they say—when the money runs out, the relationship ends, right? ...Well... it’s basically like that.”
重明\n「……法的には親の借金は子供が払う必要はないはず……あまり立派な選択とは: Shigeaki: “...Legally, a child shouldn't have to pay their parents' debt... It might not be a noble choice, but... why don't you just cut ties with your parents?”
重明\n「お前がその気があるなら……両親との縁を切った後、お前とお前の妹が独り立: Shigeaki: “If you’re up for it... after you cut ties with them, I could support you and your sister until you can stand on your own two feet.”
くす葉\n「……はは……ありがと……申し出は嬉しいけど……昨日会ったばかりの重明: Kusuha: “...Haha... Thanks... I appreciate the offer, but... to have Shigeaki-san, who I just met yesterday... do that much for me would be too much.”
重明\n「別にいいよ……乗りかかった船というか、何か貸すにしても独り立ちした後に: Shigeaki: “It’s fine... We’re in the same boat now. Even if I lend you something, you can just pay me back after you’re independent.”
くす葉\n「いい……もちろん普通の借金なら頼んだだろうけど……親が非合法なヤツに: Kusuha: “No... Of course, if it were a normal debt I might have asked, but... my parents got involved with illegal types... It would surely cause you all sorts of trouble... you know?”
くす葉\n「それにさ……私の両親……今でこそ億単位の莫大な借金こさえてるけど、昔: Kusuha: “And besides... my parents... they have a massive debt in the hundreds of millions now, but when things were going well, they were really good parents.”
くす葉\n「いい思い出も沢山ある……だから縁を切らずに頑張って立ち直れそうなら…: Kusuha: “I have plenty of good memories... That’s why, if it looks like we can recover without cutting ties, I feel like selling my body is unavoidable.”
くす葉\n「まぁこれも、貧乏になっちゃったんだし……しょうがないかなぁ……はは…: Kusuha: “Well, we became poor, so... I guess it can't be helped... Haha...”
重明\n（……うーん……借金か……しかも億単位……）: Shigeaki: (...Hmm... Debt... and in the hundreds of millions...)
莫大な借金……そして俺は学生の身。: A massive debt... and I'm just a student.
仮にもし社会人だったとしても、気軽に手を差し伸べるわけにはいかない金額だ。: Even if I were a working adult, it’s not an amount I could easily step in to help with.
法的にどうにか手助けするにしても……彼女の家の借金が、具体的にどういったものなの: Even if I were to help legally... I wouldn't be able to move without investigating specifically what kind of debt her family has.
重明\n（まぁやるとしても俺だけじゃ間違いなく無理だな……自分の家族……あるいは: Shigeaki: (Well, even if I try, I definitely can't do it alone... I’d need my family... or maybe Kaho's help...)
重明\n「なぁ、くす葉……ちなみに妹は本当に無事だって保障はあるのか？」: Shigeaki: “Hey, Kusuha... By the way, is there any guarantee that your sister is actually safe?”
重明\n「よくあるだろ？ ……大切な人を守りたければと言いつつ、裏では守っている: Shigeaki: “It happens all the time, right? ...Saying they want to protect someone important, but behind the scenes, the person they think they’re protecting is also suffering...”
くす葉\n「昨日の夜と今朝……一応電話で軽く喋ったよ……顔は見れなかったけど、今: Kusuha: “Last night and this morning... I spoke with her briefly on the phone... I couldn't see her face, but for now, it seems like nothing has been done to her.”
重明\n「……この後、酷い目に遭うかもしれないじゃないか」: Shigeaki: “...But she might be put through hell after this, right?”
くす葉\n「けどさ、流石にそればっかりは信じないと……そもそも、私は借金を立て替: Kusuha: “But you know, I have to believe it, at least... In the first place, I’m in the position of having my debt covered.”
重明\n「……色々諦めて一人で逃げてしまうって選択肢もあるぞ？」: Shigeaki: “...You could just give up on everything and run away alone, you know?”
くす葉\n「はは……逃げるって……逃げるお金すらないよ」: Kusuha: “Haha... Run away... I don’t even have the money to run.”
くす葉\n「それにさ……親は借金を返す責任があるし、酷い目に遭うのも仕方ないかな: Kusuha: “Besides... my parents are responsible for the debt, and I feel like them suffering is unavoidable, but... my sister has nothing to do with it...”
くす葉\n「親も私も……せめて妹ぐらいは無事で居て欲しいって……思ってるわけよ」: Kusuha: “My parents and I... we just want my sister, at least, to be safe.”
くす葉\n「ようするに……妹を守るためにも、３年間我慢して私がアイツ等のオモチャ: Kusuha: “Basically... to protect my sister, I have no choice but to endure for three years and be their toy.”
重明\n「でもさ……話を聞いた感じじゃ真っ当な奴等じゃないぞ？」: Shigeaki: “But... from what you’ve said, they’re not exactly upstanding people, are they?”
重明\n「とてもじゃないが【妹に手を出さない】って条件を……俺には信じる事が出来: Shigeaki: “I find it hard to believe... the condition that they 'won't lay a hand on the sister'...”
くす葉\n「昨日会ったばかりなのに図々しいのは承知で、お願いがあるんだけど……」: Kusuha: “I know it’s shameless of me since we only met yesterday, but I have a favor to ask...”
くす葉\n「出来ればでいいんだけど……ここを出たら妹を探して普通に暮らせてるかど: Kusuha: “If possible... after leaving here, I want you to look for my sister and see if she’s living normally.”
くす葉\n「それでその様子を……私に教えてくれないかな……」: Kusuha: “And then... could you tell me how she is...?”
重明\n「……お前の妹は、どこに居るかもわからないんだよな？」: Shigeaki: “...You don’t even know where your sister is, right?”
くす葉\n「……うん……だからほんと……出来ればでいいんだ」: Kusuha: “...Yeah... That’s why, really... only if you can.”
パッと考えただけでも、かなり困難な要望なのは間違いない……もしかしたらただ探すだ: Just a quick thought confirmed that this would be an incredibly difficult request... It might take months just to find her.
だが、それでも……俺は何の躊躇もなく、くす葉にこう答えた。: But even so... I answered Kusuha without any hesitation.
重明\n「俺に全部任せておけ……速攻で見つけた後、ついでに出来たら妹の安全も確保: Shigeaki: “Leave it all to me... After I find her in record time, I’ll even secure her safety if I can.”
くす葉\n「はは……ありがと……ほんと昨日あったばかりなのに……巻き込んじゃって: Kusuha: “Haha... Thanks... I’m really sorry for dragging you into this when we only met yesterday.”
重明\n「気にすんな、たかだか人探し……身を切るわけじゃないし、少なくとも俺は全: Shigeaki: “Don’t worry about it. It’s just finding someone... It’s not like I’m cutting into my own flesh, and at the very least, I don’t mind at all.”
くす葉\n「はは、まいったな……どーしよ……この借り…重明さんにどうやって返せば: Kusuha: “Haha, man... what should I do... this debt... how am I supposed to pay Shigeaki-san back...?”
悲運な運命を背負ったくす葉……何とか力になってやりたい。: Kusuha, carrying a tragic fate... I want to help her somehow.
その力になってやりたいくす葉の一番の望みは、妹を守る事……そして二番目は頑張って: Kusuha’s first wish is to protect her sister... and her second is to work hard and repay her parents' debt.
もしかすると華穂の両親に頭を下げれば、借金は何とかなるのかもしれない。: Maybe if I bowed my head to Kaho’s parents, the debt could be taken care of somehow.
……だが昨日会ったばかりの可哀想な家族に大金を払って欲しいなどと、恋人の親に言え: ...But I’m not such a fool that I could ask my girlfriend’s parents to pay a massive sum for a pitiful family I only met yesterday.
他にも、くす葉を汚すオッサンに暴行を加え、妹にも手を出さないよう脅すという手段も: There’s also the option of assaulting the old man who defiles Kusuha and threatening him not to touch the sister... but that would likely end with me in a jail cell without resolving anything.
重明\n（……そうなると……今この場で出来る事は……二つに一つ……）: Shigeaki: (In that case... the only thing I can do right here... is one of two things...)
……ややこしい事になるのは覚悟して、実質的にくす葉を助けるか……: ...Prepare for things to get complicated and actually help Kusuha...
……それとも彼女の一番の望みを叶え、精神的にくす葉を助ける……そのどちらか。: ...Or fulfill her primary wish and help Kusuha mentally... It’s one or the other.
重明\n「……じゃあこの場で借りを返してもらおうかな」: Shigeaki: “...Well then, I guess I’ll have you pay me back right here.”
もちろん単にくす葉とヤリたいからという訳ではない。: Of course, it’s not simply because I want to fuck Kusuha.
