重明\n「まずは……この宿を出るとしますか！」: Shigeaki: “First... let's get out of this inn!”
荷物を纏めて部屋を出ると、俺達はロビーへ向かう為、人気のない廊下を歩いていた。: Packing our bags and leaving the room, we walked through the deserted hallway toward the lobby.
重明\n「ああ……気のせいかもしれないけど、明かりが付いているのに妙に薄暗い感じ: Shigeaki: “Yeah... it might just be my imagination, but even though the lights are on, it feels strangely dim...”
華穂\n「うん……昨日はそんな風に感じなかったのに……部屋の中に比べて、廊下の気: Kaho: “Yeah... I didn't feel that way yesterday... And it feels like the temperature in the hallway is a bit lower compared to inside the room...”
重明\n「気温が低いか……そう言われてみれば、少し肌寒いな……」: Shigeaki: “Lower temperature, huh... Now that you mention it, it is a bit chilly.”
俺は状況を確認する為、スマホを取り出し液晶の画面をチラリと確認してみた。: To check the situation, I took out my smartphone and glanced at the LCD screen.
重明\n「液晶の画面が眩しくない……つまり薄暗く見えているだけで、実際の所はさほ: Shigeaki: “The screen isn't dazzling... In other words, it just looks dim, but in reality, it's not actually that dark...”
華穂\n「ほんとだ……じゃあいま暗く見えてるのは目の錯覚って事？」: Kaho: “You're right... So it's just an optical illusion that it looks dark right now?”
重明\n「ああ……もしかしたら、くす葉の件で緊張して周囲の風景が少し違って見えて: Shigeaki: “Yeah... Maybe because we're tense about Kusuha's case, the surrounding scenery just looks a little different.”
華穂\n「くす葉ちゃんにいやらしい事をしているって人と……出来れば遭遇したくない: Kaho: “We really don't want to run into the people doing those lewd things to Kusuha-chan... maybe it's because of that state of mind?”
重明\n「だな……さっさとロビーに行くぞ」: Shigeaki: “Right... Let's get to the lobby quickly.”
ひと気のないロビーにつくと、俺達は藤木親子の姿を探し始めた。: Reaching the deserted lobby, we began to look for the Fujiki mother and daughter.
華穂\n「……藤子さん達どころか……他のお客さんすら居ないね……」: Kaho: “...Forget Touko-san and the others... there aren't even any other guests around...”
重明\n「だな……まぁそもそも天候が天候だし、来てる客の数も少ないんだろうけど…: Shigeaki: “Yeah... Well, given the weather, the number of guests must be small to begin with...”
華穂\n「藤子さんか桔梗ちゃんを探した方が良いかな？」: Kaho: “Should we go look for Touko-san or Kikyou-chan?”
重明\n「いや、いい……これといって根拠があるわけではないけど……恐らく藤子さん: Shigeaki: “No, it's fine... I don't have any specific proof, but... I suspect Touko-san is involved in Kusuha's case somehow.”
華穂\n「藤子さんが絡んでる……きーくんは何でそう思うの？」: Kaho: “Touko-san is involved... Why do you think that, Ki-kun?”
重明\n「くす葉を調教したって言ったオッサンは俺に【始まるのは３時頃】と言った…: Shigeaki: “The old man who said he trained Kusuha told me [It's scheduled to start around 3:00]... In other words, there's no doubt that multiple people are involved in this case.”
重明\n「複数人の人間が経験のない女を調教し淫らな事をする……普通に考えれば、そ: Shigeaki: “Multiple people training an inexperienced girl and doing lewd things... Normally speaking, people like that wouldn't use a legitimate facility.”
華穂\n「もし普通の所なら騒ぎになって、最悪、場所を提供する人間に通報されてしま: Kaho: “If it were a normal place, it would cause a scene, and at worst, the person providing the space would report them.”
重明\n「ああ、そういう事だ……つまりそういう事をしたいなら、ハッテン場なり普通: Shigeaki: “Yeah, exactly... In other words, if they want to do that kind of thing, they'd use a cruise spot or a facility where doing something abnormal is permitted.”
華穂\n「だから……きーくんは、このペンションがそういう施設だと思ったわけだ」: Kaho: “So... you thought this pension was that kind of facility, Ki-kun.”
重明\n「まぁな……けど昔は地方の宿にストリップ劇場がある所とか、結構あったらし: Shigeaki: “I guess... But apparently there used to be many local inns with strip theaters and things like that... So if you think of it as an evolution of that, it's not such a strange story, right?”
華穂\n「まぁ女の子を無理やり……とかじゃなきゃ確かに……」: Kaho: “Well, as long as it's not forcing a girl... I suppose...”
華穂\n「けどさ、ここは元は学校の寮だったんだよ？」: Kaho: “But look, this place was originally a school dormitory, you know?”
華穂\n「……藤子さんも寮母だったわけだし……そういう事をするとは……とても思え: Kaho: “...Touko-san was the dorm mother, after all... I find it really hard to believe she'd do something like that...”
重明\n「華穂、昨日の露天風呂で桔梗ちゃんとオッサンがした事……覚えてるよな？」: Shigeaki: “Kaho, do you remember what Kikyou-chan and the old man were doing in the outdoor bath yesterday?”
華穂\n「……あんな衝撃的な事、目の前で見せられたら……忘れたくても忘れられない: Kaho: “...Being shown something that shocking right in front of me... I couldn't forget it even if I wanted to...”
重明\n「桔梗ちゃんとオッサンは慣れた様子だった……どちらかが状況に不慣れなら、: Shigeaki: “Kikyou-chan and the man looked like they were used to it... If either of them were unaccustomed to the situation, they wouldn't be able to fumble with each other's crotches in public with such a calm face.”
くす葉\n「重明さんの予想……大体当たってると思います」: Kusuha: “I think your prediction is mostly correct, Shigeaki-san.”
くす葉\n「はい、ここの地下には如何わしい部屋があって……実際に私……昨日の夜か: Kusuha: “Yes, there's a shady room in the basement here... In fact, from last night until this morning... I was... I had lewd things done to me...”
重明\n「まぁ手伝っているからといって、自ら進んでなのか、誰かに弱みを握られて仕: Shigeaki: “Well, even if she's helping, whether it's of her own accord or because someone has leverage over her and she's forced to, there are various possibilities.”
重明\n「まだ憶測の部分も多いからな……とりあえず受付のカウンターに理由やら電話: Shigeaki: “Since much of it is still speculation... let's just leave a note at the reception counter with our reason and phone number, and leave some money.”
重明\n「それに何もかも憶測に過ぎないからな……とりあえず受付のカウンターに理由: Shigeaki: “Besides, everything is just speculation... for now, it should be fine if we just leave a note at the reception counter with our reason and phone number, and leave some money.”
そういいつつ、俺は受付カウンターに移動すると、メモ書きと共に財布から宿泊と食事代: As I said that, I moved to the reception counter, took out double the amount for lodging and meals from my wallet, and placed it on the table along with the note.
倍額支払った理由は、防寒用に拝借した部屋のベッドのシーツ、二枚分の料金だ。: The reason I paid double was to cover the cost of the two bedsheets I'd borrowed from the room for protection against the cold.
倍額支払った理由は……くす葉とのＨで部屋を汚してしまった分と、防寒用に拝借した部: The reason I paid double was... to cover the cost of fouling the room during sex with Kusuha, and for the one bedsheet I'd borrowed from the room for protection against the cold.
華穂\n「ベッドのシーツ……本当に持ってきて良かったのかな？」: Kaho: “The bedsheets... was it really okay to take them?”
重明\n「一応お金もこうして払ったし大丈夫だろ」: Shigeaki: “It should be fine, since I paid for them like this.”
重明\n「それにくす葉とくす葉の妹を保護したら、二人には手を出させないぞって言う: Shigeaki: “Besides, once we've protected Kusuha and her sister and told them we won't let anyone touch them, we can just bring these borrowed sheets back.”
重明\n「それにくす葉の妹の無事を確認したら、知らせるって約束だし……その時に借: Shigeaki: “Besides, I promised to let her know once I've confirmed her sister's safety... I can just bring the borrowed sheet back then.”
華穂\n「うんうん……それに何の用意もせずに今の格好で吹雪の中に突撃するのは……: Kaho: “Mm-hmm... Besides, rushing out into a blizzard in these clothes without any preparation... is reckless, no matter how you look at it.”
一応俺も華穂も上着を羽織ってはいるものの……所詮は春山の気温を想定した程度の代物: Even though Kaho and I are both wearing coats, they're only meant for early spring temperatures in the mountains.
吹雪の中を突き進む格好としては、極めて脆弱……: As an outfit for pushing through a blizzard, it's extremely fragile...
しかも車での移動が前提だったので、華穂の靴は露出の多いコルクのウエッジサンダル。: On top of that, since we assumed we'd be traveling by car, Kaho's shoes are cork wedge sandals that leave much of her feet exposed.
……とてもじゃないが、ほぼ素足な靴で、雪の積もった場所を歩るかせるわけにはいかな: ...I can't possibly let her walk in the snow with shoes that are basically bare feet.
後ろを向き腰を下ろすと、華穂は背後から抱きつきこちらの背中に爆乳をムニュッと押し: When I turned around and lowered my hips, Kaho clung to me from behind, her massive breasts squishing against my back.
その柔らかな心地よさに、俺は少しだけ顔をニヤつかせると……気を取り直し、華穂を背: At that soft comfort, I let out a tiny grin... then, pulling myself together, I stood up smoothly while carrying Kaho.
重明\n「華穂、二人羽織の要領でシーツを羽織ってくれ」: Shigeaki: “Kaho, wrap the sheet around us like we're doing a two-person cloak act.”
背後でモソモソと動く華穂の手により、シーツが俺達の身体に覆いかぶさっていく。: With Kaho's hands moving busily behind me, the sheet was draped over our bodies.
……これでも寒い事に変わりはないが……直接触れる雪と冷たい風は、幾分防げるだろう: ...It doesn't change the fact that it's cold, but... it should block the direct snow and the cold wind somewhat.
華穂\n「きーくん、帰る時の道なんだけど、下って山道を直接大通りに出る方じゃなく: Kaho: “Ki-kun, about the road back... instead of going down the mountain road directly to the main street, let's take a detour and go up the slope past the school.”
重明\n「うん？ 登って遠回りって……何でだ？」: Shigeaki: “Hmm? Why go up and take a detour?”
華穂\n「結局どっちの道も雪が積もってるだろうけど……学校側の道の方が道幅が広く: Kaho: “There'll be snow on both roads anyway, but the road by the school is wider and paved... so it might be a bit safer than the downhill mountain road we took on the way here, don't you think?”
重明\n「なるほど……山道は細かったし、雪で木が折れて進めなかったり滑って斜面に: Shigeaki: “I see... The mountain road was narrow, and it'd be bad if a tree fell from the snow and we couldn't pass, or if we slid off the slope... Alright, let's go with that.”
重明\n「おう……華穂、くす葉……しっかり俺に掴まってろよ……」: Shigeaki: “Yeah... Kaho, Kusuha... hold on to me tight, okay...”
重明\n「おう……華穂、しっかり俺に掴まってろよ……」: Shigeaki: “Yeah... Kaho, hold on to me tight, okay...”
……建物から出て、ほんの数歩進むと……遮蔽物のなくなった俺達の身体に、アホみたい: ...Stepping out of the building and moving only a few paces, a fiercely intense blizzard, like something out of a nightmare, assaulted our bodies that were now without shelter.
華穂\n「……き、きーくん……何か……ありえないぐらい吹雪いてるんだけど……」: Kaho: “...Ki-Ki-kun... It's... it's snowing more than should even be possible...”
重明\n「お、おう……何か……冬の南極にでもやってきたような……い、勢いだな……: Shigeaki: “Y-Yeah... The... the intensity is like... we've suddenly arrived at the South Pole in winter...”
……辺りは雪で灰色に霧がかり、数メートル先すら見えない。: ...The surroundings were a gray mist of snow; I couldn't even see a few meters ahead.
恐る恐る積もった雪の中に足を突っ込むと……ズブズブと足が沈み……膝下までズッポリ: Timidly thrusting my foot into the accumulated snow... it sank down and down... until my leg was buried up to the knee.
重明\n（……おいおい、冗談だろ……今は３月だぞ……どうなってるんだ……）: Shigeaki: (...Hey now, you've got to be kidding... It's March... What is going on...)
まるで俺達の行く手を阻むような積雪と猛吹雪……: It was as if the snow and the blizzard were deliberately trying to block our way...
そんな最悪の天候の中、気合を入れた俺は華穂を背負ったままズボッズボッと積もった雪: In such terrible weather, I steeled myself and, while carrying Kaho, began to carefully move forward, my feet sinking into the snow with a crunch.
重明\n（よし……これなら行けそうだ……）: Shigeaki: (Alright... I think I can make it...)
……普通に考えれば、ここは躊躇なく宿に戻るべきなのだろう。: ...Normally speaking, this is where we should return to the inn without hesitation.
だが、どれほど悪天候だろうと……今の俺達には、そう易々と引き返すわけにはいかない: But no matter how bad the weather is... we have circumstances that won't allow us to turn back so easily now.
重明\n（……待ってろくす葉……速攻で妹を探してやるからな……）: Shigeaki: (...Wait for me, Kusuha... I'm going to find your sister in record time...)
華穂\n「う、うん……きーくんの背中だから平気……きーくんの方こそ……平気？」: Kaho: “Y-Yeah... I'm on Ki-kun's back, so I'm fine... What about you... are you okay?”
重明\n「おうよ！ ……流石に寒いけど……こうやって吹雪の中を突っ切るとか……な: Shigeaki: “You bet! ...It's cold, obviously... but pushing through a blizzard like this... it feels kind of like an adventure... I'm super excited!!”
重明\n「けど華穂……もしヤバそうな時は遠慮なく言えよな？」: Shigeaki: “But Kaho... if it looks like things are getting dangerous, don't hesitate to say so, okay?”
重明\n「……こんな天候だ……いくらくす葉の願いを叶えてやりたくても、こっちが命: Shigeaki: “...It's this kind of weather... No matter how much I want to fulfill Kusuha's wish, if we lose our lives... it won't mean a thing.”
華穂\n「けどさ……この雪の中……車……動くのかな……」: Kaho: “But you know... I wonder if the car... will even move in this snow...”
重明\n「まぁ動いたとしても、車体下に圧縮された雪が入り込んだらアウトかもな……: Shigeaki: “Well, even if it moves, it might be game over if compressed snow gets under the chassis... I've turned off the traction control for now, so it's fine even if the tires spin.”
４ＷＤでないのは辛いが、それでも俺が乗ってきた車は重いし無駄に馬力もある。: It's tough that it's not a 4WD, but the car I came in is heavy and has more horsepower than it needs.
慌てず安全重視を心がければ、安全を重視してノロノロ運転になるだろうが……: As long as I don't panic and prioritize safety, it'll just be slow driving with a focus on caution, but...
一歩……また一歩と、雪の中を進む中……俺はふと、ある事に気付いてしまった。: One step... then another, pushing through the snow... I suddenly noticed something.
俺は、このペンションのどの辺りに……自分の車を停めたのだろうか？: Where exactly... had I parked my car at this pension?
そもそも……俺は……いつ車を降りて……宿に入ったのだろうか？: In the first place... when did I... get out of the car and... enter the inn?
ゾワッと身の毛のよだつような気味の悪い感覚が、背筋を駆け上がっていく。: A creepy, hair-raising sensation raced up my spine.
軽い恐怖状態となった俺は立ち止まると……現在の状況を理解する為、集中し頭の回転を: In a state of mild terror, I stopped... and to understand the current situation, I concentrated and sped up my thoughts all at once.
重明\n（……何が起きた……今、いったい何が起きてる……考えろ俺……考えるんだ…: Shigeaki: (...What happened... What exactly is happening right now... Think, me... Think...)
華穂と二人でこの宿に来てからの事を……テープを巻き戻すように記憶をさかのぼって行: Tracing back my memories from the time the two of us arrived at this inn... like rewinding a tape.
だが、よく思い出そうとした記憶は、何故かぼんやりと曖昧で……例えば今朝と昨日食べ: But the memories I tried to recall were somehow blurry and vague... for example, I didn't have any detailed memory of how the things I'd eaten this morning and yesterday tasted.
……辺りの風景同様、霞がかったペンションでの記憶の数々……: ...Many memories at the pension, shrouded in mist just like the surrounding scenery...
この謎めいた状況に対し……ふと俺はある結論に辿り着いた。: Faced with this mysterious situation... I suddenly reached a certain conclusion.
重明\n（……ありえない……ありえないけど……まさかとは思うけど……）: Shigeaki: (...It's impossible... It's impossible, but... I suspect...)
……導き出した答えが、自分でも信じられない……だがそれ以外、他に現状を説明出来な: ...I can't believe the answer I've derived myself... But there's no other way to explain the current situation...
……俺は自分の突拍子もない考えが正しいのかを確かめる為……: ...To confirm whether my outrageous idea was correct...
……ゆっくりと息を吸い、全てを絞り出すように大声を張り上げた。: ...I slowly took a breath and yelled at the top of my lungs, as if squeezing out everything.
くす葉\n「お邪魔します、華穂さん」: Kusuha: “Excuse me for bothering you, Kaho-san.”
くす葉が遊びに来たと思ったのか、ベッドに横になったまま明るいノリで来訪者を歓迎す: Assuming Kusuha had just come to play, Kaho welcomed her visitor with a bright attitude while still lying on the bed.
重明\n（……具合の悪い華穂を面倒ごとに巻き込みたくはないんだけど……そんな事も: Shigeaki: (...I don't want to involve Kaho in any trouble while she's feeling unwell... but I can't be saying that right now...)
重明\n「華穂……実は今、ちょっと面倒な事態に直面しているんだが……いいかな？」: Shigeaki: “Kaho... actually, I'm facing a bit of a troublesome situation right now... is that okay?”
華穂\n「……大丈夫……緊急事態っぽいし、このぐらい気合でなんとか」: Kaho: “...I'm fine... it looks like an emergency, so I'll manage somehow with sheer willpower.”
重明\n「休ませてやりたいのはやまやまだけど……悪いな」: Shigeaki: “I really want to let you rest, but... sorry.”
華穂\n「つまりきーくんは……売られたくす葉ちゃんを連れ出した後、更に妹さんを探: Kaho: “In other words, Ki-kun... you want to take Kusuha-chan, who was sold, out of here, and then look for her sister and protect them both... is that it?”
重明\n「ああ、それで出来れば……くす葉の親も助けられるものなら、助けてやりたい: Shigeaki: “Yeah, and if possible... if I can save Kusuha's parents too, I'd like to help them...”
華穂\n「そのしたい事に対して、きーくんは具体的に何が出来るの？」: Kaho: “And for what you want to do, specifically what can you do, Ki-kun?”
重明\n「具体的に俺が出来る事は……くす葉をここから連れ出して、何とか妹も見つけ: Shigeaki: “Specifically, all I can do is take Kusuha out of here, find her sister somehow, and shelter them for a little while.”
重明\n「まぁ地球の反対側まで二人を連れ出して、あとは事が片付くまで自力で頑張っ: Shigeaki: “Well, if it's permitted to take them to the other side of the planet and tell them to work hard and live on their own until things are settled... that much would be possible, too.”
華穂\n「ビザの問題もあるし、それだと家族と一緒に暮らすって条件を切る事になるで: Kaho: “There are visa issues, and that would break the condition of living with the family, wouldn't it?”
華穂\n「それに二人に普通の暮らしをさせるだけなら、別にそう大変な話じゃないし…: Kaho: “Besides, just letting the two of them live a normal life isn't that difficult... and I don't have anything in particular to say against it.”
華穂\n「……もちろん働けるようになった時点で、掛かった費用はある程度払ってもら: Kaho: “...Of course, once they're able to work, I intend to have them pay back the expenses to some extent.”
重明\n「……やっぱ莫大な借金をした親まで助けるとなると……相当無理があるか……: Shigeaki: “...As expected, trying to save the parents who have a massive debt... is pretty much impossible, isn't it...”
華穂\n「お金を出す事自体は別に構わないんだけど、そこに投資する何らかの価値を見: Kaho: “I don't mind providing money in itself, but unless I can find some kind of value in investing there... I don't feel like paying.”
重明\n「まぁな……ただ借金を肩代わりしてお金をドブに捨てるなんて、確かに馬鹿ら: Shigeaki: “True... Just covering a debt is like throwing money down the drain, so it's definitely ridiculous.”
華穂\n「１０００万程度ならまだしも、数億単位なんでしょ？」: Kaho: “It's one thing if it's around 10 million, but we're talking about hundreds of millions, right?”
重明\n「……ああ……少なくともくす葉が支払う分だけで、億を超えているらしい……: Shigeaki: “...Yeah... Apparently, it exceeds a hundred million just for the portion Kusuha is supposed to pay...”
華穂\n「私の家は確かにお金持ちだけど、私自身はそこまでの資産はないなぁ……まあ: Kaho: “My family is certainly wealthy, but I don't have that much of an asset myself... well, even if I did, I wouldn't feel like putting it out if it wasn't worth the investment.”
華穂\n「例えば無利子で１億貸したとしてだよ？ ……３０年で返却するとなると、一: Kaho: “For example, let's say I lent 100 million interest-free. To pay it back over 30 years, it would be about 280,000 a month.”
華穂\n「普通の生活をしていて一月２８万返すってだけでも相当難しいのに……身体も: Kaho: “Just paying back 280,000 a month while living a normal life is incredibly difficult... and to keep paying it back for 30 years without breaking down... it's normally impossible for just an office worker, right?”
重明\n「まぁそうだな……スポーツのプロ選手とか、芸能人で成功するか……もしくは: Shigeaki: “Well, you're right... Unless you succeed as a pro athlete or a celebrity... or maybe become a top-earning sex worker and rake it in... it'd be pretty tough...”
華穂\n「運任せの稼ぎなんてリスクがあるし……そもそもくす葉ちゃんを風俗に行かせ: Kaho: “Earnings that depend on luck are a risk... and in the first place, if we're going to have Kusuha-chan go into sex work, there's no need to take her out of here.”
重明\n「だな……つまり融資は出来ても無尽蔵にお金は出せないってわけだ」: Shigeaki: “Exactly... In other words, we can provide financing, but we can't just put out money limitlessly.”
華穂\n「その辺を踏まえて、今後をどうすべきかを話し合うわけなんだけど……くす葉: Kaho: “Taking all that into account, we're discussing what to do from now on... Kusuha-chan, is there anything you want to say so far?”
くす葉\n「い、いえ……そもそもここを出て妹と合流出来たとして、お二人の助けなし: Kusuha: “N-no... To begin with, even if I get out of here and join up with my sister, I won't be able to live without the help of you two... so just being supported is something I'm very grateful for.”
華穂\n「じゃあこのまま先に進むけど……くす葉ちゃんとしては、借金した親を見捨て: Kaho: “Well then, let's proceed. For your part, Kusuha-chan, you don't want to abandon the parents who took on the debt, and you want to manage at least the portion assigned to you... that's what you're thinking, right?”
くす葉\n「……最悪……身体を売る事になっても……」: Kusuha: “...At worst... even if it means selling my body...”
華穂\n「それはつまり、ここに残ってもいいって事？」: Kaho: “Does that mean you're okay with staying here?”
くす葉\n「けど、その場合……妹の無事を私自身の目で確認できないので……出来れば: Kusuha: “But, in that case... since I won't be able to confirm my sister's safety with my own eyes... I don't want to leave that to someone else, but want to manage it myself or with my parents.”
くす葉\n「あと未成年の妹が大人になった時に、家族の状況を知って私と同じように自: Kusuha: “Also, I want to avoid at all costs a situation where my underage sister, when she becomes an adult, finds out the family situation and tries to pay off the debt with her body just like me.”
華穂\n「うん、そうだね……その可能性は、十分にあるね」: Kaho: “Yeah, you're right... That's a definite possibility.”
くす葉\n「はい……なので、ここを出た後に妹を見つけたら……出来れば妹をお二人で: Kusuha: “Yes... so, if you find my sister after leaving here... would it be possible for you two to shelter her...?”
華穂\n「わかった、任せておいて」: Kaho: “I understand, leave it to us.”
くす葉\n「あ、ありがとうございます……助かります……華穂さん……重明さん……」: Kusuha: “Th-thank you so much... That's a huge help... Kaho-san... Shigeaki-san...”
重明\n「……くす葉の妹の方は何とか頑張って保護するとして……問題は借金の方か…: Shigeaki: “...Well, we'll do our best to protect Kusuha's sister, but... the problem is the debt...”
華穂\n「確か破産申請は通ったけど、その間に更に借金をした事で支払いの義務を免れ: Kaho: “You said the bankruptcy filing went through, but because they took out more loans in the meantime, they couldn't escape the obligation to pay, right?”
華穂\n「……となると多分そこが鍵かな……」: Kaho: “...In that case, that's probably the key...”
華穂\n「もしそのお金を貸した人が意図的に支払い義務がなくならないよう借金させた: Kaho: “If it turns out that the person who lent the money intentionally made them take out loans so they wouldn't escape the obligation to pay... at the very least, the loans from banks and individuals might be discharged.”
重明\n「そうそう、それそれ……俺もそれで上手く行くんじゃないかなって……思って: Shigeaki: “Exactly, exactly! That's it... I was thinking maybe things would work out that way too.”
華穂\n「まぁ……それでも破産したからと言って、全ての債務が免除されるわけじゃな: Kaho: “Well... even so, filing for bankruptcy doesn't mean all debts are discharged.”
重明\n「……え？ そうなのか？ ……借金って、自己破産すれば全部払わなくて済む: Shigeaki: “...Eh? Is that so? ...If you file for personal bankruptcy, don't you get out of paying everything?”
華穂\n「ううん、違うよ……例えば損害賠償とか従業員の給料未払いとか罰金なんかは: Kaho: “No, it's different. For example, things like damages, unpaid wages for employees, or fines... you can't escape the obligation to pay those even if you go bankrupt.”
華穂\n「つまり私が動いてくす葉ちゃん達家族の借金を減らせるとしたら、本来原則と: Kaho: “In other words, if I move to reduce the debt for Kusuha-chan's family, I can only deal with the bank and individual loans that normally don't have to be paid, but I can't do anything about the rest.”
華穂\n「その対処出来ない金額が１億を超えるようなら……妹ちゃんは出来る限り守る: Kaho: “If that amount we can't deal with exceeds 100 million... we'll protect the sister as much as we can, but as for the debt... she'll just have to manage it on her own.”
重明\n「どうだくす葉……それでいいか？」: Shigeaki: “How about it, Kusuha... is that okay with you?”
くす葉\n「は、はい！ 実は正直何の事だか良く分かってないですけど……おいおい分: Kusuha: “Y-yes! To be honest, I'm not really sure what you're talking about... but I'm hoping to understand it as we go along!”
重明\n「おいおい……結構分かりやすく説明したのに……何でコレでわからないんだよ: Shigeaki: “Hey now... she explained it pretty clearly, why don't you get it...”
くす葉\n「華穂さんが妹の美奈恵を必ず守ってくれる……という部分に関しては良く分: Kusuha: “I understood perfectly the part where Kaho-san will definitely protect my sister Minae.”
くす葉\n「それと……色々やって支払い金額が１億を超えた場合は……やっぱり身体を: Kusuha: “And also... the part where if the amount exceeds 100 million after everything is done... then I'll just have to sell my body after all.”
重明\n「一応……親を見捨てるって方法もあるぞ」: Shigeaki: “There is an option... to abandon your parents.”
くす葉\n「そんな冷たい事言って……もし私と同じ立場なら、どうせ重明さんだってご: Kusuha: “How can you say such a cold thing... If you were in my position, you wouldn't abandon your parents either, would you, Shigeaki-san?”
重明\n「まぁな……即、華穂にお金を借りるのは間違いない」: Shigeaki: “I guess... I'd definitely borrow money from Kaho immediately.”
くす葉\n「うわ……なんか最低……」: Kusuha: “Whoa... that's kind of the worst...”
華穂\n「いや、そりゃ貸すけど……流石に億超えたら、私きーくんの家族の財産、容赦: Kaho: “Well, I'd lend it, but... if it's over a hundred million, I'm mercilessly confiscating Ki-kun's family's assets, you know?”
華穂\n「それと、それ以降……家族のお金は全部、私が管理するからね」: Kaho: “And from then on... I'll be the one managing all the family money.”
重明\n「うむ、まぁそれはしょうがないな……つーかウチの家族、そんな借金背負うよ: Shigeaki: “Well, I guess there's no choice then... I mean, no one in my family is in a position to take on that kind of debt anyway.”
華穂\n「……お宅の息子さんが、痴漢したので示談金を……とか電話が掛かってきて、: Kaho: “...Like getting a call saying, 'Your son was caught groping someone, pay the settlement money,' and paying a huge sum.”
重明\n「ウチの親なら事実だろうとお勤めしてこいって言うだけだよ」: Shigeaki: “If it's my parents, even if it's true, they'd just tell me to go serve my time.”
華穂\n「うん、まあ私でもそう言うと思う」: Kaho: “Yeah, I think I'd say the same.”
重明\n「そこは助けろよ……まあ脱線はこの辺にしておくとして、特に問題がないなら: Shigeaki: “Hey, save me there... well, enough with the tangents. If there are no problems, shall we get moving?”
重明\n「お、おう……何か……冬の南極にでもやってきたような……い、勢いだな……: Shigeaki: “Y-Yeah... The... the intensity is like... we've suddenly arrived at the South Pole in winter... Kusuha, are you okay?”
……何か言っているようだが、風に邪魔されてよく聞き取れない。: ...She seemed to be saying something, but the wind was in the way and I couldn't hear well.
背負ってる華穂と違い、くす葉は俺の左腕を掴んだまま斜め後ろを歩いている……少し距: Unlike Kaho who was on my back, Kusuha was walking diagonally behind me while gripping my left arm... since there was a bit of distance, it must be hard to hear.
重明\n「くす葉！ ……吹雪が酷いから……何言ってるかよく聞こえないぞ！！」: Shigeaki: “Kusuha! ...The blizzard's too bad... I can't hear what you're saying!!”
重明\n「……まあいいや……雪に足をとられて転ばないよう、気をつけて歩けよ！ い: Shigeaki: “...Oh well... make sure you watch your step so you don't trip in the snow! Got it!!”
重明\n（むしろ悪天候の方が好都合……この雪の中じゃ、誰だって外出を躊躇うはず…: Shigeaki: (...If anything, the bad weather is convenient... in this snow, anyone would hesitate to go outside... I'll take advantage of that and find Kusuha's sister and take her away...)
妹は表向きは普通の生活をしていると言っていた……それが本当なら、学校ぐらいは通っ: She'd said her sister was living a normal life on the surface... If that's true, she must be attending school at least.
重明\n（まずは友達関係か、通ってる学校から住所を聞き出すか……たとえ転校してい: Shigeaki: (I'll start with her friends or find her address from the school... even if she's transferred, it should be easy to find out with her relative Kusuha here... Hmph, piece of cake...)
重明\n「……うん？ ……何だ、くす葉……どうした？」: Shigeaki: “...Hm? What is it, Kusuha... what's wrong?”
重明\n「……いや、だから……吹雪でお前の言葉が上手く聞き取れないんだって……」: Shigeaki: “...No, like I said... I can't hear you properly because of the blizzard...”
先程から何かを呟いているくす葉の言葉をしっかりと聴く為……俺は左後方へと振り向き: To hear the words Kusuha had been muttering for a while now, I turned to the left rear and brought my face close to her face as she gripped my arm.
くす葉\n「……重明さん……私……駄目みたい……」: Kusuha: “...Shigeaki-san... I... I don't think I can make it...”
重明\n「？？？ ……駄目？ ……何が駄目なんだよ」: Shigeaki: “??? ...Not make it? ...What do you mean by that?”
くす葉\n「……私ね……ここを出られない……白花荘から……離れられないの……」: Kusuha: “...You know... I can't leave this place... I can't leave... Shirohana-sou...”
重明\n「はぁ？ ……お前、今更何言ってんだよ……そりゃ逃げた事でリスクは産まれ: Shigeaki: “Hah? ...What are you talking about now... Sure, running away comes with risks, but... what about your sister? ...Didn't you want to protect her with your own hands?”
くす葉\n「……妹を守るのは……もういいの……だって……私には……もうどうする事: Kusuha: “...Protecting my sister... it's fine now... because... there's nothing... I can do anymore...”
重明\n「……出来なくなんかねーよ……たとえ１人じゃ無理でも、俺も華穂も力を貸す: Shigeaki: “...There's no such thing... Even if you can't do it alone, Kaho and I are lending you our strength, aren't we? ...It'll definitely be a better result than just giving up here and doing nothing.”
くす葉\n「けど……悪いよ……重明さんに……凄い迷惑がかかる……」: Kusuha: “But... I'd feel bad... It would be a huge trouble... for Shigeaki-san...”
重明\n「迷惑なんて気にすんな……俺が勝手におせっかいするって決めたんだ……ここ: Shigeaki: “Don't worry about the trouble... I'm the one who decided to butt in. Now that I've come this far... I'll stick with you until the end, no matter what happens.”
くす葉\n「……ほんとに最後まで付き合ってくれるの？」: Kusuha: “...Will you really stick with me until the end?”
くす葉\n「……ああぁ……よかった……私……誰にも頼れなくて……寂しかった……ど: Kusuha: “...Ahh... I'm so glad... I... I was lonely because I had no one to rely on... I was always anxious because I didn't know what would happen...”
重明\n「……まぁ、こんな目に遭えば当然だよな……けど安心しろ、これからは１人じ: Shigeaki: “...Well, it's only natural if you've been put through that... but don't worry, you're not alone anymore.”
くす葉\n「……うん……重明さん……ずっと傍に居てね……」: Kusuha: “...Yeah... Shigeaki-san... stay by my side forever, okay...”
その正体を考えるより前に……俺はソレを……目一杯力を入れ、蹴り飛ばした。: Before I could even think about what it was... I kicked it... with all my might.
蹴った足を積もった雪の中に埋め込むと同時に……頭の中に、恐怖と嫌悪感が混じった…: At the same time as my kicking foot buried itself in the accumulated snow... a horrifying shivering sensation, a mixture of terror and disgust... swelled in my head.
重明\n（……な、何だ今の……今、俺が蹴ったのって……くす葉……だったのか？）: Shigeaki: (...Wh-What was that... What I just kicked... was that... Kusuha?)
今は笑い声を上げている、先ほどまで隣に居た存在に対し……俺は驚きの余り、木製の壁: Against the existence that had been by my side until a moment ago and was now letting out a laughing voice... I had delivered a kick with enough force to put a hole in a wooden wall, out of sheer surprise.
しかも高さからいって、柔らかい腹部の辺り……: And judging by the height, it was around the soft abdomen...
……女の子なら……いや……たとえ屈強な男だろうと、食らえば声も出せず地面に倒れ込: ...If it were a girl... no... even a sturdy man, they should've collapsed on the ground, unable to even make a sound after taking that.
重明\n（……なのに何でアレを食らって笑っていられるんだ……違う……確かにくす葉: Shigeaki: (...So why can it stay standing and laughing after taking that... No... it certainly had the form of Kusuha... but it's absolutely different... that is nothing like Kusuha.)
くす葉の形をした何か……その姿を捉えようと周囲に目配せをするものの……吹雪に遮ら: Something in the shape of Kusuha... I cast my eyes around to try and catch its figure, but I was blocked by the blizzard and couldn't catch a single shadow.
くす葉\n「……あははははは……しげあきさん……ふふふふふ……しげあきさん……あ: Kusuha: “...Ahahahaha... Shigeaki-san... fufufufufu... Shigeaki-san... ahahahaha... Shigeaki-san... Shigeaki-san...”
真っ白な世界に……どこから聞こえているのかわからない、不気味な笑い声が響き渡る。: In the pure white world... an eerie laughter, the source of which was unknown, echoed.
……視界の中には居ない……まだ近くには居ないはず……: ...It wasn't in my field of vision... it shouldn't be close yet...
……それなのに、まるで耳元で直接囁かれているかのように……冷たく刺さるような声が: ...And yet, as if it were being whispered directly into my ear... a cold, piercing voice slipped into my ear.
くす葉\n「……いかないで……重明さん……ふふ……ずっとここに……一緒に居ようよ: Kusuha: “...Don't go... Shigeaki-san... fufu... let's stay here... together forever... fufu... hey... fufu... ahaha...”
華穂を背負っている為、両手は使えない……足も膝下まで雪に埋もれ、まともに防戦も出: I couldn't use both hands because I was carrying Kaho... My legs were buried up to the knees in snow, and I wasn't in a state where I could fight back properly.
……しかも思い切り蹴り飛ばしても、ダメージどころか怯ませる事すら出来ない相手……: ...And on top of that, an opponent that wasn't even fazed, let alone damaged, by a full-force kick... No matter how you looked at it, the odds were clearly against me.
重明\n（……このまま何もせずにジッと立って居れば、どこかへ行ってくれる……何て: Shigeaki: (...It's not as if it'll go away if I just stand here and do nothing, right...)
俺は急ぎ、この現状をどうすべきか……思考を巡らせていく。: I hurriedly scanned my thoughts for what to do in this current situation.
重明\n（……華穂を守るのが最優先として……くす葉っぽい何かが、一緒に居ようと誘: Shigeaki: (...With protecting Kaho as the top priority... the option of returning to the pension where that Kusuha-like thing is inviting us to stay together... is obviously out of the question.)
そうなると逃げ込む先は、自分が乗ってきた車しかない。: In that case, the only place to flee to is the car I arrived in.
……その時……俺はふとある事に気付いてしまった。: ...At that moment... I suddenly noticed something.
……俺はペンションのどの辺りに……自分の車を停めたのだろうか？: Where exactly... had I parked my car at this pension?
そもそも俺は……いつ車を降りて……宿に入ったのだろうか？: In the first place, when did I... get out of the car and... enter the inn?
重明\n「……おいおい……冗談だろ？」: Shigeaki: “...Hey now... you've got to be kidding, right?”
華穂\n「きーくんどうしたの？ 震えてるけど、何があったの？」: Kaho: “Ki-kun, what's wrong? You're shaking, what happened?”
重明\n「何がって！！ ……お前……この笑い声が聞こえないのかよ！！」: Shigeaki: “What happened!! ...Can't you... can't you hear this laughing voice!!”
華穂\n「……笑い……声？ ……聞こえないけど？」: Kaho: “...Laughing... voice? ...I can't hear anything, though?”
くす葉\n「……あはは……うふふ……ここで私とずっと一緒に居ようよ……重明さん…: Kusuha: “...Ahaha... ufufu... let's stay here together forever... Shigeaki-san... fufu... fufufu... AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!!”
……まるで俺の耳元に直接響くかのように聞こえる、くす葉の不気味な笑い声。: ...Kusuha's eerie laughter, sounding as if it were echoing directly in my ear.
その声と共に……どこからか、ザッザッと雪が積もった地面を蹴る音が聞こえてきた。: Along with that voice... from somewhere, the sound of footsteps—thump, thump—crunching through the accumulated snow could be heard.
吹雪が舞う暗闇の中、何者かが走ってくる……俺と華穂に近づいてくる。: In the darkness where the blizzard danced, someone was running... approaching Kaho and me.
状況に慄き、混乱する中……ふと俺の脳が、ある突拍子もない仮説を閃かせた。: While I was terrified and confused by the situation... my brain suddenly flashed an outrageous hypothesis.
……まったく根拠はない……だがもしその仮説が正しければ、この窮地から逃れる事が出: ...There was no basis at all... but if that hypothesis were correct, I might be able to escape from this predicament.
……咄嗟に振り返り、こちらに飛び掛るおぞましい何かの姿を見た瞬間……: ...The moment I reflexively turned around and saw the figure of that horrifying something leaping at me...
閃いた仮説に、わらにも縋る思いで……俺は“彼女”の名を目一杯、大声で叫んでみた。: Clinging to the hypothesis I'd flashed with a desperate hope... I yelled out "her" name as loud as I could.
……俺は目を覚ますと、驚きで乱れ早まった心臓の鼓動と呼吸をゆっくりと整えていく。: ...I woke up and slowly steadied my heart's racing pulse and my breathing, which were irregular from surprise.
目覚めると……俺は自分の車の運転席に座っていた。: When I woke up... I was sitting in the driver's seat of my own car.
隣の助手席には、目が覚めたばかりで少し寝ぼけた華穂の姿。: In the passenger seat next to me was Kaho, looking a bit sleepy after just waking up.
……そして車外は、先ほどまでの猛吹雪は何だったのかと言わんばかりの青空……: ...And outside the car was a blue sky, as if asking what on earth that fierce blizzard from just a moment ago was all about...
周辺にも雪が積もった形跡はなく……人の手入れのされていない草木が生い茂っている。: There was no trace of accumulated snow in the surroundings either... instead, unmaintained plants and trees were growing thick.
重明\n「……は、はは……ははは……おいおい、何だよこれ……はは、ははは……」: Shigeaki: “...Ha, haha... hahahaha... Hey now, what is this... haha, hahahaha...”
華穂\n「……あれ……私、寝てた？ …………ここ、どこ？ ……今……何時？」: Kaho: “...Wait... was I sleeping? ............Where is this? ...What... time is it?”
重明\n「……ここは俺の車の中……場所は……ナビによると白花荘から５００ｍ離れた: Shigeaki: “...This is inside my car... the location is... according to the navigation, we're on a mountain road 500m away from Shirohana-sou... the time is March 7th, Saturday, 3:00 PM.”
華穂\n「……土曜の……１５：００かぁ……予定より……少しかかっちゃったね……」: Kaho: “...3:00 PM on Saturday, huh... It took... a bit longer than planned, didn't it...”
華穂\n「ってぇええっ！！ ……ど、土曜ぉ！？ ……って雪、雪は！？ 吹雪はどこ: Kaho: “Wait, WHA-A-AT!! ...Sa-Saturday!? ...And the snow, the snow!? Where did the blizzard go!?”
重明\n「……見ての通り外は晴天だ……しかも雪が降った形跡もないようだぞ」: Shigeaki: “...As you can see, it's a clear day outside... and there doesn't seem to be any trace of snow falling either.”
重明\n「……とりあえず……まずはナビの日付が間違っているという可能性から検証し: Shigeaki: “...For now... why don't we first verify the possibility that the date on the navigation is wrong?”
華穂\n「わかった……じゃあ二人でスマホのカレンダーを見てみようか」: Kaho: “Got it... Let's look at the calendars on our smartphones together.”
俺達は色々と調べた結果……どうやら今日が土曜日である事は間違いない……という結論: After checking various things, we reached the conclusion that... it was undoubtedly Saturday today.
……それどころか……ナビの走行記録を見た限り、まだ白花荘に到着していないらしい。: ...Moreover... judging by the travel record on the navigation, it seemed we hadn't even arrived at Shirohana-sou yet.
俺達は様々な事を確認する為……白花荘へと……向かう事にしたのだった……: We decided to head toward Shirohana-sou... to confirm various things...
重明\n「……華穂……この場所で……いいんだよな？」: Shigeaki: “...Kaho... this is the place... right?”
……車を走らせ辿り着いた場所には、火事で焼け落ちたと思われる建物の残骸が、一面に: ...The place we reached by driving the car was covered in the remains of a building that appeared to have been destroyed by fire.
俺と華穂は、焼け跡に近づき、炭化した壁や柱……炭の色などを色々と見てまわっていく: Kaho and I approached the ruins and looked over the charred walls and pillars... the color of the charcoal and various other things.
……どうやらこの建物が火事にあったのは、かなり前の事のようだ。: ...Apparently, it had been quite a long time since this building had been in a fire.
重明\n「……雪は降ってない……宿も火事でなくなっている……」: Shigeaki: “...No snow... and the inn is gone because of the fire...”
華穂\n「……つまり……きーくんと私は……白花荘の幻を見ていた……って事？」: Kaho: “...In other words... Ki-kun and I... were seeing a vision of Shirohana-sou?”
重明\n「……二人して幻を見たか……まぁ他に説明のつけ様がないよな……じゃあ幻だ: Shigeaki: “...The two of us saw a vision together, huh... well, there's no other way to explain it... so, assuming it was a vision...”
重明\n「白花荘が寮からペンションに改築されたってのは……実際にあった事だったの: Shigeaki: “The story about Shirohana-sou being renovated from a dormitory to a pension... was that something that actually happened?”
華穂\n「凄い簡易だったけどＨＰもあったし、ネットで予約も出来たよ」: Kaho: “It was very simple, but there was a website, and I could even make a reservation online.”
重明\n「ＨＰ自体は外部のサーバーで、閉鎖してないから残ってたって事か……ここが: Shigeaki: “Maybe the website itself was on an external server and remained because it wasn't shut down... How did you find out that this place had become a pension, Kaho?”
華穂\n「このあたりの宿泊施設を探してた時に偶然」: Kaho: “By chance, when I was looking for accommodations in this area.”
重明\n「……ちなみに予約してメールで【承りました】的な返事とかはあったのか？」: Shigeaki: “...By the way, did you get an [Accepted] type of reply after making the reservation?”
華穂\n「ううん、返信はなかったけど藤子さんがやってるってプロフィールがあったし: Kaho: “No, there was no reply, but there was a profile saying Touko-san was running it, and since there were only vacant rooms... I thought it'd be fine.”
重明\n「うぉい……気持ちはわからないわけではないけど、そこはもう少し確認しろよ: Shigeaki: “Whoa... I can understand the feeling, but you should've checked a bit more, you know...”
華穂\n「けど変だよね……幻を見たとして、何で二人して同じモノを見たんだろう」: Kaho: “But it's strange, isn't it... Assuming we saw a vision, why did the two of us see the same thing?”
重明\n「完全に一致してたわけじゃあないっぽいけど……偶然誰かと同じ夢を見る事っ: Shigeaki: “It doesn't seem like they were perfectly identical, but... apparently it's rare, but sometimes you do see the same dream as someone else.”
重明\n「……まぁそもそも……こっちは白花荘の事を全然知らなかったのに、かなり近: Shigeaki: “...Well, in the first place... it is a strange story that I saw something so close to reality even though I didn't know anything about Shirohana-sou.”
華穂\n「知らないって言うなら……私も藤子さんに桔梗ちゃんって娘が居た事知らなか: Kaho: “If you're talking about not knowing... I didn't know Touko-san had a daughter named Kikyou-chan, either.”
華穂\n「それにもちろん……くす葉ちゃんって女の子の事も」: Kaho: “And of course... about the girl named Kusuha-chan, too.”
……俺は白花荘のロビーがあった跡あたりに視線を移し……幻の中での出来事を思い返し: ...I shifted my gaze to around where the lobby of Shirohana-sou would've been... and thought back on the events within the vision.
白昼夢にしては、妙に生々しい体験……: For a daydream, it was a strangely vivid experience...
特に白花荘で出会い、親密になったくす葉という女の子が……幻だったというのが……俺: I really couldn't believe that the girl named Kusuha, whom I'd met and become intimate with at Shirohana-sou... was a vision.
華穂\n「うん、ちょっとこの火事の事調べてみようか……藤子さんは火事から逃れて、: Kaho: “Yeah, let's try looking into this fire... maybe Touko-san escaped the fire and is living normally somewhere else, not here.”
重明\n「あと居るかどうかがそもそも怪しいんだけど……くす葉の妹……美奈恵だっけ: Shigeaki: “And I'm not even sure if she exists in the first place, but... Kusuha's sister... Minae, was it? Let's try looking for that girl too, just in case.”
華穂が実際過去に会った事のある藤子と違い、くす葉の妹を探すのは、ただの骨折り損に: Unlike Touko-san, whom Kaho had actually met in the past, looking for Kusuha's sister might turn out to be just a wasted effort.
だが、そこを調べ知る事が出来れば……色々な疑問や、モヤモヤした気持ちは間違いなく: But if we can look into it and find out... I'm sure various doubts and uneasy feelings will undoubtedly be cleared.
……この宿に何が起きたのか……その真相にも、少しは近づけるだろう。: ...We might also be able to get a bit closer to the truth of what happened at this inn.
重明\n「という事でまず図書館だな……過去の新聞を調べて、火事の事を調べるとしよ: Shigeaki: “So, first the library, then... we'll look through past newspapers and look into the fire.”
重明\n「それと今日の夜、あらためて初Ｈしような」: Shigeaki: “And also, let's have our first time for real tonight.”
赤面した華穂と共に車へ戻る途中……俺はふと振り返り、焼け跡となった白花荘の外観を: While returning to the car with a blushing Kaho... I suddenly looked back and stared at the exterior of Shirohana-sou, now a ruin.
重明\n「……おい、くす葉……最後はビビッて蹴っちまって悪かったな……けど安心し: Shigeaki: “...Hey, Kusuha... Sorry I got scared and kicked you at the end... but don't worry, I'll properly look for your sister and protect her, just as I promised.”
重明\n「……おい、くす葉……夢だろうが幻だろうが、俺は約束はちゃんと守るからな: Shigeaki: “...Hey, Kusuha... Whether it was a dream or a vision, I'll properly keep my promise... so wait for me in peace.”
……くす葉が実在しなければ、何の意味もない呼びかけ。: ...A call that meant nothing if Kusuha didn't exist.
そんな少し儀式めいた独白を、焼け跡へ向け呟いた後……: After muttering such a slightly ritual-like monologue toward the ruins...
……俺は再びここへ戻る決意を胸に……: ...With a resolution in my heart to return here once more...
……華穂と共に、自分の車へと歩き始めたのだった……: ...I began to walk toward my car with Kaho...
トレイに乗った空の食器を持ち談話室に入ると、部屋には桔梗が居た。: When I entered the common room carrying the tray of empty dishes, Kikyou was there.
重明\n「朝からお仕事ご苦労様、桔梗ちゃん」: Shigeaki: “Hard at work even this early, Kikyou-chan.”
桔梗\n「どうもありがとうございます、重明さん……そのトレイ、どうしたんですか？: Kikyou: “Thank you very much, Shigeaki-san... what happened with that tray?”
桔梗\n「おはようございます、重明さん……そのトレイ、どうしたんですか？」: Kikyou: “Good morning, Shigeaki-san... what happened with that tray?”
重明\n「実は今、華穂のヤツが具合悪くってね……それで藤子さんに部屋で食べられる: Shigeaki: “Actually, Kaho's not feeling so great right now... so I had Touko-san make something she could eat in the room. I'm just on my way back.”
桔梗\n「そうだったんですか……では片付けますので、お預かりします」: Kikyou: “Is that so... in that case, I will take care of it for you.”
食器の乗ったトレイを俺から受け取った桔梗は、談話室の端にある隣接した調理場へと移: Taking the tray from me, Kikyou moved to the adjacent kitchen at the edge of the common room.
俺の居る談話室と桔梗の居る調理場には、現在二人以外誰も居ない。: In the common room where I was and the kitchen where Kikyou was, there was currently no one else besides the two of us.
半ば貸し切り状態となった状況の中……俺は手早く食器を洗っている桔梗に声を掛けた。: In a situation that felt almost like we had the place to ourselves... I spoke to Kikyou as she quickly began washing the dishes.
重明\n「そういえば俺達、今日の午後には帰る予定だったんだけど……この吹雪だし、: Shigeaki: “By the way, we were planning to head home this afternoon... but with this blizzard, we've pushed our departure back to tomorrow.”
桔梗\n「そうですか……確かに雪が積もった山道を移動するのは危険ですしね」: Kikyou: “I see... it certainly would be dangerous to travel on mountain roads with snow piling up.”
重明\n「だね……とまぁそういう事でもう一日よろしく、桔梗ちゃん」: Shigeaki: “Right... so anyway, looks like we'll be in your care for another day, Kikyou-chan.”
桔梗\n「はい、ゆっくりしていって下さい」: Kikyou: “Yes, please take your time and relax.”
重明\n「ありがと……それで停電とか万一の事態を考えて、今のうちに暖房器具を貸し: Shigeaki: “Thanks... so, thinking about blackouts or other emergencies, I was wondering if I could borrow some kind of heating equipment while we're at it... think we can manage that?”
重明\n「いやそこで【何と】って……この話の流れで驚く桔梗ちゃんに、こっちの方が: Shigeaki: “Wait, why the 'my goodness'? I'm more surprised that you're surprised by that request.”
桔梗\n「いえ……実は朝の時点で万一の事を考え、他のお客様の所に暖房器具を提供し: Kikyou: “No... actually, early this morning I provided heating equipment to the other guests in case of an emergency...”
桔梗\n「故障しているものなどがあって数が足りず……重明さんの所は若いし、何か言: Kikyou: “There were some malfunctions and we didn't have enough... since Shigeaki-san's room is occupied by young people, I thought I would just leave you be until you said something.”
重明\n「あぁ確かに……華穂の具合が悪くなきゃ、俺もまず気にしなかっただろうな」: Shigeaki: “Ah, true enough... if Kaho weren't sick, I probably wouldn't have bothered either.”
桔梗\n「ですがあくまで直ぐに取り出せる場所には無い……というだけなので、用意す: Kikyou: “However, it is merely that they are not in a place where I can get them immediately... so there is no problem in preparing them for you.”
重明\n「そっか、よかった……けど桔梗ちゃんって、思いのほか気さくな性格している: Shigeaki: “I see, that's a relief... but Kikyou-chan, you're surprisingly easy to talk to.”
重明\n「うん、もっと大人しくてお人形さんみたいに無口で……喋っても堅苦しい事し: Shigeaki: “Yeah. I thought you were more of a quiet, doll-like person... a super serious girl who only says formal stuff when she does speak.”
桔梗\n「確かにあまり騒がしい性格ではありませんが……こうして客商売をしている以: Kikyou: “I am certainly not a noisy person... but as long as I am in a service industry, I would not be able to do my job if I were silent.”
重明\n「まぁね……ペンションを二人だけで運営するって時点で大変なのに、従業員が: Shigeaki: “Well, yeah... running a pension with just two people is hard enough. If one employee were a literal doll... that'd be straight-up punishment game territory.”
重明\n（うん？ ……まるで実際にそういう状況を経験したような苦々しい顔をしてる: Shigeaki: (Hm? ...She's making a bitter face like she's actually experienced a situation like that... did something similar happen to her in the past?)
桔梗\n「ですが今日は他の従業員が休みというだけで……別に常に２人だけで宿を運営: Kikyou: “However, it is simply that the other employees are off today... it is not as if the two of us are constantly running the inn alone, you know?”
重明\n「え？ そうなの？ ……確か藤子さんは娘とやってるって言ってたと思うんだ: Shigeaki: “Eh? Really? ...I thought Touko-san said she was doing it with her daughter.”
桔梗\n「基本はそうですね」: Kikyou: “That is the base of it, yes.”
桔梗\n「ですが流石に常時２人体制というのは肉体的に厳しいので、元この寮に住んで: Kikyou: “But naturally, a permanent two-person system is physically demanding, so we have several students who used to live in this dormitory come regularly as part-time workers.”
重明\n「ああ、そりゃそうか……この建物を２人でキレイに掃除とかしてたら、他のこ: Shigeaki: “Ah, that makes sense... if you two were trying to keep this whole building clean by yourselves, you wouldn't have time for anything else.”
桔梗\n「それはそうなのですが……実際の所この宿はそれほど繁盛していないので、あ: Kikyou: “That is true... but in reality, this inn is not that prosperous, so even if there are many people, there is often not much to do.”
重明\n「……昨日初めて来たばかりの客が言うのも何なんだけど……この宿、経営とか: Shigeaki: “...I know it's a bit much coming from a guest who only arrived yesterday... but is the management of this place okay?”
桔梗\n「平気ですよ、そもそも半分趣味みたいなものですから」: Kikyou: “It's fine. In the first place, it's half-hobby.”
桔梗\n「無料というわけではありませんが、基本的に儲けは度外視でやっています」: Kikyou: “It's not as if it's free, but basically we do it without regard for profit.”
重明\n「……ああ、もしかして金持ちの道楽とか、税金対策ってやつ？ ……もしくは: Shigeaki: “...Ah, maybe a rich person's pastime, or some kind of tax write-off? ...Or maybe you're under contract as a retreat facility for some company.”
山奥のペンションにしては妙に豪勢だと思ったが、道楽や慰安施設というなら納得もいく: I thought it was strangely lavish for a pension deep in the mountains, but a pastime or retreat facility makes sense.
重明\n「ちなみに、他のバイトの子も……そうやってメイド服着るのかな？」: Shigeaki: “By the way, do the other part-time girls... wear maid outfits like that too?”
桔梗\n「それなりに可愛いと思いますよ……全員、歳も私ぐらいですし」: Kikyou: “I believe they are reasonably cute... they're all around my age.”
重明\n（ふむ……メイド喫茶ならぬメイドペンションか……何か急にこの宿、案外リピ: Shigeaki: (Hmm... a maid pension rather than a maid cafe? I'm starting to think this place might have a surprisingly high repeat rate.)
だが流行らすには少々山奥過ぎる……もう少し大通りの方がいいかもしれない。: But it's a bit too far in the mountains for it to really catch on... maybe somewhere closer to the main road would be better.
重明\n（まぁそもそも道楽っぽいし、儲けなくていいのか）: Shigeaki: (Well, it's a pastime anyway, so I guess they don't need to make a profit.)
桔梗\n「では雑談はこの辺にして……暖房器具ですが、外の倉庫に纏めて仕舞ってある: Kikyou: “Well then, let us put the small talk aside... regarding the heating equipment, it is all stored in the outdoor warehouse, so please wait a moment.”
ちらっと窓の外を見たが、相変わらずアホみたいに吹雪いている……: I glanced out the window, but it was still snowing like crazy...
いくら仕事とはいえ、こんな悪天候の中を女の子１人で行かせるわけにはいかない。: Even if it's her job, I can't let a girl go out alone in weather like this.
重明\n「俺も行くよ……吹雪の中、桔梗ちゃんに怪我して欲しくないし」: Shigeaki: “I'll go too... I don't want you getting hurt in the blizzard, Kikyou-chan.”
桔梗\n「お気遣いありがとうございます……結構重いので、とても助かります」: Kikyou: “Thank you for your concern... it is quite heavy, so it will be a great help.”
重明\n「気にしないでいいって、んじゃ行こうか桔梗ちゃん」: Shigeaki: “Don't worry about it. Let's go, Kikyou-chan.”
玄関から出た瞬間、横殴りの強い風と雪が顔に当たり……思わず変な声が出てしまった。: The moment I stepped out of the front entrance, a strong, sideways wind and snow hit my face... and a weird sound escaped my lips before I could stop it.
重明\n（……ハハッ……ここまでくると、もう３月に雪は季節ハズレとか大した問題じ: Shigeaki: (...Haha... at this point, it's not even a matter of March snow being out of season. This is abnormal weather on a whole different level...)
桔梗\n「……重明さん……倉庫は……建物沿いに右へ行った先にあります……」: Kikyou: “...Shigeaki-san... the warehouse is... just past the building to the right...”
重明\n「……右か……じゃあ俺が前に出て壁になるから、桔梗ちゃんは後ろから付いて: Shigeaki: “...To the right... okay, I'll go ahead and be the windbreaker. You follow behind me, Kikyou-chan.”
……身体の熱を奪う、冷たく重い風が吹き荒れる中……俺は積もった雪の中に、ズボリと: ...Amidst the cold, heavy wind that stripped the heat from my body... I buried my right leg into the accumulated snow with a thud.
重明\n（うぁ……膝下まで足がめり込みやがった……一晩でどんだけ積もったんだよ）: Shigeaki: (Whoa... it's in up to my knee... just how much did it snow overnight?)
重明\n「桔梗ちゃん、結構深いから足元をとられて転倒しないよう注意して……もし倒: Shigeaki: “Kikyou-chan, it's pretty deep, so be careful not to lose your footing and fall... if you feel like you're going to fall, you can grab onto me.”
重明\n「まぁね……俺、スキーで結構雪が深い所とか平気で行くし……このぐらい余裕: Shigeaki: “Yeah... I go skiing in deep snow all the time, so... this is a piece of cake. Leave it to m-whoa!?”
……玄関を出て５歩ぐらいは歩いただろうか？: ...I'd walked maybe five steps from the entrance?
突然強くなった無慈悲な横風により……俺はなす術もなく深い雪の中へボスッと倒れこん: Due to a sudden, merciless gust of wind... I fell helplessly into the deep snow with a thud.
雪の中を歩くなんて余裕だと思ったのだが……膝下まで埋まると、思いのほか身体のバラ: I thought walking through the snow would be easy, but once you're buried up to your knees, it's unexpectedly hard to keep your balance... it's like being on a crowded train.
とりあえず上体を起こし大丈夫だと言おうとした所……: For now, I tried to sit up and say I was okay...
……俺の耳に思いもかけない言葉が降りかかってきた。: ...when some unexpected words hit my ears.
桔梗\n「……えっと……余裕ですか？ 重明さん」: Kikyou: “...Um... is it a 'piece of cake'? Shigeaki-san.”
……君を守る的な事を言った直後に、間抜けにも倒れこんだのだ……: ...I'd fallen like a total idiot right after saying I'd protect her...
失態を弄るとしたら、まさにここしかないというポイント。: If there was ever a point to tease me for a failure, this was it.
だが……いかにも真面目そうな桔梗が、仮にも客である俺をおちょくるとは……思いもよ: But... I never expected someone as serious-looking as Kikyou to poke fun at me, even if I am a guest.
重明\n（……けど、これって……ようするに桔梗ちゃんが俺に打ち解けてきている証拠: Shigeaki: (...But, doesn't this... basically mean Kikyou-chan is opening up to me?)
……普通なら親しくもない人間の失敗を、弄るような真似はしない……: ...Normally, you don't tease someone you're not close to for their mistakes...
……そう、つまり桔梗は俺と仲良くなりたい……: ...Yes, in other words, Kikyou wants to get closer to me...
もしくは冗談を言い合うような友達になってもいいという、彼女なりの俺へのメッセージ: Or maybe this is her way of messaging me that it's okay for us to be friends who joke around?
重明\n（……ふっ……そういう話なら……ならこっちもそれに応えないとな！）: Shigeaki: (...Heh... if that's the case... then I've gotta respond in kind!)
そんな彼女の可愛らしい想い（妄想）に応える為……: To respond to her adorable feelings (delusion)...
……俺は起き上がると同時に、勢いよく桔梗に飛び掛かった。: ...I leaped at Kikyou the moment I stood back up.
……雪が降る中……友達２人のうち１人が雪塗れになったら、もう片方の運命など決まっ: ...When two friends are in the snow and one gets covered in it, the fate of the other is already decided.
俺は正面から桔梗にしっかり抱きつくと同時に、勢いよく雪の中へ飛び込んでいく。: I grabbed Kikyou in a firm embrace and dove headlong into the snow with her.
そして吹雪に包まれた一面の雪化粧を、大部屋にしかれた布団に見立て……ゴロゴロと転: Treating the pure white blanket of the blizzard like a futon spread out in a large room... I started rolling around...
２分ほど桔梗と共に雪の中を転げまわった後……: After rolling around in the snow with Kikyou for about two minutes...
俺達は倉庫へ行く目的を、結局果たせぬまま……ボロボロになりロビーへと戻ってきてい: We returned to the lobby in a bedraggled state, without ever fulfilling our purpose of going to the warehouse.
重明\n「……はは、雪やべー……あの状況で、外を歩くとか無理すぎ……はは……降り: Shigeaki: “...Haha, the snow is crazy... trying to walk outside in that is impossible... haha... it's just too much... haha... hahahaha!”
スキー場でウェアを着込んだ状態で深い雪に寝転んだ事はあるものの……こんな薄着で新: I've lain in deep snow at ski resorts while wearing gear, but this was naturally my first time diving into fresh snow with such light clothing and crushing it with my whole body.
我ながら馬鹿っぽい事をしたなと思う所もあるが……それ以上にやりきった感が強い。: I think I did something pretty stupid, but more than that, I feel a strong sense of accomplishment.
そんな中……俺は自信に満ちた満面の笑みで、まだ床にしゃがみこんだままの桔梗に声を: In the midst of that... with a beaming, confident smile, I spoke to Kikyou, who was still crouching on the floor.
重明\n「いやぁ……楽しかったね、桔梗ちゃん♪」: Shigeaki: “Man... that was fun, wasn't it, Kikyou-chan?♪”
桔梗\n「……重明さん……よくそこまで悪びれず笑顔でいられますね……」: Kikyou: “...Shigeaki-san... I'm impressed you can stay so unrepentant and keep smiling like that...”
重明\n「……あれ……もしかして本気で怒ってる？ ……凄い嫌な目にあったと思って: Shigeaki: “...Oh... are you actually mad? ...If you feel like you've been put through something terrible... I'll apologize seriously right now...”
桔梗\n「やり過ぎですし凄いビックリしましたけど……別に怒っては居ません……」: Kikyou: “You went too far and I was very surprised... but I am not particularly angry...”
重明\n「けどあんなに積もった雪の中をボスボス潰して転がるなんて、中々出来る事じ: Shigeaki: “But crushing and rolling in snow that's piled up that high isn't something you get to do every day... don't you think it was a good experience?”
桔梗\n「……確かに……細かい発泡スチロールに飛び込むみたいで新鮮な感覚でしたけ: Kikyou: “...It certainly felt fresh, like diving into fine Styrofoam... but I have no desire for a second time in this outfit.”
重明\n「俺もこの格好でもう一度は嫌だ……寒いし」: Shigeaki: “I don't want a second time in this outfit either... it's cold.”
桔梗\n「寒いのなんて初めからわかってる事じゃないですか……それなのに私を巻き込: Kikyou: “You knew it would be cold from the start, didn't you... so why did you drag me into it and dive in on purpose?”
重明\n「……いや雪ってテンションあがるじゃん？ しかも自滅して倒れちゃったのも: Shigeaki: “...Well, doesn't snow just get you hyped? And since I'd already messed up and fallen, I just went with the flow.”
桔梗\n「……重明さんって、もう少し冷静な方かと思ったんですが……結構子供っぽい: Kikyou: “...I thought you were a bit more composed, Shigeaki-san... but you're quite childish, aren't you.”
重明\n「まぁつい最近までジャリガキやってたわけだし……実際親元で学生やってるう: Shigeaki: “Well, I was a little brat until just recently... and as long as you're a student living at home, I guess it's okay to still be a kid, right?”
そんな風に〆る感じで話の流れを切った後……俺は両手で挟むように桔梗の肩を持ち、床: After cutting off the flow of the conversation with that kind of conclusion... I took Kikyou's shoulders in both hands and pulled her body up from where she was sitting on the floor, helping her stand.

重明\n「……まぁ取り合えずこんなものか……」: Shigeaki: “...Well, I guess that's about it...”

重明\n「男だし、少しぐらい乱れててもいいさ……それで、外の倉庫に行くのは諦める: Shigeaki: “I'm a guy, it's fine if I'm a bit messy... so, giving up on the outdoor warehouse, what should we do about the heating?”
桔梗\n「そうですね……階段裏の小さい物置にも……あったような、なかったような…: Kikyou: “Let's see... in the small storage closet behind the stairs... I think there might have been something, or perhaps not...”
重明\n「じゃあ早速そこに移動しようか」: Shigeaki: “Then let's head there right away.”
俺達はお風呂場へ向かう通路の途中にある、物置へとやってきていた。: We had come to the storage closet in the middle of the passage leading to the bathroom.
桔梗\n「では中に入って探してきますので、重明さんはここで待っていてください」: Kikyou: “I will go inside and look, so Shigeaki-san, please wait here.”
桔梗\n「いえ、ここの収納スペースは狭いですし、まずはモノを見つけるだけなので私: Kikyou: “No, the storage space here is narrow, and since it is just finding the items first, I am enough on my own.”
重明\n「そっか……じゃあ寂しいけど、桔梗ちゃんに任せて俺はここで留守番してるよ: Shigeaki: “I see... well, it's lonely, but I'll leave it to you, Kikyou-chan, and keep watch here.”
突っ立っているだけでやる事もない俺は、物置の中でゴソゴソと探し物をしている桔梗の: With nothing to do but stand there, I began to vacantly watch Kikyou fumbling around looking for things inside the closet.
重明\n（しかし、メイド服とか興味なかったんだけど……結構エロいもんなんだな）: Shigeaki: (Still, I never had an interest in maid outfits... but they really are pretty erotic, aren't they?)
……母性を感じさせるエプロン……清楚さを演出するロングスカート……: ...The apron that made me feel motherhood... the long skirt that created an air of refinement...

重明\n（……ああ、いかんいかん……フリーの時ならいざ知らず、今は華穂が居るって: Shigeaki: (...Ah, no, no... if I were single it'd be one thing, but Kaho's right here... I can't just be going into heat indiscriminately...)
……ムラムラとし始めた気持ちをクールダウンさせる為、視線を逸らした所……見知った: ...To cool down my rising feelings, I averted my gaze, and I saw a familiar face approaching.

尚人\n「ふむ……まぁそれがしたいというなら止めはしない……地下のステージの裏に: Naoto: “Hmm... well, if that is what you wish to do, I will not stop you... there should be a small stove left behind the stage in the basement... you should use that.”

尚人\n「俺がお前に嘘を言う理由があるのか？」: Naoto: “Do I have any reason to lie to you?”
重明\n「……昨日、初めて顔を合わせた時の険悪なムードを考えたら……嫌がらせをさ: Shigeaki: “...Given the hostile mood when we first met yesterday... I think it's only natural to suspect I'm being messed with.”
尚人\n「あれはお前を見た瞬間、らしくもなく攻撃的になっただけだ……あまり気にす: Naoto: “That was simply me becoming uncharacteristically aggressive the moment I saw you... do not worry about it too much.”
重明\n「……顔を見ただけで腹が立つとか、どんだけ俺の第一印象は悪かったんだよ…: Shigeaki: “...Getting angry just by looking at my face, just how bad was my first impression... well, whatever.”
尚人\n「では引き続き桔梗の事を頼んだぞ」: Naoto: “Well then, I continue to leave Kikyou to you.”
重明\n「……いやいや、頼むって……お前は桔梗のお父さんか何かか？」: Shigeaki: “...No, no, 'leave her to me'... are you Kikyou's father or something?”
こちらの突っ込みも待たず自分勝手に立ち去る尚人……そんな可愛げのない野郎と入れ替: Without waiting for my retort, Naoto walked away selfishly... and as if switching places with that uncharming guy, a very cute maid came out of the closet.
桔梗\n「ただいまです、重明さん……よく探してはみたのですが、残念な事にどうやら: Kikyou: “I'm back, Shigeaki-san... I looked thoroughly, but unfortunately it seems there are no heaters here.”
重明\n「お疲れ……その暖房なんだけど、今ここを通った何だかワケのわからないオッ: Shigeaki: “Good work... about that heater, some weird middle-aged guy who just passed by told me there's one behind the stage in the basement.”

桔梗\n「………………はぁ……それは確かに……わけがわかりませんね……」: Kikyou: “..............Hah... that certainly... does not make sense...”

友好の証として取り合えず勝手に手を握り何度かニギニギした後……続けて何となく、流: As a sign of friendship, I took her hand without permission and gave it a few squeezes... then, just naturally following the flow, I gave her a light hug.
重明\n（くす葉あたりなら【にょああぁ！！】とか叫ぶだろうに……このノーリアクシ: Shigeaki: (If it were Kusuha, she'd be screaming [Nyoaaa!!] or something... but this zero reaction... she's so unresponsive, it's hard to tell what she's thinking...)
重明\n「よし交友も軽く深めたし、情報を貰った地下とやらに行ってみようか」: Shigeaki: “Alright, now that we've deepened our friendship a bit, let's head to this basement place I heard about.”
談話室から更に奥へと続く通路を抜け、暗がりの階段を降りると……明らかに他の場所と: Passing through a passage that led further back from the common room and descending a dim staircase... I stepped into a room with an atmosphere clearly different from anywhere else.

重明\n（……しかし風呂場といい、ここといい……山奥の宿にしては、えらい金が掛か: Shigeaki: (...But between the bath and this place... they've spent a hell of a lot of money for an inn in the mountains... as expected of a rich person's pastime?)

真っ先に頭に浮かんだのは犬の躾。: The first thing that came to mind was dog discipline.
……その繋がりと言った感じで、俺の脳内にパッと首輪をつけた女性の姿が浮かび上がる: ...Following that connection, a vision of a woman wearing a collar flashed through my mind.
重明\n「それって、犬とか動物じゃなく……人相手の性的な行為って事かな？」: Shigeaki: “Does that mean... not dogs or animals, but... sexual acts with humans?”
昨日の風呂場で見た桔梗と客の絡み……金持ちの道楽で運営されるペンション……会員限: The interaction between Kikyou and the guest I saw at the hot spring yesterday... the pension run as a rich person's pastime... the training shows in the basement for members only.
それらの情報を経て……俺はここがどういう場所なのか……薄っすらと理解し始めていた: With those pieces of info... I was starting to vaguely understand what kind of place this was.
重明\n「……えっと……ちなみに桔梗ちゃんも、あのステージに立って調教されたりす: Shigeaki: “...Um... by the way, do you stand on that stage and get trained too, Kikyou-chan?”

桔梗\n「そうですよ、膜もありますし……疑うようでしたら直接見ますか？」: Kikyou: “I am, yes. I have my membrane... and if you doubt me, would you like to see for yourself?”

桔梗が立ち上がりロングスカートに手をかけようとした所で、俺は慌てて彼女の手を掴み: Just as Kikyou stood up and reached for her long skirt, I hurriedly grabbed her hand and stopped her.

桔梗\n「見たいのに、いいんですか？」: Kikyou: “Even though you want to see, are you sure?”
重明\n「……あ、ああ……何かここで見たら流れで桔梗ちゃんとＨしちゃいそうだから: Shigeaki: “...A-ah... yeah... because I feel like if I see it here, I'll end up having sex with you, Kikyou-chan, just from the mood... so maybe some other time.”
こんな過激な流れでも、表情一つ変えてこない……どうやら桔梗は、性的な事に対しかな: Even with such an extreme flow, she didn't change her expression once... apparently Kikyou has a very liberal attitude toward sexual matters.

重明\n「いやいや、確かに見てみたいけど……外は吹雪なんだぜ？」: Shigeaki: “No, no, I'd like to see it, but... look at the blizzard outside.”
重明\n「そうですねって……この天候じゃ客もステージに立つ人間も、この宿に来れな: Shigeaki: “What do you mean 'that is true'... in this weather, neither the guests nor the performers could even get to this inn.”

重明\n「じゃあ……観客は昨日の泊まり客として……ステージに立つ人も、もう来てい: Shigeaki: “Then... the audience are yesterday's staying guests... and the performer is already here too?”
桔梗\n「はい……昨日の昼過ぎに来て、夜から今朝まで入念な準備をされていたようで: Kikyou: “Yes... she arrived yesterday afternoon, and it seems she was undergoing thorough preparations from last night until this morning.”

桔梗\n「……身体を売る女の人の誰もが、楽にお金を稼ぐ為にやっている……重明さん: Kikyou: “...Do you truly believe, Shigeaki-san... that every woman who sells her body does so to make money easily?”
桔梗\n「……若い彼女達は他の選択肢があったのに……誰もが誰も、喜んで身体を売る: Kikyou: “...Are you saying that these young girls had other options... and each and every one of them chose the job of selling their bodies of their own free will?”
比較的裕福な家庭で今まで過ごしてきたとはいえ……俺だって借金が理由で仕方なく風俗: Even though I've lived in a relatively wealthy home... even I know that there are women who fall into the sex industry out of necessity because of debt.
そんな人達の事情を無視して【気楽にやっている】などと言えば……実際、そういう世界: If I said they were [doing it easily] while ignoring the circumstances of people like that... it's only natural that Kikyou, who actually works in that world, would be angry.
重明\n「……そうだな……嫌でも仕方なくやっている人も居る……ゴメン……我ながら: Shigeaki: “...You're right... there are people who do it because they have no choice, even if they hate it... I'm sorry... that was a very tactless thing for me to say.”
重明\n「……けど、桔梗ちゃんも真剣に怒るんだね……もっと何事もふわっとして争い: Shigeaki: “...But, you can actually get seriously angry, Kikyou-chan. I thought you were the type who was always soft about everything and hated conflict... so I was a bit surprised.”
桔梗\n「……間接的とはいえ、仕事仲間や母の境遇を馬鹿にされるような発言をされれ: Kikyou: “...Even if it is indirect, if someone makes remarks that mock the circumstances of my mother or my colleagues... I will get truly angry.”
桔梗\n「はい、私の母も親によってお金持ちの家に売られました」: Kikyou: “Yes. My mother was also sold to a wealthy home by her parents.”
この地下室に来てから、余りに色々と衝撃的な事を聞かされ過ぎた結果……情報を処理し: Since coming to this basement, I've been told too many shocking things... as a result, I'm unable to process the info, and my head feels like it's on the verge of overheating.
……これは一度、話題を切って……物事を整理する時間が必要かもしれない。: ...I might need to cut the topic for a moment... and take some time to organize things.
重明\n「取り合えず、表の客……つまりくす葉のように売られたわけじゃない俺や華穂: Shigeaki: “For now, can I assume that public guests... like me and Kaho, who weren't sold like Kusuha... don't have to worry about being targeted by the members, who are the hidden guests?”
桔梗\n「当然です、会員は皆さん立場のある方々ですから……そんな事をして、ここや: Kikyou: “Of course. The members are all people of standing... if they were to do something like that and have their actions here or elsewhere exposed to the public and end up in a police matter, it would be they who are troubled.”
桔梗\n「この白花荘は、そういうルールを守れる方達の遊び場なので……重明さんが考: Kikyou: “This Shirohana-sou is a playground for those who can follow such rules... so I believe the concerns you are having are basically non-existent.”
重明\n「怪しい薬で前後不覚になり、無関係な人間に傍若無人な振る舞いをするような: Shigeaki: “There are no bastards who get high on some weird drug and behave arrogantly toward unrelated people?”
桔梗\n「身体を壊す薬なんて将来を考えられない人間がする遊びですから、売りはして: Kikyou: “Drugs that destroy the body are a game for those who cannot think about the future. While some may sell them, there are almost none who use them themselves.”
重明\n「じゃあ……誰にも気付かれないよう、こっそり寝てる無関係な客を襲う下種野: Shigeaki: “Then... what about some low-life who secretly attacks a guest while they're sleeping so no one notices?”
桔梗\n「…………誰にも気付かれないのなら、私が知るわけないじゃないですか」: Kikyou: “............If no one notices, how would I know?”
桔梗\n「鍵を盗むかピッキングして部屋に侵入して、寝ている重明さんに気付かれず華: Kikyou: “If there were someone who stole a key or picked a lock to break into a room and attacked or took Kaho-san away without you noticing while you were sleeping, Shigeaki-san...”
桔梗\n「そんな忍者みたいな相手、私には対処不能です……もはや諦めてください」: Kikyou: “I would be unable to deal with an opponent who was like a ninja... you would just have to give up.”
重明\n「……だよね……けどさ、ＡＶとかにはある展開だけど実際出来るのかな？」: Shigeaki: “...Right... but, that's a common plot in AVs, is it actually possible?”
桔梗\n「……医者だとか薬品に精通してて、寝ている相手に麻酔を打つとか……」: Kikyou: “...If they were a doctor or well-versed in medicine and gave someone an anesthetic while they were sleeping...”
重明\n「俺に麻酔を打っておいて【彼氏の命を守りたければ……分かるよな？】とかい: Shigeaki: “Giving me an anesthetic and then saying, [If you want to protect your boyfriend's life... you know what to do, right?] and then keeping her for a night and silencing her?”
桔梗\n「たとえ話だとしても、自分の恋人相手によくそんな酷い事を考えますね」: Kikyou: “Even if it is a hypothetical, you certainly think of terrible things to happen to your own girlfriend.”
重明\n「けどもしそんな事があれば、必ず態度に出るだろうからバレちゃうよな……じ: Shigeaki: “But if something like that happened, it would surely show in her attitude so it would be found out... what if both of us were given an anesthetic and had lewd things done to us while unconscious?”
桔梗\n「そんな事はありえないとは思いますが……仮にもしここの信用に泥を塗るよう: Kikyou: “I do not think such a thing is possible, but... if by any chance a member were to commit such a lawless act that dragged this place's credit through the mud, and it were discovered...”
桔梗\n「重明さんと華穂さんに誠意を持って謝罪した後、その方には無法には無法とい: Kikyou: “After apologizing sincerely to you and Kaho-san, we would meet lawlessness with lawlessness and take all of that person's assets, and then use that money to have some scary people from overseas dispose of them.”
重明\n「何か今、凄いあっさりと怖いこといったね……」: Shigeaki: “You just said something really scary in a very casual way...”
桔梗\n「それが嫌なら余所でやってくれという感じですね……そもそもお金を払って淫: Kikyou: “If they dislike that, they should do it elsewhere... in the first place, I cannot understand why someone who has paid money to come here and do lewd things would try to lay a hand on something else.”
重明\n「遊園地に来てスマホでゲーム始めるようなものか？」: Shigeaki: “Like going to an amusement park and starting a game on your smartphone?”
桔梗\n「いえ、寿司屋に来てハンバーガーを食べるようなものですね」: Kikyou: “No, it is like going to a sushi restaurant and eating a hamburger.”
重明\n「……それは理解不能というより、ただただ失礼なやつだな……」: Shigeaki: “...That's not so much incomprehensible as it is just plain disrespectful...”
桔梗\n「まぁここの会員には、そんな頭の悪い方は居ないと思うので……重明さんのさ: Kikyou: “Well, I do not believe there are any such stupid people among the members here... so I think you can rest assured that the concerns you are having are most likely unnecessary.”
仮に桔梗の言う事が嘘で、実際には見境ない野郎が居たとしたら、当然華穂ほどの上玉を: If Kikyou were lying and there actually was some indiscriminate bastard, there's no way they'd leave a prize like Kaho alone.
俺達の予定は１泊２日……つまり手を出す気なら、昨日の夜のうちに手を出している事に: Our plan is for one night and two days... in other words, if they were going to make a move, they would have done it last night.
そして先程考えたように、気付かぬ内に手を出されていたら完全にアウト……: And just as I thought earlier, if they'd made a move without us noticing, it's game over...
だが、仮にそんな事が起きていたとしても、それはもう既に過去の話……今の俺にはどう: But even if something like that had happened, it's already in the past... there's likely nothing I can do about it now.
重明\n「……わかった、取り合えず今は大丈夫という桔梗ちゃんの言う事を信じるよ」: Shigeaki: “...Understood. For now I'll believe you when you say things are okay, Kikyou-chan.”
重明\n「よし……じゃあ雑談はこの辺にして、ステージ裏にあるっていう暖房器具を探: Shigeaki: “Alright... let's put the small talk aside and look for that heater that's supposed to be behind the stage.”
とりあえず目的の場所であるステージ裏とやらは桔梗に任せ……俺は部屋を適当に眺め、: For now, I'll leave the intended spot behind the stage to Kikyou... and I'll just look around the room and organize the info I've gained here.
この宿がヤバイ場所なのは間違いないが、働く桔梗は根っからの悪人という感じはしない: This inn is definitely a dangerous place, but Kikyou, who works here, doesn't feel like a bad person at heart...
それにどの道、吹雪で宿から出れないのだ……今は無闇に華穂の身を心配する必要はない: And anyway, we can't leave the inn because of the blizzard... there's no need to worry about Kaho's safety pointlessly right now.
重明\n（……しかし……桔梗ちゃんって、一体何者なんだろう……）: Shigeaki: (...But... who on earth is Kikyou-chan...)
母親である藤子は金持ちに売られ、その母と共に淫らな山の中の宿を経営する謎の娘、桔: The daughter of Touko, who was sold to a rich man... a mysterious girl who helps her mother run a lewd inn in the mountains...
そんな悲惨な環境で生きているというのに……品のある外見や落ち着いた言動を見る限り: And yet, despite living in such a tragic environment... judging from her refined appearance and calm speech, she has an air like a lady from some high-ranking family.
重明\n（……本当に謎だ……華穂とはまた違ったベクトルで、浮世離れしてるよな……: Shigeaki: (...She really is a mystery... she's otherworldly in a different way from Kaho... this girl...)
そんな謎の美少女桔梗の事を、自分なりに理解しようとしていると……ふと頭の片隅に、: While I was trying to understand the mysterious beauty Kikyou in my own way... the face of another man who was just as hard to read—Naoto—flashed through my mind.
重明\n（……華穂の元担任って言ってたけど……桔梗ちゃんの事、よく知ってるみたい: Shigeaki: (He said he was Kaho's former teacher... but he seems to know Kikyou-chan well... is he a hidden guest at this inn too?)
だが、もし淫らな事をしに来た客だというなら……何故あの男は俺に、桔梗と仲良くしろ: But if he's a guest who came to do lewd things... why would that man tell me to get close to Kikyou and things like that... which made zero sense?
重明\n（……仲良くなって、この非常識な世界から彼女を救い出せってか？ ……いや: Shigeaki: (To get close and save her from this abnormal world? ...No, no, a socialite like him would be more suited for that than a student like me...)
そんな事を１人考えていた所……ステージの奥に行っていた桔梗が、四角いストーブを持: While I was thinking that to myself... Kikyou, who had gone to the back of the stage, approached me carrying a square stove.
桔梗\n「ありました……小さいので７畳ぐらいしか温まらないヤツですけど」: Kikyou: “Found it... it's a small one that can only heat about seven mats, though.”
重明\n「確かに小さいけど、形はいかにもって感じのストーブじゃないか……十分十分: Shigeaki: “It's definitely small, but it looks exactly like a stove should... it's enough, it's enough.”
桔梗\n「このままタンクに石油を入れて運ぶと重いので……本体とタンクは別々に運ぶ: Kikyou: “It will be heavy if we put kerosene in the tank and carry it as is... so I would like you to help me carry the main unit and the tank separately... would that be alright?”
重明\n「おう、もちろん……じゃあ重くて持ち難そうな本体の方を俺が持つよ」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, of course... I'll take the main unit, since it's heavy and looks hard to hold.”
地下室から地上へ戻ると……俺はタンクに燃料を入れに行った桔梗を待つため、空の石油: Returning from the basement to the ground level... I was standing alone in the common room with the empty kerosene stove, waiting for Kikyou who had gone to put fuel in the tank.
重明\n（……しかし……ただのイチャラブ旅行のはずが、何だこの非常識な状況は……: Shigeaki: (...But man... what is this abnormal situation for what was supposed to be a simple lovey-dovey trip...)
３月だというのに、外はアホみたいな吹雪でペンションから出る事が出来ない。: It's March, yet we can't leave the pension because of a crazy blizzard.
……そしてその閉じ込められた場所の裏の顔は、会員制の淫らな施設。: ...And the hidden face of the place we're trapped in is a members-only lewd facility.
重明\n（まぁ普段何気なく利用してた場所が、実は怪しい奴等の溜まり場だった……な: Shigeaki: (Well, it's not exactly rare to find that a place you use casually is actually a hangout for shady people... it's just a matter of bad luck, I guess)
そう……ただ施設がいやらしい場所というだけで、俺も華穂も特に被害は受けていない。: Right... just because the facility is lewd, doesn't mean Kaho or I have suffered any harm.
問題があるとしたら、天候不順で宿から出れないだけなのだ。: The only problem is that we can't leave the inn because of the bad weather.
重明\n（まぁだとしても……大切な恋人と一緒にいる所としては、あまりいい気分の場: Shigeaki: (Even so... it's not a place that leaves you feeling great as somewhere to be with your precious girlfriend... this place)
事情を知った途端、今まで何の気兼ねもなく利用していたこの談話室ですら……気の抜け: As soon as I learned the circumstances, even this common room that I'd been using without any hesitation... felt like an alien space where I couldn't let my guard down.
一人そんな事を悶々と考えていると……用事を済ませた待ち人がこちらへと近づいてきた: While I was brooding over such things, the person I was waiting for approached.
……事実を知りペンションへの印象は大きく変わったものの……: ...Although my impression of the pension had changed significantly once I learned the facts...
桔梗に対しての印象は、正直あまり変わっていないような気がする。: my impression of Kikyou didn't really seem to have changed much, to be honest.
重明\n（……そもそも、彼女はここの従業員であって……別に好き好んでくす葉に酷い: Shigeaki: (...In the first place, she's an employee here... it's not like she's a villain who's doing terrible things to Kusuha because she likes it...)
そしてこの施設も、桔梗の話を信じるなら売られた女を扱うだけ……決して外から拉致し: And this facility, if I believe Kikyou's story, only handles women who were sold... they definitely don't kidnap people from outside or deceive and attack guests.
つまり俺にとって、桔梗が淫らな宿で働く従業員という事実は……彼女の評価を変えるほ: In other words, to me, the fact that Kikyou was an employee at a lewd inn... wasn't something that changed my evaluation of her.
重明\n（……まぁどっちかと言うと……俺がまだこの浮世離れした女の子……桔梗ちゃ: Shigeaki: (...Well, if anything... it's more that I just didn't know this otherworldly girl... Kikyou-chan... that well yet)
華穂の身を心配する必要はない……桔梗の方も、不必要に警戒したり、彼女の境遇をあれ: There's no need to worry about Kaho's safety... and for Kikyou too, it seems unnecessary to be pointlessly guarded or worry about her circumstances too much.
そうなると……今、俺が一番気になるのは……やはりくす葉の境遇という事になる。: If that's the case... then what I'm most curious about now... is naturally Kusuha's situation.
もしかしたら今も、ここの客達の手によって、酷い目に遭っているのかもしれない。: Maybe she's being subjected to terrible things by the guests here even now.
彼女の全てを把握しているわけではないが、男慣れをしている印象はなかった……恐らく: I don't know everything about her, but she didn't give me the impression of being used to men... she likely has zero experience with men.
重明\n（……昨日の感じだと、親に売られた事を知ってたってわけじゃなさそうだし…: Shigeaki: (...From how she was yesterday, it didn't seem like she knew she'd been sold by her parents... Kikyou-chan said it was consensual, but... I bet it wasn't... a happy agreement...)
だが確か法律上は、財産を相続していなければ親の借金を子が払う義務はなかったのでは: But I recall that legally, a child has no obligation to pay a parent's debt unless they inherit assets?
その辺の細かい部分は、正直よくはわからないのだが……勉強が出来る華穂なら、専門家: I don't know the specifics of that part, to be honest... but Kaho, being smart, might know a bit more, even if she's not a specialist.
重明\n（……まぁ仮に華穂が知っていたとしても……外は吹雪で助けも呼べず逃げれも: Shigeaki: (...Well, even if Kaho did know... we can't call for help or escape because of the blizzard... right now we're pretty much at a dead end anyway...)
親に身売りされた可哀想なくす葉……: The poor Kusuha, sold by her parents...
助けてやりたい……そう思う反面、薄情だが身内の借金なら仕方がないという気持ちもな: I want to help her... but on the other hand, it's heartless but I can't help but feel that if it's a relative's debt, there's nothing for it.
そもそも……くす葉は親に売られ、ここの客に金で買われたのだ。: In the first place... Kusuha was sold by her parents and bought by the guests here with money.
身内でも恋人ですらないのに……可哀想だからというだけで、他人の俺が介入していい問: I'm not a relative or even her boyfriend... it's clear as day that it's not a problem that I, a stranger, should interfere with just because I feel bad for her.
仮にとにかく気に入らないからと、ここで俺が暴れたとしても……それでくす葉の家の借: Even if I went wild here just because I didn't like it... it wouldn't wipe out Kusuha's family debt.
重明\n（少なくとも一応は両者合意の上、行われている事らしいからな……そこへ俺が: Shigeaki: (At the very least, it's apparently being done with the consent of both parties... if I were to interfere, I might end up causing even more trouble for Kusuha and her family...)
それに桔梗は同意したと言っていた……: And Kikyou had said she consented...
もしそれが本当なら……くす葉は自分を売った親を見捨てず、身を切って借金を返す選択: If that's true... then Kusuha didn't abandon the parents who sold her, and chose to pay off the debt by sacrificing herself.
重明\n（……自分を売る親なんて、さっさと見限って……誰かに助けを求めりゃあいい: Shigeaki: (...She should've just given up on parents who would sell her... and asked someone for help... she's such an idiot...)
だとしても……俺はくす葉と知り合い、彼女の事情を知ってしまった。: Even so... I've met Kusuha and learned about her circumstances.
自分達の安全が何より第一とはいえ、何もせず初めから諦めるというのは……俺の性分で: Even though our own safety is the number one priority, giving up from the start without doing anything... isn't in my nature.
重明\n（……さてと……どうすっかな……）: Shigeaki: (...Now then... what should I do...)
出来ればくす葉の件で、華穂を深く巻き込みたくない。: If possible, I don't want to involve Kaho deeply in Kusuha's matter.
そして俺一人で出来る事があるとしたら……恐らく暴れて皆に迷惑をかけるぐらいだろう: And if there's anything I can do alone... it would likely just be going wild and causing trouble for everyone.
重明\n（暴れるのはリスクが高いから無しとして……そうなるとまぁ……第三者に協力: Shigeaki: (Going wild is high risk so that's out... in that case, well... I'd have to ask for help from a third party...)
被害者がくす葉で出来れば華穂を巻き込みたくない以上……俺の相談に乗ってくれそうな: Since the victim is Kusuha and I want to avoid involving Kaho if possible... the only person I can think of who might be able to help me is Kikyou, who's by my side now.
重明\n（ここの関係者だし、協力してくれれば心強いのは間違いない……まぁそもそも: Shigeaki: (She's involved here, so if she helped it would definitely be a boost... well, whether she'd actually help... is a tough call...)
何かをするにしても、もう少し色々と詳しい話を聞いておきたい。: Whatever I do, I'd like to hear more detailed info.
それにこれ以上１人であれこれ考えるより、相手が居た方が刺激になり妙案が浮かぶかも: And instead of thinking about all sorts of things alone, having someone to talk to might provide a stimulus and lead to a good idea.
重明\n（……よし、部屋にストーブを設置したら……桔梗ちゃんとちょっくら話をして: Shigeaki: (...Alright, once I've set up the stove in the room... I'll have a little talk with Kikyou-chan...)
……まだ３０分程度しか経過していないのに、何だか久しぶりにこの部屋に戻ってきたよ: ...It's only been about 30 minutes, but it feels like it's been a long time since I've returned to this room.
色々な事があり緊張していたのか、気が緩みホッとする中……俺はストーブを床に置き恋: Perhaps because I was tense after all that had happened, I felt a sense of relief as my tension eased... I placed the stove on the floor and approached my girlfriend.
地下室で心が荒む話を聞いた後という事もあり……美しく可愛い華穂の寝顔を見ているだ: Having heard that heart-wrenching story in the basement... just looking at Kaho's beautiful and cute sleeping face was healing to my soul.
重明\n（……具合は悪そうだけど、熱はないし顔色もそうでもない……これなら特にこ: Shigeaki: (...She looks unwell, but she doesn't have a fever and her complexion isn't that bad either... it looks like I don't need to panic.)
一通り華穂の様子を眺めると、俺は石油が詰まったタンクをストーブに差し込んでいた桔: After checking on Kaho, I joined Kikyou, who was inserting the kerosene-filled tank into the stove.
重明\n「……これだけ苦労して探して、いざ点火しようとしたら点きませんでした……: Shigeaki: “...After all that trouble finding it, if it didn't light when we tried... I'd be pretty depressed.”
桔梗\n「機械式のファンヒーターと違って構造的には単純なアルコールランプと大差な: Kikyou: “Unlike a mechanical fan heater, its structure is not much different from a simple alcohol lamp, so as long as the flame catches it should be fine... I brought matches just in case.”
こちらに相槌を打ちつつ、テキパキと準備を済ませた桔梗は……ストーブの下部にあるオ: Giving her acknowledgement as she spoke, Kikyou finished the preparations efficiently... and firmly pushed the orange ignition button at the bottom of the stove.
赤く光りだしたストーブを眺めていると……じんわりとした柔らかな暖かさが身体に伝わ: Staring at the stove as it began to glow red... a gentle, steady warmth began to transfer to my body.
重明\n「……とりあえず問題なく動く事も確認出来たし……まだそんなに寒くないから: Shigeaki: “...For now, I've confirmed that it works without any problems... and it's not that cold yet, so let's turn it off for now.”
桔梗\n「わかりました、では消しますね」: Kikyou: “Understood, I will turn it off then.”
点火ボタンの隣にある消火ボタンを桔梗が押すと、ストーブの火が徐々に消えていく。: When Kikyou pressed the extinction button next to the ignition button, the flame of the stove gradually went out.
……これでもし雪の影響で宿が停電になっても……しばらく寒さを凌ぐ事が出来るだろう: ...With this, if the inn has a blackout because of the snow... we'll be able to withstand the cold for a while.
