桔梗\n「全員おかしい自覚があるから、大金で女性の人生を買い……こんな山奥で人知: Kikyou: “Isn't it because they are all aware they are broken that they buy a woman's life with a massive sum of money and violate them in secret deep in the mountains?”
重明\n「だからって許されるのか？ ……同じ女として……桔梗ちゃんは気分悪くない: Shigeaki: “Does that make it excusable? ...As a woman yourself... don't you feel sick, Kikyou-chan?”
桔梗\n「当然いい気はしません……ですが、これはあくまで一方的ではなく商売ですか: Kikyou: “Naturally I do not feel good about it... but this is not one-sided, it is a business after all.”
桔梗\n「それにある意味、大金を払ってでも女性への乱暴を働きたい危険人物を宿に閉: Kikyou: “And in a way, the fact that dangerous individuals who want to commit violence against women even if they have to pay a massive sum are locked away in this inn... might be considered a contribution to society, in a sense.”
重明\n「……必要悪ってか？ ……けどいくら何でも酷すぎるだろ……何かこう……上: Shigeaki: “...A necessary evil, huh? ...But no matter how you look at it, it’s too much... Isn't there some kind of... clever way to save Kusuha?”
桔梗\n「先程言った通り、もうくす葉さんは会員の方々の所有物……この宿のスタンス: Kikyou: “As I said before, Kusuha-san is already the property of the members... As for this inn's stance, it is merely a receptacle for the play.”
桔梗\n「父がここを纏めていた時代は、売られた女生徒へ深刻なダメージを与えるよう: Kikyou: “Back when my father was managing this place, play that caused serious damage to the sold female students was prohibited... so things like that did not happen.”
桔梗\n「今はそういった事を抑制する人が居ませんし……そもそも今と寮だった頃とは: Kikyou: “Now there is no one to restrain such things... and in the first place, the situation now is vastly different from back when it was a dormitory.”
重明\n「……そこを何とか……昔の女子寮みたいに、売られた女の子を守る感じでやれ: Shigeaki: “...Can't you do something about that... like how it used to be, protecting the sold girls like the old dormitory did?”
桔梗\n「私はただお金持ちの祖父を持つ娘でしかないので無理です」: Kikyou: “I am merely a daughter who happens to have a wealthy grandfather, so it is impossible.”
重明\n「ならそのお爺さんに頼むとか」: Shigeaki: “Then how about asking that grandfather?”
桔梗\n「お爺様は元々父のやり方を好いていませんでした」: Kikyou: “My grandfather did not like my father’s methods to begin with.”
桔梗\n「それに……私の言う事でご自分の仕事の方針を変えるような方ではないので、: Kikyou: “And... he is not the kind of person to change his business policy based on what I say, so I believe it is out of the question.”
重明\n「……ならいっそ、こっそり警察に垂れ込んでしまうとかはどうかな？」: Shigeaki: “...Then what if I secretly tipped off the police?”
桔梗\n「垂れ込んだ場合、恐らく違約金でくす葉さんの借金が増えますね」: Kikyou: “If you tipped them off, Kusuha-san's debt would likely increase due to breach of contract penalties.”
重明\n「……俺が警察に垂れ込んだのに……くす葉の借金が増えるのか？ ……それっ: Shigeaki: “...Wait, I tip off the police and Kusuha’s debt increases? ...Isn't that strange?”
桔梗\n「文句なら、そもそも怪しい相手にお金を借りたくす葉さんのご両親に言ってく: Kikyou: “If you have a complaint, tell Kusuha-san's parents who borrowed money from a shady source to begin with... as for our side, we only lent and borrowed money, after all.”
桔梗\n「それにあまりに勝手が過ぎると、やぶ蛇になると……友達として忠告しておき: Kikyou: “And if you take things too far, you will stir up a hornet's nest... I am warning you as a friend.”
重明\n「たとえ現状に納得出来なくても……やばい連中に手を出せば、その手が火傷す: Shigeaki: “Even if I’m not satisfied with the situation... if I lay a hand on those dangerous people, my hand will get burned?”
桔梗\n「火傷どころか炭化するかもしれませんね」: Kikyou: “Not just burned, it might be carbonized.”
桔梗\n「もしくは……重明さんではなく、家族や恋人の華穂さんが変わりに火傷する事: Kikyou: “Or... instead of Shigeaki-san, your family or your girlfriend Kaho-san might be the ones to get burned instead.”
重明\n「……む、むぅ……もしかして……桔梗ちゃんのお爺さんって……やく●屋さん: Shigeaki: “...Ugh... By any chance... is your grandfather... a yakuza?”
桔梗\n「一応違いますが……多方面に近い関係があるのは確かですね」: Kikyou: “Technically no... but it is true he has close ties in many directions.”
重明\n「……むうぅ……確かにそれは……あまり軽率な事をするのは、やめておいた方: Shigeaki: “...Muuu... Certainly, it would be better... to avoid doing anything rash, it seems...”
桔梗\n「ある意味短期間で高額を得る仕事なわけですから……人体実験のバイトのよう: Kikyou: “In a sense it is a job that pays a high amount in a short period... so please give up and accept that Kusuha-san must shoulder the risk like a part-time job for human experimentation.”
重明\n「……むむ……けどさ……そもそも何でこんなよそ様に知られちゃいけない事を: Shigeaki: “...M-Mm... but wait... why on earth is a facility doing things that shouldn't be known by others... open to ordinary people like us?”
桔梗\n「それはもちろん、ここに人を入れるためですよ」: Kikyou: “That is of course to bring people in.”
重明\n「……へ？ 表に出せないような事をしているのに？」: Shigeaki: “...Eh? Even though you’re doing things that can't be made public?”
桔梗\n「はい……お爺様がここで死んだ父が寂しくないようにする……それがそもそも: Kikyou: “Yes... my grandfather making sure my father who died here isn't lonely... that was the reason this pension was born to begin with.”
重明\n「……ああ、なるほど……この建物自体が桔梗ちゃんのお父さんのお墓なのか…: Shigeaki: “...Ah, I see... so this building itself is your father’s grave, Kikyou-chan...”
現代版のピラミッドや古墳だとでもいいたいのだろうか？: Is she trying to say it’s a modern-day pyramid or ancient tomb?
身内の桔梗ちゃんには悪いが……確かにそういうのは、頭のおかしい大金持ちが考えそう: I feel bad for his relative Kikyou... but certainly that sounds like something an insane multi-millionaire would think of.
桔梗\n「ちなみに実際遺体も保管されているらしいですよ」: Kikyou: “By the way, apparently the corpse is actually being preserved here as well.”
桔梗\n「見たいですか？」: Kikyou: “Do you want to see it?”
重明\n「人の遺体なんてわざわざ見たくないよ！」: Shigeaki: “I don't want to go out of my way to see a corpse!”
桔梗\n「とまぁ……そういった理由で一般解放してはいるものの、実際沢山来られても: Kikyou: “And so... while we have opened it to the general public for that reason, we would actually be troubled if too many people came, so we only put information on our website...”
桔梗\n「何故か……年々表の客が増えてきて……少し困っていたりします」: Kikyou: “For some reason... the number of public guests has been increasing year by year... and it has become a bit of a problem.”
重明\n「いやいや、美人親子がやってて若い従業員はメイド服だろ？ ……そりゃ客も: Shigeaki: “Wait, no, it’s run by a beautiful mother and daughter and the young employee is in a maid outfit, right? ...Of course the guests will increase.”
桔梗\n「家ではずっと着物を着ていたので、ここでは洋服にしてみたんですが……まさ: Kikyou: “I had always worn a kimono at home, so I tried wearing western clothes here... I did not expect it to backfire like this... it was a blunder.”
重明\n「……そのメイド服って、桔梗ちゃんの趣味だったの？」: Shigeaki: “...Was that maid outfit your hobby, Kikyou-chan?”
桔梗\n「そうですよ……メイド服、可愛いと思いませんか？」: Kikyou: “It was, yes... don't you think maid outfits are cute?”
重明\n「……確かに可愛い……似合ってるよ」: Shigeaki: “...They’re definitely cute... it suits you.”
桔梗\n「ありがとうございます……実は結構気に入ってるんです」: Kikyou: “Thank you very much... I actually quite like it.”
重明\n「けど俺としては……メイド服より、桔梗ちゃん自身の方が凄い可愛いと思うし: Shigeaki: “But for me... rather than the maid outfit, I think you yourself are incredibly cute and I like you quite a bit.”
重明\n「よし、じゃあ桔梗ちゃん……スリーサイズ教えてよ」: Shigeaki: “Alright, then Kikyou-chan... tell me your three sizes.”
桔梗\n「身長１５５、上から８６・５４・８８のＦカップ……体重は多分４８キロです: Kikyou: “Height 155cm, from the top 86, 54, 88, F-cup... weight is probably around 48kg.”
重明\n「……華穂より１０ｃｍ低いのか……桔梗ちゃんって胸もあるし細いからもっと: Shigeaki: “...You're 10cm shorter than Kaho... I thought you were taller since you have a chest and you're thin, but... you’re quite petite, aren't you.”
ちなみに身長だけではなく、胸も華穂の方が１０ｃｍ大きく、その上ウエストは２ｃｍ細: By the way, not just height, but Kaho's chest was 10cm larger, and on top of that her waist was 2cm thinner.
重明\n（……いや、俺の彼女……ほんとマジで凄いスタイルしてるよなぁ……ふふ～ん: Shigeaki: (...No, my girlfriend... really has an amazing figure, doesn't she... fufu-n♪)
桔梗\n「……どうして今の話の流れで、重明さんはドヤ顔をしているんですか？」: Kikyou: “...Why do you have such a smug face during this conversation, Shigeaki-san?”
重明\n「この宿ってさ……会員限定で、金持ちのオッサンが女の子にエロい事をする施: Shigeaki: “This inn... it’s a members-only facility where rich old guys do erotic things to girls, right?”
重明\n「イメクラとかならまだしも、調教とかハードな事もしちゃう職場なのに……桔: Shigeaki: “Even if it were an image club or something it’d be one thing, but this is a workplace where they do hard stuff like training... how on earth are you still a virgin, Kikyou-chan?”
桔梗\n「客に手を出されない理由ですか？」: Kikyou: “The reason the guests do not lay a hand on me?”
桔梗\n「そもそも私は売られて来たわけではないので……この宿のオーナーのお爺様は: Kikyou: “In the first place I was not sold here... the grandfather who is the owner of this inn is my biological grandfather by blood.”
重明\n「……藤子さんを買った爺さんの息子の子供って事？」: Shigeaki: “...You mean you’re the child of the son of the old man who bought Touko-san?”
重明\n「……もしかして……桔梗ちゃんって、実は凄い金持ちの娘なの？」: Shigeaki: “...Is it possible... you're actually the daughter of an incredibly wealthy family, Kikyou-chan?”
桔梗\n「この一帯の山とか、全部お爺様の所有物ですし」: Kikyou: “This whole mountain area and everything is all my grandfather's property.”
重明\n「や、山ぁ！？ ……ビルとかじゃなくて？」: Shigeaki: “Th-the mountain!? ...Not like a building or something?”
桔梗\n「ビルも覚えられないぐらいありますよ」: Kikyou: “He owns more buildings than I can remember as well.”
重明\n「……は、はあ……なら何でそんな大金持ちのお嬢様が……客とは言えオッサン: Shigeaki: “...I-I see... then why is a daughter of such a wealthy family... stroking some old guy's cock even if he is a guest?”
桔梗\n「働いている以上……自分だけ汚れ仕事をしないというのはお客様に失礼ですし: Kikyou: “As long as I am working... it would be disrespectful to the guests if I alone avoided the dirty work, and it would not set a good example for the employees.”
重明\n「……そのプロ意識自体は悪くはないんだろうけど……立場的には、現場仕事は: Shigeaki: “...That professionalism itself isn't bad, I guess... but given your position, wouldn't it be better to leave the field work to others and do something else, Kikyou-chan?”
桔梗\n「実際重明さんの言う通りですし、いずれはそうなるでしょうが……母の傍に居: Kikyou: “What you say is true, Shigeaki-san, and eventually it will be so, but... I chose the field because I wanted to be by my mother’s side.”
重明\n「あぁ、なるほど……桔梗ちゃんはお母さんの傍に居たいから、この宿で働いて: Shigeaki: “Ah, I see... you're working at this inn because you want to be near your mother, Kikyou-chan.”
桔梗\n「ちなみに話は戻りますが、別に私は自分が生娘である事に特に拘りはありませ: Kikyou: “Anyway, returning to the previous topic, I do not have any particular attachment to being a virgin.”
重明\n「ならお客さんにしようって言われたりしたら……やっちゃうわけ？」: Shigeaki: “Then if a guest asked to do it... you would?”
桔梗\n「言われた事は何度かありますが、今まで全部断ってきました」: Kikyou: “I have been asked several times, but I have refused them all so far.”
桔梗\n「扱く程度ならまだしも……流石に自分の父より年上の男と性行為をしたくない: Kikyou: “Stroking them is one thing... but I do not particularly want to have sex with a man older than my own father.”
重明\n「ヤルのが凄い嫌なら、いっそ本番以外の事もしなきゃいいのに……桔梗ちゃん: Shigeaki: “If you hate doing it that much, you might as well not do anything besides the main event either... given your position, Kikyou-chan, no one would complain.”
桔梗\n「それはそれ、これはこれ……私はあくまで、この宿のスタッフですから」: Kikyou: “That is one thing, and this is another... I am a member of the staff of this inn, after all.”
重明\n「……桔梗ちゃんって……仕事に対して凄い真面目なんだね……」: Shigeaki: “...You’re really serious about your work, aren't you, Kikyou-chan...”
重明\n「桔梗ちゃん、友達になったしメアド教えてよ」: Shigeaki: “Kikyou-chan, we’re friends now, so tell me your email address.”
桔梗\n「私、自分の携帯持ってません」: Kikyou: “I do not have my own cell phone.”
重明\n「え？ マジ！？ そんな人いるの！？」: Shigeaki: “Eh? Seriously!? There are people like that!?”
桔梗\n「ここに居ます……ちなみに仕事用の携帯のアドレスならありますけど」: Kikyou: “I am right here... for what it’s worth, I have an address for the work phone.”
重明\n「いやいや！ 自分のを買いなさい！ 今後俺と頻繁に連絡を取り合う為にも、: Shigeaki: “No, no! Buy your own! To keep in frequent contact with me from now on, buy one tomorrow or the day after!”
桔梗\n「……自分の携帯……必要ですかね？」: Kikyou: “...Is my own cell phone... really necessary?”
重明\n「必要！ ないと死ぬ！ 絶対にいる！！」: Shigeaki: “Necessary! I'll die without it! It’s absolute!!”
桔梗\n「……まぁ……そこまで強く言うのであれば……買う事にします」: Kikyou: “...Well... if you insist that strongly... I will buy one.”
桔梗\n「重明さんって……本当に変な人ですよね」: Kikyou: “Shigeaki-san... you really are a strange person.”
重明\n「ねぇ、今度俺とデートしようぜ？」: Shigeaki: “Hey, let's go on a date next time?”
桔梗\n「いいですよ、けどいいんですか？ 華穂さんが居るのに」: Kikyou: “That is fine, but are you sure? Even though you have Kaho-san.”
重明\n「デートぐらい問題ないよ……ちなみに桔梗ちゃんはドコへ行きたい？」: Shigeaki: “A date is no problem... by the way, where would you like to go, Kikyou-chan?”
重明\n（……ああ……これは二人でイチャイチャしたいとかじゃなく……ガチで夢の国: Shigeaki: (...Ah... so she doesn't want to be lovey-dovey, she just genuinely wants to go to the magical kingdom...)
重明\n「そこなら華穂と３人とかでもいいかな？」: Shigeaki: “Would it be okay to go with the three of us, including Kaho?”
重明\n「ＯＫＯＫ、近いうち絶対に行こう」: Shigeaki: “OK, OK, let's definitely go soon.”
桔梗\n「はい……凄い楽しみにしています」: Kikyou: “Yes... I am looking forward to it very much.”
重明\n「桔梗ちゃんってさ、どうしてこの宿で働いているの？」: Shigeaki: “Kikyou-chan, why on earth are you working at this inn?”
桔梗\n「……どういう意味でしょうか？」: Kikyou: “...What do you mean by that?”
重明\n「いやさ……ここって多額の借金を返済する為に、若い子が身体を金持ちのオッ: Shigeaki: “I mean... this is a place where young girls sell their bodies to rich old guys to pay off massive debts, right?”
桔梗\n「表向きは普通のペンションですが、裏は大体そんな感じです」: Kikyou: “On the surface it is a normal pension, but behind the scenes it is basically as you say.”
重明\n「こう言うのは悪いんだけど……これって底辺の仕事なわけじゃん」: Shigeaki: “It’s bad to say it like this... but it’s a bottom-of-the-barrel job.”
桔梗\n「はい、悪いも何も、紛うことなきド底辺です」: Kikyou: “Yes, bad or not, it is without a doubt rock bottom.”
重明\n「けどさ、桔梗ちゃんのお爺さんって……凄いお金持ちなんだよね？」: Shigeaki: “But your grandfather... he’s really rich, right?”
桔梗\n「そうですね……そして父が死んでしまった事で、私はお爺様の唯一の血縁者と: Kikyou: “He is... and since my father died, I am my grandfather's only living blood relative.”
重明\n「という事は特にお金に困っているわけじゃあないんだろうし……ここで風俗嬢: Shigeaki: “Which means you're not exactly troubled for money... so you don't really need to work like a sex worker here, do you?”
桔梗\n「確かにお金には困ってませんが……働いている以上、自分だけ汚れ仕事をしな: Kikyou: “It is true I am not troubled for money... but as long as I am working, it would be disrespectful to the guests if I alone avoided the dirty work, and it would not set a good example for the employees.”
重明\n「いや、その姿勢自体は悪くないんだろうけど……立場的には、現場は他の人に: Shigeaki: “No, the attitude itself isn't bad, I guess... but given your position, wouldn't it be better to leave the field to others and do something else, Kikyou-chan?”
重明\n「あぁ、なるほどか……桔梗ちゃんはお母さんの傍に居たいから、この宿にいる: Shigeaki: “Ah, so that’s why... you're at this inn because you want to be near your mother, Kikyou-chan.”
重明\n「処女の下りで少し聞いたけど……どうしてここで働く事にこだわってるの？: Shigeaki: “I heard a bit about it during the virginity talk... why are you so focused on working here? Are you that worried about your mother?”
桔梗\n「……重明さんは、私がここで働いている事が嫌なんですか？」: Kikyou: “...Shigeaki-san, do you dislike the fact that I am working here?”
重明\n「そりゃ……お金に困ってるわけでもないのに……友達の桔梗ちゃんが、オッサ: Shigeaki: “Well... even though you’re not troubled for money... it kind of sucks that my friend Kikyou-chan is having lewd things done to her by a bunch of old guys.”
桔梗\n「そうですか……まぁ先程も言いましたが、私はいずれは現場を離れる事になる: Kikyou: “I see... well, as I said before, I will eventually leave the field.”
重明\n「でもさ……別に藤子さんの介護が必要ってわけじゃないんだし……何も常に一: Shigeaki: “But still... it’s not like Touko-san needs nursing care... there’s no need to be together all the time, is there?”
桔梗\n「必要だったんですよ……半年ぐらい前まで、母の介護が」: Kikyou: “It was necessary... until about six months ago, I was nursing my mother.”
桔梗\n「私の父がここで死んだって言いましたよね……その時、一緒に私の姉も死んで: Kikyou: “I told you that my father died here... at that time, my older sister also died with him.”
重明\n「……桔梗ちゃんって……お姉さんが居たの？」: Shigeaki: “...You had an older sister, Kikyou-chan?”
桔梗\n「はい、撫子という姉が居ました」: Kikyou: “Yes, I had a sister named Nadeshiko.”
重明\n（撫子……あれ……その名前、どっかで聞いたような……）: Shigeaki: (Nadeshiko... wait... I've heard that name somewhere...)
桔梗\n「母は父や姉……それらを取り巻く日々に、とても幸せを感じていました」: Kikyou: “My mother felt very happy in the days surrounding my father and sister.”
桔梗\n「お爺様に売られる前の場所に比べ、ここは明るい未来に溢れている……私が小: Kikyou: “Compared to the place before she was sold to my grandfather, this place was full of a bright future... when I was little, she told me about the past and the present with such happiness.”
桔梗\n「その二人を同時に失い未来が消えた事で、母は壊れてしまったわけですね……: Kikyou: “When she lost them both at the same time and the future vanished, my mother broke... well, that is a story from long ago now.”
重明\n「……桔梗ちゃん……もしかしてその時、凄い仕事大変だった？」: Shigeaki: “...Kikyou-chan... was the work really tough for you back then?”
桔梗\n「はい、それはもう」: Kikyou: “It was, yes, very much so.”
桔梗\n「……客も私達も新しいルールに慣れてない事もあって、１年目の白花荘は混沌: Kikyou: “...The first year of Shirohana-sou was chaotic, partly because neither the guests nor we were used to the new rules... truly.”
重明\n「……そんな酷い状況で……何で壊れちゃった藤子さんを、入院させなかったの: Shigeaki: “...In such a terrible situation... why didn't you have Touko-san, who had broken down, hospitalized?”
桔梗\n「現場に居たのに父を救えなかった母にお爺様が激怒して……ここで魂を慰めろ: Kikyou: “My grandfather was furious with my mother for being at the scene and not being able to save my father... he ordered her to console the soul here.”
重明\n「……それを藤子さんも受け入れた……心配な桔梗ちゃんは、お母さんについて: Shigeaki: “...And Touko-san accepted that... and you followed your mother because you were worried, Kikyou-chan...”
桔梗\n「それでも徐々に父と姉の話題を出さなければ安定するようになって……今では: Kikyou: “Still, she gradually became stable as long as we did not bring up my father or sister... and by now she has recovered to the point where there is almost no problem.”
重明\n「そうか……それはまぁ……お疲れ様」: Shigeaki: “I see... well... good work on that.”
重明\n（……さてと、情報収集はこの辺にしておくとして……）: Shigeaki: (...Alright, enough information gathering for now...)
会話中ずっと湯船に浸けていた下半身を浴槽から上げると……俺は火照った身体を冷まし: Pulling my lower half out of the tub where it had been soaked throughout the conversation... I cooled my feverish body and organized the information I’d gained so far.
まず一番に考えるべきは、この淫らな施設における華穂の身の安全。: The first thing to consider was Kaho's safety in this lewd facility.
だがそれは、ここに来る前にした判断同様……無闇に警戒する必要はないだろう。: But just as I’d judged before coming here... there seemed to be no need to be pointlessly guarded.
理由はここの会員達が自分達の社会的地位を気にしているという事……そして桔梗の人柄: The reason was that the members here cared about their social status... and having interacted with Kikyou's personality, I felt I could trust her.
重明\n（まぁいくら信用していいからと言って……流石に俺や華穂の味方ってわけでは: Shigeaki: (Well, even if I can trust her... she’s obviously not exactly on me or Kaho's side...)
そうなると華穂同様……ここに来る前に上げたくす葉の件へどう関わっていくかという事: If that was the case, then just like Kaho... the issue I should be thinking about now was how to get involved in Kusuha’s case, which I’d brought up before coming here.
通常なら、ここはまずは被害者本人であるくす葉と話し合い、彼女の意思を尊重すべきな: Normally, I should talk to the victim herself, Kusuha, and respect her will.
……だがくす葉に話を持ちかけても、彼女の性格なら、まず間違いなく迷惑になるから関: ...But if I brought it up to Kusuha, given her personality, she would undoubtedly tell me not to get involved because it would be a nuisance.
もちろん一切関わらず、このまま見捨てるという選択肢もありなのだが……話を聞いた感: Of course, there was the option of not getting involved at all and abandoning her... but from what I’d heard, Kusuha would be subjected to terrible things that were beyond normal imagination.
重明\n（……やっぱり……何とかして少しは助けてやりたいよな……）: Shigeaki: (...As I thought... I want to help her at least a little...)
そのくす葉を助ける方法は、単純に借金を返すか……暴れまわるという強硬手段。: The way to help Kusuha was simply to pay off the debt... or use force and go wild.
当然俺は肩代わり出来るほどの金を持ってない……他人の億単位の借金を、恋人の華穂に: Naturally I didn't have enough money to cover it... and I couldn't have Kaho, my girlfriend, do something about someone else's debt in the hundreds of millions.
かといって暴れても、借金が返せるわけではなく……上手い解決法とはいえないのだ。: On the other hand, even if I went wild, I couldn't pay off the debt... so it wasn't a good solution.
重明\n（……詰まる話、もはや自分の力だけで解決する事は出来ない……完璧なまでに: Shigeaki: (In short, I can no longer solve this with my own power... it’s a perfect dead end.)
……自分の力だけでは、絶対に解決出来ない……: ...If I can't solve it with my own power alone...
という事はつまり……解決したいなら１人でやらず、解決出来そうな人間に力を借りれば: Then that means if I want to solve it, I shouldn't do it alone, but should borrow the strength of someone who can solve it.
重明\n（……よし、たとえ無様だろうと力を借りる……借りるとして……誰が一番適任: Shigeaki: (Alright, I'll borrow strength even if it’s pathetic... assuming I do... who is the best person for it?)
華穂の力を借りるパターンは既に考察済み……藤子とは接点が薄く、たとえ交渉したとし: The pattern of borrowing Kaho's strength was already considered... I had little contact with Touko, and even if I negotiated... honestly I couldn't see a vision of things going well.
被害者のくす葉は論外……華穂の元教師の尚人は……そもそもヤツが何者かすらよくわか: The victim Kusuha was out of the question... and as for Kaho's former teacher Naoto... I didn't even know who he was in the first place.
重明\n（……このペンションに居て、華穂以外で俺に協力してくれそうな人間……）: Shigeaki: (Someone at this pension, besides Kaho, who might cooperate with me...)
しかも必要なのはただ協力してくれるのではなく、この無理難題な状況を、引っくり返す: And what I needed wasn't just someone who would cooperate, but someone who could flip this impossible situation... like a Joker in a deck of cards.
そんな無茶苦茶な条件に当てはまる人間を……俺は１人しか知らない。: I only knew one person who fit such an outrageous requirement.
重明\n（……よし、頼む分にはタダだし……いっちょやるだけやってみますか……）: Shigeaki: (Alright, it’s free to ask... I might as well give it a shot...)
俺は再び湯船に半身を沈めると、意を決し桔梗に話しかけた。: Submerging half my body in the tub again, I made my resolution and spoke to Kikyou.
重明\n「……色々話を聞いた結論からいくとだな」: Shigeaki: “...Judging from everything I’ve heard, here is the conclusion.”
重明\n「俺は……くす葉を現状からどうにか助けてやりたいと考えている」: Shigeaki: “I... want to somehow save Kusuha from her current situation.”
桔梗\n「……その結論に対し、私からはあまりに無謀だとしか言えません」: Kikyou: “...To that conclusion, I can only say it is far too reckless.”
重明\n「そうだな……普通に考えれば俺には何も出来ないし、何か行動すれば家族や華: Shigeaki: “I guess so... normally speaking there’s nothing I can do, and if I act, there’s no doubt my family or Kaho will be harmed.”
桔梗\n「わかっているのなら……やめるべきでは？」: Kikyou: “If you understand that... shouldn't you stop?”
重明\n「けどさ、無理だからと直ぐ諦めるより……どうせなら出来る可能性を全部やっ: Shigeaki: “But still, wouldn't you say it feels more refreshing to try every possibility before giving up rather than just giving up right away because it’s impossible?”
桔梗\n「何もかも徒労に終わる可能性だってありますよ？」: Kikyou: “There is a possibility everything will end in vain, you know?”
重明\n「そうだな……けど最初から諦めて後悔するより、やりきって徒労で終わる方が: Shigeaki: “True... but trying and failing is more my style than giving up from the start and regretting it.”
桔梗\n「つまり結果より過程……くす葉さんのためだけでなく、自分の自己満足の為に: Kikyou: “In other words, the process matters more than the result... you are doing something for your own self-satisfaction, not just for Kusuha-san.”
桔梗\n「その結果、くす葉さんどころか華穂さんも不幸になる可能性は考えないんです: Kikyou: “And you don't care if not just Kusuha-san but also Kaho-san becomes unhappy as a result?”
重明\n「……そういう不幸な事態にならない為に……」: Shigeaki: “...To avoid such an unhappy situation...”
重明\n「今から、俺と桔梗ちゃんが二人で知恵を絞るんじゃないか」: Shigeaki: “Starting now, won't you and I put our heads together, Kikyou-chan?”
重明\n「ははぁん……それは何故自分がくす葉を助ける方法を考えるんだって顔だな？: Shigeaki: “Hahaha... that’s the look of 'why on earth should I think of a way to save Kusuha?' isn't it?”
桔梗\n「当たり前です……何故自分が不利益になる事を私自身が考えなければいけない: Kikyou: “Of course. Why should I myself think of something that would be to my own disadvantage?”
重明\n「理由は単純……俺がこの白花荘に来て友達になったくす葉を助けるのを、同じ: Shigeaki: “The reason is simple... because I want you, Kikyou-chan, who became my friend after I came to Shirohana-sou, to help me save Kusuha, who also became my friend.”
桔梗\n「……？？？ ……やはり……意味がわかりません……」: Kikyou: “...??? ...As I thought... I do not understand...”
重明\n「まぁようするにだ……俺は昨日仲良くなったばかりの友達の桔梗ちゃんに、女: Shigeaki: “Well, in short... I don't want you, Kikyou-chan, my friend I just got close to yesterday, to help with taking away a girl's life.”
桔梗\n「はあ……昨日会ったばかりの薄い関係なのに、人の仕事に口を出すというわけ: Kikyou: “Hah... even though we have a thin relationship and only met yesterday, you intend to interfere with my work... that is quite a cheeky request.”
桔梗\n「……いえ、別に褒めてはいません……ドヤ顔して嬉しそうに笑みを浮かべない: Kikyou: “...No, I am not complimenting you... please do not wear a smug and happy smile.”
重明\n「はは……確かに出会ったばかりと言われると、反論のしようもないけど……こ: Shigeaki: “Haha... certainly if you say we only just met, I have no argument... but how about thinking of it this way?”
桔梗\n「はぁ……なんでしょうか」: Kikyou: “Hah... and how would that be?”
重明\n「俺と桔梗ちゃんは、この先の長い年月、ずっと仲良くするわけだろ？ ……だ: Shigeaki: “You and I are going to be friends for a long time from now on, right? ...Then doesn't the short time we’ve spent together become a trivial issue?”
桔梗\n「すみません……一瞬納得しかけましたが、その捉え方はいくらなんでも無理が: Kikyou: “I apologize... I was almost convinced for a moment, but that interpretation is far too forced, no matter how you look at it... it is not trivial at all.”
重明\n「そうかな……俺としては本気で桔梗ちゃんと仲良くやっていくつもりなんだけ: Shigeaki: “Is that so... I’m serious about getting along with you from now on, Kikyou-chan.”
桔梗\n「……その点については……どうも……素直に嬉しいです」: Kikyou: “...On that point... well... I am honestly happy.”
重明\n「じゃあ、これからもよろしく……仲良くしよう」: Shigeaki: “Then, nice to meet you from now on... let's be friends.”
重明\n「あとでメアド教えてね」: Shigeaki: “Tell me your email address later.”
桔梗\n「携帯持ってません」: Kikyou: “I told you I do not have a cell phone.”
重明\n「マジか！？ じゃあ雪止んだら俺が車出すから、一緒に街に買いに行こうぜ♪: Shigeaki: “Seriously!? Then once the snow stops I’ll drive the car, so let's go buy one in town together!♪”
桔梗\n「……まぁいいですけど……重明さんって、凄い強引ですね……」: Kikyou: “...Well, fine, I suppose... you are quite forceful, aren't you, Shigeaki-san...”
重明\n「確かにそうだけど……基本的に強制する気はないから、嫌な時はちゃんと嫌っ: Shigeaki: “True, but... basically I have no intention of forcing you, so make sure you tell me clearly if you don't like something, okay?”
重明\n「それでだ……この先仲良くしていく桔梗ちゃんに、俺としては女の子を酷い目: Shigeaki: “So, it returns to the point where I don't want you, Kikyou-chan, whom I’m going to be close to from now on, to be doing something that puts a girl through hell.”
桔梗\n「はぁ……どうしてもそこに繋がるんですね……」: Kikyou: “Hah... so it always comes back to that, does it...”
重明\n「そりゃ自分の仲のいい友達がしてる事だからね」: Shigeaki: “Well, it’s what my good friend is doing, after all.”
重明\n「ちなみに売られた子が酷い目に遭っても、桔梗ちゃんはまったく心を痛めない: Shigeaki: “By the way, if you don't feel any pain in your heart at all even if the girl sold here goes through hell, then since everyone has their own way of thinking, I’ll just give up on this entirely...”
重明\n「……で……そこんとこ、ぶっちゃけ桔梗ちゃんはどう思ってるのかな？」: Shigeaki: “...So... to be blunt, how do you feel about it, Kikyou-chan?”
桔梗\n「同情はしますが、仕方がない事だと思います……うちに関わる時点で、既に救: Kikyou: “I sympathize, but I believe it cannot be helped... by the time someone is involved with us, they have already fallen into a hopeless situation... but...”
桔梗\n「ここに来た女性が酷い目に遭うのは、あまりいい気分ではない事は確かです…: Kikyou: “It is true that I do not feel good about a woman who comes here being put through hell... although I have dismissed it as strictly work, for the most part.”
重明\n「助けられるものなら、助けたい……って事でいいのかな？」: Shigeaki: “So if you can save them, you want to... is that it?”
桔梗\n「当然家に迷惑がかからないのであれば、ですけど」: Kikyou: “Naturally, provided it does not cause trouble for my home.”
重明\n（……よしよし……これなら結構簡単にいけそうだぞ……）: Shigeaki: (...Alright... this might be easier than I thought...)
重明\n「基本的に俺も桔梗ちゃんと同じ意見だよ……借金作って怪しい所へ身体を売っ: Shigeaki: “Basically I’m of the same opinion as you, Kikyou-chan... once someone makes a debt and sells their body to a shady place, it can't be helped if they go through hell.”
重明\n「もちろん助けてあげたいけど、その子が背負った借金を立て替えられるのかと: Shigeaki: “Of course I’d like to help them, but if I were asked if I could cover the debt they took on, I’d answer that it’s impossible.”
桔梗\n「なら……重明さんはくす葉さんの件を諦める……という事でしょうか？」: Kikyou: “Then... does that mean you give up on Kusuha-san's case, Shigeaki-san?”
重明\n「確かに一般人の俺には無理だけど……関係者の桔梗ちゃんになら、出来る可能: Shigeaki: “It’s certainly impossible for an ordinary person like me... but for you, Kikyou-chan, an insider... it might be possible... don't you think so?”
桔梗\n「私は家に迷惑がかかるような行為はしませんよ？」: Kikyou: “I will not do anything that causes trouble for my home, you know?”
重明\n「わかってるって……だからさ、同意した以上、くす葉が身体を売るのはしょう: Shigeaki: “I know... so look, since she consented, let's accept that Kusuha selling her body is unavoidable.”
重明\n「そこで客に売ったくす葉を一旦買い直して、拘束期間を倍にして負担を減らし: Shigeaki: “So what if we buy back Kusuha, who was sold to the guests, double the period of her restraint to reduce the burden, and then provide her to guests to pay back the debt... what do you think?”
桔梗\n「……つまり学園でしていた父と同じ方法を私にしろという話ですか？」: Kikyou: “...In other words, you are telling me to do the same thing my father did at the academy?”
重明\n「大体そういう事……桔梗ちゃんだって、女の子を酷い目に遭わせたいわけじゃ: Shigeaki: “Basically... you don't want to put a girl through hell either, do you, Kikyou-chan?”
重明\n「流石にお互いのメンツもあるし、今すぐ取り上げるってわけにはいかないのは: Shigeaki: “Naturally everyone has their pride, so I understand you can't just take her away right now.”
重明\n「だから今回のプレイが終わった後、残りの日数を買い取って……たとえばここ: Shigeaki: “So once this current play is over, how about buying back the remaining days and... for example, having her work here?”
桔梗\n「もし仮に……くす葉さんを買い取り、父と同じように使い潰すのではなく育て: Kikyou: “If... by some chance... we were to buy back Kusuha-san and, instead of using her up, raise and operate her like my father did... first of all, there is no trainer to do so.”
桔梗\n「そして第二に先ほども言いましたが、今のこの宿の主であるお爺様は父のやり: Kikyou: “And second, as I said before, my grandfather, who is the master of this inn now, was very negative toward my father’s methods, saying they were too soft... convincing him would be extremely difficult.”
重明\n「そこを……ほら……何とかしようよ！」: Shigeaki: “Let's... you know... do something about that!”
桔梗\n「何とかって……私に丸投げですか？ あまりに適当が過ぎると殴りますよ？」: Kikyou: “'Do something'... you are just dumping it all on me? If you are too irresponsible, I will punch you, you know?”
重明\n「むぅ……なら調教師ってヤツは、お爺さんのコネで紹介してもらえばいいんじ: Shigeaki: “Muuu... then for the trainer, shouldn't you just have your grandfather introduce someone through his connections? Frankly, I don't really know.”
桔梗\n「まぁそこは確かにその通りでしょうが……」: Kikyou: “Well, what you say is likely true, but...”
重明\n「なら後は桔梗ちゃんの身内のお爺さんだけだね、楽勝楽勝♪」: Shigeaki: “Then it’s just your grandfather, Kikyou-chan's relative. Piece of cake!♪”
桔梗\n「……重明さんは会った事がないので、そうやって簡単に言えるのでしょうが…: Kikyou: “...You can say it so easily because you have never met him, Shigeaki-san... my grandfather is... very, very strict and difficult, though.”
重明\n「凄い頑張れ！ ふぁいとっだよ！」: Shigeaki: “Give it your best! Do your best!”
桔梗\n「……重明さん、近いうちに私のお爺様へ紹介しますので覚悟しておいてくださ: Kikyou: “...I will introduce you to my grandfather soon, Shigeaki-san, so be prepared.”
重明\n「おうっ！ そんな事で協力してくれるのなら任せておけ……桔梗ちゃんのお爺: Shigeaki: “Alright! If that’s what it takes for you to cooperate, leave it to me... I'll give your grandfather a real exciting greeting!”
桔梗\n「失礼が過ぎると、普通にどこかの沖合いに投げ捨てられると思いますので、精: Kikyou: “If you are too disrespectful, you will likely be thrown into the sea somewhere off the coast, so please do your best.”
重明\n「お、沖ぃ？ ……まぁでも泳げるし手足を縛られてないなら何とか……あと外: Shigeaki: “Th-the coast? ...Well, I can swim and as long as my hands and feet aren't tied... although since it’s the open sea, I’d like the weather, wave height, and tide currents to be taken into account if possible...”
桔梗\n「取り合えず……今言った二つの問題は、一応保留という形で置いておく事にし: Kikyou: “For now... let us put those two problems aside as being on hold... the problem is the third one.”
桔梗\n「単純に大して知りもしないくす葉さんの為に、何故そんな面倒事をしないとい: Kikyou: “It is the story of why on earth I should go through such trouble for Kusuha-san, whom I barely even know.”
重明\n「そこはさ……くす葉のためじゃなく、俺の自己満足の為にやってくれないかな: Shigeaki: “How about... not for Kusuha, but for my self-satisfaction?”
桔梗\n「では何故私が重明さんの自己満足の為に、大変な目に遭わないといけないんで: Kikyou: “And why must I go through such a terrible time for Shigeaki-san's self-satisfaction?”
桔梗\n「友達にお願いされたからという理由だけで億単位の仕事をするのは、普通に非: Kikyou: “I believe it is normally quite unusual to do a job worth hundreds of millions just because a friend asked you to.”
重明\n「じゃあさ、桔梗ちゃん……桔梗ちゃんが、その面倒ごとをやる理由を考えてよ: Shigeaki: “Then, Kikyou-chan... you think of a reason why you would do that troublesome thing.”
桔梗\n「………………私自身が……進んで苦労する理由を考えるんですか？」: Kikyou: “............I... myself... am to think of a reason to work hard on my own initiative?”
重明\n「いやだってさ？ 結局納得するのは桔梗ちゃんなわけで……俺がどうこう考え: Shigeaki: “Yeah, I mean in the end you're the one who has to be convinced... so I thought it’d be faster if you thought of a way that you would be okay with doing rather than me thinking of something.”
桔梗\n「……納得はしかねますが……理屈としては……理解しました……」: Kikyou: “...I find it hard to accept... but the logic is... understood...”
桔梗\n「……考えてみます……暫く時間を下さい」: Kikyou: “...I will think about it... please give me some time.”
俺にそう言葉を残して桔梗は湯船から上がると、壁に設置されていたシャワーで全身を洗: Leaving me with those words, Kikyou got out of the tub and rinsed her whole body with the shower installed on the wall.
そして５分ほど時間が経過した後……シャワーを浴びズブ濡れとなった桔梗が、再び俺の: And after about five minutes had passed... Kikyou, soaking wet after her shower, returned to me.
重明\n（……むぅ……濡れ髪が……やたらエロいな……）: Shigeaki: (...Ugh... wet hair is... really erotic, isn't it...)
桔梗\n「重明さんの提案をどうすれば私が飲むのか……自分なりに考えてみたのですが: Kikyou: “I have thought in my own way about what would make me accept Shigeaki-san's proposal...”
重明\n「うんうん、それでどんな結論が出たのかな？」: Shigeaki: “Mm-hmm, and what kind of conclusion did you reach?”
桔梗\n「まず結論からいくと……先ほどの提案、やってもいいです」: Kikyou: “First, as for the conclusion... I am willing to do as you proposed.”
桔梗\n「では、どうすれば私が納得し提案を受け入れるかを説明する前に……くす葉さ: Kikyou: “Now then, before I explain what made me accept the proposal... let me explain the concrete plan to save Kusuha-san.”
桔梗\n「まず、当然ですが借金をチャラなんてマネは出来ません。理由はその金額を即: Kikyou: “First, naturally I cannot just wipe out the debt. The reason is that Kusuha-san does not have the value to pay that amount in cash immediately.”
重明\n「まぁそりゃ普通はないだろうさ……有名な女優とかアイドルがＡＶ行くとかじ: Shigeaki: “Well, normally she wouldn't... it's not like she’s a famous actress or idol going into AV or something.”
桔梗\n「なのでくす葉さんの未来を担保にして、お金を貸す事になるのですが……当然: Kikyou: “Therefore, we will lend money with Kusuha-san's future as collateral... but naturally she will have to work for our group.”
桔梗\n「基本的には外のお客相手に高級娼婦として働く方が多くなると思います……こ: Kikyou: “Basically I believe she will mostly work as a high-class courtesan for outside clients... I do not want to pointlessly exhaust a precious body that earns a large sum of money with the chores at this inn.”
重明\n「まぁそうか……ここの仕事より、風俗の方が稼げるだろうからな」: Shigeaki: “I see... sex work would earn more than the work here, I guess.”

くす葉\n「……それにね……何回も……何回もヤだって……嫌だって言ったのに……」: Kusuha: “...And you know... even though I said no... over and over... said I hated it...”
くす葉\n「……私のおまんこに……足とか……瓶とか……色々なもの突っ込んで……く: Kusuha: “...Into my pussy... feet... bottles... they shoved all sorts of things... inside...”
くす葉\n「……それで股間がブチブチ切れて……血もいっぱい出て……痛いって……助: Kusuha: “...And my crotch tore and bled so much... and no matter how much I screamed that it hurt, to help me, they just ignored it... really... I thought I was going to be killed so many times...”
くす葉\n「……ガラスの灰皿で目一杯頭を殴って……ストーブの石油をかけて……火を: Kusuha: “...I hit their heads as hard as I could with a glass ashtray... and poured kerosene from the stove on them... and lit them on fire...”
くす葉\n「……ふふっ……ホントすっきりした……くすっ……ふふふっ……うふふふふ: Kusuha: “...Hehe... it really was a relief... *giggle*... hehehe... ufufufufufufufufufufufu...”
重明\n「……わかった、大変だったな……とりあえず詳しい事情は後にして、急いでこ: Shigeaki: “...I get it, you’ve been through a lot... let’s worry about the details later and get out of here.”
重明\n「ああ、危険だから外に行くんだ……さあいくぞ、くす葉」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, it’s dangerous, so we’re going outside... come on, Kusuha.”
重明\n「いや、どうしてって火事だぞ！？ 燃えてるんだぞ！？ 普通に逃げなきゃ駄: Shigeaki: “What do you mean 'why', it’s a fire!? It’s burning!? You have to run away!!”
何故くす葉は炎に囲まれたこの状況で、平然としているのだろうか？: Why is Kusuha so calm in this situation, surrounded by flames?
所々に酷い火傷の痕すらあるというのに……何故逃げようと……助けて欲しいと言わない: There are even severe burn marks here and there... so why doesn't she try to run... why doesn't she ask for help?
重明\n（いやそもそも俺が地下から上がってきてまだ２０分ぐらいしか経ってないはず: Shigeaki: (Wait, it should have only been about twenty minutes since I came up from the basement... so what’s with this... sudden drastic change in the situation...)
くす葉\n「……ねぇ重明さん……今から部屋でお喋りしよ……」: Kusuha: “...Hey, Shigeaki-san... let’s chat in the room now...”
くす葉\n「……私……重明さんと……色々お話したいな……ねぇ……いいでしょ……」: Kusuha: “...I... want to talk about all sorts of things... with you... hey... it’s okay, right...”
くす葉が素足のまま、一歩……また一歩と近づいてくる。: Kusuha takes a step... and another... toward me with her bare feet.
もちろん話などしている場合ではない……３人の安全を考え、今すぐにでもくす葉の手を: Of course, this is no time for talking... considering the safety of the three of us, I should grab Kusuha’s hand and start running right now.
……だが、その疑い様もない正しい行動を実行出来ない……: ...But I can't execute that undeniably correct action...
先ほどから身体が何かを拒絶するかのように硬直し……本能がこの女は火事よりヤバイと: My body has been frozen as if rejecting something... and my instinct is screaming a loud warning that this woman is more dangerous than the fire.
重明\n「……んぐっ……わ、わりぃ……くす葉……ほんとゴメンっ！！」: Shigeaki: “...Ngh... s-sorry... Kusuha... I’m really sorry!!”
もしくす葉に逃げる気があるなら、追いかけてくるはず。: If Kusuha had any intention of escaping, she would follow me.
何より……自分達ですら、まだ助かると決まっているわけではないのだ。: Above all... it’s not even decided that we ourselves will be saved yet.
近づく火の手ごとくす葉を振り切るように、俺は一階へ向け廊下を走り抜ける。: As if to shake off Kusuha along with the approaching flames, I run through the hallway toward the first floor.
すると進行方向の横手の通路から、見覚えのあるメイド服が視界に飛び込んできた。: Then, a familiar maid uniform jumps into my field of vision from the side passage ahead.
桔梗\n「し、重明さん！？ か、火事！ 火事です！！」: Kikyou: “Sh-Shigeaki-san!? A f-fire! There’s a fire!!”
先ほどのくす葉と違い、この状況に露骨に慌てる桔梗。: Unlike the Kusuha from a moment ago, Kikyou is visibly panicked by the situation.
そんな普通の反応を見せる彼女に俺はホッとし、軽くだが気を緩めさせる。: Seeing her show such a normal reaction, I feel relieved and let down my guard slightly.
既に火の手が回っていた階段の炎をなにクソと恐れず気合で駆け下りると、俺は玄関のド: Dashing down the stairs, braving the flames that had already spread there, I move nonstop toward the front door.
重明\n「………………って……あ、あれ？ ……あ、開かない？」: Shigeaki: “.............. Eh... h-huh? ...It... it won't open?”
扉の鍵を確認した後、再びドアのレバーをガチャガチャと動かすものの……まるでまだ鍵: After checking the lock, I rattle the door lever again, but the handle won't budge, as if it were still locked.
重明\n「……クソッ！ ……桔梗ちゃん、見てもらえるかな……って……桔梗ちゃん？: Shigeaki: “...Dammit! ...Kikyou-chan, can you take a look... wait... Kikyou-chan?”
音も無く唐突にロビーの中央に現れた藤子……: Fujiko appeared in the center of the lobby abruptly and without a sound...
その姿を見た瞬間、俺の勘がくす葉の時同様にヤバイと判断した。: The moment I saw her, my intuition judged her to be as dangerous as Kusuha.
重明\n「……やっぱ開かねぇ……クソッ……どうなってんだ」: Shigeaki: “...Still won't open... Dammit... what’s going on.”
藤子\n「……桔梗……外は危険よ……行っては駄目……」: Touko: “...Kikyou... it’s dangerous outside... you mustn't go...”
藤子\n「……さぁ……これまで通り、私が守ってあげる……こっちにいらっしゃい……: Touko: “...Come... I will protect you as I always have... come over here...”
火の手と共に、不気味な雰囲気の藤子がゆっくりと近づいてくる。: Along with the fire, the eerie Fujiko slowly approaches.
廊下で合ったくす葉の時とは違う……周りは火の海……逃げられるとしたら、背後にある: This isn't like when I met Kusuha in the hallway... we’re surrounded by a sea of fire... the only way out is the door behind me.
その扉も壊れているのか、何度レバーや鍵を動かしても……開く気配すらない。: But that door seems broken; no matter how many times I move the lever or the lock... there’s no sign of it opening.
もはや万策尽き、背中に背負った華穂の温もりに現実逃避しようとした刹那……唐突に桔: Just as I was about to give up and retreat into the warmth of Kaho on my back... Kikyou suddenly spoke up and addressed Fujiko.
桔梗\n「……お母さん、私外に行かないと」: Kikyou: “...Mother, I have to go outside.”
桔梗\n「お爺様に……後継ぎになる決心がついたって……お父さんの意志を継ぎたいっ: Kikyou: “I have to go tell Grandfather... that I’ve decided to become the successor... that I want to carry on Father’s will.”
桔梗\n「……ずっと踏ん切りがつかなかった……お母さんの事もあったし、お爺様には: Kikyou: “...I couldn't make up my mind for the longest time... there was your situation, and Grandfather kept telling me it was useless and unnecessary... to treat the women who were sold as mere objects...”
桔梗\n「けど重明さんと出会って、色々とかき回されて……決心がついた……私……お: Kikyou: “But after meeting Shigeaki-san and being stirred up... I’ve made up my mind... I’m going to try doing something close to what Father did.”
桔梗\n「……大変な事ばかりかもしれない……沢山の人に迷惑をかけるかもしれない…: Kikyou: “...It might be nothing but hardships... I might cause trouble for many people...”
桔梗\n「……ただの自己満足……綺麗事だと馬鹿にされ笑われると思う……けど、私は: Kikyou: “...It might be dismissed and laughed at as self-satisfaction or empty idealism... but I want to chase the ideal I’ve envisioned.”
桔梗\n「……だって……やっぱり自分が満足出来て、何事も綺麗な方がいいし……」: Kikyou: “...Because... after all, it’s better to be satisfied and for things to be beautiful...”
桔梗\n「何より、その方が面白そうなんだもん」: Kikyou: “And above all, that way seems more interesting.”
藤子\n「……じゃあ頑張って……お母さん……応援してるから……」: Touko: “...Then do your best... I’ll... be rooting for you...”
玄関の扉が唐突に開き掴んでいたドアレバーに引っ張られるようにたたらを踏むと、外か: The front door suddenly swings open, and as I stumble, pulled by the door lever I was gripping, a rush of cold air blows in from outside.
重明\n「……あ、開いた……行こう、桔梗ちゃん！」: Shigeaki: “...It... it opened... let’s go, Kikyou-chan!”
火の海となった建物から一転、今度は太股まで雪が積もった猛吹雪の中……: From the building that had become a sea of fire, we were now in a heavy blizzard with snow piled up to our thighs...
朝も桔梗と一度だけ外に出たが……風の勢いがあの時より強い気がする。: I’d been outside once with Kikyou this morning, but... the wind feels even stronger than it did then.
重明\n「……んおぉ……寒すぎて……顔とかが痛てぇ……つか雪が深すぎて……前に進: Shigeaki: “...Ngh... it’s so cold... my face hurts... and the snow is so deep... I can't move forward...”
桔梗\n「……んぐ……し、重明さん……後ろから押します……」: Kikyou: “...Ngh... Sh-Shigeaki-san... I’ll push from behind...”
太股まで積もった雪の中を歩く事自体大変だというのに……まるで台風のような横殴りの: Walking through thigh-deep snow is hard enough... but the gale-force winds, hitting us from the side like a typhoon, are stripping away my balance and body heat all at once.
俺も桔梗もそれほど薄着ではないとはいえ、吹雪の中を突き進むには無理がある格好。: Neither I nor Kikyou are dressed lightly, but we’re hardly in gear meant for pushing through a blizzard.
こちらは一応ベッドのシーツをマントのように身体に巻きつけてはいるものの……完全に: I’ve at least wrapped the bedsheet around me like a cloak... but it’s purely for peace of mind.
重明\n（……くそ……やっぱこの吹雪の中を突き進むのは……無理があるか？）: Shigeaki: (...Dammit... is it really impossible to push through this blizzard after all?)
想像を絶する過酷な状況を前に別の策を練るため、俺はふと後ろを振り返った。: Facing an unimaginably harsh situation, I turned around to think of another plan.
ペンションの火の手は、もう先ほど通り抜けた玄関まで進んでいた。: The fire at the pension had already reached the front entrance we’d just passed through.
その建物内の火の海へよくよく目を凝らすと……燃え盛る炎の中に、ちらほらと人影が見: Straining my eyes into the sea of fire inside the building... I can see several silhouettes through the roaring flames.
現在進行形で身体を火に焼かれているはずなのに……: Even though their bodies should be burning at this very moment...
炎の中に見える男達はまるで気にせず、さも安全な所から頑張って吹雪の中を突き進む俺: The men visible in the flames don't seem to care at all, and it almost looks as if they’re watching us from a safe place as we struggle through the blizzard.
重明\n（……おいおい、どうなってるんだ……何であいつ等逃げようとしないんだよ…: Shigeaki: (...Hey now, what’s going on... why aren't those guys trying to run... it makes no sense...)
……もしかして炎の中は安全なのだろうか？: ...Could it be that it’s safe inside the flames?
そんな馬鹿な考えが過ぎりつつも……中とはいわず、火事の建物に近づき……吹雪と火の: While such a stupid thought crossed my mind... the idea occurred to me to approach the burning building—even if not going inside—and ride out both the blizzard and the fire.
常識的に考えれば、無闇に吹雪の中を突き進むより安全だろう。: Common sense would say it’s safer than recklessly pushing through the blizzard.
だが俺の直感は、根拠はないが建物から少しでも離れるべきだと強く主張している。: But my intuition, though baseless, strongly insisted that we should get as far away from the building as possible.
重明\n（……迷ってる時間はない……このまま無策でも突き進むか……燃える建物の傍: Shigeaki: (...There’s no time to hesitate... do I keep pushing forward without a plan... or try to weather the fire and cold near the burning building...)
そうして理性と本能がせめぎ合い、どうすべきか迷うさなか……: And as my reason and instinct clashed, leaving me unsure of what to do...
……俺は燃え上がる火の海の中に、ある人物の姿を見つけ出した。: ...I spotted a certain person within the sea of flames.
会うたびワケのわからない事を言う男……: A man who says things that make no sense every time we meet...
だが、よくよく思い返せば……こうなる前の段階から、尚人はペンションから早く出て行: But thinking back on it... even before things got to this stage, Naoto had been warning me to leave the pension quickly.
そして今俺の傍にいる桔梗の事を、何度も気にかけていた……: And he’d repeatedly shown concern for Kikyou, who was now by my side...
少なくとも自分達に危害を加えるような人間ではない……と思う。: At the very least, he isn't the type of person who would harm us... I think.
……もしかすると、この状況から助けてくれるのでは？: ...Could it be that he can save us from this situation?
思わず縋るような心境で尚人に視線を送ると……俺を見るヤツの口が、ゆっくりとこう動: Instinctively sending a pleading look toward Naoto... the mouth of that guy looking at me moved slowly like this:
何ビビッてんだ、このチキン野郎: What are you scared of, you chicken?
重明\n「アアッ！？ ……ビビッてねぇよ！！ ナメんな！！！」: Shigeaki: “AAH!? ...I’m not scared!! Don't underestimate me!!!”
状況に飲まれ弱気になっていた思考力が、尚人に反発する事で活力を取り戻していく。: My ability to think, which had been weakened by the situation, regained its vitality by rebelling against Naoto.
……周りは吹雪の中……近くには火事のペンション……: ...Surrounded by the blizzard... and the burning pension nearby...
自分達が薄着である以上、常識で考えれば……燃える館の近くで吹雪が去るの待つ、この: Since we’re lightly dressed, common sense says... there’s no option other than waiting for the blizzard to pass near the burning mansion.
俺はあえて常識を否定し……館を背に吹雪と深い雪に包まれた更に先へと、力強く足を進: I chose to defy common sense... and began to step forward powerfully, away from the mansion and into the depths of the snow and blizzard.
……一見すると、ただの無策で自殺行為の選択と思われるかもしれない。: ...At a glance, it might seem like a reckless, suicidal choice.
だが肝心の逃げこむ場所が、あまりにも非常識過ぎる。: But the place to escape to is just too nonsensical.
つまりワケのわからない所に助けを求めるより……たとえ根拠がなかろうとも、俺は自分: In other words, rather than seeking help from something I don't understand... even if I had no proof, I trusted my intuition.
太股まで砂に埋まった足を前に出すように……俺は全身に力を入れ、前へ前へと深く積も: As if pulling my legs out of the sand, I put all my strength into moving forward through the deep snow.
荒い息で吸い込んだ空気が、肺の中に突き刺さるように広がり、胸が痛む。: The air I sucked in with my ragged breath felt like it was stabbing into my lungs, and my chest ached.
もはや直接外気に触れている部分は冷え切り……感覚はない。: The parts of my body exposed to the outside air were already chilled to the bone... and I had no sensation in them.
それでも俺はしっかりと華穂を背負ったまま、少しでも宿から離れる為、必死に脚を動か: Even so, while firmly carrying Kaho on my back, I desperately moved my legs to get even a little further from the inn.
……燃えあがる建物から距離が離れたのか、周りの視界が少し暗くなった気がする。: ...Perhaps because we’ve moved away from the burning building, the surroundings seem to have gotten a bit darker.
薄暗くなり少し不安な気持ちが強くなったが、それも車につきさえすれば何とかなるだろ: It’s getting dim and I feel more anxious, but once we reach the car, we’ll manage somehow.
たとえすぐに車を動かし、山を下りれなかったとしても……吹雪の中や、火事のペンショ: Even if I can't move the car and get down the mountain immediately... it has to be better than being in the blizzard or at the burning pension.
その時……俺はふと思った。: Then... a thought suddenly occurred to me.
……俺は一体……どこに車を停めたのだろうか……: ...Where exactly... did I park the car...
……そもそも……俺はいつ車を降りたのだろうか……: ...For that matter... when did I get out of the car...
重明\n「……桔梗ちゃん……ここの駐車場ってどこだっけ……」: Shigeaki: “...Kikyou-chan... where was the parking lot here again...”
返事のない桔梗の姿を探し、後ろを振り向いてみたものの……傍に居たはずの彼女の姿が: I turned around to look for Kikyou, who hadn't replied... but she, who should have been right beside me, was nowhere to be seen.
それどころか……いつのまにか、背中に大切に背負っていた華穂の感触も失っている。: Moreover... before I knew it, the sensation of Kaho, whom I’d been so carefully carrying on my back, was gone.
重明\n「……お、落としたのか？ ……い、いや……そんなハズは……何だこれ……華: Shigeaki: “...Did I... drop her? ...N-no... that’s impossible... what is this... Kaho! Kikyou-chan! Kaho!!!”
俺は眠りから目を覚ますと……現実に夢が混じり込んだ混乱した頭で、いま自分の置かれ: I wake up from my sleep... and with my mind confused, where dreams and reality are mixed, I organize my current situation and grasp what’s happening.
重明\n「……時間は……午後３時……日付は３月７日土曜日……」: Shigeaki: “...The time is... 3:00 PM... the date is Saturday, March 7th...”
重明\n「……そう……今日は華穂と旅行に行く日……」: Shigeaki: “...Right... today is the day I go on a trip with Kaho...”
重明\n「……２月のわけがないし……雪なんてこの時期に降るはずもない……」: Shigeaki: “...There’s no way it’s February... and it shouldn't be snowing at this time of year...”
穏やかな顔……ゆったりとした浅い呼吸で、豊満な胸が微かに動いている。: A peaceful face... with calm, shallow breaths, her ample chest is moving slightly.
吹雪の中で見失ったのが現実でない事に安心し、ほっと胸を撫で下ろした。: Relieved that losing her in the blizzard wasn't reality, I breathed a sigh of relief.
再び前を向き備え付けられたカーナビを見ると……液晶の画面には、目的地まで残り５０: Looking back at the car navigation system... the LCD screen shows that there are 500m left to our destination.
重明\n「……表示を見た感じ、ペンションに到着すらしていない……つまりあの出来事: Shigeaki: “...Based on the display, we haven't even arrived at the pension... in other words, everything that happened was just a dream I had while dozing off... is that how it is?”
本当の出来事のようにリアリティがある面もあったが、現実的ではない事も多々あった気: There were parts that felt as real as if they had actually happened, but I feel like there were also many things that weren't realistic.
やはりあのペンションでの出来事は、何もかも夢だった……という事なのだろうか？: After all, everything that happened at that pension... was just a dream... I suppose?
重明\n「……何にしろ……運転中に居眠りとかマジありえねぇ……何やってんだよ俺…: Shigeaki: “...In any case... dozing off while driving is seriously unthinkable... what was I doing... even though I have Kaho with me... I’ve gotten too lax...”
運転中に眠るなど、もちろん今回が初めて。: Sleeping while driving is, of course, a first for me.
しかも特に睡眠不足というワケでもなく、運転の道中も眠気を感じる事もなかった。: And it wasn't as if I was particularly sleep-deprived, nor did I feel sleepy during the drive.
それなのに居眠りしてしまった……これでは反省は出来ても具体的な対処のしようがない: Yet I dozed off... I can reflect on it, but there’s no specific way to deal with it.
重明\n「まぁいいや……とりあえず今は普段よりもう少し気を張っておくとするか……: Shigeaki: “Well, whatever... for now, I’ll just stay a bit more alert than usual...”
もし何らかの疲労が原因だとしても、宿でゆったりと過ごせば帰りは大丈夫だろう。: Even if the cause was some kind of fatigue, if I spend some time relaxing at the inn, I’ll be fine on the way back.
俺は少し眠気の残った頭に気合を入れなおすと、現実の白花荘へ向け車を走らせ始めたの: Putting some spirit back into my still-sleepy head, I started driving toward the real Shirahanasou...
カーナビの指示通り山道を車で進むと、そこにはペンションなどなく……ただ焼け落ちた: Following the car navigation along the mountain road, there was no pension there... only the remains of a burnt-down building scattered across the area.
車内にいまだ眠っている華穂を置き、俺は一人燃えカスとなった建物周辺を見渡していく: Leaving Kaho still asleep in the car, I looked around the area of the building that had become cinders.
所々に燃え残った内装を見た感じ、夢の中で見た白花荘に酷似しているのは……俺の勘違: Based on the charred interior visible in places, the resemblance to the Shirahanasou I saw in my dream... am I just imagining it...
重明\n「……昨日今日火事になったってわけじゃなさそうだな……華穂のやつ、これで: Shigeaki: “...It doesn't look like the fire happened just today or yesterday... how did Kaho manage to book a reservation here...”
確か華穂はネットで予約したと言っていた……ホームページの情報は別の場所のサーバー: If I recall correctly, Kaho said she booked it online... perhaps the homepage information was on a server in another location, and only the data remained... something like that.
重明\n「……わけがわからん……まさに狐か狸に化かされたって感じだな……」: Shigeaki: “...I don't understand anything... it really feels like I’ve been bewitched by a fox or a raccoon.”
とりあえず華穂も先ほどから寝たままな上、俺自身の居眠り運転の事もある。: In any case, Kaho has been asleep this whole time, plus there’s my own dozing while driving.
……今からＵターンで自宅に戻るのは危険だろう。: ...It would be dangerous to pull a U-turn and head home now.
……俺は今日泊まる宿を探すため……この何もない焼け跡から立ち去る事にしたのだった: ...I decided to leave these empty ruins to find an inn to stay at for today...
白花荘と思われる焼け跡から去った後……: After leaving the ruins of what appeared to be Shirahanasou...
夜になっても目を覚まさない華穂が心配になり……俺は彼女を病院へ運び込んでいた。: I became worried about Kaho, who hadn't woken up even though it was night... and I brought her into the hospital.
１日経過した今でも、華穂は目を覚ましていない……: Even now, a day later, Kaho hasn't woken up...
外傷はなく、病気というわけでもない……医者にも華穂が目覚めない理由は見当もつかな: There are no external injuries, and it’s not a disease... even the doctor apparently has no idea why Kaho won't wake up.
そんな意識不明となった華穂の傍らには、彼女の両親が心配そうに寄り添っている……現: Beside the unconscious Kaho, her parents are huddled close, looking worried... that’s how things are now.
ただの楽しい小旅行のはずが一転し、彼女の両親が駆けつけるような大事……: What was supposed to be a fun little trip turned into an emergency where her parents had to rush over...
一体、何故……こんな事になってしまったのだろうか……: Why... did it turn out like this...
俺は……何か間違った選択をしたのだろうか？: Did I... make some wrong choice?
重明\n（……クソ……これからどうすりゃいいんだ……俺は今……華穂の為に……何を: Shigeaki: (...Dammit... what am I supposed to do now... what can I do... for Kaho’s sake...)
一人自分の無力さに苦しんでいる中……俺を呼ぶ声が聞こえた。: While suffering in my own powerlessness... I heard a voice calling my name.
……だが、その人物と俺は、面識がないはず……: ...But she and I are not supposed to be acquainted...
……そもそも、何故……彼女がここに居るのだろうか？: ...For that matter, why... is she here?
まるで理解不能だが……相手を確かめないわけにもいかない。: It’s completely incomprehensible... but I can't not check who it is.
……俺は……まさに幽霊でも見るような気持ちで……: ...With a feeling as if I were seeing a ghost...
俺の名前を呼ぶ声の主の方へと……顔を振り向かせていく。: I turned my face toward the owner of the voice calling my name.
桔梗\n「初めまして……私、桔梗といいます」: Kikyou: “Nice to meet you... my name is Kikyou.”
一時的に病院を離れていた俺は、再び華穂の元に戻ってきていた。: Having briefly left the hospital, I’d returned to Kaho’s side.
？？？\n「…………お疲れ様です、重明さん」: ???: “............ Thank you for your hard work, Shigeaki-san.”
小さな声で労を労ってくれた桔梗の車椅子を押す少女の名前は京香……生前の尚人が調教: The girl who thanked me for my efforts in a small voice while pushing Kikyou’s wheelchair is Kyoka... the last child Naoto trained before he died.
華奢で背が小さく、何かの怪我の後遺症なのか少し足を引きずっていて儚げだが……とて: She’s frail and small, and she drags her leg slightly, perhaps as an aftereffect of some injury, giving her a fleeting air... but she’s a very serious and hardworking girl.
重明\n「ああ、予定通りくす葉の妹ちゃんをバッチリ見つけて話をしてきた……白花荘: Shigeaki: “Yeah, just as planned, I found Kusuha’s little sister and had a good talk with her... I’ve also finished investigating most of what I could about Shirahanasou... I think that’s all the preparations done for now.”
簡単な報告を済ませた後も３人で軽い雑談を交わしていると……病室から出てきた華穂の: After finishing the brief report, the three of us were exchanging some light small talk when Kaho’s parents came out of the hospital room and approached us.
重明\n「どうも……事前に話しておいた下調べは一通り終わりました……予定通り今か: Shigeaki: “Hello... I’ve finished the preliminary investigation I told you about... As planned, please let me be alone with Kaho for a little while now.”
華穂のお母さん\n「そう……頑張ってね、重明くん」: Kaho's Mother: “I see... Good luck, Shigeaki-kun.”
重明\n「はい……正直あまりに現実味がなさすぎて、上手く確信は持てませんが……精: Shigeaki: “Yes... Honestly, it all feels so unrealistic that I can't say for sure... but I’ll do my best.”
華穂のお母さん\n「貴方、下にいってお茶でも飲みましょうか」: Kaho's Mother: “Dear, shall we go downstairs and have some tea?”
前から仲のよかった華穂の母親と違い、父親の方は俺と顔を合わせるたび、渋い表情をし: Unlike her mother, with whom I’ve always been on good terms, her father makes a sour face every time he sees me.
既にそんな微妙な間柄だったというのに……今回の件で、更に俺と華穂の父親の関係は悪: Our relationship was already awkward as it was... and after this incident, it’s no doubt worsened.
重明\n（華穂の事もあるのに、１年間意識不明だった桔梗ちゃんといきなり仲良くして: Shigeaki: (Even with Kaho like this, I’m suddenly getting along with Kikyou-chan, who’s been unconscious for a year... It’s only natural for him to think [I’m not giving my daughter to a playboy like this!])
一方的とはいえ、この先もずっと不仲であり続けるなんて精神衛生上よろしくない。: Even if it’s one-sided, it’s not good for my mental health to remain on bad terms like this forever.
今の問題が片付いたら……とりあえず華穂の父親とさしで飲み、少しは交流を深めてみる: Once the current problem is settled... I’ll try to have a drink with Kaho’s father and see if we can bond a little.
重明\n「という事で、ちょっと行ってくるね」: Shigeaki: “Anyway, I’m going for a bit.”
重明\n「ありがと……じゃあ桔梗ちゃん、また後で」: Shigeaki: “Thanks... well, Kikyou-chan, see you later.”
廊下から華穂が寝ている個室の病室へ静かに入ると……俺はベッドの近くにあった椅子に: Quietly entering the private room where Kaho is sleeping... I sit in the chair near the bed and gently take her hand.
……これから俺は……あの幻想の中の白花荘へ再び足を踏み入れようと考えている。: ...Now, I’m planning to step into that illusory Shirahanasou once again.
本当にそんな映画や漫画のような事が可能なのだろうか……: Is such a thing, straight out of a movie or manga, really possible?
だがこの数日の間、色々と考察し調べ確かめた事で辿りついた結論がコレなのだ……今更: But after several days of contemplating, investigating, and verifying, this is the conclusion I’ve reached... there’s no point in doubting now.
重明\n（……よし……疑うのは止めだ……いくぞ華穂……必ずお前に会いに……）: Shigeaki: (...Alright... no more doubting... let’s go, Kaho... I’m coming to see you, no matter what...)
雑念を振り切り、決意と共に目を瞑ると……俺は心を落ち着かせ、無心のまま意識を内側: Shaking off all idle thoughts and closing my eyes with resolve... I calm my mind and concentrate my consciousness inward.
重明\n（…………思い出せ俺……あの時の……白花荘に居た時の感覚を……）: Shigeaki: (............ Remember... the feeling when I was at... that Shirahanasou...)
……俺は次々と……あの時夢でみた白花荘の事を頭に思い浮かべていく……: ...I call to mind the things about the Shirahanasou I saw in my dream, one after another...
……人里を少し離れた……山の中腹にある……白花荘の事を……: ...Shirahanasou, located halfway up the mountain... a bit away from civilization...
……まさかあんな事になるとは思わなかった……あの時の事を……: ...I never thought it would turn out like that... that time...
ふと自分の【頭の中】で、誰かの声が聞こえたような気がした。: I felt as if I heard someone’s voice in [my head] just now.
……しかもその声の主に、俺はまったく覚えがない……: ...Moreover, I have absolutely no memory of the owner of that voice...
……気になり始めた声の主の正体を探るべく……俺は自分の頭の中を覗き見るイメージで: ...To search for the identity of the voice’s owner... I concentrate my consciousness as if peering into my own head...
……俺の思考は深い闇の底へと……ズブズブと落ちていったのだった……: ...My thoughts sank... deep into the bottom of the darkness.
寝起き直後にも似た、強い倦怠感を感じる……: I feel a heavy lethargy, similar to the moment right after waking up...
意識がハッキリとしない中……俺は今の状況を把握する為、目の前に意識を配っていく。: While my consciousness is still hazy... I focus on my surroundings to grasp the current situation.
……どうみても自分の車の中……: ...By all appearances, I’m inside my own car...
現在地を把握しようにも、カーナビの画面は故障したように何も映ってない。: I try to figure out my location, but the navigation screen is blank as if it’s broken.
だが、この車外の風景には見覚えがある……どうやら白花荘へ向かう山道のようだ。: However, this scenery outside the window is familiar... It seems to be the mountain road heading toward Shirahanasou.
重明\n「……ぶっちゃけ理由は良くわからないけど……俺の考え通り……上手くあの世: Shigeaki: “...To be honest, I don't really know why... but it seems... like I planned... I managed to enter that world... right?”
？？？\n「……ここをどんな風に考えたの？ 私にも教えてよ……重明さん」: ???: “...How did you think of this place? Tell me too... Shigeaki-san.”
重明\n「……俺がこの不思議な空間を、どんな風に思ってたかって事か？」: Shigeaki: “...You mean what I thought this mysterious space was?”
重明\n「って！ ……そもそも……お前、誰だよ？」: Shigeaki: “Wait! ...Who the hell... are you anyway?”
？？？\n「……コホン……では改めまして……名乗らせていただきます」: ???: “...Ahem... Then allow me... to introduce myself properly.”
撫子\n「私の名前は撫子……藤木藤子の娘の撫子……よろしくね」: Nadeshiko: “My name is Nadeshiko... Fujiki Touko’s daughter, Nadeshiko... Nice to meet you.”
重明\n「俺は萩原重明……よろしく」: Shigeaki: “I’m Hagiwara Shigeaki... Nice to meet you.”
撫子\n「まぁお母さんの藤木ってのは、白花荘で仕事をする時の偽名だから……本名っ: Nadeshiko: “Well, my mother’s name 'Fujiki' is a pseudonym she uses when working at Shirahanasou... so it’s not exactly our real name.”
重明\n「それより撫子って……白花荘で尚人と一緒に死んだ、桔梗ちゃんのお姉ちゃん: Shigeaki: “More importantly, Nadeshiko... you mean Kikyou-chan’s older sister, who died at Shirahanasou with Naoto?”
重明\n「……ならその死んだ桔梗ちゃんの姉さんが……何で……俺の車の助手席に居る: Shigeaki: “...Then why is Kikyou-chan’s dead sister... sitting... in the passenger seat of my car?”
撫子\n「それは重明さんが中に入りたいって呼びかけてきたから」: Nadeshiko: “It’s because you called out, wanting to come inside.”
撫子\n「正確には重明さんは華穂さまを呼んだんだけど……華穂さまの意識はまだ深い: Nadeshiko: “Technically, you called for Kaho-sama... but Kaho-sama’s consciousness is still sleeping deep down... so I came out like this as a substitute.”
重明\n「……死んだはずのお前が……わざわざ永眠から目を覚まして、俺をここに迎え: Shigeaki: “...You mean you, who should be dead... went out of your way to wake from your eternal sleep to welcome me here?”
撫子\n「んー目覚めるのとはちょっと違うかな……私は白花荘で重明さんが会った人達: Nadeshiko: “Hmm, waking up isn't quite right... Unlike the people you met at Shirahanasou, I had almost faded away...”
撫子\n「形こそ確かに撫子だけど……実際は華穂さま本人といってもいいかも」: Nadeshiko: “I certainly have Nadeshiko’s form... but in reality, you could say I’m practically Kaho-sama herself.”
重明\n「……死んだ撫子本人とは完全に別物だって事か？」: Shigeaki: “...So you’re completely different from the actual Nadeshiko who died?”
撫子\n「うん、けど一応生前の記憶はあるよ……まぁ流石に全ては思い出せないけど」: Nadeshiko: “Yeah, but I do have memories from when I was alive... though I can't remember everything, obviously.”
重明\n「……つまり……お前は華穂が撫子の記憶をサルベージしたもう一つの華穂の人: Shigeaki: “...In other words... you’re like a second persona of Kaho’s, created when she salvaged Nadeshiko’s memories?”
重明\n「……わかった……普通に信じられないし、納得も出来ないけど……理解はした: Shigeaki: “...I see... It’s hard to believe and I can't say I’m satisfied, but... I understand.”
撫子\n「重明さんって幽霊とか信じない性質？」: Nadeshiko: “Are you the type who doesn't believe in ghosts, Shigeaki-san?”
重明\n「いや信じてるよ……死後の世界があった方が、何だか面白そうだし」: Shigeaki: “No, I believe in them... It seems more interesting if there’s an afterlife.”
撫子\n「……よりにもよって霊を信じる理由がそれ？」: Nadeshiko: “...Of all things, that’s your reason for believing in spirits?”
重明\n「そうだ……けど存在は信じても幽霊が実際に人間に何か影響を与えるってのは: Shigeaki: “Yeah... but even if I believe they exist, the idea that ghosts actually influence humans... I honestly find that hard to believe.”
重明\n「ああ……恐らく霊感があるヤツってのは、普通は聞こえない音域を聞く事の出: Shigeaki: “Yeah... I think people who have spiritual sensitivity probably just have a kind of talent, like being able to hear frequencies that normal people can't.”
重明\n「つまり霊は存在してはいるけど、精々特殊な人に見える程度……人や自然に何: Shigeaki: “Basically, spirits exist, but they’re only visible to special people at most... I don't think spirits have the kind of energy to influence people or nature.”
撫子\n「どうして力がないと思うの？」: Nadeshiko: “Why do you think they have no power?”
重明\n「だってさ……もし影響を及ぼすエネルギーがあって、今まで死んだ人間の数を: Shigeaki: “Because... if they had energy that could exert influence, considering the number of humans who have died so far... wouldn't it be strange if the effects weren't more blatant?”
重明\n「そうそう……けど影響する力がないからといって、それらの存在を軽んじても: Shigeaki: “Exactly... But just because they lack the power to influence things, I don't think it’s right to treat their existence lightly.”
撫子\n「つまり……実際には存在して礼も尽くすけど、何かをするようなモノでもなけ: Nadeshiko: “So... they actually exist and you show them respect, but they aren't something that does anything, nor do they have power... That’s your view of ghosts, Shigeaki-san.”
重明\n「それで最初にお前がした……俺がこの世界をどう考えていたのかって質問に戻: Shigeaki: “Now, back to that question you asked at first... about what I thought of this world...”
重明\n「まず最初に考えたのは、あれは全て凄くリアリティのある白昼夢だったという: Shigeaki: “First, I assumed it was all a very realistic daydream.”
重明\n「けど、その白昼夢らしきものの中で出会った面識がないはずの桔梗が……俺と: Shigeaki: “But Kikyou, whom I supposedly hadn't met but encountered in that daydream-like place... saw almost the same things I did... and from her own perspective, no less.”
重明\n「しかも現実にくす葉が宿に来てから白花荘が火事になった期間が２月９日から: Shigeaki: “Furthermore, while the period from when Kusuha came to the inn until Shirahanasou burned down in reality was from February 9th to February 16th, what Kikyou and I saw was a two-day event.”
重明\n「それに桔梗はそこで俺と交わした会話を全てハッキリと覚えている……もうこ: Shigeaki: “And Kikyou clearly remembers every conversation we had there... At this point, wouldn't you agree it’s more of a stretch to think we just coincidentally had the same dream?”
撫子\n「まぁね……なら何で夢じゃないって思ったの？」: Nadeshiko: “I guess... then why did you think it wasn't a dream?”
重明\n「可能性は大きく見積もって２つ……その１つは、ホラー映画なんかによくある: Shigeaki: “There are two main possibilities... One is the typical horror movie scenario where a vengeful spirit does bad things to people.”
撫子\n「けどそれは重明さん的にはありえないって思ってるんでしょ？」: Nadeshiko: “But you think that’s impossible, right?”
重明\n「けど今回の件は、そもそも普通ではありえない出来事……自分の固定観念を捨: Shigeaki: “However, this whole incident is something impossible to begin with... I thought that as an exception, I should set aside my preconceptions and consider it based solely on the objective situation at the scene.”
重明\n「ああ、現場に足を運んで色々と試してみたよ……眠ってみたり、あの白花荘が: Shigeaki: “Yeah, I went to the site and tried all sorts of things... sleeping there, trying to believe from the bottom of my heart that the mansion existed, etc., etc...”
撫子\n「けど結局駄目だったと」: Nadeshiko: “But in the end, it didn't work.”
重明\n「一応自分に霊感がないだけかもと思って……近くに住む学生なんかに噂話を聞: Shigeaki: “Just in case I just didn't have spiritual sensitivity, I tried asking students living nearby for rumors and checked online to see if it was a spiritual spot... but that didn't yield much either.”
重明\n「それで俺はあの場所は切っ掛けを作ったけれど、事態を引き起こした直接的原: Shigeaki: “So, I concluded that while that place provided the spark, it wasn't the direct cause of the situation.”
撫子\n「その直接的原因が……もう一つの可能性……」: Nadeshiko: “And that direct cause is... the other possibility...”
重明\n「霊には人に何かをするエネルギーは無いと思う……けど、同じ人なら何かをす: Shigeaki: “I don't think spirits have the energy to do anything to people... but I think it’s not strange for another person to have the energy to do something.”
撫子\n「人が人に何かする……つまりこの状況を、誰かが作ったって事？」: Nadeshiko: “A person doing something to a person... you mean someone created this situation?”
重明\n「そう……この状況は華穂が作った……俺はそう考えている」: Shigeaki: “Yes... Kaho created this situation... That’s what I think.”
撫子\n「ではそう結論付けた根拠の方を聞かせてもらいましょうか……重明博士」: Nadeshiko: “Then allow me to hear the basis for that conclusion... Dr. Shigeaki.”
重明\n「あの夢のような状況にはだな……白花荘で死んだ人間の記憶が入っていたと、: Shigeaki: “In that dream-like situation... I believe the memories of the people who died at Shirahanasou were inside... like, thoughts of the dead? Something like that.”
重明\n「けど俺には霊感ってのがない……そして華穂にはあるらしい……実際、華穂と: Shigeaki: “But I don't have spiritual sensitivity... and it seems Kaho does... In fact, there are several people at school who testify to seeing things when they were with Kaho.”
重明\n「しかも普段見ないヤツも、華穂と一緒に居る時は見てしまうらしい……」: Shigeaki: “Moreover, even people who don't usually see things seem to see them when they’re with her...”
撫子\n「その学内のご学友と同じように……重明さんも、怪現象を見せられたと？」: Nadeshiko: “So, just like those schoolmates... you were shown strange phenomena, Shigeaki-san?”
重明\n「ああ……もしかすると、華穂は自分が見ているものや想像したものを……あた: Shigeaki: “Yeah... I thought that maybe Kaho could make others hallucinate what she sees or imagines... as if it actually existed.”
撫子\n「つまり白花荘に居た幽霊が悪さをしたのではなく……その霊を霊感で受信した: Nadeshiko: “So it wasn't the ghosts at Shirahanasou doing bad things... but Kaho-sama, who received the spirits through her sensitivity... showed you a daydream...”
重明\n「ああ、しかも無意識でな……よくわからないけど、多分催眠術の一種なんだと: Shigeaki: “Yeah, and unconsciously at that... I don't know for sure, but it’s probably a type of hypnosis... since nothing was actually happening...”
撫子\n「流石に幻は見せられないけど、確かに実際そういう人って居ますよね……自分: Nadeshiko: “While she can't show literal illusions, there certainly are people like that... who make others understand what they want through feelings rather than words.”
重明\n「多分、華穂はそれが極限まで特化した才能の持ち主なんだろうな……女王蜂の: Shigeaki: “Kaho probably has a talent that is specialized to the extreme in that regard... I think she’s putting out something like radio waves, like a queen bee.”
撫子\n「……霊感でその場の情報を読み取り、幻覚で追体験する能力か……」: Nadeshiko: “...The ability to read information from a place through sensitivity and relive it through hallucinations...”
撫子\n「……魔女の箱庭は、ちょっと違うかな……う～ん……追憶の情景……幻視の追: Nadeshiko: “...‘The Witch’s Birdcage’ isn't quite right... hmm... ‘Sensory Reminiscence’... ‘Phantom Recollection’...”
撫子\n「よし！ この能力の名前は【根雪の幻影】、これでいきましょう！」: Nadeshiko: “Alright! The name of this ability is [Neyuki no Gen'ei]! Let’s go with that!”
重明\n「……いや別に名前とかつけないでいいから……ちなみに俺はそういうノリは、: Shigeaki: “...Look, you don't need to give it a name... and by the way, I can't really keep up with that kind of vibe... I just... I don't know it.”
撫子\n「はぁ、付き合い悪いですねぇ……まぁ別にこっちも強要するつもりもないです: Nadeshiko: “Sigh, you’re no fun... well, I’m not going to force it on you.”
撫子\n「それで……妹が幻での記憶を持っていて、ずっと目覚めなかったのは……やは: Nadeshiko: “So... my sister having memories from the illusion and not waking up for so long... I guess it’s like her soul drifted from her body due to the shock of the accident and remained at Shirahanasou.”
重明\n「……多分、そんな感じなんじゃないかな……意識を失った華穂がつれてきた…: Shigeaki: “...Yeah, I think it’s something like that... Like the unconscious Kaho brought her along?”
撫子\n「けど、それが本当に出来たら凄い事ですよね……現代に舞い降りたシャーマン: Nadeshiko: “But if she can really do that, it’s amazing... isn't she like a shaman descended into the modern world?”
重明\n「けど多分、今回一度限りの限定なんじゃないか？ ……過去に一緒に幽霊を見: Shigeaki: “But it’s probably a one-time thing for this specific occasion, isn't it? ...Even if there were people who saw ghosts with her in the past, there was never a situation where she lost consciousness.”
撫子\n「では何で今回はここまで大事になってしまったと……重明博士はどう考えてい: Nadeshiko: “Then why did things become such a big deal this time... what does Dr. Shigeaki think?”
重明\n「……博士って……質問ばっかりしないで、たまにはお前も自分で考えろよ」: Shigeaki: “...Doctor... don't just keep asking questions, you should think for yourself once in a while.”
撫子\n「んーと……重明さんと違って私は今回の件を熟考する時間的猶予はなかったの: Nadeshiko: “Hmm... unlike you, I haven't had the luxury of time to think deeply about this incident... so I’ll pass.”
重明\n「そうかよ……まぁこれは想像でしかないんだけど」: Shigeaki: “Fine... well, this is just my imagination.”
重明\n「原因は白花荘という場所をよく知って居て、そしてその場に居た人達に華穂自: Shigeaki: “The cause was likely that she knew the place called Shirahanasou well, and Kaho herself had strong feelings for the people who were there.”
重明\n「それと……アイツはあの夢の中で……死んだお前の事を知りたいと言っていた: Shigeaki: “And... in that dream, she said she wanted to know about you, who died.”
重明\n「お前の事を詳しく知る人間は、あのとき現場に居た藤子さんのみ……それを知: Shigeaki: “The only person who knows you in detail is Fujiko-san, who was at the scene back then... To find that out, it would be inconvenient if Shirahanasou had burnt down.”
撫子\n「華穂さまが……火事で焼け落ちた事を知りつつ……ここを泊まる場所に選んだ: Nadeshiko: “So you think... Kaho-sama chose this as a place to stay while knowing it had burnt down in a fire, Shigeaki-san?”
重明\n「いや、それはないと思う……まぁいざ近づいてみたら感覚で火事を理解しちま: Shigeaki: “No, I don't think so... I suppose when she actually got close, she understood there was a fire through her senses... and the shock made her exert stronger power than usual...”
撫子\n「そして必要以上に力が強かったせいで……疲弊して深い眠りについてしまった: Nadeshiko: “And because the power was stronger than necessary... she became exhausted and fell into a deep sleep.”
撫子\n「けどそれなら……案外時間が経てば回復して……目を覚ますんじゃないですか: Nadeshiko: “But if that’s the case... wouldn't she eventually recover and wake up as time passes?”
重明\n「ああ、俺もその可能性は十分にあると思う……けどな……」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, I think that’s very possible... but...”
重明\n「……やっぱ眠り姫は……王子のキスで起こした方が格好がいいじゃん？」: Shigeaki: “...It’s just cooler to wake up a sleeping princess... with a prince’s kiss, right?”
重明\n「まぁ何もしないと目覚めない可能性もゼロではないわけだし……ぶっちゃけ、: Shigeaki: “Well, the possibility that she won't wake up if I do nothing isn't zero... and honestly, doing nothing just isn't my style.”
重明\n「あと調べて色々わかったけど、折角の機会だし……直接当事者達と話して、ス: Shigeaki: “Also, I found out a lot by investigating, and since this is a rare opportunity... I wanted to talk to the parties involved directly and get some closure... basically, it’s self-satisfaction.”
重明\n「とりあえず、こんな所かな……他に聞きたい事はあるか？」: Shigeaki: “Anyway, I guess that’s about it... Anything else you want to ask?”
撫子\n「んー……まぁ別にないかな……必要になったら、その時に聞けばいいし……重: Nadeshiko: “Hmm... not really... I can just ask when I need to... Do you have anything you want to ask me, Shigeaki-san?”
重明\n「そうだな……じゃあお前と尚人の関係かな……お互いどう思っていて、どうし: Shigeaki: “Let’s see... then how about the relationship between you and Naoto... what did you think of each other, and why did you both die together?”
撫子\n「私と尚人は、お互いに好き合っていたよ」: Nadeshiko: “Naoto and I liked each other.”
撫子\n「まぁ実際にそうだと気付いたのは……私も尚人も、死ぬ直前だったんだけどね: Nadeshiko: “Well, neither Naoto nor I realized that was actually the case... until just before we died.”
重明\n「向こうに確認はしたのか？」: Shigeaki: “Did you confirm it with him?”
撫子\n「してないよ、気づいた時には尚人死んでたし」: Nadeshiko: “I didn't, Naoto was dead by the time I realized it.”
撫子\n「けど……今になって振り返れば、案外分かり易かったかな……自分の子を生ま: Nadeshiko: “But... looking back now, it was actually quite obvious... Even though he never completely opened his heart even to my mother who bore his child... he always treated me specially.”
重明\n「それなのに……どうして死んじまったんだ？」: Shigeaki: “Even so... why did you die?”
撫子\n「……私が……ご主人様である尚人に切り捨てられたって……勘違いしちゃった: Nadeshiko: “...It’s because I... misunderstood that I had been cast aside by my master, Naoto...”
撫子\n「それで凄く混乱して、周りが見えなくなって……【捨てないで】って飛び付い: Nadeshiko: “I got so confused and lost sight of my surroundings... I jumped at him saying [Don't throw me away], and as bad luck would have it, that was right at the stairs.”
撫子\n「うん……私を助けようと考えなきゃ、尚人も死なずに済んだんだと思う……な: Nadeshiko: “Yeah... If he hadn't thought about saving me, Naoto wouldn't have had to die either... I guess... it was a stupid end, right?”
重明\n「まぁ……完全に自業自得ってやつだな」: Shigeaki: “Well... it was a case of getting exactly what you deserved.”
撫子\n「酷いなぁ……重明さん、少しは同情してくれないわけ？」: Nadeshiko: “How cruel... Shigeaki-san, can't you show a little sympathy?”
重明\n「けどな……それ以上に……俺としては捨てられたと勘違いして錯乱する意味が: Shigeaki: “But... more than that... I don't understand the point of getting frantic because you misunderstood you were cast aside... You could have just talked to the other person before it got to that.”
撫子\n「……それはね……みんながみんな重明さんみたいに単細胞じゃないって事」: Nadeshiko: “...That’s because... not everyone is a simpleton like you, Shigeaki-san.”
撫子\n「……言葉を交わせば、必ず分かり合えるわけじゃない……他人同士、考えの違: Nadeshiko: “...Exchanging words doesn't mean you’ll always understand each other... between different people, there can be differences in thought or a failure to fully convey intentions... sometimes it just makes the relationship even more complicated.”
撫子\n「けど……死んだ今となっては……重明さんの言う通り……あの時もう少し変わ: Nadeshiko: “But... now that I’m dead... just as you say... I do find myself thinking it would have been better if I’d stepped forward without being so afraid of things changing back then.”
撫子\n「ううん、悔やんでないよ……だって尚人と私じゃ……どう考えても釣り合わな: Nadeshiko: “No, I’m not regretting it... Because Naoto and I... we weren't a match, no matter how you look at it, right?”
撫子\n「生い立ちは最低最悪で……見た目もお母さんや妹と違ってちんちくりん……顔: Nadeshiko: “My upbringing was the absolute worst... and unlike my mother and sister, I’m tiny... my face isn't that great either, and my personality is cheeky and I’m not exceptionally smart.”
撫子\n「……そんな私が……王子様みたいな尚人の一番の存在だったんだよ……私を見: Nadeshiko: “...And yet, I... was the most important existence to someone like Naoto, who was like a prince... Even though he might have been saved if he’d abandoned me... he protected me on impulse...”
撫子\n「あはは……まぁ何ていうか……私は……その窮地を抜けられるほどのモノを持: Nadeshiko: “Ahahaha... well, I guess... I just didn't have what it took to get through that predicament... Like, I used up all my luck by meeting Naoto?”
撫子\n「だから自分としては結構上出来な人生を送ったって……そう思うよ」: Nadeshiko: “So I think I lived a pretty good life for myself.”
重明\n「……わっかんねぇなぁ……死ねば全部終わり……生きてりゃいい事なんていく: Shigeaki: “...I just don't get it... Once you die, it’s all over... If you’re alive, any number of good things can come your way, and you can grab them yourself.”
重明\n「……もし俺がお前の立場なら……あれをしたかった、これをやりたかった……: Shigeaki: “...If I were in your position... I’d want to do this, I’d want to do that... I’d regret and regret... and lament quite pathetically... for sure.”
撫子\n「多分それが人の生きたいって思う心の強さの表れなんじゃないかな……私には: Nadeshiko: “Maybe that’s a sign of the strength of your heart’s desire to live... I didn't have much of that... that’s all.”
重明\n「とりあえず俺が聞きたい事は以上だ」: Shigeaki: “Anyway, that’s all I wanted to ask.”
重明\n「……ところでお前……ずっと俺についてくる気なのか？」: Shigeaki: “...By the way... do you plan on following me around the whole time?”
撫子\n「だって誰か傍に居た方が、重明さんだって心強いでしょ？」: Nadeshiko: “I mean, it’s more reassuring for you to have someone with you, isn't it, Shigeaki-san?”
撫子にジッと見つめられる中……俺はこれから自分が足を踏み入れる場所の事を、軽く考: As Nadeshiko stared at me... I decided to give some thought to the place I was about to enter.
今から行く場所はようするにお化け屋敷……しかも遊園地にある作り物と違い、実際何が: The place I’m heading to is essentially a haunted house... but unlike the fake ones at amusement parks, it’s an irrational place where you don't know what might actually happen.
しかも火事で死んだ人間達に会いにいくのだ……常識的に考えて怖くないワケがない。: And I’m going to meet the people who died in the fire... Common sense says it’s bound to be scary.
だが人は窮地でも誰かが傍に居ると、それだけで意外に落ち着けるもの……: But people can be surprisingly calm even in a predicament if someone is by their side...
こうして会話が出来る状況は、案外俺の心の安定剤に役立つかもしれない。: Having her around to talk to like this might actually help keep me stable.
重明\n（まぁその傍に居る撫子自身も、実際は死人なんだけど……今はそこを深く考え: Shigeaki: (Well, Nadeshiko herself, who’s by my side, is actually a dead person too... but for now, I’ll... stop thinking too deeply about that.)
重明\n「……やっぱり心細いので、このまま一緒に付いて来て下さい」: Shigeaki: “...Actually, I am a bit lonely, so please come along with me as you are.”
撫子\n「うんうん素直でよろしい……ではしゅっぱーつ♪」: Nadeshiko: “Yep, yep, it’s good to be honest... Then, off we go~♪”
……ふと気付くと……俺はいつのまにか車から降り、吹雪の中に突っ立っていた。: ...Suddenly, I realize I’ve gotten out of the car and am standing in the middle of the blizzard.
辺りを見渡すと、近くには白花荘が見える。: Looking around, I can see Shirahanasou nearby.
外観は同じ……それなのに以前に比べ、何だか不気味な感じがする……: The exterior is the same... and yet, compared to before, it feels somewhat eerie...
……これは、俺がこの空間にビビッている心境の表れなのだろうか？: ...Is this a reflection of my own state of mind, being scared of this space?
撫子\n「じゃあ早速中に入っちゃう？」: Nadeshiko: “So, shall we head right inside?”
重明\n「……いや、入る前に……一度確かめなきゃいけない事がある」: Shigeaki: “...No, before that... there’s something I have to check.”
……曲がりなりにも、こんな非常識な所に再び足を踏み入れようと思ったのだ。: ...After all, I’ve decided to step into such an nonsensical place again.
現実ではあり得ないような窮地に陥った場合も考慮し……対応策も準備してきてある。: Considering the possibility of falling into a predicament that wouldn't happen in reality... I’ve prepared a countermeasure.
問題はそれが上手く出来るかどうかなのだが……こればかりは、実際にやってみない事に: The problem is whether I can do it well... but that’s something I won't know until I actually try.
重明\n「よし……じゃあ試しにやってみるから、ちょっと見ていてくれ」: Shigeaki: “Alright... I’m going to give it a try, so just watch me for a second.”
精神を統一する為……目を瞑り、何度か深呼吸を繰り返していく。: To focus my spirit... I close my eyes and repeat a few deep breaths.
心を落ち着かせたまま、自分の内なる力をイメージし……: Keeping my mind calm, I imagine the power within me...
最後にポーズをつけると……俺は腹に力を込め、言葉を解き放った。: Finally, I strike a pose... I tense my stomach and release the words.
重明\n「……ノウマク・サラバ・タタギャテイビャク・サラバ・ボッケイビャク・サラ: Shigeaki: “...Nou-maku sa-ra-ba ta-ta-gya-tei-bya-ku sa-ra-ba bo-kkei-bya-ku sa-ra-ba-da ta-ra-ta sen-da...”
重明\n「……マカロシャダ・ケン・ギャキギャキ・サラバ・ビキンナン・ウンタラタ・: Shigeaki: “...Ma-ka-ro-sha-da ken gya-ki-gya-ki sa-ra-ba bi-kin-nan un-ta-ra-ta kan-man...”
重明\n「なぁ撫子……いま俺の手から……炎とか……エネルギー波的なモノって出たか: Shigeaki: “Hey, Nadeshiko... did... flames or energy waves or something come out of my hand just now?”
重明\n「……うぐ……やっぱ駄目かぁ……」: Shigeaki: “...Ugh... I guess it’s no good...”
撫子\n「……いきなり叫んで……いったい何がしたいんですか……」: Nadeshiko: “...What were you trying to do, suddenly screaming like that...”
重明\n「いやさ……中に入ったら化け物が襲い掛かってきて、しかも殴る蹴るじゃ倒せ: Shigeaki: “Well, it’s a countermeasure for if a monster attacks me once I’m inside, and I can't defeat it by punching or kicking...”
重明\n「これをやる為に、色々桔梗ちゃんにアドバイスしてもらって、かなり本気でや: Shigeaki: “I had Kikyou-chan give me all sorts of advice to do this, and I tried it quite seriously... but no... I guess it really didn't work...”
撫子\n「……あの子の助言って……じゃあ今の元ネタは東京●●ブンズですか……あれ: Nadeshiko: “...That girl’s advice... was the source for that ‘Tokyo ●●-buns’ then...? There was a lot going on and I didn't get to read the sixth volume, which was the latest at the time...”
重明\n「……そんな名前だったような……確かそれ、華穂も好きなんだよな」: Shigeaki: “...I think it was called something like that... Kaho likes that one too, if I recall.”
撫子\n「ちなみにソレは、私が華穂さまにお奨めしました」: Nadeshiko: “By the way, I was the one who recommended that to Kaho-sama.”
重明\n「……まぁいいや……とりあえずここがいくら非常識な空間でも、俺には超能力: Shigeaki: “...Whatever... anyway, even if this space is nonsensical, I’ve confirmed that I can't use psychic powers or anything.”
撫子\n「じゃあもし襲われたらどうするんですか？」: Nadeshiko: “Then what will you do if you’re attacked?”
重明\n「まずは暴力に訴えるけど、駄目なら逃げる……まぁ多分、そういう事にはなら: Shigeaki: “I’ll resort to violence first, and if that doesn't work, I’ll run... well, I don't think it’ll come to that, but...”
重明\n「……何かお前……俺が桔梗ちゃんから聞いてたのと、印象が違う気がするんだ: Shigeaki: “...Say... you seem to have a different impression than what I heard from Kikyou-chan... are you really that Nadeshiko... who died at Shirahanasou?”
重明\n「ああ、桔梗ちゃんや京香ちゃんに聞いた話だと……お前って真面目で物静かな: Shigeaki: “Yeah, based on what I heard from Kikyou-chan and Kyoka-chan... I heard you were a serious, quiet, and gentle girl.”
撫子\n「ああ、それ私の上っ面だから……演技、演技」: Nadeshiko: “Ah, that was just my surface... an act, an act.”
重明\n「……お前、妹にも演技していたのか？」: Shigeaki: “...You were even acting for your sister?”
撫子\n「そうだよ……桔梗どころかお母さんも……一応尚人の前でも自分を殺してたし: Nadeshiko: “Yeah... not just Kikyou, but my mother too... and I was supressing myself even in front of Naoto.”
撫子\n「……まぁこんな生意気な性格してるって周りにバレたら……自分の存在自体が: Nadeshiko: “...Well, it was an environment where my very existence might have been in danger if people found out I had such a cheeky personality.”
重明\n「……ずっと自分を殺して生きてきたわけか……大変だったんだな」: Shigeaki: “...So you lived while suppressing yourself the whole time... That must have been tough.”
撫子\n「まぁね……それに、人間死ぬと人が変わるって言うじゃん？」: Nadeshiko: “I guess... besides, they say people change when they die, right?”
