重明\n「いや、それは死にそうな目にあってであって……死んだら変わりようもないだ: Shigeaki: “No, that’s when they have a brush with death... there’s no way to change once you’re dead.”
撫子\n「細かく突っ込まない……まぁようするに、色々と衝撃的な事を経験した結果…: Nadeshiko: “Don't get into the specifics... basically, as a result of experiencing all sorts of shocking things... the 'me' here is much more mellow as a human than when I was alive.”
重明\n「……いやお前の言動は親しげな感じはあるけど……別に丸くないと思うぞ」: Shigeaki: “...Well, your words and actions are friendly... but I don't think you’re mellow.”
撫子\n「三角形の正四面体から五角形の正十二面体になれば、もう結構丸いと思わない: Nadeshiko: “Don't you think going from a triangular tetrahedron to a pentagonal dodecahedron is already pretty mellow? It’s like that.”
重明\n「なるほど……つまり生前のお前は、痛いヤツだったんだな」: Shigeaki: “I see... in other words, you were a real pain in the ass when you were alive.”
撫子\n「……ちなみにさっき名前が出たキョウカって子……もしかして足をひきずって: Nadeshiko: “...By the way, that girl Kyoka whose name came up... does she happen to drag her leg?”
撫子\n「そっか……あの子、今も元気なのか……よかったよかった」: Nadeshiko: “I see... so that girl is still doing well... that’s good, that’s good.”
重明\n「……そうか……んじゃ、お前がヨロシク言ってたと……京香ちゃんに伝えてお: Shigeaki: “...I see... well then, I’ll tell Kyoka-chan that you said hello.”
結局、呪文で何の現象も起きなかったが……やりきった達成感で、多少は緊張はほぐれた: In the end, the spell didn't cause any phenomena... but I feel like my tension has eased a bit thanks to the sense of accomplishment from having seen it through.
そんなプラス思考の自分自身に、少しばかり心強いものを感じる中……: Feeling somewhat encouraged by my own positive thinking...
……俺は意を決し、白花荘の玄関のドアノブをグッと握り締めるのだった。: ...I steel my resolve and firmly grip the doorknob of Shirahanasou’s entrance.
扉を開けロビーに足を踏み入れた途端……薄暗く何とも言えない不気味な雰囲気を前に、: The moment I open the door and step into the lobby... a sensation like a chill runs down my spine at the dim and indescribably eerie atmosphere.
重明\n（吹雪の中から建物に入ったら寒気を感じるとか……中々の冗談だな……）: Shigeaki: (Feeling a chill when entering a building from a blizzard... that’s quite the joke...)
暗い部屋の中を一通り見渡してみたものの……人影らしきものは見つけられなかった。: I scanned the dark room... but I couldn't find anything like a silhouette.
だが、こういうひと気のない場所は……想像力がある人間を、臆病にさせる。: However, a deserted place like this... makes a person with an imagination cowardly.
……もしかして物陰に誰か居て、急に飛び出してくるのでは……: ...Maybe someone is hiding in the shadows and will suddenly jump out...
そんな妄想が頭に過ぎり……俺はもう一度、注意深く辺りを見渡していく。: Such a delusion crossed my mind... and I carefully scanned the area once more.
重明\n（……俺ちょっとビビリ過ぎかな……まぁいい、誰も居ないなら他へ行くか……: Shigeaki: (...Am I being a bit too much of a scaredy-cat... oh well, if no one’s here, I’ll go elsewhere...)
……後ろに居る撫子に、そう声をかけようとした所……: ...Just as I was about to say that to Nadeshiko behind me...
正面の通路の暗がりから、人影が現れ……それはゆっくりと……こちらへと近づいてきた: A figure appeared from the darkness of the hallway ahead... and slowly... approached me.
くす葉\n「……私の人生って……いったい何だったのかな……」: Kusuha: “...What exactly... was my life anyway...?”
くす葉\n「……恋人どころか恋をした事もない……部活とか習い事とかで、何か目標を: Kusuha: “...I never had a target of affection, let alone a lover... I never had the experience of having a goal and working hard at club activities or lessons...”
くす葉\n「……けど別に刺激が欲しかったわけじゃない……私は……ただ平凡でヌルい: Kusuha: “...But it’s not that I wanted excitement... I... just wanted to continue a mundane, lukewarm life... indefinitely...”
くす葉\n「……売られたのは凄いショックだったけど……３年耐えさえすれば、元の生: Kusuha: “...It was a huge shock to be sold... but I told myself... that if I could just endure for three years, I could return to my original life...”
くす葉\n「……首を絞められたまま犯され……水の中に顔を突っ込まれたまま犯され…: Kusuha: “...I was raped while being strangled... raped while my face was shoved into water... they even sent an electric current through me... and shoved all sorts of things... into every hole...”
くす葉\n「……何回も……何回も死ぬ……今度こそ死んじゃうって……そう思った……: Kusuha: “...I thought... that I was going to die... over and over... that I was really going to die this time...”
くす葉\n「……けど生きてる……まだ平気……今を我慢さえすれば……また平凡な生活: Kusuha: “...But I’m alive... I’m still okay... If I just endure now... I can return to a mundane life... there’s a future... believing that... I continued to endure the lewd abuse and pain...”
くす葉\n「……けど……この催し物が終わったら、病院で手足を切断するって言われて: Kusuha: “...But... they told me that once this event was over, they’d amputate my limbs at the hospital... and because I’m stupid... I finally realized...”
くす葉\n「……期限は３年でも、自分の生涯を対価として売ってしまったんだって……: Kusuha: “...Even if the limit was three years, I had sold my own life as the price... I couldn't return to a mundane life... I finally felt... that I have no more future...”
くす葉\n「……近くにあったガラスの灰皿で……男の頭を何度も打ちつけてた……」: Kusuha: “...I hit the man’s head over and over... with a glass ashtray that was nearby...”
くす葉\n「……帰りたかった……平和だった日常に……差し押さえられて住めなくなっ: Kusuha: “...I wanted to go home... to my peaceful everyday life... to the house that was seized and I couldn't live in anymore... to the warm place where my father, mother, and... sister are...”
くす葉\n「……家族に迷惑がかからないよう……酷い事をする悪い奴等を全員殺してか: Kusuha: “...So as not to cause trouble for my family... I intended to kill all the bad people who did horrible things, and then escape from here...”
くす葉\n「……二度と起き上がってこれないよう……近くにあったストーブの石油をか: Kusuha: “...So they could never get back up... I poured kerosene from a nearby stove over them... and lit... a fire...”
くす葉\n「……そうしたら男の身体が勢いよく燃え始めて……やった……これで逃げれ: Kusuha: “...Then the man’s body started to burn vigorously... I did it... I can escape now... I have to hurry and run... I have to go home... when I thought that...”
くす葉\n「……急に身体からスッて力が抜けて……私……床に倒れちゃった……」: Kusuha: “...The strength suddenly drained from my body... and I... fell onto the floor...”
くす葉\n「……休まずずっと犯され続けてたんだもん……力なんて……残ってるはずも: Kusuha: “...I’d been raped continuously without rest... there was no way... any strength remained...”
くす葉\n「……人を一人殺せただけでも、ちょっとした奇跡だったのかもしれない……: Kusuha: “...Maybe it was a small miracle just to be able to kill one person...”
くす葉\n「……身動き出来ないまま……何も出来ないまま……どんどん火の手が広がっ: Kusuha: “...Unable to move... unable to do anything... the fire spread more and more...”
くす葉\n「……そして……そのまま……私は火に飲まれて……死んでしまった……」: Kusuha: “...And... just like that... I was consumed by the fire... and died...”
くす葉\n「……ねぇ重明さん……私の一生って……何だったのかな……」: Kusuha: “...Hey, Shigeaki-san... what was my life for...?”
くす葉\n「……結局何も出来なかった……何もしないまま……何も知らないまま終わっ: Kusuha: “...In the end, I couldn't do anything... it ended while I did nothing... while I knew nothing...”
くす葉\n「……別に何かしたかったわけじゃない……いつか自分は何か出来るって思い: Kusuha: “...It’s not that I wanted to do something... while thinking I’d be able to do something someday... I just wanted to live... mundanely...”
くす葉\n「……それがいけなかったのかな……私……悪い事したのかな……」: Kusuha: “...Was that wrong...? Did I... do something bad...?”
くす葉\n「……ねぇ重明さん……私って……凄く可哀想だよね……私の事……同情する: Kusuha: “...Hey, Shigeaki-san... I’m... very pitiful, aren't I...? You... pity me... right?”
くす葉\n「……このまま私の傍に居て……ずっと……ずっと一緒に居ようよ……ねぇ…: Kusuha: “...Stay by my side like this... let’s be together... forever and ever... hey... that’s okay, right?”
重明\n（……ヤバい……何かわからないけど……ヤバい気がする……）: Shigeaki: (...This is bad... I don't know why... but I feel like this is bad...)
だが本能は、この状況を危険と判断したらしい……先ほどから不安という形で訴えかけ、: But my instinct seems to have judged this situation as dangerous... It’s been pleading with me in the form of anxiety, making my legs go weak.
……ここでの一番の目的は、華穂を目覚めさせる事……: ...My primary goal here is to wake Kaho up...
面倒ごとは避け、くす葉を無視するのも……選択としては正しいと思う。: I think ignoring Kusuha to avoid trouble... would be a correct choice.
だが俺は……その安全策を取る気はまるでなかった。: But I... had no intention of taking that safe route.
……ある意味、俺はもう一度彼女に会う為に……ここへ再び足を運んだのだから……: ...In a sense, I came here again... to see her one more time...
重明\n「俺とお前は……本当は現実には出会ってない……いわば全くの他人……友達ど: Shigeaki: “You and I... the truth is we never met in reality... we’re essentially total strangers... let alone friends... I’ve never even caught a glimpse of you...”
重明\n「けどな……俺はお前を親しい存在だと思ってる……」: Shigeaki: “But... I think of you as someone close to me...”
重明\n「たとえ出会いが幻でも……大切な友達で……とても可哀想だと……心の底から: Shigeaki: “Even if our meeting was an illusion... you’re an important friend, and I think from the bottom of my heart... that you’re very pitiful.”
重明\n「けどな……俺はお前の傍に居る事は出来ない……こればっかりは諦めてくれ」: Shigeaki: “But... I can't stay by your side... You have to give up on that much.”
くす葉\n「……私の事……大切に思ってくれてるんでしょ……私……凄く……凄く……: Kusuha: “...You think of me as important... right...? I’m... very... very... pitiful, aren't I?”
重明\n「ああ……さっきも言った通り、大切な友達で可哀想だと思ってるよ……けどな: Shigeaki: “Yeah... as I said just now, I think of you as an important friend and you’re pitiful... But, I’m still alive.”
重明\n「だから、お前がいくら大切で可哀想だろうと……所詮は別の人間……未来をお: Shigeaki: “So, no matter how important and pitiful you are... you’re a different person after all... I have no intention of giving you my future.”
重明\n「けどな……ここに……傍に居る事は出来なくても……俺がお前にしてやれる事: Shigeaki: “But... even if I can't stay here... by your side... there are things I can do for you.”
くす葉\n「……そんなのいい……いらない……傍に居てくれればいい……他はいらない: Kusuha: “...I don't care about that... I don't want it... I just want you by my side... I don't want anything else... I’m lonely... I’m lonely alone... I’m lonely...”
くす葉\n「……私……何も出来なかった……私の一生に何の意味もなかった……」: Kusuha: “...I... couldn't do anything... there was no meaning to my life...”
くす葉\n「……悲しい……虚しいよ……寂しいよ……せめて……せめて傍に居て欲しい: Kusuha: “...I’m sad... it’s empty... I’m lonely... at least... I want you by my side... Shigeaki-san... stay by my side...”
重明\n「……気持ちはわからんでもない……けど、どうにも出来ないんだよ……それに: Shigeaki: “...I can understand how you feel... but I just can't do it... And... and besides...”
重明\n「お前の一生はさ、確かに可哀想で理不尽だったかもしれねぇけど……別に何も: Shigeaki: “Your life... it certainly was pitiful and irrational... but it’s not that you couldn't do anything, or that it was meaningless.”
くす葉\n「……うそ……嘘……嘘嘘……嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘……嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘嘘: Kusuha: “...Lie... lie... lie, lie... lie, lie, lie, lie, lie... lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie, lie...”
重明\n「いいや本当の事だ……証拠だってある」: Shigeaki: “No, it’s the truth... I even have proof.”
重明\n「ああ……それは、お前の妹の美奈恵ちゃんが無事だったって事だよ」: Shigeaki: “Yeah... it’s the fact that your sister, Minae-chan, was safe.”
重明\n「ああ……バッチリ探して会って話をしてきたぞ」: Shigeaki: “Yeah... I searched for her, met her, and talked with her.”
重明\n「……お前の妹ってだけで手がかり無かったからな……桔梗のお爺ちゃんに頭下: Shigeaki: “...I had no clues other than the fact that she was your sister... I had to bow my head to Kikyou’s grandfather to get information, and reach out to your friends... I had a pretty hard time, you know?”
重明\n「ああ、元気だった……周辺をちょっと探った後、喫茶店で１時間ほど喋っただ: Shigeaki: “Yeah, she was doing well... I only talked to her for about an hour at a cafe after scouting the area... but she was living a very mundane life in the house where she was taken in.”
重明\n「そうして妹が今も平和に暮らしているのは……お前がここで逃げ出さずに頑張: Shigeaki: “And the reason your sister is living in peace now... is because you worked hard here and didn't run away, right?”
重明\n「妹ちゃん、詳しくは知らされてないみたいだけど……お前が助けてくれたって: Shigeaki: “It seems your sister wasn't told the details... but she knew you saved her... she seemed incredibly grateful.”
重明\n「確かにお前の一生は幸せなものじゃなかったかもしれない……けど身体を張っ: Shigeaki: “Your life certainly might not have been a happy one... but you put your body on the line to protect your sister, didn't you... What good is it to dismiss that hard work as meaningless yourself?”
重明\n「お前は……存在が無意味だったと自虐し、自分を汚す必要なんてない……お前: Shigeaki: “You... don't need to be self-deprecating and defile yourself by saying your existence was meaningless... You worked hard enough... At least I think so.”
重明\n「……だから俺とここに居続ける事は諦めてくれ……理不尽でも……寂しくても: Shigeaki: “...So give up on staying here with me... even if it’s irrational... even if it’s lonely... even if it’s empty...”
くす葉\n「……だからって……だからって何？ ……いっぱい頑張って妹が救われたか: Kusuha: “...But... but what? ...You want me to endure... because I worked hard and my sister was saved? ...I... I haven't been rewarded... at all...?”
くす葉\n「……何それ……意味わかんない……全然納得出来ないよ……」: Kusuha: “...What’s that... it makes no sense... I can't accept that at all...”
重明\n「……俺も全然納得出来ねぇ……出来るもんなら過去に戻って……お前をどうに: Shigeaki: “...I can't accept it at all either... If I could, I’d go back to the past... and save you somehow...”
重明\n「……凄い悔しいけど……俺もお前も、もう何も出来ない……納得出来なくても: Shigeaki: “...It’s incredibly frustrating... but neither I nor you can do anything anymore... even if you can't accept it... it’s over... you have to give up.”
くす葉\n「……嫌……重明さん……ここに居てよ……可哀想な私の傍に……ずっと居て: Kusuha: “...No... Shigeaki-san... stay here... stay by my side, since I’m so pitiful... stay here forever...”
重明\n「……無理だ……俺は行く……未来へ……前へ進む……華穂を悲しませたくない: Shigeaki: “...I can't... I’m going... to the future... I’m moving forward... I don't want to make Kaho sad... And, this might be a stretch, but if I stay here like this...”
重明\n「……お前の妹に何かあった時……代わりに俺が駆けつけてやれないだろうが…: Shigeaki: “...If something happens to your sister... I won't be able to rush to her side for you, will I...”
何度も諦めろと言われ、まるで子供のように泣き叫ぶくす葉。: Told to give up over and over, Kusuha screams and cries like a child.
本当のくす葉と俺は……こうして出会う事はなかった。: The real Kusuha and I... never met like this.
何も知らないまま、一人で山奥に来て……誰一人味方の居ない白花荘で、男達に陵辱の限: Knowing nothing, she came to the mountains alone... and at Shirahanasou, where she had no allies... she was subjected to all the lewdness the men could muster... and she died.
しかも現実では、２日間ではなく……何日も……この白花荘で汚されていたらしい。: Moreover, in reality, it wasn't for two days... but for many days... that she was being defiled at Shirahanasou.
そしてくす葉が死ぬ当日……本来なら、他にも客の相手をする女の子が……何人か用意さ: And on the day Kusuha died... originally, several other girls were supposed to be prepared to deal with the customers.
それが大雪で女たちが白花荘へ向かえなかった為……既に宿に入っていた客達は、初心な: But because the heavy snow prevented those girls from reaching Shirahanasou... the customers who were already at the inn flocked to the inexperienced Kusuha... and as a result, she was pushed to the limit.
……時間にして体感１０分ぐらいが経過しただろうか？: ...Has it been about ten minutes since then?
落ち着きを取り戻し、泣く事をやめていたくす葉が……俯いたまま、こちらへと顔を向け: Kusuha, who had regained her composure and stopped crying... turned her face toward me while looking down.
くす葉\n「重明さんにとって、私との出会いって……どうだったわけ？」: Kusuha: “To you, our meeting... how was it?”
くす葉に言われ、俺は幻の白花荘に来てからの出来事を軽く思い返していく。: Prompted by Kusuha, I briefly recall the events since coming to the illusory Shirahanasou.
重明\n「……出会いは……なんというか結構個性的だったよな……」: Shigeaki: “...Our meeting... was quite unique, to say the least...”
くす葉\n「……重明さん達を見た瞬間、何事かと思ったよ……」: Kusuha: “...I wondered what was going on the moment I saw you and the others...”
重明\n「風呂にも入ったっけ……しかも混浴」: Shigeaki: “We even took a bath together... and it was mixed bathing, too.”
くす葉\n「……初対面だっていうのに……ほんとにもう……重明さんって何なんですか: Kusuha: “...Even though it was the first time we met... seriously... what are you, Shigeaki-san... you even grabbed me... and threw me into the bath...”
重明\n「面白かっただろ？ ……お前だってまんざらじゃない感じだったじゃないか」: Shigeaki: “It was fun, right? ...You seemed to like it too, in your own way.”
くす葉\n「まんざらではなく重明さんに呆れてたんですよ……」: Kusuha: “I didn't like it, I was just exasperated by you, Shigeaki-san...”
くす葉\n「まぁいやらしい感じはなかったから……凄く嫌だったわけじゃないけど……: Kusuha: “Well, there was nothing nasty about it... so I didn't exactly hate it...”
重明\n「その後、一緒にメシを食べたっけ……ぶっちゃけ何食べたか、まるで覚えてな: Shigeaki: “After that, we ate together, I think... To be honest, I don't remember what we ate at all.”
くす葉\n「まぁ……その……全部幻ですしね」: Kusuha: “Well... that’s... because it’s all an illusion.”
重明\n「けどそこで話した事は覚えてるぜ……まぁ特に中身のある話をしたわけじゃな: Shigeaki: “But I remember what we talked about there... well, it’s not like we talked about anything with substance, though.”
くす葉\n「……そうですね……でも私……ああいう空気……嫌いじゃないですよ……」: Kusuha: “...That’s true... but... I don't hate... that kind of atmosphere...”
重明\n「お前との出会いは、凄く刺激的で楽しかった……ここに至るまでも含めて、一: Shigeaki: “Meeting you was very stimulating and fun... Including everything that led up to this, it was a meeting I’ll never forget for the rest of my life.”
くす葉\n「……それってつまり私と会って凄く怖い思いをしたって……言いたいんです: Kusuha: “...Does that mean you want to say that you had a very scary experience meeting me?”
重明\n「いやいや……お前は女の子として凄い魅力的だったよ」: Shigeaki: “No, no... as a girl, you were very charming.”
重明\n「可愛くて……ちょっと生意気な所も含めて、一緒に居て楽しかった」: Shigeaki: “You’re cute... and including your slightly cheeky side, it was fun being with you.”
重明\n「けど外見はもう少し背が高くて、こうおっぱいも大きかったら俺のストライク: Shigeaki: “But as for your appearance, if you were a bit taller and had bigger breasts, you’d have been right in my strike zone... well, even so, Kaho is far superior.”
くす葉\n「……何ですかそれ……人がちょっといい気分になってたのに……台無しなん: Kusuha: “...What was that... just when I was starting to feel a bit good... you ruined it.”
重明\n「しょうがないだろ……これがまったく紛れもない俺の……本心なんだからさ」: Shigeaki: “It can't be helped... this is my... true feelings, without a doubt.”
くす葉\n「……ふふ……何て言うか……重明さんって……ほんと……どうしょうもない: Kusuha: “...Hehe... how should I put it... Shigeaki-san... you’re really... a hopeless person...”
重明\n「そうか？ ……自分では結構イケてる方だと思うんだけど」: Shigeaki: “Is that so? ...I thought I was doing pretty well myself.”
俺としては、くす葉の評価に納得がいかない……: Personally, I wasn't satisfied with Kusuha’s evaluation...
……ならば第三者である撫子に、評価してもらうとしよう……: ...In that case, I’ll have Nadeshiko, who’s a third party, evaluate me...
……そう考え意識をくす葉から傍にいる撫子に移した瞬間……: ...The moment I shifted my consciousness from Kusuha to Nadeshiko beside me...
……くす葉の気配が、忽然とロビーから消え去っていく。: ...Kusuha’s presence suddenly vanished from the lobby.
重明\n「……消えたって…………まだ……お別れとか言ってないだろ？」: Shigeaki: “...What do you mean she’s gone............ I haven't even said goodbye...?”
重明\n「それにさ……あいつの妹の事だって……今後は桔梗ちゃんにバックアップして: Shigeaki: “Besides... I even got a promise from Kikyou-chan to back up her sister in the future... I wanted to tell her... to reassure her...”
呟くように無念を言葉にするものの……それをくす葉に伝えたからと言って何がどうなる: I put my regret into words as a mutter... but then the question of what would happen if I told Kusuha that suddenly surfaced in my mind.
結局の所……それは俺が言いたかっただけ……それを伝えたからと言って、くす葉自身が: In the end... that was just something I wanted to say... Telling her that doesn't mean Kusuha herself would be saved.
撫子\n「……あれでよかったって？」: Nadeshiko: “...What do you mean, was that alright?”
重明\n「……いやさ……俺の中では……もっとこうちゃんと……アイツを弔ってやりた: Shigeaki: “...Well... I... wanted to properly... mourn her, you know?”
重明\n「……精一杯頭を捻ったよ……何かいい言葉はないかって……」: Shigeaki: “...I racked my brain as much as I could... wondering if there were any good words...”
重明\n「……けど思いつくいい感じのヤツは……結局どれもが全部誰かの受け売りって: Shigeaki: “...But the ones I thought of... they all felt like someone else’s words in the end... like, they weren't my own words...”
重明\n「そうして色々と悩んだ結果……結局の所、俺はアイツ自身の境遇への無念に対: Shigeaki: “So after agonizing over it, in the end, I could only tell her to give up... in response to her regret over her own situation...”
重明\n「……俺がくす葉なら、諦めろとか言われても絶対に納得出来ねぇ……ほんと意: Shigeaki: “...If I were Kusuha, I’d never accept being told to give up... it makes no sense at all...”
重明\n「けどさ……他に何てアイツに言えばよかったんだ……ずっと傍に居るとか……: Shigeaki: “But... what else could I have said to her... should I have told a temporary lie that I can't keep, like saying I’d stay by her side forever...?”
重明\n「……心の中にいるとか……適当なこと言えばいいのかよ……必ず墓参りすると: Shigeaki: “...Should I have said some random thing like I’ll always be with her in my heart...? Would she be happy... to be told I’ll definitely visit her grave...? When I thought that... I couldn't... think of anything...”
重明\n「……もっと上手くやりたかったのに……格好わりぃなぁ……畜生……」: Shigeaki: “...I wanted to do better... how pathetic... dammit...”
撫子\n「……確かに……客観的に見て、全体的にあまり格好のいい感じではなかったか: Nadeshiko: “...It’s true... looking at it objectively, overall, it wasn't exactly a cool display.”
撫子\n「けどくす葉って子は……あれで十分救われたと思うよ」: Nadeshiko: “But I think that girl Kusuha... was sufficiently saved by that.”
撫子\n「……そうだよ……私はあのくす葉って子の事は……正直よく知らないけど……: Nadeshiko: “...It is... Honestly, I don't know much about that girl Kusuha... but...”
撫子\n「本当は味方の居ないこの白花荘で、一人寂しく死んじゃったのに……幻の中と: Nadeshiko: “Even though she actually died lonely and alone at this Shirahanasou where she had no allies... even if it was in an illusion, she was able to meet a friend... who truly cared about her like this.”
撫子\n「ならさ……たとえ彼女の身に起きた不幸な結末は、何も変えられなかったかも: Nadeshiko: “Then... even if nothing could be changed about the tragic end that befell her... I think meeting you was a salvation for her, wasn't it?”
撫子\n「じゃあさ、重明さん……あの子、重明さんと会って……お喋りして……楽しそ: Nadeshiko: “Well then, Shigeaki-san... didn't that girl... seem happy to meet you... and chat...? Did she look like she hated it?”
重明\n「そんなわけあるか……そりゃ特に何か中身ある話をしたわけじゃないけど……: Shigeaki: “As if... I mean, we didn't exactly talk about anything with substance, but... we enjoyed the time together to the fullest in a useless way, even if it was short.”
撫子\n「だろうね……重明さん、何か場を盛り上げるのとかそういうの得意そうだし」: Nadeshiko: “I bet... You seem good at livening things up, Shigeaki-san.”
重明\n「ああ、だから盛り上げ要員として飲み会とかよく誘われるよ……何せこの通り: Shigeaki: “Yeah, that’s why I’m often invited to drinking parties as the person to liven things up... since I’m this handsome, after all.”
撫子\n「はいはい……まぁようするにさ……あの子にとっては……多分それで十分だっ: Nadeshiko: “Yes, yes... anyway... for that girl... that was probably enough.”
重明\n「……俺なら……絶対納得出来ないぞ」: Shigeaki: “...If it were me... I’d never accept that.”
撫子\n「それは重明さんがロマンチストじゃないから……だってあの子、最後は何かス: Nadeshiko: “That’s because you aren't a romantic, Shigeaki-san... I mean, that girl, she seemed refreshed at the end, didn't she?”
撫子\n「重明さんは頑張った……他の誰でもない、重明さんらしさであの子を弔えた…: Nadeshiko: “You worked hard, Shigeaki-san... I think you were able to mourn her in your own way, like no one else could.”
撫子\n「うんうん、頑張った頑張った」: Nadeshiko: “Yep, yep, you did great, you did great.”
重明\n「……そうか……いつまでもウジウジしてるのも何だし……パンツも見たし……: Shigeaki: “...I guess... there’s no point in moping forever... and I saw her panties, so... let’s just leave it at that.”
重明\n「ああ、さっきからバッチリ見えてたぞ」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, I could see them clearly just now.”
撫子\n「んぐっ！？ ……せ、せっかく人が真面目に慰めてやってんのにぃ…………ど: Nadeshiko: “Ngh!? ...Wh-when I was seriously trying to comfort you............ where are you looking! You pervert!”
重明\n「そんな事言っても、見えたんだからしょうがねーだろ……男はな……状況とか: Shigeaki: “Even if you say that, I saw them, so there’s nothing I can do... Men are... creatures whose eyes go to panties when they see them, regardless of the situation.”
撫子\n「……重明さんって……実際素直で凄くいい人なんだけど……ほんとバカだよね: Nadeshiko: “...You really are a honest and good person, Shigeaki-san... but a total idiot, aren't you...”
重明\n「うるさい……けどまぁ……気落ちしてた所を慰めてくれてありがとな」: Shigeaki: “Shut up... but anyway... thanks for comforting me when I was feeling down.”
重明\n「さて……取り合えず次はどこへ行くか、考えるとしようぜ」: Shigeaki: “Now then... for now, let’s think about where to go next.”
撫子\n「……ああ……重明さん、どうせなら華穂さまの所へ行くのは最後にしておきま: Nadeshiko: “...Ah... Shigeaki-san, why don’t we save going to Kaho-sama for last?”
撫子\n「実際はどうなるかわからないけど……華穂さまが目覚めた瞬間、夢から覚める: Nadeshiko: “I don't know for sure what’ll happen... but there’s a chance that the moment Kaho-sama wakes up, this whole illusion of Shirahanasou will vanish like a dream ending.”
重明\n「……なるほど……こっちもこの機会に藤子さんや尚人と会っておきたいと思っ: Shigeaki: “...I see... and I did want to take this chance to see Touko-san and Naoto too... let’s do that.”
撫子\n「うんうん……じゃあまずは私のお母さんに会いに行こうよ」: Nadeshiko: “Yep, yep... then let’s go see my mother first.”
重明\n「藤子さんか……どこに居るかな……」: Shigeaki: “Touko-san, huh... I wonder where she is...”
撫子\n「いや、普通に考えて居ないでしょうそこには」: Nadeshiko: “No, think about it—there’s no way she’d be there.”
重明\n「去り際を察して、最後の入浴をしてるかもしれないだろ」: Shigeaki: “She might be sensing the end is near and taking one last soak, you know.”
撫子\n「……この何がどうなるかわからん状況下で【入浴してるかも】なんて考えるの: Nadeshiko: “...You’re probably the only person in the world who’d think [she might be taking a bath] in a situation as weird as this... Shigeaki-san...”
重明\n「……やっぱ……居ない……かな？」: Shigeaki: “...I guess... she’s not there... then?”
重明\n「そうか……最後に藤子さんの大きなおっぱい見られるかもって……チョット期: Shigeaki: “Bummer... I was kind of hoping I’d get to see Touko-san’s big tits one last time.”
撫子\n「実の娘の前で母のオッパイが見たいとか言わないで下さい……華穂さまに【重: Nadeshiko: “Please don't say you want to see my mother’s boobs right in front of her actual daughter... You want me to tell Kaho-sama [Shigeaki-san was lusting after my mom’s tits]?”
重明\n「……それはやめてくれ……じゃあ他を選ぶか……」: Shigeaki: “...Please don't do that... I’ll pick somewhere else...”
撫子\n「……それってここの隣の部屋の事だよね？」: Nadeshiko: “...You mean the room right next to this one?”
撫子\n「まぁそもそも……さすがに隣の部屋だし、居たら向こうからこっちに来るんじ: Nadeshiko: “Well, I mean... it’s the room right next door; if someone were there, wouldn't they have just come over here?”
重明\n「確かに……となると別の場所か……」: Shigeaki: “Point taken... so it’s somewhere else...”
撫子\n「……地下室……誰か居るかなぁ？」: Nadeshiko: “...The basement... I wonder if anyone’s down there?”
重明\n「だな……となると他の場所か」: Shigeaki: “Yeah... guess it’s somewhere else then.”
撫子\n「適当って……そこで私のお母さんは……何してるわけ？」: Nadeshiko: “One of the rooms... what would my mother even be doing there?”
重明\n「……となると……お前の部屋……とか？」: Shigeaki: “...In that case... how about your room...?”
撫子\n「……ああ、うん……何かお母さん、そこに居そうな気がする」: Nadeshiko: “...Oh, yeah... I have a feeling Mother might be there.”
重明\n「んじゃ行ってみるか」: Shigeaki: “Then let’s give it a look.”
撫子\n「へぇ……じゃあ今すぐ１人で行って外をくまなく探してきてくださいよ」: Nadeshiko: “Heh... then by all means, go out there by yourself right now and search every inch of the outdoors.”
重明\n「……いや、まて……やっぱ外の可能性は薄いかなぁ……」: Shigeaki: “...No, wait... the chances of her being outside are pretty slim, I guess...”
撫子\n「そういうのいいから……男らしく言った責任を取って外に出てくださいよ」: Nadeshiko: “I’m done with the jokes... take responsibility for what you said like a man and get out there.”
重明\n「……じゃあ……仕方ない……ちょっくら行って来るわ……」: Shigeaki: “...Fine... I’ll go... give me a second...”
重明\n「……さ、さみぃ！ 寒いよ！」: Shigeaki: “...I-It’s freezing! It’s so fucking cold!”
重明\n「……つーか、入る前はそれほど気にならなかったのに……何でこんなに寒く感: Shigeaki: “...I mean, I didn't mind it that much before I came in... why does it feel so cold now...?”
撫子\n「……それはやっぱり……幻覚だから？ ……寒いって思い込むと、より寒く感: Nadeshiko: “...Is it because... it’s a hallucination? ...If you're convinced it’s cold, maybe it just feels colder...”
重明\n「……お前さ……何で扉に鍵かけてんだよ……」: Shigeaki: “...Hey... why did you lock the door...?”
撫子\n「……いやぁ……やっぱ定番ネタかなぁ……と思って」: Nadeshiko: “...Well... I just thought... it was a classic trope.”
重明\n「ぐ……まぁ確かにそうなんだけどさ……このお化け屋敷みたいな状況でやるか: Shigeaki: “Ugh... I mean, you’re not wrong... but do you really have to do that in a haunted-house situation like this? ...I actually panicked a bit getting locked out there, you know?”
撫子\n「はいはい、ごめんごめん……お詫びにチューでもしてあげようか？」: Nadeshiko: “Yeah, yeah, sorry, sorry... Want a kiss to make up for it?”
これがもし華穂だったり、桔梗もしくは藤子なら多少なりともドキドキとしてしまうのだ: If this were Kaho, or Kikyou, or even Touko, my heart would be pounding at least a little... but with Nadeshiko, I don't feel like that at all.
重明\n（……見た目は十分可愛いと思うんだけど……やっぱ性格の問題なのかな……）: Shigeaki: (...I think she’s plenty cute, but... I guess it’s a personality thing...)
とはいえ女の子に、お前とキスする気にはなれないなどと言うのは、あまりにも失礼。: Still, it would be way too rude to tell a girl I’m not interested in kissing her.
重明\n「……華穂に悪いし……やめておくわ」: Shigeaki: “...It wouldn't be fair to Kaho... so I’ll pass.”
部屋の中に入ると……ベッドの端に腰かけた藤子が、一人ポツンと佇んでいた。: As I enter the room... I find Touko sitting alone on the edge of the bed, perfectly still.
感極まった感じで二人は歩み寄ると……撫子は甘え、藤子は包み込み、お互いの身体を抱: Overcome with emotion, the two of them step toward each other... Nadeshiko seeking affection and Touko embracing her, as they hold each other tight.
親子の感動の再会を前に、余所者の俺が出る幕はない。: Facing this touching reunion of mother and daughter, there’s no place for an outsider like me.
俺は取り合えず傍観者になる事を決めると、入り口のドアに背中を寄りかからせ、親子の: I decide to remain a bystander for now, leaning my back against the door and watching over them.
撫子\n「……お母さん……先に死んじゃってごめんね……」: Nadeshiko: “...Mother... sorry for dying before you...”
撫子\n「……それと……産んでくれてありがとう……短い一生だったけど……私……幸: Nadeshiko: “...And... thank you for giving birth to me... It was a short life... but I was... I was happy...”
藤子\n「……私……ずっと考えてた……」: Touko: “...I’ve... been thinking about it this whole time...”
藤子\n「……もしかしたら貴方が……尚人さんの奴隷として、普通ではない人生を歩ま: Touko: “...Wondering if you... hated me for making you walk such an extraordinary path... as Naoto-san’s slave...”
撫子\n「……正直言えば……普通ならって思う事はあったかな……自分の生い立ちに悩: Nadeshiko: “...To be honest... there were times I wondered what a 'normal' life would be like... I worried about my upbringing... and I got depressed sometimes...”
撫子\n「けどね……普通に産まれて普通に暮らしてたら……尚人の傍には居られなかっ: Nadeshiko: “But you know... if I’d been born normally and lived a normal life... I wouldn't have been by Naoto’s side... so I’m glad it turned out this way.”
撫子\n「……まぁこんな風に思えるのも……こうして死んだ事で……今までをちゃんと: Nadeshiko: “...Well, the only reason I can think like this... is because I died... and finally became able to look back properly on everything...”
撫子\n「……どうしてお母さんも含めて、白花荘に居た人達はみんな死んじゃったのに: Nadeshiko: “...Everyone at Shirahanasou died, including you... so why was Kikyou the only one who was saved?”
それは俺も聞きたかったし、聞くつもりだった。: That was something I wanted to ask, too—and something I’d intended to ask.
体力のない桔梗が助かるなら、他の男性の客も何人かは助かってもよかったはず。: If the frail Kikyou was saved, at least a few of the male guests should have been able to make it out.
それなのに何故……桔梗だけが、ただ一人助かったのだろうか？: So why... was Kikyou the only one who survived?
藤子\n「……煙を吸って意識を失った桔梗と私をね……助けてくれたのよ……お客様達: Touko: “...Kikyou and I had lost consciousness from inhaling the smoke... but we were saved... by the guests...”
重明\n「……お客様って……ここのショーを見に来た、おっさん達がって事ですか？」: Shigeaki: “...By the guests... you mean the middle-aged guys who came to see the show?”
藤子\n「ええ……もちろん皆さん全員がというわけではないけれど……何人かの方が身: Touko: “Yes... of course, not every single one of them... but several of them put their lives on the line... to let us escape...”
藤子\n「どうにか火の中を抜けてロビーに辿り着いて……あと少しで外に出れるって所: Touko: “I managed to make it through the fire to the lobby somehow... but when I saw the front entrance engulfed in flames, only a few steps from getting out... I honestly felt my heart break...”
藤子\n「……もう桔梗と二人でこのまま死ぬんだって……撫子の時みたいに……私はま: Touko: “...I thought Kikyou and I were going to die right there together... that once again... just like with Nadeshiko... I wouldn't be able to save my own daughter...”
藤子\n「……そうしたらね……燃え上がる炎の中に……尚人さんの幻が見えたの……」: Touko: “...And then... within the roaring flames... I saw an illusion of Naoto-san...”
藤子\n「尚人さん……ここで諦めるな……道は俺が見つけるから頑張れって……二人の: Touko: “Naoto-san... he encouraged me, telling me not to give up here... that he would find a path for us, so I had to stay strong... and protect our children... protect Kikyou...”
藤子\n「……私……言われるがまま、必死に足を運んだわ……無我夢中だったせいか、: Touko: “...I moved my feet desperately, just as I was told... Maybe because I was in such a trance, I didn't even notice the many burns I suffered along the way...”
藤子\n「……炎の中を突っ切って、細い裏口からどうにか外に出て……駐車してあった: Touko: “...I pushed through the fire and somehow got outside through a narrow back exit... I took the keys from the hand of a guest who had died near the parked cars... and put Kikyou inside one of them...”
藤子\n「……けど、二人で中に居たら……助けに来た人が見逃してしまうかも……」: Touko: “...But I thought if we both stayed inside... the people coming to help might miss us...”
藤子\n「……だから私は外に出て……扉に寄りかかって身体を休めた……ここに娘が居: Touko: “...So I went outside... and leaned against the door to rest... so that I could tell them my daughter was inside... to save her immediately...”
重明\n「だから藤子さんは……発見された時に、あえて外に居たんですね……」: Shigeaki: “So that’s why you were outside when they found you, Touko-san...”
藤子\n「……ええ……酷い火傷を負って……もう助からないって……自分でもわかって: Touko: “...Yes... I had suffered terrible burns... and I knew myself... that I wouldn't make it...”
藤子\n「ねぇ、重明さん……あの子は……桔梗は無事なの？」: Touko: “Say, Shigeaki-san... is that girl... is Kikyou safe?”
重明\n「ええ、１年間昏睡状態でしたが……華穂が病院に運ばれると同時刻ぐらいに、: Shigeaki: “Yes. She was in a coma for a year... but it seems she suddenly woke up at almost the exact same time Kaho was brought to the hospital.”
重明\n「ずっと寝たきりだったので流石にまだ歩けませんが……どこも異常はないし、: Shigeaki: “She’d been bedridden the whole time, so she can't walk yet... but the doctor said there are no abnormalities and she’ll be better in no time.”
撫子\n「あの子はもう大丈夫だよ……元々、尚人に似てあまり動じないタイプだし……: Nadeshiko: “That girl’s going to be fine now... She takes after Naoto; she’s not the type to get easily rattled...”
撫子\n「それに重明さんなら……この先も、ずっと……桔梗の事を助けてくれると思う: Nadeshiko: “Besides, I’m sure Shigeaki-san... will keep helping Kikyou from here on out.”
重明\n「……俺、お前にそんな事、言った覚えないぞ？」: Shigeaki: “...I don't remember ever telling you that.”
撫子\n「……妹の事……助けてくれないわけ？」: Nadeshiko: “...You’re not going to help my sister?”
重明\n「いやまぁ……今後も深く交流するつもりではあったし、もちろん何かあれば助: Shigeaki: “I mean... I did intend to stay in touch, and of course I’ll help if anything happens... though Kaho comes first, obviously.”
重明\n「まぁ……必ず桔梗ちゃんを幸せにするとまでは言いませんが……俺に任せてお: Shigeaki: “Well... I won't go so far as to say I’ll definitely make Kikyou-chan happy, but... you can leave her to me.”
藤子\n「……ええ、お願いします……末永く、あの子と仲良くしてあげてください」: Touko: “...Yes, please... Do stay on good terms with her for a long time to come.”
藤子\n「それじゃお母さんはもういくわね……元気で」: Touko: “Then Mother will be going now... take care.”
撫子\n「……元気って……もう私、死んでるし……」: Nadeshiko: “...Take care? I’m already dead, you know...”
撫子\n「……ぐすっ……重明さんも……そんな平気なフリしないで…………凄く悲しい: Nadeshiko: “...*sniff*... Shigeaki-san... don't act like you're so unfazed... when you’re sad... *sniff*... you shouldn't be ashamed... you don't have to hold it back, you can cry too...”
重明\n「……いや、特に悲しくもないし……別に泣くのを我慢してるわけじゃないんだ: Shigeaki: “...I mean, I’m not particularly sad... and it’s not like I’m holding back any tears.”
撫子\n「は！？ くす葉って子の時はあんなに感情移入して落ち込んでたのに……何そ: Nadeshiko: “Huh?! You got so emotionally invested and depressed over that Kusuha girl... what’s with this cold response now?! Isn't that a bit much?!”
重明\n「お前の言いたい事はわかる……確かに悲しい事件であり、感動しそうな話の流: Shigeaki: “I get what you’re saying... It was certainly a tragic incident, and the flow of the story was touching.”
重明\n「けど、お前は過去を振り返ると悪い人生じゃないって考えてたし……藤子さん: Shigeaki: “But you said yourself that looking back, your life wasn't bad... and Touko-san gave birth to two children and saved one of them with her own strength, didn't she?”
撫子\n「……むぅ……つまり……同情はするけど、あの子の時と違って救いがあるって: Nadeshiko: “...Mmu... so you mean... you sympathize, but unlike with that girl, there’s some salvation here... I guess you have a point.”
重明\n「ああ……それにくす葉とは幻の中で短かったとはいえ、友達として仲良くなっ: Shigeaki: “Yeah... plus, even if it was just in an illusion, I actually became friends with Kusuha before watching her go through hell... I mean, we're close in age; it’s only natural there’d be a difference in how much I relate.”
撫子\n「……私は……一応重明さんと年近いけど？」: Nadeshiko: “...I’m... technically close in age to you too, aren't I?”
重明\n「何だ撫子……お前自分の不幸な境遇を同情して欲しいのか？」: Shigeaki: “What is it, Nadeshiko... you want me to pity you for your tragic upbringing?”
撫子\n「ううん、全然、まったく」: Nadeshiko: “No, not at all, not even a bit.”
重明\n「……だろ？ ……つまり俺がここで凄く凹むのは説得力がないわけだ……いっ: Shigeaki: “...See? ...So it wouldn't be very convincing for me to get all depressed here... Just so you know, I’m not trying to take it lightly, okay?”
撫子\n「わかってる……妹の事……守ってくれるんでしょ？」: Nadeshiko: “I know... You’re going to protect my sister, right?”
撫子\n「……ありがとう……塩対応とか言ってごめん……ちょっと先走った」: Nadeshiko: “...Thank you... sorry for calling you cold... I got a bit ahead of myself.”
重明\n「気にすんな、気持ちはわかるって言っただろうが」: Shigeaki: “Don't sweat it. I told you I understand how you feel.”
重明\n「じゃあ俺も一応あえて言っておくが……俺はお前の事を軽く尊敬している」: Shigeaki: “Then I’ll go ahead and say this, just for the record... I actually respect you a little.”
重明\n「色々と話を聞いた感じ、普通に考えたらお前ってかなり不幸な一生を送ったわ: Shigeaki: “From everything I’ve heard, objectively speaking, you’ve had a pretty miserable life, haven't you?”
撫子\n「ん～……主観を抜いて客観的に振り返ると確かにそうかも……生まれる前から: Nadeshiko: “Hmm~... Looking back objectively and taking out my own bias, I guess that’s true... I was a sex slave? From before I was even born... I didn't have a birth certificate, and I barely got to go to school.”
重明\n「……考えようによってはくす葉より余程酷い目にあってきたわけだ……己の境: Shigeaki: “...Depending on how you look at it, you’ve been through much worse than Kusuha... It wouldn't even be weird if you were bitter about your situation or jealous of people who live normally.”
撫子\n「……まぁ無表情だけど尚人は優しかったし……それにさ……こうして死んでし: Nadeshiko: “...Well, Naoto was kind despite being expressionless... and you know... since I’ve already died, there’s no point in regretting it, is there?”
重明\n「それだ……そのお前のプラス思考……俺、結構嫌いじゃないぞ」: Shigeaki: “That’s it... That positive thinking of yours... I actually don't hate it.”
撫子\n「惚れんなよ」: Nadeshiko: “Don't go falling for me now.”
重明\n「まぁようするにだ……俺も死に際だったり死んで出て来た時は、誰かに恨み言: Shigeaki: “Basically... I’m saying when it’s my time to go, I’d rather be cracking jokes like you instead of whining to someone.”
撫子\n「あっそ……まぁ重明さんなら確実にそうなるんじゃない？」: Nadeshiko: “Is that so... well, I’m sure that’s exactly how it’ll go for you, Shigeaki-san.”
撫子\n「それじゃ雑談はこの辺にして……次行こうか、重明さん」: Nadeshiko: “Anyway, enough with the small talk... let’s move on, Shigeaki-san.”
立ち去る前に軽く頭を下げ、先ほどまで居た藤子に別れを告げる。: Before leaving, I bow my head slightly, saying goodbye to Touko who had been there until just a moment ago.
そして俺達は他の場所へ向かう為……部屋の外へ向け歩き出したのだった。: And then we started walking out of the room to head elsewhere.
華穂の所へ行きたい衝動を抑えつつ……俺と撫子は２階から階段を下り、ロビーへと戻っ: Suppressing the urge to head straight to Kaho... Nadeshiko and I head down the stairs from the second floor and return to the lobby.
新聞を読むオッサン\n「……おや、キミは……このまえ出て行ったと思ったのに……ま: Man Reading Newspaper: “...Oh, you... I thought you left the other day... but you’ve come back here again?”
重明\n「……どうも……その……出たはいいんですが、実は彼女が目を覚まさなくて…: Shigeaki: “...Hello... well... I did leave, but she didn't wake up... so surprisingly even to myself, I ended up back at Shirahanasou.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「はは……どんな理由であれ、またここに来るだなんて……キミ: Man Reading Newspaper: “Haha... whatever the reason, to come back here again... you’re quite the eccentric, aren't you.”
重明\n「いや、何でお前がそこで即答するんだよ」: Shigeaki: “Hey, why are you answering so quickly?”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「……ん？ ……そこのお嬢ちゃんは……見かけない顔だね……: Man Reading Newspaper: “...Hm? ...I don't recognize this young lady’s face...”
撫子\n「どうも、初めまして……私の名前は撫子……ここがまだ女子寮だった時に死ん: Nadeshiko: “Hello, nice to meet you... my name is Nadeshiko... I’m just the leftover scraps of a student who died when this place was still a girls' dormitory.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「……おお……キミがあの……まさかここで死んだ噂の子を見れ: Man Reading Newspaper: “...Oh... so you’re the one... I never thought I’d get to see the girl from the rumors who died here... My, it’s... an honor.”
重明\n「……なに二人して軽く意気投合してるんだよ……意味わかんねーし……」: Shigeaki: “...Why are the two of you hitting it off so easily... I don't get it...”
二人のやり取りに軽く呆れる中……急に背筋がゾクリとする感覚を覚えた俺は、直ぐさま: While I was slightly exasperated by their exchange... I suddenly felt a chill down my spine and immediately scanned my surroundings.
……すると周囲の影から……白い人の形をしたモヤのようなモノが……一つ……また一つ: ...Then, from the surrounding shadows... white, human-shaped mists... appeared... one after another.
？？？Ａ\n「やあ……確か君は、重明くん……だっけ？ ……よくココに……戻ってこ: ??? A: “Hi... You’re Shigeaki-kun... right? ...I’m surprised you managed to... come back here.”
重明\n「……どうも……けど、すみません……俺は呼んでもらった貴方の名前を知らな: Shigeaki: “...Hello... but, sorry... I don't know your name even though you called mine... and to be honest, I can't even tell who’s speaking...”
撫子\n「だね……こっちからは全部ただの白いモヤにしか見えないし」: Nadeshiko: “True... from over here, they all just look like white mists.”
重明\n「……ああ、お前にもそう見えるんだ」: Shigeaki: “...Oh, they look that way to you too?”
重明\n「……ペプ……い、いやぁ……一応服のラインもあるっぽいし……アレとはちょ: Shigeaki: “...Pep... I mean... they seem to have the outlines of clothes... aren't they a bit different from that?”
重明\n「いや目視出来るんだし、無理に例えなくてもいいから」: Shigeaki: “No, I can see them too, so you don't have to force a comparison.”
？？？Ａ\n「…………おや？ もしかして……貴方は……撫子くんではありませんか？: ??? A: “............ Oh? Could you be... Nadeshiko-kun?”
撫子\n「……もしかして……ここが女子寮だった時に常連だった……柏木さんですか？: Nadeshiko: “...Could it be... Mr. Kashiwagi, who was a regular back when this was a girls' dormitory?”
？？？Ａ\n「ええ！ その通り！ ……いやぁご無沙汰です……お互い死んで以来です: ??? A: “Yes! That’s right! ...My, it’s been a while... since we both died, I suppose.”
撫子\n「はい、どうもお久しぶりです」: Nadeshiko: “Yes, it’s been a long time.”
？？？Ｃ\n「いやぁ……まさかここで死んでしまった女の子の姿を、もう一度見られる: ??? C: “My... to think I’d get to see the girl who died here one more time... it’s truly moving...”
撫子\n「皆様方……最後の最後まで、この白花荘をご贔屓にして頂き……ありがとうご: Nadeshiko: “Everyone... thank you for patronizing Shirahanasou... until the very end.”
撫子\n「元オーナーの尚人、現オーナーの桔梗、藤子に代わりまして……私、撫子が…: Nadeshiko: “On behalf of the former owner Naoto, and the current owners Kikyou, Fujiko... I, Nadeshiko... would like to offer our words of gratitude.”
？？？Ｄ\n「いやいや……我々のようなクズには、実にいい場所だったよ」: ??? D: “No, no... for scum like us, it was truly a wonderful place.”
？？？Ｅ\n「ですな……はみ出し者が何かと生きずらい世の中……最後の楽園でしたな: ??? E: “Indeed... in a world where misfits have a hard time living... it was the final paradise.”
撫子\n「ありがとうございます……ですが誠に勝手ながら……現時点をもって、この白: Nadeshiko: “Thank you... however, by our own convenience... Shirahanasou will be closing its doors as of this moment.”
撫子\n「今までありがとうございました……誠に簡単で申し訳ありませんが、これにて: Nadeshiko: “Thank you for everything... this is a very brief and inadequate farewell, but this concludes our closing announcement.”
？？？Ｇ\n「……まぁ……藤子さんも、あのくす葉って子も居なくなってしまったみた: ??? G: “...Well... Touko-san and that Kusuha girl seem to be gone... and Kikyou-chan isn't here either... I suppose it can't be helped.”
？？？Ａ\n「そういえば……桔梗ちゃんは、あれからどうしたんだい？」: ??? A: “By the way... what happened to Kikyou-chan after that?”
撫子\n「おかげさまで元気です……一年近く寝たきりだったんで、まだリハビリ中らし: Nadeshiko: “She’s doing well, thanks to you... She was bedridden for nearly a year, so apparently she’s still in rehab, though.”
？？？Ｂ\n「おお、そうかそうか……よかった……本当によかった」: ??? B: “Oh, is that so... good... truly good.”
？？？Ｃ\n「さて……もうこれで思い残す事は……何もありませんな」: ??? C: “Well... now we have... no regrets left.”
？？？Ｄ\n「ええ……最後の最後に好き放題して、自業自得という感じで死んだという: ??? D: “Yeah... even though we died after doing whatever we wanted and getting what we deserved... we were able to enjoy ourselves like this again at the very end.”
新聞を読むオッサン\n「……では……我々はこれで失礼するよ」: Man Reading Newspaper: “...Well then... we’ll be taking our leave now.”
重明\n「ああ……オッサンらも、みんな仲良く往生しろよ」: Shigeaki: “Yeah... you old guys better pass on peacefully together.”
？？？Ａ\n「……まぁ往生といっても……我々の行き先は……やはり地獄なんだろうけ: ??? A: “...Well, even if we pass on... our destination is... likely hell anyway...”
重明\n「だな……いきなりワラワラ出て来た時は、どうしたもんかと思ったよ……」: Shigeaki: “Yeah... when they all started coming out at once, I wondered what was going to happen...”
撫子\n「このまま乱暴な展開に発展しちゃうかもって思った？」: Nadeshiko: “Did you think things might take a violent turn?”
重明\n「けどさ、お前えらく上手い感じで纏めたよな……もしかして事前にこのケース: Shigeaki: “But man, you handled that really well... did you plan for this case in advance?”
撫子\n「……ただ昔の知り合いが居て……ここのお客様だって思ったら……咄嗟にそれ: Nadeshiko: “...I just thought of the old acquaintances... and the customers here... and the words just came to me... after that, I just went with the flow.”
撫子\n「まぁね……これでも小さい頃から尚人の傍で仕事を手伝ってたわけだし」: Nadeshiko: “I guess... I did help Naoto with his work from a young age, after all.”
重明\n「今でも相当小さいだろ」: Shigeaki: “You’re still pretty small now, though.”
撫子\n「でも形だけとはいえ、一応お客様を見送れてよかった……何だかスッキリした: Nadeshiko: “But even if it was just a formality, I’m glad I could see the customers off... I feel a bit refreshed.”
撫子\n「……けどさ、重明さんは良かったわけ？」: Nadeshiko: “...But, Shigeaki-san, were you okay with that?”
撫子\n「今のお客さん達って、重明さんが仲良くしてたくす葉って子に酷い事したんで: Nadeshiko: “Those customers just now... they did horrible things to that Kusuha girl you were friendly with, didn't they? You didn't want to say anything to them?”
重明\n「ああ……そう言われれば……まぁ確かにそうなんだけど……」: Shigeaki: “Oh... now that you mention it... I guess you’re right...”
重明\n「何せもうみんな死んじまっているからな……今更文句を言ってどうするよって: Shigeaki: “But they’re all dead now anyway... what’s the point in complaining this late in the game... To be honest, I only realized it just now because you said it.”
撫子\n「まぁ、くす葉って子も……消えちゃった後だもんね」: Nadeshiko: “Well, Kusuha... she’s already gone, too.”
撫子\n「んじゃ、雑談はこの辺にして……最後の……尚人の所へ……いこっか」: Nadeshiko: “Then, enough small talk... shall we go to the last one... Naoto?”
地下の部屋に入り尚人が見えると、撫子が名前を呼びながら駆け寄っていく。: Entering the room in the basement and seeing Naoto, Nadeshiko runs toward him, calling his name.
撫子の小さな身体が、細身でしっかりとした身体つきの尚人の胸に収まり……二人は愛し: Nadeshiko’s small frame is gathered into the chest of the slim but well-built Naoto... and the two of them embrace each other affectionately.
撫子\n「……こうやって……素直な感情のままするって……生きてる間してなかったか: Nadeshiko: “...Acting on our honest feelings like this... we never did it while we were alive... it’s fresh... kind of embarrassing, but... I’m happy.”
尚人\n「……ああ、そうだな……お互い生きてる時は……自分の気持ちを曝け出すのが: Naoto: “...Yeah, that’s true... Neither of us was very good at... exposing our feelings when we were alive... it is fresh.”
撫子\n「そうそう……私達って……お互い面倒な人種だったよね」: Nadeshiko: “Exactly... we were both... difficult types, weren't we?”
撫子\n「なに重明さん、いかにもわざとってセキして……もしかして、尚人に嫉妬？」: Nadeshiko: “What is it, Shigeaki-san, with that obviously fake cough... are you jealous of Naoto?”
重明\n「んなわけあるか……完全に俺を忘れてイチャコラしはじめたから、存在をアピ: Shigeaki: “As if... you two completely forgot about me and started flirting, so I just wanted to remind you I exist.”
撫子\n「いいじゃん……久しぶりなんだしちょっとぐらい」: Nadeshiko: “Come on... it’s been a while, just a little bit is fine.”
尚人\n「いや別に構わないさ……座ろうか」: Naoto: “I don't mind either way... shall we sit?”
尚人\n「よく、再びこの場所へ来る気になれたな」: Naoto: “I’m surprised you felt like coming back here again.”
重明\n「当然……華穂のピンチとなれば、たとえ火の中水の中だ」: Shigeaki: “Of course... if Kaho’s in a pinch, I’ll go through fire or water.”
撫子\n「実際ここ火事で吹雪の中だもんね」: Nadeshiko: “Technically, we're in a fire during a blizzard here.”
重明\n「……お前なに飲んでるんだ？ ……てか、そもそも……その飲み物はドコから: Shigeaki: “...What are you drinking? ...And more importantly... where did that drink come from...?”
撫子\n「……ん？ これ？ ……これはただの雰囲気作りの幻……重明さんの分も出そ: Nadeshiko: “...Hm? This? ...This is just an illusion to set the mood... want me to get one for you too, Shigeaki-san?”
重明\n「……いやいいよ……つーか、そんな事出来るのか……俺は呪文を唱えても光す: Shigeaki: “...No, I’m good... I mean, you can do that? ...Even though not even a light came out when I chanted a spell.”
撫子\n「そりゃここは華穂さまの中で、重明さんは余所者だもん……とは言っても……: Nadeshiko: “That’s because we’re inside Kaho-sama, and you’re an outsider, Shigeaki-san... That said... I can only do things to the extent that it wouldn't be strange for it to be here.”
重明\n「……ふむ……そういうもんなのか……」: Shigeaki: “...I see... so that’s how it works...”
尚人\n「雑談はそこまでにして、いいかな？」: Naoto: “Can we leave the small talk at that?”
重明\n「……無事だよ……つーかその質問、今日これで３回目だったか？」: Shigeaki: “...She’s fine... I mean, is this the third time I’ve been asked that today?”
撫子\n「まぁしょうがないよ……同じ世界の住人とはいえ、全員の意識が繋がって情報: Nadeshiko: “It can't be helped... even if we're residents of the same world, it’s not like all of our consciousnesses are connected and sharing information.”
重明\n「ふむ……なら一応……詳しく説明しておくとするか……」: Shigeaki: “I see... then I’ll go ahead and... explain in detail...”
重明\n「ここの火事で意識不明になった後、病院に入院して１年ほど昏睡してたよ……: Shigeaki: “After losing consciousness in the fire here, she was in a hospital coma for about a year... She just woke up about four days ago, as if trading places with Kaho when she was brought in.”
尚人\n「そうか……その桔梗の世話はどうなっている？ それと僕の父はどうした？」: Naoto: “I see... and who is looking after Kikyou? And what happened to my father?”
撫子\n「身の回りの世話は、あの京香って子がやってるって……覚えてる？」: Nadeshiko: “The one taking care of her everyday is that girl Kyoka... do you remember her?”
尚人\n「……京香……確か最後に調教した娘の名だったか？」: Naoto: “...Kyoka... was that the name of the girl I trained last?”
重明\n「そうだ、あの子なんかお前の事を【あの方は自分を救ってくれた救世主です】: Shigeaki: “Yeah, that’s her. She was practically worshiping you, saying things like [That person is the savior who rescued me]...”
撫子\n「……ああ、それはまぁしょうがないかな……不幸にも売られた子が、人並みの: Nadeshiko: “...Ah, well, that can't be helped... It’s practically a given for a girl who was unfortunately sold to worship Naoto, who gave her a decent life and a woman’s pleasure.”
重明\n「それとお前の父親だけど、ヤボ用があって少し顔を合わせてきたよ……取り合: Shigeaki: “As for your father, I met him briefly because of a little errand... He seemed healthy enough, for now.”
撫子\n「はぁ！？ ……し、重明さん……あの御方に……直接会ったの！？」: Nadeshiko: “Huh?! ...Sh-Shigeaki-san... you met that man... in person?!”
重明\n「……いやいや、会うだけで無謀って何だよ……確かに何だか妙に迫力のある人: Shigeaki: “...Hey, why is meeting him 'reckless'? He certainly had an unusually powerful aura, but he wasn't exactly 'dangerous' enough to be that surprising, you know?”
尚人\n「……いや……我々が死に、桔梗も長期間倒れていた事で……多少なりとも丸く: Naoto: “...Well... maybe he’s mellowed out a bit... after we died and Kikyou was also down for a long time... It’s not impossible...”
撫子\n「……ええぇ……あのマフィアのボスみたいな冷徹な人が……その程度の事で変: Nadeshiko: “...What... That cold-blooded man who’s like a mafia boss... I find it hard to believe he’d change over something like that...”
重明\n「一応そっちの質問には答えたって事で……今度は俺の方がいくつか質問しても: Shigeaki: “Consider your questions answered... can I ask a few now?”
何故、初対面の時にキツくあたってきたのか: Why were you so hostile when we first met?
何故、最初から自分の事や桔梗の事を言わなかった: Why didn't you tell me the truth about yourself or Kikyou from the start?
撫子の事は実際、生前はどう思っていたのか: How did you actually feel about Nadeshiko when you were alive?
童貞捨てたのはいつ？: When did you lose your virginity?
重明\n「……初めて顔を合わせた時の事なんだが……何でお前あんな喧嘩腰だったんだ: Shigeaki: “...About the first time we met... why were you so aggressive?”
尚人\n「まぁ死んだはずなのに、何故か意識があり動けるという状況に戸惑っていたと: Naoto: “Well, I was confused by the situation where I should be dead but somehow had consciousness and could move... but the main reason was...”
尚人\n「直感でお前が娘を……桔梗を手篭めにするような気がしたからだ」: Naoto: “I had a hunch that you were going to... lay a hand on my daughter, Kikyou.”
尚人\n「直感というより、見て確信したと言った方がいいだろうな」: Naoto: “It was more than a hunch; I was convinced the moment I saw you.”
尚人\n「……お前の容姿、言動に見える思考……その表情にいたるまで……短い時間だ: Naoto: “...From your appearance to the thoughts visible in your words... and even your expression... it was a short time, but I knew this guy would definitely seduce my daughter...”
尚人\n「そう思ったら……つい口が滑った、ただそれだけの事だ」: Naoto: “When I thought that... my tongue just slipped. That’s all.”
撫子\n「……いや尚人、それ親馬鹿過ぎ……普段のあの冷静でかっこいいキャラは……: Nadeshiko: “...Naoto, you’re being way too much of a doting father... where did that cool and composed character of yours go...?”
尚人\n「……女のお前には、男親の気持ちはわからないだろうな……」: Naoto: “...As a woman, you wouldn't understand a father’s feelings...”
重明\n「いや男の代表みたいに言われても、俺にもわかんねぇよ」: Shigeaki: “Hey, don't talk like you represent all men; I don't get it either.”
尚人\n「そうか？ ……なら想像してみるといい」: Naoto: “Is that so? ...Then try to imagine it.”
尚人\n「お前と華穂くんの娘をだ……それは……さぞ可愛いだろうなぁ」: Naoto: “A daughter between you and Kaho-kun... she’d... be quite cute, I’m sure.”
重明\n「……まぁ当然だな……世界の至宝と呼ばれる存在になるだろうよ」: Shigeaki: “...Well, obviously... she’d be a world treasure.”
尚人\n「そしてその子は、お前が大好きで将来はパパと結婚するなんて言うわけだ」: Naoto: “And that child would love you and say she’s going to marry Papa in the future.”
重明\n「……フッ……悪いな朱美……俺には華穂が居るし、親子は結婚出来ないんだよ: Shigeaki: “...Heh... sorry, Akemi... I have Kaho, and parents and children can't get married.”
尚人\n「そしてその朱美とやらが成長し、桔梗と同じぐらいの歳と美しさになったある: Naoto: “And one day, when that Akemi girl has grown to be about the same age and beauty as Kikyou...”
尚人\n「お前は……自分の自宅の居間で……大切な娘と見知らぬチャラ男がセックスし: Naoto: “You... in the living room of your own home... witness your precious daughter having sex with some random playboy.”
尚人\n「……お前と初めて出会った時のこちらの心境が、大体そんな感じだったと思っ: Naoto: “...Just think of my state of mind when I first met you as being something like that.”
重明\n「ああ、納得した……むしろお前の反応は抑えられていたと言ってやってもいい: Shigeaki: “Ah, I get it now... I’d even say your reaction was restrained.”
撫子\n「……ェェ……今ので納得できるわけ？ ……重明さんって馬鹿なの？」: Nadeshiko: “...Eeeh... you can accept that? ...Are you an idiot, Shigeaki-san?”
重明\n「いやいや、息子ならよくやったと褒めるが可愛い愛娘だぞ？ ……これは男の: Shigeaki: “No, no—if it’s a son, I’d praise him for a job well done, but this is a precious beloved daughter, you know? ...Is there any other choice but a punch to the face?”
撫子\n「はいはい……精々重明さんと華穂さまとの間に娘が生まれないよう、今から祈: Nadeshiko: “Yeah, yeah... I’ll pray right now that a daughter isn't born between Shigeaki-san and Kaho-sama.”
重明\n「そういえば……何で最初から俺に本当の事を言わなかったんだ？」: Shigeaki: “By the way... why didn't you tell me the truth from the start?”
重明\n「例えば自分はもう既に死んでいるとか、この白花荘は過去に燃えたとか……桔: Shigeaki: “Like, that you were already dead, or that Shirahanasou had burned down in the past... or that Kikyou was your daughter and you wanted me to help her.”
尚人\n「まるで面識のない相手に、いきなり【実は私は死んでいて、今居るこの場所は: Naoto: “If someone you’d never met suddenly said to you [Actually, I’m dead, and this place is an illusion, so I want you to take my daughter and leave the inn immediately]... what would you think?”
重明\n「……確実に頭がイカれてると思う……二度と話しかけて欲しくないと、露骨に: Shigeaki: “...I’d definitely think they were insane... I’d probably have avoided you explicitly, not wanting you to talk to me again... for sure.”
尚人\n「そう思われない上で……お前に桔梗へ興味を持たせる必要があった……ここに: Naoto: “Without being thought of like that... I needed to get you interested in Kikyou... because I was worried about what had happened to my real daughter here.”
重明\n「お前自身は桔梗ちゃんと話せなかったのかよ」: Shigeaki: “Could you not talk to Kikyou-chan yourself?”
尚人\n「ああ……どうやらこっちは君と華穂くん以外には認識されていなかったようで: Naoto: “No... it seems I wasn't recognized by anyone other than you and Kaho-kun.”
重明\n「……白花荘がペンションになった時点で、お前は死んでいたからか？」: Shigeaki: “...Was it because you were already dead by the time Shirahanasou became a pension?”
撫子\n「多分、華穂さまは白花荘で死んだ人間達を幻として形にしたけど……私と違っ: Nadeshiko: “Kaho-sama probably gave form to the people who died at Shirahanasou as illusions... but unlike me, she didn't know Naoto was dead, so maybe she got it wrong.”
尚人\n「……本当なら華穂くんに頼みたかったが……最初に会った時は、まだこちらは: Naoto: “...I actually wanted to ask Kaho-kun... but when I first met her, I was still confused by my own situation...”
尚人\n「理解した後は会えず仕舞い……仕方なくお前に桔梗を任せる事にした……とい: Naoto: “By the time I understood, I couldn't meet her anymore... so I had no choice but to leave Kikyou to you... that’s how it was.”
重明\n「……もうちょっと……上手い事説明出来なかったのかよ」: Shigeaki: “...Couldn't you have... explained it a bit better?”
尚人\n「……そうだな……似たような機会があれば……今回の反省を生かす事にしよう: Naoto: “...I suppose... if there’s ever a similar opportunity... I’ll try to learn from this.”
重明\n「そういえば実際の所、お前って撫子の事どう思ってたんだ？」: Shigeaki: “By the way, what did you actually think of Nadeshiko?”
尚人\n「もちろん大切に思っていたが……それがどうかしたか？」: Naoto: “Of course I thought of her as precious... what about it?”
重明\n「いや、お前等が死んだ理由が気持ちの行き違いが原因だって撫子に聞いて……: Shigeaki: “Well, I heard from Nadeshiko that the reason you two died was a misunderstanding... and I figured if the feeling was mutual, maybe there was something that could’ve been done.”
撫子\n「まぁ一番の原因は……私と尚人を取り巻く環境が、男女が恋をするのに適して: Nadeshiko: “Maybe the main reason was... the environment surrounding Naoto and me just wasn't suited for a man and a woman to fall in love?”
重明\n「……奴隷と主人が恋に落ちる……良くある話じゃないか」: Shigeaki: “...A slave and a master falling in love... that’s a common story, isn't it?”
撫子\n「それを夢物語として憧れ目指す人も居れば……産まれた時から日常で、変える: Nadeshiko: “Some people dream of it and aim for it... while others grow up with it as their daily life and don't even realize it can be changed.”
重明\n「童貞捨てたのはいつだ？」: Shigeaki: “When did you lose your virginity?”
撫子\n「……重明さん……この状況でなんつー質問してくれるんですか……」: Nadeshiko: “...Shigeaki-san... what kind of question is that in this situation...?”
重明\n「……いやまぁ……ふと頭に浮かんで……つい……」: Shigeaki: “...Well... it just popped into my head... and...”
撫子\n「子供じゃあるまいし、思った事をすぐ口にしない……それで他に質問はないん: Nadeshiko: “You’re not a kid; don't just say whatever comes to mind... Anyway, no more questions?”
重明\n「……とりあえず、俺の方はこんな感じかな」: Shigeaki: “...That’s about it for me, I guess.”
撫子\n「ちなみに重明さん、桔梗が今後どんな身の振り方をするかって聞いてたりする: Nadeshiko: “By the way, Shigeaki-san, have you heard anything about what Kikyou plans to do from here on out?”
尚人\n「ふむ……では聞かせてもらおうか」: Naoto: “I see... then let’s hear it.”
重明\n「確か……爺さんの仕事の何を引き継ぎ、何をいまの部下に譲り任せるかを話し: Shigeaki: “I think... she was saying something about how she needs to talk to her grandfather and decide what parts of his work to take over and what to leave to the current subordinates...”
重明\n「その上で……父親であるお前のように、売られて来た女を管理する形の商売を: Shigeaki: “On top of that... she said she wanted to start a business managing women who were sold, just like you, her father... saying it was more efficient or something like that...”
桔梗\n「一度落ちた上で、再び這い上がりたいと思う人間はモチベーションが高く……: Kikyou: “People who have fallen once and want to crawl back up have high motivation... and they’ll endure working even if the pay is a bit poor or the job is tough.”
確か……ここ数日の間にした雑談の中で、桔梗がそんな事を言っていた気がする。: I think... during one of our small talks over the past few days, Kikyou had said something like that.
重明\n「他にも……この先の日本はより個人主義になり、子育てが難しくなる……」: Shigeaki: “She also said... Japan is going to become more individualistic from here on out, making it harder to raise children...”
重明\n「……けどそれは別に男性側の問題ではなく、極限まで効率を重視し人材を酷使: Shigeaki: “...But she said that wasn't necessarily a problem on the men’s side, but rather due to a harsh social climate where it’s considered normal to prioritize efficiency to the extreme and overwork people...”
重明\n「そうなるとシングルマザーや共働きで忙しい女性へのサービスが世の中に求め: Shigeaki: “When that happens, there’ll be a demand for services for single mothers and busy women, so she said she wanted to build a facility with a bit of a high-end feel for the moderately wealthy...”
桔梗\n「そして大概そういう場所のお客は……金銭面のトラブルを抱えるケースが多い: Kikyou: “And customers at places like that usually have a lot of financial trouble.”
桔梗\n「はい、子育ては何かと入り用ですし、大切な子供の為と普段より背伸びしよう: Kikyou: “Yes. Raising children is expensive, and people tend to overextend themselves for their precious children...”
桔梗\n「そんな方々の為に……施設と同時に、金貸しや裏の仕事の相談仲介斡旋などの: Kikyou: “For people like that... while providing the facility, I’m thinking of... running services like money lending or brokering and mediating for underground work...”
重明\n「……とまぁこんな感じだったかな」: Shigeaki: “...Well, it was something like that.”
撫子\n「……あの子……どちらかというと自分から前にいかないタイプだったのに……: Nadeshiko: “...That girl... she used to be the type who wouldn't step forward herself... she’s become quite aggressive, hasn't she...”
尚人\n「まぁ我々が居た時は、あえて自分から前に出る必要はなかったからな」: Naoto: “Well, back when we were here, she didn't have a need to step forward herself.”
撫子\n「……そっか……もうあの子の身内は……年老いた祖父しか居ないんだもんね…: Nadeshiko: “...I guess... she doesn't have any relatives left... except her elderly grandfather... She either has to find someone she can rely on for life, or become independent.”
尚人\n「そういう事だな……まぁ桔梗なら大丈夫だろう」: Naoto: “That’s right... well, Kikyou will be fine.”
尚人\n「さてと……聞くべき事は聞いた…………私はそろそろ行くとしよう」: Naoto: “Well then... I’ve heard what I needed to hear............ I’ll be going now.”
尚人\n「重明くん、桔梗のこと今後も気にかけてやってくれ」: Naoto: “Shigeaki-kun, keep helping Kikyou from here on out.”
重明\n「おう……って、お前はまだいいのか？ ……尚人と一緒に消えなくても」: Shigeaki: “Yeah... hey, are you okay staying? ...Not vanishing with Naoto?”
撫子\n「私は、もう少しだけ重明さんの傍に居るよ」: Nadeshiko: “I’ll stay by your side just a little longer, Shigeaki-san.”
撫子\n「私はここで退散するね……カップルの感動の再会に水を差しちゃ悪いし」: Nadeshiko: “I’ll take my leave here... I wouldn't want to ruin a couple’s touching reunion.”
重明\n「別に遠慮するなって……華穂だってお前と会えれば喜ぶだろうし……ついでに: Shigeaki: “Don't be so modest... I’m sure Kaho would be happy to see you too... and I’ll even let you watch us flirting.”
撫子\n「……二人のイチャイチャする所はちょっと見てみたいけど……やっぱやめとく: Nadeshiko: “...I’d kind of like to see you two flirting... but I’ll pass.”
撫子\n「私は華穂さまにとって、もう死んでるから」: Nadeshiko: “Because to Kaho-sama, I’m already dead.”
撫子\n「……重明さんがそうやって何とも思わないのは……生きてる私と出会った事が: Nadeshiko: “...The only reason you can think nothing of it, Shigeaki-san... is because you never met me when I was alive.”
撫子\n「重明さん……もし重明さんの結構仲のいい友達が死んで、その人が目の前に現: Nadeshiko: “Shigeaki-san... what would you think if a pretty close friend of yours died, and then that person showed up in front of you?”
重明\n「…………それは……確かに怖いな」: Shigeaki: “............ That... would certainly be scary.”
撫子\n「うん、しかもそれが自分の力で……コミュニケーションなんてしようものなら: Nadeshiko: “Yeah, and if you have to communicate with them through your own power... that’s a lot of stress, isn't it?”
重明\n「確かにその通りだが……それを言うなら、この幻を忘れでもしない限りストレ: Shigeaki: “I guess you’re right... but if that’s the case, won't it be stressful as long as she remembers this illusion?”
撫子\n「……知らずに流して見て感じるのと存在を理解認識した上で体感するのは、ま: Nadeshiko: “...Feeling something while just letting it flow past you is completely different from experiencing it while understanding and recognizing its existence.”
重明\n「子供の頃は素手でつかめた虫が、大人になったら触れなくなった……みたいな: Shigeaki: “Like how you could grab bugs with your bare hands as a kid, but you can't touch them once you’re an adult?”
撫子\n「しかも外部から来たゲストの重明さんと違って、私は華穂さまの別人格といっ: Nadeshiko: “And unlike you, Shigeaki-san, who came as a guest from the outside, I’m essentially Kaho-sama’s second persona.”
重明\n「……つまり……死んだ友達の姿をした自分と対面って事か……確かにゾッとす: Shigeaki: “...In other words... facing yourself in the form of your dead friend... That certainly is chilling...”
撫子\n「そういう事……だから、私はここで退場させてもらいます」: Nadeshiko: “Exactly... so, I’ll be making my exit here.”
撫子\n「それと……他の人達と違って、私は当分このまま華穂さまの中に居るから」: Nadeshiko: “And... unlike the others, I’ll be staying inside Kaho-sama like this for the time being.”
撫子\n「私は他の人達と違って、重明さんをここに連れてくる為に華穂さまが無意識に: Nadeshiko: “Unlike the others, I’m an existence that Kaho-sama unconsciously created in order to bring you here, Shigeaki-san.”
撫子\n「それとこれは確証があるわけじゃないけど……私が存在する事で華穂さまの力: Nadeshiko: “And I don't have proof, but... my presence might be able to suppress Kaho-sama’s power.”
重明\n「……お前が常時存在する事で、メモリ不足みたいな感じになって……華穂は能: Shigeaki: “...So by you always being there, it’s like a memory shortage... and Kaho won't be able to use her abilities...”
重明\n「わかった……お前が華穂の中に居るって事は、今後念頭に置いておくよ」: Shigeaki: “Got it... I’ll keep in mind that you’re inside Kaho from now on.”
撫子\n「まぁ別人格とはいえ、華穂さまの身体を乗っ取れるわけじゃないし……意識を: Nadeshiko: “Well, even if I’m a second persona, it’s not like I can take over Kaho-sama’s body... or bring my consciousness to the surface.”
撫子\n「……私が出てくるのは、あくまで緊急事態……まぁまず再び会う事はないと思: Nadeshiko: “...I’ll only come out in an emergency... so you can assume we won't be meeting again.”
重明\n「そうか……じゃあ取りあえずのサヨナラって事で」: Shigeaki: “I see... then this is goodbye for now.”
重明\n「ああ、またな撫子……ここまで付き合ってくれてありがとう」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, see you, Nadeshiko... thanks for sticking with me until now.”
意識を失ってからも毎日欠かさず病室に足を運び、寝顔を見ていたというのに……何だか: Even though I’d been coming to her hospital room every single day since she lost consciousness and looking at her sleeping face... it somehow feels like it’s been a long time since I’ve seen her.
再会の喜びでほんのりとした暖かさが胸に広がる中……俺は華穂の身体を、仰向けに押し: With a faint warmth spreading in my chest at the joy of our reunion... I push Kaho’s body down so she’s lying on her back.
重明\n（……好きだ……華穂……お前が……好きだ……）: Shigeaki: (...I love you... Kaho... I... love you...)
自分の中にある華穂への熱い気持ちを込め、俺は彼女の柔らかな唇に唇をしっかりと重ね: With all my passionate feelings for her, I firmly press my lips against her soft ones.
眠っている華穂を目覚めさせる方法は、とりあえず思いつかない。: I can't think of any other way to wake the sleeping Kaho.
だが……特に小難しい事をしなくても、華穂は俺とのキスで目覚めるだろう。: But... I’m sure she’ll wake up with a kiss from me, even without doing anything complicated.
何故なら……俺は今、華穂とキスする事で……とても胸が高鳴っている。: Because... my heart is pounding so hard right now as I kiss her.
華穂が俺と同じぐらい俺の事を好きなら……胸の高鳴りで、寝てなどいられないはず。: If Kaho loves me as much as I love her... she shouldn't be able to stay asleep with her heart racing like this.
……そんな馬鹿っぽく根拠など無いに等しい自分のインスピレーションを信じ……俺はと: ...Trusting my own inspiration, which is as stupid as it is baseless... I continue to kiss Kaho with all my might.
重明\n「病院だよ……お前、車の中で意識を失ったんだ」: Shigeaki: “In the hospital... you lost consciousness inside the car.”
重明\n「まぁその辺の詳しい話は後でしてやるよ……色々ありすぎて、時間がかかりそ: Shigeaki: “Well, I’ll tell you all about that later... Too much has happened; it’s going to take a while.”
重明\n「心配したお前の両親が外で待ってるから、ちょっと呼んでくるよ」: Shigeaki: “Your parents were worried and are waiting outside, so I’ll go call them.”
華穂\n「……わかった……後で詳しく教えてね」: Kaho: “...Okay... tell me everything later, okay?”
廊下へ出て近くに居た華穂の両親に頷いて見せると、二人は軽く驚いた顔のまま俺と入れ: Stepping out into the hallway and nodding to Kaho’s parents who were nearby, the two of them entered the room as if trading places with me, their faces slightly surprised.
感動の再会に昂ぶり、自然といつもより声が大きくなる華穂たち。: Excited by their touching reunion, their voices naturally grew louder.
俺は彼女等の騒ぐ声でクレームが来ないよう、そっと病室のドアを閉める。: I softly closed the door to the room so that no one would complain about the noise.
そして俺は自分を労うように……病院の通路の壁に、自分の背中を寄りかからせた。: And then, as if to reward myself... I leaned my back against the wall of the hospital corridor.
幻の白花荘を見た事件から３ヵ月後……: Three months after the incident where we saw the phantom Shirahana-sou...
……白花荘の近くにある廃校になった校舎を見たい。: ...I wanted to see the abandoned school building near Shirahana-sou.
そんな俺の思い付きを実現するため……俺達は再びあの事件が起きた山へと……足を運ん: To make my whim a reality... we had once again set foot... on the mountain where that incident took place.
重明\n「くそ……中に全然入れなかった……」: Shigeaki: “Dammit... I couldn't get inside at all...”
華穂\n「まぁ普通に考えれば、誰かに勝手に住まれても困るし……当然、鍵は掛けてお: Kaho: “Well, if you think about it normally, it’d be a problem if someone just started living there without permission... Naturally, they’d keep it locked.”
重明\n「お前が止めなきゃよじ登って侵入出来たのに」: Shigeaki: “If you hadn't stopped me, I could've climbed over and broken in.”
華穂\n「犯罪行為は許しません」: Kaho: “I will not allow criminal acts.”
重明\n「……忍び込んだ後、物陰でお前とチュッチュしちゃおうかなぁとか……ぼんや: Shigeaki: “...I was vaguely thinking about sneaking in and then having a little make-out session with you in the shadows... Ah well... what a disappointment.”
華穂\n「……私は、その発言をしたきーくんにガッカリだよ」: Kaho: “...I'm disappointed in Ki-kun for even saying that.”
華穂とゆるい感じの雑談をする中……俺はふと一緒に来たもう一人の事が気になり、軽く: While engaging in this light banter with Kaho... I suddenly grew curious about the other person who came with us and lightly scanned the surroundings.
重明\n「桔梗ちゃん、瓦礫の前にしゃがみこんで……何してるの？」: Shigeaki: “Kikyou-chan, what are you doing... crouching down in front of the rubble?”
桔梗\n「……折角足を運んだので……挨拶しておこうと思いまして」: Kikyou: “...Since we took the trouble to come all this way... I thought I should pay my respects.”
先ほどまで桔梗がしゃがんでいた場所を見ると……地面の燃え落ちた木材の上に線香立て: Looking at the spot where Kikyou had been crouching just moments ago... I saw an incense burner placed atop the charred timber on the ground, with three sticks of incense releasing thin, wispy trails of smoke.
元々は白花荘跡に来る予定はなかったのだが、桔梗は立ち寄ると予測し、事前に道具を用: Originally, we hadn't planned on coming to the ruins of Shirahana-sou, but Kikyou must have predicted we’d stop by and prepared the tools in advance.
華穂\n「……そうだね……きーくん、私達もちょっと挨拶していこうよ」: Kaho: “...You're right... Ki-kun, let's pay our respects for a moment too.”
重明\n「おう、んじゃ俺達の事……軽く報告してやるとしますか」: Shigeaki: “Yeah, then I guess I'll give them a quick report... about us.”
俺と華穂は静かに煙を上げる線香の前にしゃがみこみ……ゆっくりと目を瞑り、そっと手: Kaho and I quietly crouched in front of the rising smoke of the incense... we slowly closed our eyes and softly pressed our hands together in prayer.
白花荘の幻を見た事件から３ヶ月……色々な事があった。: Three months since the incident where we saw the phantom of Shirahana-sou... many things had happened.
一番の騒動は、やはり……俺と華穂の輪に桔梗が入った事だろう。: The biggest uproar was, as expected... Kikyou joining the circle between me and Kaho.
今後とも普通に仲良くするだけなら、当然問題はなかったのだが……: If it were just a matter of being normal friends from now on, there would obviously be no problem...
桔梗が俺との肉体関係を許容して欲しいという発言が、当然だが波乱を呼んだのだ。: But Kikyou’s statement—that she wanted Kaho to tolerate a physical relationship with me—naturally caused a stir.
彼女の言い分としては、あくまで華穂が好きな俺が好きなので、恋人や将来なるであろう: Her argument was that she only loves me because I love Kaho, so she has absolutely no intention of shaking or stealing the position of my lover or the wife I would eventually become.
そもそも若い健康的な男女が親密になれば間違いを起こすのも仕方がない……: To begin with, she argued that if healthy young men and women become intimate, it's only natural for mistakes to happen...
ならば初めから認めてもらえないだろうか？ というものだった。: So, couldn't she just be recognized from the start? That was her proposal.
当然、その横柄ともいえる桔梗の物言いに……華穂が軽くキレかけてしまった。: Naturally, Kaho nearly snapped at Kikyou’s arrogant way of putting things.
荒ぶる寸前の恋人に、俺はまずは冷静になるよう華穂に訴える。: I pleaded with Kaho to stay calm, as she was on the verge of exploding at her lover.
そして……彼女の生い立ちや、人にはそれぞれの考えがある事を考慮すべきだと諭した。: And... I admonished her to consider Kikyou’s upbringing and the fact that everyone has their own way of thinking.
華穂\n『……じゃあ……きーくんは……どう思うの？』: Kaho: “...Then... Ki-kun... what do you think?”
重明\n『……えっと……ぶっちゃけて言ってもいいかな？』: Shigeaki: “...Uh... can I be totally blunt about it?”
華穂\n『怒るけどいいよ』: Kaho: “I’ll be mad, but go ahead.”
重明\n『当然だけど、俺は生涯お前一人を愛し続ける……その事が揺るがない自信はあ: Shigeaki: “Obviously, I’ll keep loving you and only you for the rest of my life... I’m confident that won't ever waver.”
重明\n『……けど……愛とかは関係なしに、桔梗ちゃんみたいな子としてもいいって条: Shigeaki: “...But... regardless of love, the condition that I can do it with a girl like Kikyou-chan... to be blunt, as a man...”
重明\n『……凄い魅力的な条件かなぁ……なんて？』: Shigeaki: “...Is it a pretty attractive condition, maybe...?”
素直な返答で怒りを買い、世間ズレした桔梗から我が身へと逸らす事に成功した結果……: As a result of successfully diverting her anger from the socially eccentric Kikyou to myself with my honest answer... I was, naturally, lightly beaten by Kaho’s hands and feet.
桔梗の提案に、当然のように怒る華穂……: Kaho, who was naturally angry at Kikyou's proposal...
だが、そんな華穂を説得したのは……意外にも華穂の母親だった。: But surprisingly, the one who persuaded Kaho... was her own mother.
【仕事をしっかりやりつつ、性欲の強い夫の相手を毎晩するのは厳しい……ならばいっそ: [It's difficult to handle a husband with a strong sex drive every night while doing your job properly... So wouldn't it be better to just be pragmatic about it?]
【それに手垢のついた見知らぬ売春婦と遊ばれるより、素性の知った愛人の方がまだマシ: [Besides, a mistress whose background you know is better than him playing around with some random, grubby prostitute.]
【それが嫌なら、学校を卒業しても仕事はせず一生家事に専念するか……今すぐ別れて性: [If you hate that, then don't work even after graduating and dedicate your whole life to housework... or break up right now and choose a man with a low sex drive.]
それら意見に加え、自分の父親が過去に２度ほど浮気していたという衝撃の事実を母親に: In addition to those opinions, she was informed by her mother of the shocking fact that her own father had cheated twice in the past...
長期に渡ると思われた愛人事案は、俺の華穂への気持ちが揺れない限り受け入れる形で…: As a result, the mistress issue, which was thought to drag on for a long time, was settled quite easily... in the form of accepting it as long as my feelings for Kaho didn't waver.
華穂\n「うん？ なに？ 急に」: Kaho: “Hmm? What? All of a sudden.”
重明\n「いやさ……付き合って早々……愛人作っちゃって」: Shigeaki: “Well, you know... so soon after we started dating... I went and got a mistress.”
重明\n「うん、今更……一応これも今更だけど、嫌なら今すぐ桔梗ちゃんとの関係を切: Shigeaki: “Yeah, at this late stage... Just in case, and this is also late, but if you hate it, you can cut off my relationship with Kikyou-chan right now, you know?”
華穂\n「……もういいよ……桔梗ちゃん見てても、本気で私からきーくんを奪う気がな: Kaho: “...It’s fine now... Even looking at Kikyou-chan, I can tell she has no intention of seriously stealing Ki-kun from me... and Ki-kun still loves me just the same.”
華穂\n「それに今やってる予備試験を通って、続けて来年の司法試験も受かれば……そ: Kaho: “Besides, if I pass the preliminary exam I’m taking now, and then pass the bar exam next year... I'll start working right away, won't I?”
華穂\n「きっと忙しくなるだろうし、会えない日も増える……そうなっても、桔梗ちゃ: Kaho: “I'll surely get busy, and the days we can't meet will increase... Even if that happens, I can feel at ease if Kikyou-chan is keeping an eye on you.”
重明\n「……常に見張ってなきゃ浮気するって思われてるのが、非常に心外なんだが…: Shigeaki: “...I find it extremely offensive that you think I'll cheat if I'm not being watched constantly...”
華穂\n「……たとえきーくんにその気がなくても……おいしそうだから、飢えた女の人: Kaho: “...Even if Ki-kun has no intention of doing so... you look so delicious that I'm worried hungry women will swarm all over you.”
重明\n「……む、むぅ……それは……なんとも言えないな……」: Shigeaki: “...Mu-muuu... I... I can't really say anything to that...”
華穂\n「そこで美人の桔梗ちゃんが居れば……少しは臆するでしょ？」: Kaho: “So if the beautiful Kikyou-chan is there... they'll be at least a little intimidated, right?”
重明\n「まぁな……お前だけでも凄いのに桔梗ちゃんもってなったら……流石に普通の: Shigeaki: “I guess so... If I have not just you but Kikyou-chan as well... any normal woman would probably hesitate to make a move...”
華穂\n「それでも寄ってくるような女は、きーくん自身が拒む」: Kaho: “Even so, if a woman still approaches, Ki-kun himself will refuse her.”
華穂\n「……いい、きーくん……これからきーくんが目指す探偵業は……熟れた肢体を: Kaho: “...Listen, Ki-kun... the private detective business you're aiming for from now on... has a lot of opportunities to get intimate with housewives who have too much time and ripe bodies on their hands, you know?”
重明\n「……何か凄い偏見だけど……まぁ確かに少なくは……ないだろうな……」: Shigeaki: “...That’s a hell of a prejudice... but well, it’s true there probably won't be... few of them...”
華穂\n「そんな依頼主の人妻に、主人とはご無沙汰で寂しいから一晩だけとか泣きつか: Kaho: “If such a client housewife clings to you, crying that she’s lonely because it’s been a while since she’s been with her husband and asks for just one night... you have to clearly refuse her, okay?”
華穂\n「……桔梗ちゃん……きーくんの事、ちゃんと見張っててね」: Kaho: “...Kikyou-chan... please keep a proper eye on Ki-kun.”
桔梗\n「任せてください……重明さんの仕事場は私のビル内に構えるわけですし、その: Kikyou: “Leave it to me... Shigeaki-san’s workplace will be set up inside my building, and even when I am busy, I will have my subordinates keep an eye on his movements at all times.”
重明\n「……はは……二人とも仲がよろしくて……いい事だ……」: Shigeaki: “...Haha... it’s a good thing that you two get along so well...”
あの事件を経て、俺と華穂はお互い将来のビジョンを明確に意識するようになっていた。: Through that incident, Kaho and I had become clearly conscious of our visions for the future.
既に目標があった桔梗に触発された感じもあるが……やはり決め手となったのは、くす葉: I feel like I was inspired by Kikyou, who already had a goal... but I think the deciding factor was the incident with Kusuha.
現実にああいう不幸な子が居たら……ちゃんと力になってやりたい。: If such an unfortunate child existed in reality... I want to be able to help them properly.
その為に俺は探偵業を選び、華穂は法律家を目指す事となった。: For that reason, I chose the detective business, and Kaho decided to aim for being a legal professional.
