華穂\n「いえいえ……つたない私ときーくんの馴れ初めを、最後まで聞いて頂いて、こ: Kaho: “Not at all... thank you for listening to the clumsy story of how Ki-kun and I met until the very end.”
くす葉\n「ですね……それじゃ華穂さん、私達はここで」: Kusuha: “Right... Well, Kaho-san, we’ll leave you here.”
くす葉\n「って、何故外が夜に！？ 時間軸どこいった！？」: Kusuha: “Wait, why is it night outside all of a sudden?! What happened to the timeline?!”
桔梗\n「くす葉さん、これは番外編なので、細かい事は気にしないで下さい」: Kikyou: “Kusuha-san, this is a bonus chapter. Please don't worry about the minor details.”
くす葉\n「……な、なるほど……では気にせず、奥へと……」: Kusuha: “...I-I see... Then let's ignore it and head further in...”
くす葉\n「いきなりの全裸……とても色っぽいですね、藤子さん」: Kusuha: “Naked right off the bat... you look very seductive, Fujiko-san.”
桔梗\n「母親の裸を見ながら雑談をするというのも、娘としては何だか微妙な気分なの: Kikyou: “As her daughter, it’s a bit of a weird feeling to have a chat while looking at my mother’s naked body, but...”
桔梗\n「けど、よく良く考えたら、裸どころか複数のお客さんと肉団子のようにセック: Kikyou: “But, come to think of it, I’ve seen my mother having sex with multiple guests like a mass of tangled meat many times before... so her being just naked feels like nothing at this point.”
藤子\n「そぉね……折角お風呂場に来たんだし、二人とも裸になったら？」: Touko: “That’s right... Since you’ve come to the bathroom, why don't you both get naked too?”
くす葉\n「い、いやぁ……今回の趣旨は、登場人物の話を聞いて回る事なので……今回: Kusuha: “N-no thanks... The purpose of today is to go around and hear stories from everyone... so I’ll pass this time.”
藤子\n「そう、残念だわ……若い子の裸が見れると思ったのに」: Touko: “I see, that’s a shame... I thought I might get to see some youthful naked bodies.”
くす葉\n「……桔梗さん……藤子さんって、同性もいける口なんですか？」: Kusuha: “...Kikyou-san... is Fujiko-san into women too?”
桔梗\n「お客様のご要望で、何度かしている場面を見た事はありますが……まぁ、単純: Kikyou: “I’ve seen her doing it at guests' requests a few times... but I think she probably just wanted to see some fresh, supple bodies.”
藤子\n「ふふ……女同士に興味があるなら、相手になりましょうか？」: Touko: “Fufu... if you’re interested in woman-on-woman, shall I be your partner?”
藤子\n「そう……少し残念だわ……ふふ……」: Touko: “I see... that’s a bit of a pity... fufu...”
桔梗\n「では趣旨に乗っ取った話題にするとしましょうか」: Kikyou: “Well then, shall we move on to a topic that fits our purpose?”
藤子\n「そう……じゃあ私が話すお題を、そちらから出してもらえるかしら？」: Touko: “Alright... could you give me a topic to talk about, then?”
桔梗\n「そうですね……お母さんは基本的に思考が受身なので、こちらが質問した方が: Kikyou: “Let’s see... Mother is basically a passive thinker, so it’s probably better if we ask questions.”
くす葉\n「そういえば撫子さんって藤子さんの娘さんなんですよね？」: Kusuha: “Come to think of it, Nadeshiko-san is your daughter, right, Fujiko-san?”
くす葉\n「父親って尚人さんじゃないんですよね？ 誰なんです？ 尚人さんのお父さ: Kusuha: “And the father isn't Naoto-san, right? Who was it? Naoto-san's father, maybe?”
桔梗\n「売られた時には既に妊娠していたらしいので、お爺様の娘ではないですね」: Kikyou: “She was apparently already pregnant when she was sold, so she isn't Grandfather's daughter.”
藤子\n「……ええ……親方様の子でないのは間違いないんだけど……」: Touko: “...Yes... it’s certain she isn't the Master's child, but...”
藤子\n「……正直な所、撫子の父親が誰なのかは、私にもよくわからないわ」: Touko: “...To be honest, I don't really know who Nadeshiko's father was myself.”
藤子\n「ここに売られる前は、母が再婚した義父や親戚、そこの息子達に毎日犯されて: Touko: “Before I was sold here, I was being raped every day by the stepfather my mother remarried, and by relatives and their sons... so I really have no idea whose seed actually took...”
桔梗\n「……根雪の幻影に出てくる名無し野郎は、ほんとロクなやつがいないですね…: Kikyou: “...The nameless bastards that appear in Neyuki no Gen'ei really are the lowest of the low... Well, we’ve found out Sister’s roots, so let's move on to the next question.”
くす葉\n「う、うん……では藤子さん、桔梗さんの父親である尚人さんの事はどう思っ: Kusuha: “U-um... then, Fujiko-san, what did you think of Naoto-san, Kikyou-san’s father?”
藤子\n「だってあの人、私に暴力を振るわなかったんだもの」: Touko: “Because he was the only one who didn't use violence against me.”
桔梗\n「……恋愛対象としてはどうだったの？」: Kikyou: “...What about as a romantic interest?”
くす葉\n「……で、では……今までで一番苦労……って苦労だらけか……じゃあペンシ: Kusuha: “...W-well then... What was your greatest hardship—wait, your life was full of hardships... What was the most difficult thing for you in running the pension, Fujiko-san?”
藤子\n「私、ペンションを始めた時は、撫子と尚人さんが死んで頭がおかしくなってい: Touko: “When I started the pension, I’d lost my mind because Nadeshiko and Naoto-san were dead... so I don't remember anything I’d call a hardship...”
藤子\n「少しまともになった後は、お客様の接客は私がしていたけど、大変だったり面: Touko: “Once I became a bit more sane, I handled the guests, but I left all the difficult and tedious things to Kikyou-chan... so, hmm... I don't really remember having a hard time here...”
くす葉\n「そ、そうだったんですか……な、何て言うか……藤子さんって【良妻賢母】: Kusuha: “I-is that so... H-how should I put it... I had this image of you as a ‘good wife and wise mother,’ Fujiko-san... but you’re surprisingly... easy-going, aren't you...”
桔梗\n「まぁ……母がそういう人だったからこそ……普通の人より悲惨だったはずの生: Kikyou: “Well... perhaps it’s precisely because Mother was that kind of person... that she could spend her life, which was far more tragic than most, without resenting anyone... and with a smile.”
桔梗\n「では、そろそろ次に行きましょうか、くす葉さん」: Kikyou: “Well, shall we move on soon, Kusuha-san?”
くす葉\n「そうですね、では藤子さん、お話ありがとうございました」: Kusuha: “Right. Thank you for the talk, Fujiko-san.”
くす葉\n「さてと談話室に来ました……がぁ……」: Kusuha: “Alright, we’re in the Common Room... but...”
くす葉\n「今やってきた私達以外……部屋には誰も居ませんね……どういう事でしょう: Kusuha: “There’s no one else in the room besides us... what’s the deal?”
桔梗\n「どうやらこの部屋での担当は、くす葉さんのようですね」: Kikyou: “It seems Kusuha-san is the one in charge of this room.”
くす葉\n「なるほど……私……私の話……かぁ……う～ん……何を話そうかな……」: Kusuha: “I see... my... my story, huh... Hmm... what should I talk about...”
桔梗\n「では、まず白花荘に来てからの話というのは、どうでしょうか？」: Kikyou: “Well, how about starting with your story after arriving at Shirahana-sou?”
くす葉\n「……ここに来てからの話かぁ……」: Kusuha: “...My story after coming here, huh...”
くす葉\n「まぁあれだね……重明さん華穂さんとの出会いは……私の中では、結構衝撃: Kusuha: “Well, let’s see... Meeting Shigeaki-san and Kaho-san was... quite a shock for me, I guess...”
桔梗\n「あの二人は、ほんと絵になりますからね」: Kikyou: “Those two really do look the part, don't they?”
くす葉\n「……その後も、まさかの人生初混浴で、思いっきり裸見られちゃうわ、抱き: Kusuha: “...After that, I ended up having my first mixed bath, where he saw me totally naked and even carried me in his arms...”
くす葉\n「……ま、間近で……お、オチンチン見せられるわ……もう……ほんと大変で: Kusuha: “...H-he even showed me his... his cock... right up close... it was... really a lot to handle...”
桔梗\n「まぁそれらは華穂さんが作り出した幻の中の話であって……実際は全部一人だ: Kikyou: “But that was all inside the phantom world Kaho-san created... In reality, you were all alone the whole time, weren't you?”
桔梗\n「混浴とも知らず、一人のまま満面の笑みで温泉はいって、夕食も笑顔のまま一: Kikyou: “Not knowing it was a mixed bath, you were just soaking in the hot spring all by yourself with a huge smile, and you were even wolfing down dinner alone with a grin on your face.”
くす葉\n「……一人で旅行したの初めてだったから……白花荘に来させられた本当の理: Kusuha: “...It was my first time traveling alone... so until I found out the real reason I was brought to Shirahana-sou... I was actually having quite a bit of fun, even by myself...”
桔梗\n「経営側としてではなく、個人的にはくす葉さんの境遇には同情してます」: Kikyou: “Not as someone on the management side, but personally, I do sympathize with your situation, Kusuha-san.”
桔梗\n「では白花荘の話題は置いておいて……卒業した学校での生活はどうだったんで: Kikyou: “Well, putting the topic of Shirahana-sou aside... how was your life at the school you graduated from?”
くす葉\n「うん？ 学校？ ……う～ん……学校通ってた時は……結構普通……だった: Kusuha: “Hmm? School? ...Hmm... when I was in school... it was pretty normal, I guess...”
桔梗\n「私は本の中に出てくるお話の中の学校しかしらないので……その普通というの: Kikyou: “I only know about school from stories in books... so I can't really relate to that 'normal'... but was it co-ed?”
桔梗\n「性欲の溢れた若い男女が押し込められた空間……やはり教室内の風紀は、かな: Kikyou: “A space where young men and women overflowing with sexual desire are packed together... I suppose the public morals inside the classroom were quite degraded, then?”
桔梗\n「冗談です……けど青春時代を異性と共に過ごしたというのに、何でくす葉さん: Kikyou: “Just kidding... But even though you spent your youth with the opposite sex, why didn't you ever get a boyfriend, Kusuha-san?”
くす葉\n「いやぁ……一応私だって……告白とかされましたよ？」: Kusuha: “Well... I mean, I did get... confessions and stuff, you know?”
くす葉\n「……う～ん……何というか……恥ずかしい……ってより……単純に嫌だった: Kusuha: “...Hmm... how should I put it... rather than being embarrassed... I guess I just simply... didn't want to?”
桔梗\n「告白してきた相手の男性が嫌いだったんですか？」: Kikyou: “Did you dislike the guys who confessed to you?”
くす葉\n「ううん、もちろん友達としてはいいんだけど……恋人になるって事は、やっ: Kusuha: “No, of course they were fine as friends, but becoming lovers means you’re always together, right?”
くす葉\n「私って外では結構、気ぃ遣い～な人なんだよね……友達や先生なんかと居る: Kusuha: “I’m the kind of person who’s always considerate of others when I’m out... Like, when I’m with friends or teachers, I usually end up playing the role of the leader? Something like that?”
桔梗\n「プライベートは気を緩めたいのに、告白してくる異性は気を張っている時のく: Kikyou: “You want to relax when you’re in private, but the men who confess to you like the Kusuha-san they see when you’re being all tense and professional... and that’s why you didn't want it.”
くす葉\n「そそ……それにさ、クラスとかグループの雰囲気ってあるでしょ？」: Kusuha: “Exactly... and also, classes and groups have their own atmosphere, right?”
くす葉\n「そういうのを纏めてる立場の人間が、彼氏とイチャイチャしてたら……場の: Kusuha: “If the person in the position of keeping all that together is all lovey-dovey with a boyfriend... it would totally ruin the mood, wouldn't it?”
桔梗\n「それは気を遣いすぎだと思いますが」: Kikyou: “I think that’s being a bit too considerate.”
くす葉\n「そうなんだけどさ～……わかってはいても……そっちを優先しちゃうんだよ: Kusuha: “I know, but... even though I realize that... I just end up prioritizing the other thing, you know?”
桔梗\n「ようは面倒くさい女だと」: Kikyou: “In short, you’re a high-maintenance woman.”
くす葉\n「そういう桔梗さんはどうなんですか……ああ、この人いいなって思う出会い: Kusuha: “And what about you, Kikyou-san... haven't you ever had a meeting where you thought, 'Oh, this person is nice'?”
くす葉\n「うは……重明さんには華穂さんという相手が居るというのに、ズバッと言い: Kusuha: “Whoa... even though Shigeaki-san already has a partner like Kaho-san, you say it so bluntly...”
桔梗\n「他が父と祖父とその関係の男性しか居なかったという理由もありますが……」: Kikyou: “Part of the reason is that there were no other men besides Father, Grandfather, and men related to them, but...”
桔梗\n「くす葉さん同様……私にとっての重明さんとの出会いは、中々に刺激的でした: Kikyou: “Just like for you, Kusuha-san... meeting Shigeaki-san was quite stimulating for me.”
くす葉\n「ほうほう……では更にお聞きしますが……桔梗さんにとって、重明さんはど: Kusuha: “I see, I see... Then let me ask further... what kind of person is Shigeaki-san to you, Kikyou-san?”
桔梗\n「女性がホストにハマるようなものでしょうか……仕事で疲れた時に、重明さん: Kikyou: “I suppose it’s like how women get obsessed with host clubs... When I’m tired from work and Shigeaki-san embraces me gently and intensely... it is... very comforting.”
桔梗\n「でもあの人は結構濃いので、常に傍に居て欲しいとは思いませんね……いつも: Kikyou: “But he’s quite intense, so I don't want him by my side all the time... It's like, rather than a dog you have to take for a walk every day, I prefer a cat you can play with when you feel like it.”
くす葉\n「……何て言うか……桔梗さんにとっての重明さんって、かなり都合のいい男: Kusuha: “...How should I put it... Shigeaki-san is a very convenient man for you, isn't he, Kikyou-san...”
桔梗\n「華穂さんにとって、私もそれなりに都合がいいみたいですよ……重明さんが私: Kikyou: “Apparently, I’m quite convenient for Kaho-san too... as a watchdog, so to speak, for when Shigeaki-san interacts with women other than us.”
桔梗\n「なんだか途中から私の話になってしまいましたね」: Kikyou: “Somehow we ended up talking about me halfway through.”
桔梗\n「特になければ次、いきますか」: Kikyou: “If there's nothing else, shall we move on?”
くす葉\n「はい、では撤収撤収～」: Kusuha: “Yes, let's wrap it up and go!”
桔梗\n「……確かに陰鬱過ぎですね……変えましょうか」: Kikyou: “...It certainly is too gloomy... Shall we change it?”
撫子\n「……ふぅ……私のバックが暗いのは、本編だけで十分だっつーの」: Nadeshiko: “...Sigh... my background was dark enough in the main story.”
くす葉\n「……ゲーム中のＢＧＭって、演者の気分で変えられるもんなんだ……」: Kusuha: “...So you can change the BGM in a game depending on the mood of the actors...”
撫子\n「オマケなんだし、細かい事は気にしない気にしない……久しぶりだね、妹……: Nadeshiko: “It’s a bonus chapter, don't sweat the small stuff... Long time no see, little sister... were you doing well?”
桔梗\n「お久しぶりです、姉さん……まぁボチボチと言った所じゃないでしょうか」: Kikyou: “Long time no see, Sister... I suppose I’ve been doing okay.”
くす葉\n「……何だか撫子さん、本編とかなり印象が違いますね……なんというか……: Kusuha: “...Somehow Nadeshiko-san gives off a totally different impression than in the main game... like... in the past arc in the main story, I thought she was more of the frail type...”
桔梗\n「姉さんは相手に合わせて、こうやって態度を変えてるから」: Kikyou: “Sister changes her attitude like this depending on who she’s talking to.”
撫子\n「そそ、今は妹を前にした姉の撫子、過去のしがらみから解放されたＶＥＲって: Nadeshiko: “Exactly. Right now I’m the big sister Nadeshiko in front of her little sister, the version that’s been released from the past.”
撫子\n「こうして相手の都合のいいように自分を演じられないとね、こわいお客様に【: Nadeshiko: “If you can't act the part the way the other person wants, you’ll get hit by scary guests who say things like, ‘Who the hell do you think you are for a slave?’ ...Well, as long as Naoto was there, I was fine.”
桔梗\n「本家に比べたら、白花荘に来ていたお客様はまだ紳士的でしたね……明らかに: Kikyou: “Compared to the main house, the guests who came to Shirahana-sou were still gentlemanly... There were no people who were clearly taking dangerous drugs, at least.”
くす葉\n「はは……何だろ……私も結構酷い目にあってるのに……二人の話を聞いてい: Kusuha: “Haha... what should I say... even though I went through some pretty bad things too... listening to you two, I feel like I had it much better compared to Nadeshiko-san.”
撫子\n「それはないんじゃない？ だって私には尚人が居たし」: Nadeshiko: “I don't think so. After all, I had Naoto.”
撫子\n「当時は【べ、別にアンタの事なんか好きじゃないんだからね！】とか思い込ん: Nadeshiko: “Back then I kept telling myself, ‘It’s not like I like you or anything!’ but Naoto cherished me like a jewel... Don't you think that’s totally different?”
くす葉\n「……何だろ……華穂さんの惚気話を聞いても、全然イライラしないのに……: Kusuha: “...How should I put it... I don't feel annoyed at all when I hear Kaho-san’s bragging about her love life... but hearing Nadeshiko-san’s bragging feels slightly irritating... I wonder why...”
撫子\n「そうなんだよね～……こっちは全然そんな気はないんだけど……私って何故か: Nadeshiko: “I know what you mean... I don't mean it that way at all, but apparently I tend to draw hate from people for some reason.”
撫子\n「……だから私は母親どころか愛する尚人にすら、常に自分を隠してきたわけ…: Nadeshiko: “...That’s why I was always hiding my true self even from the mother, and even from my beloved Naoto... to avoid unnecessary conflict.”
桔梗\n「けど、姉さんの場合……そうやって無理やりに自分を隠していたから、ストレ: Kikyou: “But, Sister, in your case... precisely because you were forcing yourself to hide your true self, your stress just kept building up until it... exploded, didn't it?”
撫子\n「ま～ね……まさに自業自得ってやつ？」: Nadeshiko: “I guess... exactly what I deserved, right?”
くす葉\n「……つまり撫子さんは……自分が死んでしまった事について、悔いる事はな: Kusuha: “...So you mean, Nadeshiko-san... you didn't regret the fact that you died...?”
撫子\n「死ぬ直前はそりゃ悔いてたけど、死んじゃえばもう関係ないっしょ」: Nadeshiko: “Right before I died, I regretted it, of course, but once you’re dead it doesn't matter anymore, right?”
くす葉\n「……まぁ……そう言われればそうなんですけど……私はやっぱ……あれがし: Kusuha: “...Well... when you put it like that, I guess so... but I’d still feel... if I thought about wanting to do this or that... I think I’d regret it...”
撫子\n「多分くす葉ちゃんの考えの方が普通なんじゃない？ ……まぁその辺は、人そ: Nadeshiko: “Probably Kusuha-chan’s way of thinking is more normal. ...Well, everyone’s different, I guess.”
桔梗\n「一通り雑談が終わった所で、姉さん、今回の趣旨なんだけど」: Kikyou: “Now that we’ve finished our chat, Sister, about today’s purpose.”
撫子\n「ああ、うん……自分語りだっけ？ 何かもう少し話しちゃってるけど」: Nadeshiko: “Oh, yeah... talking about myself? I feel like I’ve already talked quite a bit, though.”
くす葉\n「一応最初の手はず的には、こちらから【撫子さんお話聞かせてください】っ: Kusuha: “According to the original plan, we were supposed to start with ‘Nadeshiko-san, please tell us your story,’ but the flow is already all messed up.”
くす葉\n「……撫子さんだけですよ……こちらが何か言う前から勝手に喋ったのは……: Kusuha: “...Nadeshiko-san is the only one who just started talking on her own before we could say anything...”
撫子\n「ほら、私一応、姉ポジだから……年下相手だと、仕切らないと……みたいな？: Nadeshiko: “Well, I am in the big sister position... so I felt like I had to take charge with younger ones... something like that?”
桔梗\n「あらゆる部分が私より小さいけど」: Kikyou: “Even though you’re smaller than me in every other way.”
撫子\n「……むぅ……半分は同じ遺伝子なのに……どうしてこうも体格に差が出るかな: Nadeshiko: “...Hmph... even though we share half the same genes... why is there such a difference in our builds...?”
くす葉\n「確かに……お二人の身長差は１６ｃｍでしたよね……体重も３５ｋｇほどだ: Kusuha: “True... the height difference between you two is 16 cm, isn't it... and your weight is about 35 kg apart too.”
桔梗\n「……まさに大きいのは態度だけ」: Kikyou: “...The only thing big about her is her attitude.”
くす葉\n「こ、こほん……そういえば撫子さんは……漫画や小説が趣味だと聞きました: Kusuha: “K-kohm... come to think of it, Nadeshiko-san... I heard your hobby is manga and novels.”
撫子\n「うん、そうそう……関係ないけど、くす葉ちゃんって案外ＭＣ上手いね」: Nadeshiko: “Yeah, that’s right... unrelated, but you’re surprisingly good at being an MC, Kusuha-chan.”
くす葉\n「ど、どうも……それで、その漫画や小説はどういった感じのモノが好きなん: Kusuha: “T-thanks... So, what kind of manga and novels do you like?”
桔梗\n「主人公の女の子が、美少年または美少女にチヤホヤされる話」: Kikyou: “Stories where the female protagonist is doted on by beautiful boys or beautiful girls.”
撫子\n「……いや……まぁ……そうなんだけど……」: Nadeshiko: “...Well... I mean... that’s true, but...”
桔梗\n「あとは仕事の資料とかいいつつ、趣味丸出しのエロいヤツ」: Kikyou: “And also the lewd ones that you claim are reference materials for work but are actually just for your own hobby.”
撫子\n「そこの妹、姉を辱めるな」: Nadeshiko: “Little sister over there, stop humiliating your big sister.”
くす葉\n「……はは……お二人は……とても仲がいいんですね……」: Kusuha: “...Haha... the two of you... really do get along well...”
桔梗\n「まぁそうですね……二人きりで長い間話した事はありませんが……相性は悪く: Kikyou: “Well, I guess so... We haven't talked for long just the two of us, but I don't think we’re incompatible.”
撫子\n「本家では私は下賎な存在だったからね……跡取り息子の娘と関わるのは、あま: Nadeshiko: “In the main house, I was a lowly existence. It wasn't considered good for me to interact with the daughter of the heir.”
桔梗\n「……跡取り息子の娘とはいえ……私もお父さんと姉さんが死ぬまでは、表に出: Kikyou: “...Even though I was the daughter of the heir... I was in a position like a hidden child who couldn't come out into the open until Father and Sister died.”
撫子\n「でも桔梗は、まったく知らない大人から、出会って直ぐ無言で全力ビンタされ: Nadeshiko: “But you never had a total stranger adult come up and slap you with all their might without saying a word the moment they met you, did you, Kikyou?”
桔梗\n「うん、姉さんと違って暴力を振るわれた事はないかな」: Kikyou: “No, unlike you, Sister, I’ve never had violence used against me.”
くす葉\n「……お二人の過去話って……ほんと衝撃的ですよね……」: Kusuha: “...The stories of both your pasts... are really shocking...”
撫子\n「とは言っても、大抵私の傍には尚人が居たから……日常的に暴力を振るわれて: Nadeshiko: “Having said that, Naoto was usually by my side... so I wasn't being subjected to violence on a daily basis, though.”
くす葉\n「では、仮にもし二人して階段から転落死しなかったら……その後の人生は、: Kusuha: “Well, if by any chance the two of you hadn't died from falling down the stairs... how do you think your lives would have turned out after that?”
撫子\n「……う～ん……あそこで死んでなかったら……か……」: Nadeshiko: “...Hmm... if we hadn't died there... huh...”
撫子\n「まぁ間違いなく親方様の命令で、尚人はどこかの権力者の娘と結婚させられた: Nadeshiko: “Well, there’s no doubt that by Grandfather's order, Naoto would have been forced to marry the daughter of some powerful person... and then he would have become distant from me... something like that, don't you think?”
くす葉\n「……二人でその親方様から逃げる……みたいな選択肢はないんですか？」: Kusuha: “...Wasn't there an option for the two of you to run away from that Grandfather person?”
撫子\n「尚人は回りを気にせず己を貫き通すヤツだけど、馬鹿みたいに義理堅い所があ: Nadeshiko: “Naoto is the type who follows his own path regardless of what others think, but he’s also foolishly dutiful... he wouldn't do something like betray his own father's expectations.”
くす葉\n「好きな人より……親を優先すると……」: Kusuha: “So he’d prioritize his parent... over the person he loves...”
撫子\n「まーけど……親方様が死んで、結婚相手への義理をある程度果たしたら……」: Nadeshiko: “Well, but... after Grandfather died and he’d fulfilled his duty to his marriage partner to some extent...”
撫子\n「全てを捨てて……私を迎えに来てくれるんじゃないかな」: Nadeshiko: “I think he would have thrown everything away... and come to get me.”
桔梗\n「……そんなに上手くいくかな？」: Kikyou: “...I wonder if things would really go that well?”
撫子\n「さぁ？ ……人生何が起こるかなんて、神様以外誰にもわからないし」: Nadeshiko: “Who knows? ...No one but God knows what will happen in life.”
撫子\n「けど、確かに他の人に比べたら短い一生だったけど……」: Nadeshiko: “But, even though it was a short life compared to other people, certainly...”
撫子\n「尚人の物として生を受け、その人を好きになって、愛する人と共に死ねたと思: Nadeshiko: “If I think about being born as Naoto's property, falling in love with him, and being able to die together with the one I love... I don't think it was such a bad life... that’s what I believe.”
桔梗\n「……では話がいい感じに纏まった的な空気になった所で……そろそろ終わって: Kikyou: “...Well, now that the mood has settled nicely... shall we wrap it up?”
撫子\n「ほいほい……じゃあ幸せになってね、桔梗」: Nadeshiko: “Sure, sure... well, be happy, Kikyou.”
くす葉\n「え！？ 病院通路！？ ……白花荘の廊下とかじゃなくて！？ ……てか効: Kusuha: “What?! A hospital corridor?! ...Not the hallway of Shirahana-sou?! ...And I heard the sound of a door opening with a click... what just opened?!”
桔梗\n「落ち着いてくださいくす葉さん……ここは白花荘が火事になった後、１年ほど: Kikyou: “Calm down, Kusuha-san... this is the hospital where I slept for about a year after Shirahana-sou caught fire.”
くす葉\n「ああ……ようするに、ここでのお題は桔梗さんという事ですか」: Kusuha: “Ah... so in other words, the topic here is you, Kikyou-san.”
くす葉\n「では桔梗さんのエピソードで気になる点という事で……不肖松原くす葉、質: Kusuha: “Then, regarding points I’m curious about in your episode... I, Matsubara Kusuha, shall humbly ask a question.”
くす葉\n「事件の後って重明さん華穂さん桔梗さんの３人で行動していたじゃないです: Kusuha: “After the incident, Shigeaki-san, Kaho-san, and you were acting together, right? By any chance, are you all living together?”
桔梗\n「そうですよ、３人で一緒に駅近くのビルに住んでます」: Kikyou: “That’s right, the three of us live together in a building near the station.”
桔梗\n「一階が働く女の人の為の保育所、二階には“表向き”は普通の金融業、三階は: Kikyou: “The first floor is a daycare center for working women, the second floor is 'officially' a normal financial business, the third floor is a detective and law office, and the fourth floor and above is our residence.”
くす葉\n「……保育所の上の階が金貸しで、その上が探偵法律事務所って……何て言う: Kusuha: “...A moneylender on the floor above a daycare center, and a detective and law office above that... that’s quite a ruthless setup, isn't it...”
桔梗\n「今後はますます女性が働きに出て社会が大きく変容し、新しい変化によって生: Kikyou: “If you consider that in the future women will increasingly go out to work and society will undergo major changes, and the various problems arising from those new changes will increase... I think it's a reasonable combination.”
くす葉\n「……需要があっても、あえて同じビルに押し込む必要性はあるのかって疑問: Kusuha: “...Even if there’s a demand, I still have doubts about the necessity of packing them all into the same building...”
桔梗\n「……確かに隣のビルも私の物ですが……それぞれの事務所が別棟だと、私の移: Kikyou: “...True, the building next door is also mine... but if each office were in a separate building, it would be a hassle for me to move around, wouldn't it?”
桔梗\n「とりあえず今の所、ビル内にある事業についてどうこう言われた事はないので: Kikyou: “Anyway, so far, no one has said anything about the businesses in the building, so I don't think there are any problems in that regard, but...”
桔梗\n「はい……最近うちの保育所に子供を預けたまま、親が行方をくらますという事: Kikyou: “Yes... lately there have been several cases where parents have disappeared after leaving their children at our daycare center...”
桔梗\n「もういっそ今住んでいる所の近くに児童擁護施設を作って、ついでに老人ホー: Kikyou: “I’m actually considering building a child welfare facility near where we live now, and maybe a nursing home and a small hospital along with it.”
くす葉\n「同じビルには探偵事務所がありますし、重明さんに依頼して、子供を置いて: Kusuha: “There’s a detective agency in the same building, so couldn't you just ask Shigeaki-san to find the parents who disappeared after leaving their children?”
桔梗\n「……どんな理由であれ……保育所に子供を捨ててしまえるような親元で暮らし: Kikyou: “...No matter the reason... a child will not be happy living with parents who are capable of abandoning them at a daycare center.”
桔梗\n「もちろんその子供が自立出来るほど大きくなってから、自分を捨てた親に会い: Kikyou: “Of course, if the child says they want to meet the parents who abandoned them after they’ve grown up enough to be independent... I won't stop them then.”
くす葉\n「でも捨てられた子供を助けるだなんて……桔梗さんって、実は凄いいい人？: Kusuha: “But helping abandoned children... are you actually a really good person, Kikyou-san?”
桔梗\n「養護施設出身者というレッテルは、何だかんだといって就職する時に不利にな: Kikyou: “The label of being from a welfare facility is, after all, a disadvantage when it comes to finding a job.”
くす葉\n「……うん、悲しいけど……そうみたいだね」: Kusuha: “...Yeah, it’s sad... but it seems so.”
桔梗\n「つまり小さい頃から恩を売り、きっちり教育しておけば……将来高確率で、信: Kikyou: “In other words, I’m calculating that if I do them a favor from a young age and educate them properly... there’s a high probability they will become reliable pawns in the future.”
くす葉\n「……ああ……捨てられた子供を引き取るからって、別に一点の曇りもない善: Kusuha: “...Ah... so you taking in abandoned children isn't out of pure, selfless goodwill...”
桔梗\n「当然です……社会貢献とかボランティアなんて気持ちは、微塵もありません」: Kikyou: “Of course not... I don't have a shred of desire for social contribution or volunteering.”
くす葉\n「何だろ……その流れでどんどんいくと……桔梗さんの住んでいるビルの近隣: Kusuha: “Somehow... if you keep going like that, it feels like the whole neighborhood around your building is going to end up under your influence, Kikyou-san.”
桔梗\n「その方が効率がよく近隣一帯の住民がそれを望むのであれば、可能性はないと: Kikyou: “If that’s more efficient and the residents of the neighborhood desire it, I can't say it’s impossible... Though for now I have no intention of wanting to do that myself.”
くす葉\n「ほんと桔梗さんって、主人に仕えるメイド服が凄く似合ってるのに……頭の: Kusuha: “Kikyou-san, you really look the part in that maid outfit serving a master... but inside your head you’re a natural-born ruler, aren't you.”
桔梗\n「……一応言っておきますが……白花荘を出てからは、このメイド服を着て仕事: Kikyou: “...Just so you know... I haven't been wearing this maid outfit for work since leaving Shirahana-sou, you know?”
くす葉\n「ああ、そうなんですか……やっぱりスーツとかですか？」: Kusuha: “Oh, really... so you wear a suit or something?”
桔梗\n「いえ、自宅と同じで和服ですね」: Kikyou: “No, just like at home, I wear traditional Japanese clothing.”
くす葉\n「……わ、和服が仕事着……それはまた随分と……カッコイイですね……」: Kusuha: “Japanese clothing for work... that’s quite... cool, isn't it...”
桔梗\n「仕事がらヤク●っぽいと、よく言われます」: Kikyou: “People often say I look like a member of the Yaku-something because of my work.”
くす葉\n「あははは……何か深く突っ込むとヤバイ感じなので、そこはノーコメント！: Kusuha: “Ahahaha... it feels like it would be dangerous to dig any deeper, so I’ll leave that one alone!”
桔梗\n「では、ここらで次の場所へと、行きましょうか」: Kikyou: “Well then, shall we move on to the next place?”
くす葉\n「はい、では次の場所へと移動しまーす！」: Kusuha: “Yes, moving on to the next place!”
桔梗\n「……どうやら本日の催し物は、これで終わりみたいですね」: Kikyou: “...It seems today’s festivities end here.”
くす葉\n「ですね……じゃあ、行きましょうか」: Kusuha: “I guess... well, shall we go?”
桔梗\n「これにて根雪の幻影～白花荘の人々～は、幕引きとさせていただきます」: Kikyou: “With this, Neyuki no Gen'ei ~The People of Shirahana-sou~ comes to a close.”
くす葉\n「最後の最後まで、この物語にお付き合いしてくださった方々、本当にありが: Kusuha: “To everyone who stayed with this story until the very end, thank you very much.”
